Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, you say that the Kalki avatar has already been born. I also came to know from the Malika about 256 devotees. I want to know, is this news true? And can we find or identify these 256 devotees?
Answer: Look, in the Bhavishya Malika, the Mahapurush Pancha Sakha wrote that when the branch of the Kalpavata (wish-fulfilling banyan tree) breaks and the flag from the Neel Chakra flies off repeatedly, at that time, Lord Kalki will be 11 years old. In March 2018, the branch of the Kalpavata inside the Shri Jagannath temple broke. This proves that Lord Kalki's incarnation has already happened. That's the answer to your first question. For the second question about the 256 devotees, they are the Nitya Pancha Sakha, who will remind people about Lord Kalki. Among them are the five Pandavas, who have already taken birth on Earth in human bodies. They are born as ordinary humans and their true potential will not be revealed until they meet Lord Kalki. Along with the twelve Gopals, who are parts of the Lord, and the five Pandavas, the 256 devotees have also arrived on Earth. They are born in India and other parts of the world. Regarding your question if we can meet or identify them, I must tell you that God has not given us the authority to identify them. God himself will do the identification. The Malika says that all these devotees from all over India and the world will gather at Khandagiri in Odisha, the Lord's place of residence. There, they will all see the child form of the Lord, Bal Govind, and their lives will be blessed. After seeing Vishnu, the divine Vaishnav power will manifest in their bodies, and they will go on to work for the establishment of Dharma in the world. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Prabhu ji, tell me one thing, has Radha Rani ji taken birth?
Answer: Radha is the stream of love and devotion. Mother Radha Rani is in the heart of every devotee. The power of Radha Rani, which is half of the Lord's power, the Vaishnav shakti, the Lord's Yogamaya shakti, was in penance in her Vaishnavi form and has already met with Lord Kalki. Radha Rani has taken birth in a human body in the holy Jagannath Kshetra of Odisha, within the Panchkosi area, in the house of one of the temple's servitors. However, it is not right for us to reveal her identity, because she should remain hidden. Only the Lord has the right to speak about her and bring her before society. The Malika has written about this in detail, including her name. She has been born from the Vaishno Devi shakti in the sacred land of Puri, Jagannath Kshetra. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: I read in the Malika that eight goddesses have been tasked with protecting the devotees. But the numbers mentioned are very small, like 5,000, 2,000, 7,000. So how will the rest of the devotees be protected? The numbers add up to less than 50,000, but there are many more devotees than that.
Answer: What you've said is correct. The number of devotees involved in the program to establish Satyayuga is around 70,000 to 80,000. In total, across India and the world, there will be 33 crore devotees, who are gods and goddesses born in human bodies, and another 31 crore human devotees. The total population of the world will be 64 crore. The responsibility given to the goddesses for establishing Dharma, specifically the Ashta Chandi and Ashta Durga (the eight forms of Yogamaya like Kali, Durga, Varahi, etc.), is to directly appear to those 70,000 special devotees and engage them in the Lord's work. The remaining devotees will also be saved, but they will have to endure many hardships before they finally reach the Lord. They will not be directly involved in the administrative work of establishing Dharma in the new age. The goddesses will protect these special devotees and bring them to the Lord's refuge. This will happen both secretly and openly. For instance, you might find yourself in a situation where death seems certain, but at that moment, someone will come and save you. Then you will realize who saved you. The Malika says that the divine feminine powers will go from village to village to establish Dharma, and this is happening even today. The other devotees will be saved, but only after facing a lot of trouble will they reach the Lord. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: I am a devotee of Ananta Madhav ji and I want to become like Meera ji. So please tell me, will Meera ji also be reborn?
Answer: That's a very good question. We see Meera ji as a form of Radha. The Mother has many forms, and so does the Lord. Meera ji's body merged into the Lord's. Your desire to be like Meera is wonderful. Through Meera, the Lord proved that a devotee is greater than God. A devotee like Shabari is in no way different or less pure than Meera; think of how many ages she waited. If you have that motherly power and devotion, and you surrender to the Lord, you too can become Meera, you can become Radha. This human birth is a chance where one can become Dhruva, Prahlada, Narada, or Indra. We must make this sacred human body so pure by immersing ourselves in the ocean of the Lord's love and bliss that you can emerge as a devotee even greater than Meera Bai. But only God knows the extent of your faith and power. God fulfills such desires of the heart. So, remain in the Lord's refuge. Read the Srimad Bhagavatam daily and constantly chant the Lord's name. A true devotee is not concerned with what is happening in society. Their connection is only with the Brahman (the ultimate reality) and the Atman (the soul). Meditate with such focus. I respect your devotion and pray that God gives you the strength to fulfill your desire. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: As you said, Kali Yuga has ended. However, according to our Vedas and scriptures, the age of Kali Yuga is said to be 432,000 years. Please shed some light on this.
Answer: Tulsidas ji wrote about Kali Yuga, 'The path is whatever one fancies, and a scholar is one who just talks big.' This means that the saints and sages who are supposed to guide the world will mislead people with false and wrong paths. And what is happening in the world today? Analyze it yourself. Tulsidas ji also wrote that those who are supposed to impart culture to the world will preach for their own livelihood and speak falsehoods. They will stick to the 432,000-year figure and say Kali Yuga has not ended. Because if Kali Yuga ends, their livelihood, the money, the respect they are getting—where will all that go? When the Lord comes, the devotees will get their rights, and who will respect them then? So, the guides of Kali Yuga will speak lies. Tulsidas also wrote, 'One who is full of falsehood and arrogance, everyone considers him a saint.' This is why the Malika was written. This is why Lord Kalki took birth in the sacred land of Odisha. The scriptures say otherwise. Garg Muni wrote in the Garg Samhita that after 4,000 years, plus a 'sandhya' (transitional period) of 400 years, making it 4,800 years, Kali Yuga will end, and Sri Nath (Lord Krishna) will descend on Earth. Is this false? It is not. Furthermore, the Pancha Sakha Malika, written by Mahapurush Achyutananda, states that after 5,000 years, Lord Jagannath will leave his wooden form and take a human body. I am quoting the Malika. If people don't follow this, what will happen in the course of time? You who are in this satsang will surely witness it. Kali Yuga has ended. It has been 5,124 years. The time for establishing Dharma has come, and its first phase is ongoing. Everything will be proven between 2029 and 2031. Just hold on to Dharma. Make Lord Kalki your guru; He will guide you. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, someone is saying that the Kali demon is yet to be born. I saw a video today where they were saying that the Kali demon has just been born in human form. They say Lord Kalki's incarnation hasn't happened yet, but the Kali demon's has.
Answer: Again, 'A scholar is one who just talks big.' These spiritual guides speak incorrectly. They have no connection with the Malika. The demon Kali was given five places to reside: gold, women, gambling, land, and sin. The Kali demon has many forms; he will never be born as a single human. In this age, there are crores of Kali demons, crores of Ravanas, crores of Kamsas. The 'Mlecchas' are those who are always immersed in these five things: women, land, wealth, violence, and sin. They are the Mlecchas, and they will be destroyed. A separate Kali demon will not be born. I don't know where people get these ideas. No scripture ever says this. The Srimad Bhagavatam says that at the end of Kali Yuga, when rulers become like dacoits, plundering the people, Lord Kalki, son of Vishnu Yash, will appear as the lord of the universe to destroy these demon-like kings and rulers. It never says a single Kali demon will come whom he will destroy. This is a confusing path created by people who have become saints for their livelihood. There is nothing like this in our Hindu Sanatana Dharma. The Lord will come to destroy the Mlecchas. Out of 800 crore people in the world, only 64 crore will remain. All those who perish are Mlecchas, who embody the form of Kali by holding onto those five things. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Where is it? Is it near Bhubaneswar, Odisha? What is this place Chhatia where there is something related to Vishnu ji's Kalki avatar? I asked someone, and they told me it's in Chhatia village. When I said I wanted to go there for the darshan of Kalki ji, they told me it's not good or auspicious to go there. Why is that?
Answer: Listen, mother. First, the Malika has written a lot about Chhatia, but Chhatia is not the birthplace of Lord Kalki. Lord Kalki's birthplace is in the Biraja Kshetra, on the banks of the Baitarani Ganga, which is the center of the universe where Brahma first performed a yagna. That is where Lord Kalki will be born in a human body. Second, not everyone can have the darshan (holy sight) of the Lord just by wishing for it, because Lord Kalki is still in a hidden phase. He does not give darshan to everyone. 99% of people in Odisha do not know about him. Third, regarding Chhatia, it is the place where a saint named Haridas Maharaj had his ashram. On his samadhi (tomb), his disciples built a statue of Jagannath. On the samadhis of his son and grandson, they built statues of Balabhadra and Subhadra. These were man-made. The Malika says that a time will come when Muslim armies from 13 countries will attack the Jagannath temple. Before that, the Russian head of state will help move the wooden idols of Lord Jagannath to Chhatia for safety. The idols will stay there for seven days, and the temple will be destroyed. During those seven days, the worship of the wooden deities will happen in Chhatia, not Lord Kalki. A seven-day Rath Yatra (chariot festival) will also take place there, and the Russian leader will perform the ritual sweeping in front of the chariot, fulfilling a blessing from a past life. So, Chhatia is a temporary shelter for the Jagannath idols, not Kalki's birthplace. During this time, Lord Kalki, born in human form, will be performing his leela (divine play) across the world.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Sir, how many years are left for this to happen?
Answer: All of this will happen by 2029.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: What will be the reason for the war between India and Pakistan? What will cause the war to break out?

After that, it will join forces with China to gather its strength, and then a great, terrible war will happen. That time is not far away. It can start anytime from 2023 onwards. So, wait for that time. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: India's Prime Minister, Narendra Modi, is he good for India? There are claims against him that he is wrong and not doing anything for the country. Is he right? How is he?
Answer: Look, we are not in politics, and we do not like politics. We are in the path of Dharma and prefer righteousness. First, in a country where cow slaughter and animal slaughter happen, where there is unrighteousness, where the mother cow who nourished us with her milk is killed, I cannot call anyone good. I know nothing but Dharma. Whatever is righteous is good. We have no connection with any political person. Lord Kalki will judge what politicians do. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Is he the last prime minister of India?
Answer: What will you gain from this? Look, to prove the Malika's prophecies, it is written that the last ruler of India will be a 'Jogi' (ascetic). The Gupta Malika by Mahapurush Achyutananda wrote this. And during the middle of his rule, there will be a military emergency. This is written in the Malika so that it can be proven. I don't believe in anyone's qualifications or purity. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, I have a question. Since animals, like cows, are used and killed to make vaccines, should we take the vaccine? Will we become participants in that sin by taking it? Because if we take the vaccine, we are in a way accepting the killing of an animal.
Answer: Look, India is a public welfare nation, and its constitution is always written for the benefit of human society. As we are in a democracy, it is the duty of a saint and every citizen to follow the rules and discipline of the government. It is very important for all of us to follow the government's policies and maintain discipline, especially given the current crisis the world is facing. The steps our government is taking are for the welfare of human society. As disciplined citizens of India, we have to obey the order of the government; we are bound to obey the order of the government. About this, I will only say this much: follow the government's discipline. And follow the path of Dharma that I am showing you. God will save you. The reason we are meeting is to find out how human society and devotees can be saved. If devotees suffer, what will the Lord do? He has come for his devotees. So, follow the Lord's path. Read the Bhagavatam as a vaccine. Eat vegetarian food. Do not indulge in slander, covet others' women or wealth, or chase after wrong things. Always follow the path of truth, peace, compassion, and forgiveness. Lord Jagannath will protect you. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, I wanted to ask, good people are moving towards goodness, and bad people are being destroyed. How long will this continue, and by when will Lord Kalki finish everything?
Answer: A river's stream flows to the ocean, and a sewer's stream flows to the drain. A devotee's stream flows to God. In every age, demons have never abandoned their ways. As it is said, 'Whenever there is a decline in righteousness and the arrogant demons rise, the Lord takes various forms to protect the virtuous.' When sin, arrogance, pride, and animal slaughter increase in the world, people think their wealth will save them, but I see that wealth cannot protect anyone. Only Dharma can. There are many types of people in society. We don't condemn people, we condemn their actions. No one is inherently bad, but the environment of the modern world makes them bad. Through satsang, people can change. It is our duty to spread the message of God and the Malika. Those who change will be saved; those who don't will be lost. Their fate is up to God. A time is coming when everyone will meet, just like in Vrindavan, and the Lord's divine play (leela) will unfold. We will meet like brothers and family. It will be a very joyous time, like Vrindavan's leela starting again. We can all participate in that leela if we stay on the right path and keep a watch on our karma.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: I just want to ask, when the Kalki avatar comes, for how long will the Lord stay on Earth? A few weeks, a few months, or a few days?
Answer: Mother, listen. The Srimad Bhagavatam says that after 5,000 years of Kali Yuga, Mother Ganga leaves the Earth. It is now 5,126 years, which means Mother Ganga had already left the Earth according to the scriptures. But after Lord Kalki's incarnation, Mother Ganga has descended on Earth again. The cloudburst that happened in Kedarnath, which the government talks about, was the second descent of the Ganga. She returned to Earth, flowing over Lord Kedarnath's head, because the Lord has come. When the Lord comes, Mother Ganga also comes. History shows Ganga descended on Shiva's head only once when Bhagirath called her. This recent event is unprecedented. Mother Ganga has returned, and you can see she is being cleaned and her purity is increasing. This is proof that the Kalki avatar is on Earth. Understand this and explain it to others, or they will lose their way with no one to guide them.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, how can we learn to write the Odia language?
Answer: It is not necessary for you to learn Odia. Our national language will be Devanagari, which will be a mix of Hindi, Odia, Bhojpuri, Kannada, Tamil, French, and English. That will be the language. When Kalki's rule is established over the world, Devanagari will be used. You all will receive such divine power that you will learn everything easily, as if recalling a past memory. It will come to you through God's grace. It is not necessary to learn Odia. Hindi is our national language, and that will also work.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Namaskar, this Bhavishya Malika... where can its translation be obtained?
Answer: Listen, there is no translation. The way the Malika is written is a mix of Hindi, English, and Sanskrit. Odia is also mixed in, but the script is Odia. The language contains Sanskrit and very old languages like Devanagari. To understand the Malika, nothing but God's grace is needed. The reason I can speak on the Malika today is due to the Lord's grace. When I was a child, I couldn't understand it, but I was interested. Now, I can understand it. This is God's grace. Many have requested me to write the Malika in Hindi, and I did, but I did not publish it because I feared it would be commercialized. Editors would take it, publish it in all languages, and it would become a business. The Lord's precious words would fall into the hands of demons, those who slaughter cows and commit sins. That's why this is a secret. With the power God has given me, I explain it in my episodes. Watch all of them, there are over 100. Understand the Malika from there. I recite the original Odia text and then explain its meaning. Following that is the best way. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: By which year can Lord Kalki come?
Answer: Look, brother, Lord Kalki has already descended on Earth. According to what is written in the Malika, Lord Kalki is now 14 years old. When Lord Kalki turned 13, the first phase of establishing Dharma began. Everything the Malika predicted for his 13th year has already happened. After the message of the Malika spreads, 120,000 devotees will gather across India. After that, the 'Khanda Pralay' (partial dissolution) and establishment of Dharma will proceed. Major earthquakes are coming, along with disease, social violence, war, natural calamities, floods, and fire. This time is coming. Lord Kalki can do all this while sitting in his home. It is not necessary for him to reveal himself and tell everyone, 'I am Kalki, surrender to me, and I will start a new age.' It has never happened like that and never will. As the establishment of Dharma progresses and the influence of devotees grows, the devotees themselves will reveal the Lord. And some very good devotees will have the darshan of Lord Kalki, but not everyone.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: No, no, as you mentioned earlier that a 'pralay' (dissolution/cataclysm) is going to happen before Kalki... I mean, the beginning of the end has started. In how many places has this started to happen?
Answer: Look, mother, human society is receiving repeated warnings. The first strain [of the virus] was a warning for society to turn towards Dharma. But people did not understand and continued to run after fish, meat, alcohol, women, and sin. Then the second one came. This is the second warning. Warnings will keep coming. This will not end so quickly. But the alert and cultured devotees, those who were actually with Lord Krishna in Vrindavan, will understand. The ignorant will not. Our message of the Malika is only for devotees, not for everyone. Those who eat fish and meat have no place in the Malika, unless they give it up from today. This 'khanda pralay' (partial dissolution) is ongoing. A few days ago, a tornado hit Odisha and caused great destruction. This happens every year. A time will come when it will happen twice a year, then four times, then five times, then every month. God is giving warnings: 'Change, reform, come towards Dharma. If you don't, who will protect you?' I will not strike from behind; I will strike from the front, after giving a warning. Just as Lord Krishna repeatedly warned Kansa. But the Ravanas of Kali Yuga are crueler than the original Ravana. Live a simple life. In a simple life, the light of truth shines. Eat as much as you need and share any extra food with the poor and with animals. This is Dharma for us.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: So, should we get the vaccine or not? I mean... should we take it?
Answer: Look, brother, our country is a public welfare nation. It always works in the interest of the country. All citizens must follow its constitutional rules and regulations. I am also included in this, and so are you. It is our greatest duty to protect the country and obey the laws of the government. For those who are connected with our satsang, with the Malika, who are eager for Satyayuga, who are the 'Gopis, Tapis, and Kapis' (devotees), for them I speak the language of Dharma. Follow that language. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L1 - भविष्य मालिका में कलियुग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, I am speaking from Odisha. It is written in the Malika that the Samaleswari temple will be struck by lightning. Has that already happened?
Answer: In 2018, the flag of the Jagannath temple was struck by lightning and burned. In 2018, the flag on top of the Mother Samaleswari temple was also struck by lightning and it burned. The flag of the Mother Tarini Devi temple in Odisha, a form of Vaishno Devi's power, also burned. That same year, the trident at Baba Akhandalamani's temple fell after being struck by lightning. And the flag of the Lord Neel Madhav temple in Odisha also burned. So yes, the flag of the Mother Samaleswari temple has already burned. Furthermore, four days ago, a fire broke out in the Mother's temple. Do you know? A day after that, the State Bank of India's Sambalpur branch caught fire. Do you know? This is a sign of the establishment of Dharma. When the Mother begins her act of destruction, she manifests as fire. The day Mother Vaishno Devi left Trikuta, a fire broke out on the Trikuta mountain. Do you know about the fire on Trikuta mountain in 2018? This is the proof. The flag on the Jagannath temple burned. How can lightning strike a place where the Sudarshan Chakra is present, which is brighter than crores of suns? This is a sign of destruction. Human society should understand this. Hold on to Dharma. Dharma is the greatest wealth.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: You had said that when the Kali Yuga ends and human society enters the Satya Yuga, will the internet exist then or not? Will people's houses and buildings remain? How will they eat and drink? Will phones exist or not? And how will human society be able to connect with each other?
Answer: Look, whatever development and technology exists in this Kali Yuga, the Satya Yuga will have means that are crores of times more advanced. In Satya Yuga, the sun and moon provide light to the entire universe through the power of truth (Satya). The power will be spiritual. In Satya Yuga, the rulers will be spiritual rulers. Spiritual power is the most potent force in the universe. In the Srimad Bhagavatam, it is written that when Lord Krishna was traveling from Dwarka to Hastinapur, his family traveled by road, but the sages traveled through the sky in their divine aircraft (vimanas). In this age, only a few among crores have an airplane, and even that is dangerous. But in that age, all devotees will be able to travel anywhere they wish in a Pushpaka Viman.  Regarding electronics, in Kali Yuga, the sun's rays are harsh and the moon's rays are dim. But in Satya Yuga, the sun's rays will be like the moon's rays are now, so people will be able to do their daily work and farming joyfully without feeling the heat. At night, the moonlight will be brighter than our current electric lights, and it will be cool and pleasant. People will be able to travel at night without any electricity. As for the internet, humans will have so much spiritual power that they will know what is happening in all the realms—heaven, earth, and the netherworld. Just as we talk on the phone now, through spiritual power, a person will be able to get news from the entire universe, the infinite cosmic eggs (Brahmanda). Through their power of meditation and divine energy, they will have all the means they need. Their food, drink, and housing will be like that of kings, and people will have no troubles. Most importantly, there will be brotherhood, friendship, and purity among all devotees. There will be no need for medicine as there will be no diseases. People will have 'iccha mrityu' (the ability to choose the time of their death), and they will live according to their will, performing righteous actions as described in the Srimad Bhagavatam. The scriptures say that in Satya Yuga, gods and devotees would come in their Pushpaka Vimanas to play in the river Ganga. That time will come again. The things people will receive will be thousands of times better than the artificial things of Kali Yuga. Everyone will become a saint.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: We adults can perform worship, chanting, and penance, but how should we prepare our small children, who are one or two years old, for the coming age?
Answer: Jai Jagannath. The environment gives a person everything. If a child goes to the market, he sees the market's environment. If he sits in a satsang (spiritual gathering), he hears the kirtan and bhajans. So, for your children, in your busy life, wake up as early as possible, around 4:30 or 5:00 AM. This is the first step to eradicating disease. Second, have your dinner as early as possible in the evening, by 7:00 or 8:00 PM, and go to bed by 9:30 or 10:00 PM. Teach your children this as well, because this will be the way of life for those who enter Satya Yuga. All humans will eat by 8:00-8:30 PM, go to bed by 10:00 PM, and wake up early to chant the Lord's name. Teach your children this routine. Wake them up at the prescribed time, between 4:30 and 5:00 AM, which is the Brahma Muhurta, and sit with them to chant the name of Lord Madhava. When you do your kirtan or read the Srimad Bhagavatam, have your child sit with you. Even if the child cannot say much, just teach them to say 'Madhava, Madhava.' Gradually, they will start chanting, and by following your actions, they will also be guided onto the right path. The whole family will do satsang, stay at home, and become worthy of Satya Yuga. Read the Srimad Bhagavatam at home, do not harm any living beings, and after having children, stay away from marital physical relations. Keep your family away from modern films, theater, and the negative things on YouTube. By doing this, we can easily overcome the problems in today's society and move towards Satya Yuga. Nothing can stop us. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Sir, my question is that technology is advancing rapidly. Work that used to take us four or five hours can now be done in 20 to 40 minutes. Big companies are focusing on artificial intelligence to automate things, reducing manual intervention and using more machines. What are your thoughts on this? Is this truly leading us towards progress, or is it causing the downfall of human civilization?
Answer: Look, when an age changes, people do everything for their own self-interest. The sage Achyutananda has written about this in the Malika. He wrote that first, the farmers will be destroyed; they will lose their lives and commit suicide, which you have been seeing for many years. After that, the wealthy people, the big company owners who have looted the poor and worked for their own selfish interests instead of the welfare of society—their companies will shut down. Just wait, the time is very near when the companies of the world's biggest wealthy people will close. The effect is already beginning, and it will happen gradually. But a time will come when it will all be meaningless. The technology and facilities in society should be for all humans. In the current Kali Yuga, a few people have the power, authority, and money. All this will be digitized, and everyone will get equal rights. Such a time is coming. We must follow the path of righteousness, religion, and purity. Completely oppose the killing of living beings, meat, and fish. Otherwise, entering Satya Yuga will be difficult for human society. If one kills and eats meat and fish, facing the coming times will be very difficult. There will be equal laws and a constitution for all in the assembly of dharma, but we have to wait for some time and some events to pass. Wait and see what happens. Jai Jagannath ji.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: I heard about 'jiv hatya' (killing of living beings) last time. In this context, what about pests in the house, like small insects that appear during the rainy season and damage our belongings, or spiders and ants? If they are killed, is that also a sin? Sometimes, it becomes necessary to kill them, Pandit ji.
Answer: Jai Jagannath. Actually, this is a consequence of Kali Yuga. Due to the pollution in the air, these insects have increased everywhere, including in agriculture. This is happening because of the pollution of Kali Yuga. This will continue for a few more years until the establishment of dharma is complete, then it will change. For now, in the current Kali Yuga, I will not say much about this. But try your best to ensure that no sin is committed through you. Avoid actions that lead to sin and its consequences. Jai Jagannath ji.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Sir, I have another question. Nowadays, whenever I meet people or interact on social media, I see that most people don't worship God. They'll watch other things, but when it comes to worship, they avoid it. Why don't they remember God, even once a year? Why don't my friends or juniors remember God? Also, another point is that cartoons about God used to be shown on channels like Cartoon Network, which gave knowledge to children. Why isn't that happening today? Why aren't cartoons about God shown to children so they can learn about their religion, spirituality, and live a righteous life? Because I believe religion teaches you the right way to live.
Answer: When the system of Kali Yuga is in power and human society becomes sinful, there is nothing left to teach society. Due to the influence of Kali Yuga, people today do not implement your pure ideology. But in the coming age, it will happen. In the next age, the eighteen Puranas will be read in every house. The one who is ahead in scriptural knowledge will be revered in society and will receive high positions and respect. As Kali Yuga is going on, the rights of our Sanatana Dharma, the rights of our new generation, have been snatched away by our so-called guardians, and they are repeatedly taken away. Their rule and their will shall not last long. A time will come when schools will be based on our Vedic principles, like ashrams, where everyone will study the scriptures. They will gain so much knowledge that they will not need to focus on just employment and marketing, in which people are solely interested today. The fact that cartoons about Lord Krishna and other devotional channels that used to air are no longer there is a sign of Kali Yuga's influence and its end. This will not last long. By 2030, the light of Satya Yuga will be fully manifest, and from then on, people will live according to the principles of Sanatana Dharma. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: You just said that Corona will be gone in July, but...
Answer: Regarding your first question, that I said Corona will be gone in July—neither is it written in the scriptures, nor have I ever said it. In my previous episodes, you can listen, I have said that this disease is not going to go away. It will keep coming back, and to bear it, the power of dharma is needed. That's the first point. Furthermore, I have said what the great sage Achyutananda has written: 'Mala mala daka sapta thara heba,' meaning seven times, major diseases will strike the world, and the sound of death will echo across the world seven times. We do not see any change happening in society so quickly. However, we can counter it through the power of dharma.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Ever since I've heard about the Kalki avatar from you and started chanting, I feel a strange sensation and a deep desire to see him. What should I do?
Answer: While living in the world, performing your duties, and thinking about your family, spend half an hour a day in the pursuit of divine knowledge. Secondly, you can contact the number provided on our YouTube channel. The Lord's name cannot be given to everyone. It is given only to those who do not eat meat or fish, who read the Srimad Bhagavatam daily in their homes, and who are free from sin, violence, and malice. The Mahamantra of Lord Kalki will be given by selecting such people. It is not for everyone. Please listen, this is not a commercial organization. I want to make it very clear to you, I have never earned a single paisa from the spiritual path in my life. We have never taken a single paisa from anyone through our discourses. I do not want to have any such financial relationship with pure souls like you. I want to have a relationship with you like a brother, like family, just as the gopas and gopis lived with brotherhood in Vrindavan. We will maintain that connection and spread the Lord's name. After you contact the number, the Lord's name will be given after six months. Chant that name. As for your desire to have a darshan (vision) of Lord Kalki, when the time comes, you will. This is not a shop where I can just give you the mantra. This is not a business. The Mahapurushas wrote this 500 years ago, selecting devotees for this purpose. It is repeatedly mentioned that this secret mantra of the Lord should not be given to any sinner, unjust person, or corrupt individual.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: We have spoken on WhatsApp. I told you about this feeling in my heart, and you replied on WhatsApp telling me to chant a 'Malwa mantra'. I replied that I already chant 'Radhe Radhe' from the moment I wake up, it never stops. Is that sufficient?
Answer: If I have given you a mantra on WhatsApp, then you should chant that one. That is the most powerful mantra. Chant it, and you will receive everything. Just try it and see the power of this mantra. But one thing is, you must keep your body pure, wake up during the Brahma Muhurta, and follow the path I have described. You should read the Srimad Bhagavatam daily and consider your husband as God. I am not saying this just for you, but for all women. In Satya Yuga, the husband is considered God, and the wife should be his devoted partner. In Kali Yuga, only those who change will be able to follow this path, not everyone. Since I have given you the mantra, follow it, and everything will be fine.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Guruji, regarding the earlier question about people who are abroad... it's 1:30 AM here, but we are listening to you. We live abroad. What does the Malika say for us? What should we do so that at the end of the age, we can go to a good place?
Answer: It is a great joy. See, Lord Jagannath's blessings are with you. You are following the Malika. It is written in the Malika that only those upon whom I have my blessings, who leave behind their past karmas and join the path of truth, will be able to experience the Malika. You are one of those pure souls who are following the Malika. Those who experience the Malika were devotees of Lord Krishna in all four yugas, and you must be one of them. That is why you are connected with the Malika. A person without such a background can never connect with us or the Malika. If you are connected, you are such a pure soul. Secondly, you live abroad. A person can live anywhere, but their inherent nature should remain with them. I will tell you three things. Since you live abroad, chant the Lord's name three times a day: in the morning, evening, and at night. Second, get a copy of the Srimad Bhagavatam and read it once a day. Third, eat a vegetarian diet and stay connected with our satsang. Listen to what is said and implement it in your life. By following this path, we will meet in Satya Yuga, and when the time comes, you may even have a darshan (vision) of Lord Kalki. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, I want to know, you say that Satya Yuga is coming. After Satya Yuga, will Treta Yuga, Dvapara Yuga, and then Kali Yuga come again? Will this cycle continue?
Answer: See, regarding this, our ideology is... yes, the universe God created... yes, this is true, this cycle continues. However, at this particular time, a 'kalpa' (a cosmic aeon) will come to an end. When Tulsidas was born, he wrote in the Ramcharitmanas that this creation will be dissolved. All devotees will attain Vaikuntha (the celestial abode). The three realms—heaven, earth, and the netherworld—along with the fourteen worlds, will be submerged in water. Then, Lord Brahma will begin a new creation. Lord Vishnu will place the seeds of the new creation with Lord Satyadev. The sun and moon will also be new. The Malika says that in Satya Yuga, a new sun and moon will be created every day, which will be conducive to the age of truth. The sun's rays will be cool, and the moonlight will be very bright, like daylight, so no electricity will be needed. The Pancha-sakhas (five friends of Chaitanya Mahaprabhu) have written that to escape the great dissolution, the Srimad Bhagavatam is the greatest refuge.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: In this Kali Yuga, we have so many big temples like the Jagannath temple, Konark temple, and other structures like the Taj Mahal. What will happen to them after the yuga ends? What will be their fate?
Answer: In Satya Yuga, when Lord Ram was king, Ayodhya was built. Many kings came and went, and their capitals changed. When the yuga changes, three places remain: Badrinath, Vrindavan, and Jagannath Dham. However, Jagannath Dham will be submerged in water, but Vrindavan and Badrinath will remain. Some signs of our spiritual centers will also remain. When the Lord comes as Kalki, he will restore them. But when the great dissolution (pralaya) of the universe happens, the entire world will be transformed.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, I am Harcharan Singh from Pune. I am from a Sikh background. I've been listening to your videos. You mentioned that the age of Kali Yuga, 432,000 years, will be reduced. In our Sikh scriptures, it's also mentioned that there will be a period of Satya Yuga within Kali Yuga. I want to know the scriptural basis in your tradition for the age of Kali Yuga being shortened. Also, I believe Sikhs will have a significant role in the future. Is the ongoing farmers' protest in Delhi a sign of the times to come?
Answer: Jagannath. What you are saying is absolutely correct. My salutations to your great guru, Guru Nanak Dev ji. He wrote in his scripture that Lord Kalki will be born in Odisha and that there will be a great change at the end of Kali Yuga. The Sikh dharma, Sanatana dharma, and all other religions in the world are named differently due to Kali Yuga, but their essence is one. Your guru tradition has been given the duty to protect dharma on this earth, which you are following, and this is very good for society. Regarding the end of Kali Yuga, which is said to be 432,000 years, only about 5,126 years have passed. The calculation of the yugas is given in the Manu Samhita. It says Kali Yuga is 4,000 years, followed by a transitional period (sandhya). According to scriptural calculation, the sandhya period is 10% of the yuga's duration, which is 400 years. So, after 4,400 years, Kali Yuga will end, and Satya Yuga will begin. Similarly, Garga Muni wrote in his Garga Samhita that after 4,600 years, Lord Vishnu will incarnate on Earth. The greatest sign is what Mahapurush Achyutananda wrote: when an vulture sits atop the Jagannath temple's flag, know that the end of Kali Yuga is near. This has happened multiple times since 2005. This is a sign of the establishment of dharma. When the Lord incarnates, he gives signs. The flag of the Dwarkadhish temple tore and flew away. The Malika mentions that when you see these signs, know the end of Kali Yuga has come. The Malika also predicted that the ice in the north would melt and a country like America would be reduced to a small island. These signs are visible to the whole world. The end of Kali Yuga is here, and the light of dharma is spreading. The establishment of dharma will happen. A great war will take place in India, with 13 Muslim countries uniting against it. At this time, follow the traditions of your gurus, read the Srimad Bhagavatam, do not eat meat and fish, and take refuge in the Lord. This is the path of true knowledge. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: A little while ago, I said that religion teaches a person how to live. I want to add that any religion teaches you the way of life. We shouldn't judge a person by their religion, because religion is different from the individual. One should read any religious book, be it the Bhagavad Gita or the Bible. We shouldn't judge anyone based on their religion. This is my belief.
Answer: Look, son, what you say is right. I'll tell you, a person is never bad. We condemn the wrong actions done by a person, but we love the person. We have affection for all of humanity. But the problem is their sinful actions. We condemn those actions. Those who do not rise above those actions and perform good deeds are not in our company. Secondly, all religions are connected. In the coming Satya Yuga, there will be only one religion. This war that will happen in Kali Yuga will be a religious war, a war of caste and creed. Kali has divided human society so they fight amongst themselves. But when Satya Yuga begins, there will be one religion. It is wonderful that you read the Bhagavad Gita. The Srimad Bhagavatam is the supreme scripture of Hinduism. Read the Bhagavatam, take refuge in the Lord, and together we will start the Satya Yuga with good traditions and help Lord Kalki establish dharma in the world.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, I feel a strong inclination towards the service of Lord Vishnu and feel a connection to the Sudarshan Chakra. I feel an inner guidance to perform penance and contribute to the establishment of righteousness (dharma). It feels like the Pancha Pandavas have already taken birth. I just want to ask, have all the deities and Lord Kalki already taken birth, or is it yet to happen? And in how many years will the Lord reveal himself?
Answer: All the deities have taken avatar on Earth, according to our Malika. The Pancha Pandavas and all other gods and goddesses have taken birth. Lord Kalki will reveal his divine power between 2025 and 2027. With that divine power, he can conquer a country like America in a single day. I will tell you to follow the Malika, read the Srimad Bhagavatam, and remain in a state of meditation while taking care of your family. Stay away from meat, fish, and violence. The time has come for us to spread dharma, not just for show, but to protect ourselves and to manifest Sanatana Dharma throughout the world. This is the essential work of this time. A time will come when all devotees will unite, and everyone will attain peace. Follow the path of dharma.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra

Answer: Okay, see, the number that is on our WhatsApp, call our devotees on that phone number. They will talk to you about the mantra.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: I am asking, I chant the mantra for an hour daily. You say Delhi will be destroyed by an earthquake. So, when the earthquake happens and buildings fall, will something fall on me? Or since I am a devotee of God, will I not die? Will my whole family be saved?
Answer: Look, son. Different souls have come to this earth and formed families. We don't know how righteous each person is. But the thing is, if all devotees and all families board the boat of dharma, then it is written in the Malika that those who chant the Lord's name will not be affected by any disease, natural disaster, or even an atomic war. Nothing will happen to them. This is repeatedly mentioned in the Malika. Have faith in it. For example, if five people are traveling in a car and it has an accident, four might die and one might survive. Why did one survive and four die? Only God knows. But according to the Malika, those who take refuge in God will be saved. God will save them. This is God's will. Spirituality is based on faith, devotion, and most importantly, patience. Wait for the right time, and you will experience everything.

Video Title: L2 मनुष्य समाज को सत्य युग में जाने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Before you go, please tell the devotees, what divine plays (leelas) is Lord Kalki performing right now? Because it is only through your vision that devotees like us can know about his powers and activities. Please kindly tell us.
Answer: Look, only a devotee knows the Lord's leelas. What can I say about this? You are devotees, you experience his leelas. I will only say this: when the Lord comes to Earth, he calls his devotees. It is written in the Malika that when the Malika is propagated, all the devotees will come to know about the Lord, and after that, the Lord and his devotees will meet. When all the devotees have gathered, the destruction of the Kali Yuga will begin. We are currently in that phase. The process will intensify day by day, and gradually you will all come to understand everything. There is no need for me to say it. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Some people and gentlemen have this question: if a great destruction (pralaya) is coming, then what is the need for a job? What is the need for employment? What is the need for saving money? And what is the need to get married in this world?
Answer: I will tell you one thing: the sun continuously rises and sets. During the Mahabharata war, those who were fighting were also eating and then fighting again. The establishment of Dharma will proceed on its own path, but the flow of karma in human society, according to the Vedas and societal norms, cannot be stopped by anyone. Fulfill your personal, familial, and social duties (karma) properly. But I am adding one thing: the spiritual karma will now begin. So, until that time comes, do your work, do your job, do whatever is necessary according to the norms of this Kaliyuga society. Fulfill them well and do not have any doubts in your duties. Do your work. Do not neglect your social duties like employment, education, and family bonds. And be a little wary of excessive modernity.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: I have a question, I am Abhijit from Kolkata. The vaccine that the government is giving now... we are devotees. If we don't take this vaccine, will God save the devotees from this disease?
Answer: The Malika says that whoever takes refuge in God, follows a vegetarian diet, and follows the path of dharma, for them, this disease is nothing. Follow the government's rules; there is no problem with that.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: I heard in a discourse, perhaps from you or another Pandit ji, that in the year there are four eclipses, a world war will happen. It will either be at its peak or it will begin. I want to know, according to astrological calculations, which year is that?
Answer: Look, we speak according to the Malika. The Malika says that there will be a solar and a lunar eclipse on the same day, a solar and lunar eclipse within the same fortnight, and four or five solar and lunar eclipses in a single year. Eclipses will occur on new moon and full moon days. These signs will appear at the time of the change of an era (Yuga Parivartan). When there are four eclipses in a month, it will be a symptom of the end of Kaliyuga. The world war will happen by God's will. It is written in one place that the day 12,000 devotees of Kalki gather, the work of destruction will intensify. It is also written in the Malika that the day 13 Muslim countries unite, the world war will happen. So, wait for that time.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Will there be such a big impact on Kolkata? Will it be wiped off the map?
Answer: There will be no problem for the devotees of the Lord, those who are connected to Lord Kalki. They will face no issues. However, follow the rules of the government. God has no objection to this. God says, 'Walk the path of spirituality and perform good deeds.' Both are necessary for us. And also perform your social and worldly duties.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra

Answer: The country of China invites its own troubles. It is written in the Malika that China will face great destruction because of its own karma. No disease can spread without a reason; it happens through some medium. But regarding China, I will tell you what is in the Malika and what is Lord Kalki's directive: there will be such a massive earthquake in China, and the five elements of nature will wreak such havoc, that China will be completely devastated.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: I am from Ahmedabad, Gujarat. Three years ago, I went to Dwarka and had a spiritual experience. Answer: Look, this was a sign from God to bring you to the Malika. Without such blessings from God, why would you connect with the Malika? The devotees who were the Gopis and Gopas are the ones who experience such divine phenomena, and they are the ones who will come to the Malika, work for Sanatana Dharma, and connect with Lord Kalki. This experience you had was God reminding you of your past life's culture and good deeds. It is because of that past connection that you are now associated with us. This is the fruit of your karma and the good deeds from your previous life.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, we are connected with you, following the Malika, and chanting God's name. But how should we try to connect our loved ones, friends, and family to this path? In today's time, many people are not interested in religious activities and are deeply entangled in the worldly and monetary illusions of Kaliyuga. How do we connect them?
Answer: Our greatest relative is God. The Malika says that not everyone in a family will become a devotee of Lord Kalki. Only those who seek and take refuge will become devotees. Those who don't, won't. Not everyone will survive. 75% of the world's population will perish; only 25% will remain. Therefore, continue your worldly duties, and for those who wish to come, try to bring them to the Lord's refuge with faith and devotion.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, in your YouTube channel videos, we have received information about 7-8 mandals (regions/circles) out of the total 16. Could you please provide information about all 16 mandals for the new people who have joined?
Answer: There will be 16 mandals. Three will be in Odisha: the Jagannath temple area, the Lingaraj temple area in Bhubaneswar (the capital of Odisha), and the Biraja temple area. The fourth will be in Kolkata, centered around the Kali temple. Others include Rameshwaram Dham, Vrindavan-Mathura, Ujjain, Kashi, Dwarkadhish in Gujarat (Lord Krishna's land of pastimes), Kamakhya temple, and Ratanpur. There will also be a mandal comprising Delhi, Haryana, Punjab, and Rajasthan. Satchidananda has written that these 16 mandals will be established on Earth, and they will carry out the work of establishing dharma.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Hare Krishna, Pandit ji. How did you get involved in this divine work of Bhavishya Malika and Lord Kalki? Please tell us about it.
Answer: Just as no one knows the path a river will take, no one knows how a person's path unfolds. I received my Guru mantra at the age of 19. I am doing this work today with my Guru's blessings and inspiration. The instructions from God are internal. I tried to propagate the Malika on YouTube 10 years ago but was unsuccessful. When I started again two years ago, the day we began the YouTube work, my associate and I fell so ill it felt like life was leaving our bodies. After several such obstacles, we are now propagating the Malika by the Lord's command. The Malika is like the life-giving herb 'Mritasanjivani.' If you follow its path, even a 90-year-old person can come out of a ventilator.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, you mentioned Chaitanya Mahaprabhu, who gave the Hare Krishna mahamantra. I want to ask, in the establishment of dharma, will ISKCON also have a role? What will be their role?
Answer: ISKCON (International Society for Krishna Consciousness) propagates the message of Lord Sri Krishna. However, I see one problem, and this is my personal view. The 12th Canto of the Odia Bhagavata and the Sanskrit Bhagavata explicitly mention the Kalki avatar. But the version of the Bhagavata that ISKCON uses does not contain this. Therefore, I do not know if their followers can reach Lord Kalki or not. But one thing is certain: by chanting the name of Krishna, they will surely take refuge in God.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: (In Bengali/Hindi) I read in the Malika about a prophecy of a train engine at Sealdah station in Kolkata that will travel to a place called 'Chhatia Dham'. What is this prophecy?
Answer: When the British built the first steam engine, one of them at Sealdah station would run on its own without a driver. So they chained it up there. A time will come when devotees from the 16 mandals gather, and Lord Kalki will also be there. After that, when Muslims attack the Jagannath temple, the deities will need to be moved. At that moment, the train engine at Sealdah will break its chains on its own and travel to the Jagannath temple area, as a direct railway line has now been established. The deities of Jagannath, Balabhadra, and Subhadra will be placed on it, and it will travel towards a place called 'Chhatia'. Before a station called 'Bainchi', the engine will break down. From there, devotees will carry the deities on their shoulders to Chhatia. During this time, Lord Kalki in his human form will be in the Biraja Kshetra (Jajpur).

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Hello, regarding the vaccine that the government is giving, should we take it or not? If we don't, will God save the devotees from this disease?
Answer: The Malika says that whoever takes refuge in God, follows a vegetarian diet, and follows the path of dharma, for them, this disease is nothing. Follow the government's rules; there is no problem with that.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: I want to ask, regarding the train prophecy, how was this written in the Malika 500 years ago when the train engine had not even been built and the railway line did not exist?
Answer: The Malika is based on truth and is the word of Lord Sri Krishna. Just watch, every word of the Malika is coming true. It had written about Corona, and it has also written about seven more diseases that are to come. These diseases will also affect people. But for the devotees, the solution is to chant God's name and remain on the path of righteousness. For humanity, follow the Malika. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, how exactly should we remember and chant the name of Lord Kalki?
Answer: First, you must follow the Malika. Second, read the Srimad Bhagavatam. And propagate the message of Lord Kalki and the Malika in the world—this is the greatest dharma. There are some devotees who conduct satsangs (spiritual gatherings) in India and across the world; join them and work together. Everything will be fine.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: I am from Jaunpur, UP. I have been on the path of devotion since I was 13. I am asking, which mandals (regions) will be in UP? Also, temples and monasteries are being demolished; what is the effect of this?
Answer: Look, the demolition of temples and monasteries is a sign of the end of Kaliyuga. Kali will not allow the truth to remain, so this situation is prevalent all over the world. As for Uttar Pradesh, it is a very large and divine land. The Mathura-Vrindavan mandal is in UP. Ayodhya will also definitely be a mandal.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: What will be the role of the Suryavanshi king Maru and Devapi in the new era?
Answer: When Lord Kalki rules the world, he will give the kingdoms to two kings who have been in penance since the Treta and Dvapara yugas. King Maru will be given the throne of Ayodhya, and King Devapi will be given the throne of Hastinapur (Delhi).

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, for a long time, I have been wanting to become a complete vegetarian and give up non-veg food. But whenever it is in front of me, I am unable to control myself and end up eating it. What should I do to get rid of this habit?
Answer: Read the Srimad Bhagavatam. And before you start the Bhagavatam, first read the 'Gopi Leela' (the divine pastimes of the Gopis). After reading that, you will not feel the desire to eat it. That's what I would say.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, I am from Indore. I have a good friend who believes in God but argues a lot. He sometimes drinks alcohol and eats eggs and fish, arguing that eggs are not non-vegetarian and alcohol is made from barley, so there's no harm in it, claiming even Lord Bhairav consumes it. How can we bring such people to the right path?
Answer: Eggs are non-vegetarian; it is a sin. It is written that a true devotee will change after hearing this just once. One who does not change is not a devotee; they have a demonic nature. It is not necessary to tell them repeatedly. A true devotee will feel a vibration in their body upon hearing the Malika. Those who have no faith, who argue, and who ask counter-questions have no place in the Malika.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Jai Jagannath, Pandit ji. I was saying that Yogi Adityanath ji and Modi ji are not some divine souls, are they?
Answer: No, no, it's nothing like that. When Dharma is established, Sanatana Dharma will be established all over the world. When Lord Kalki takes charge of ruling, two kings, Maru and Devapi, who are currently in penance, will fight against China for India. After the war, Lord Kalki will establish them as the rulers of Ayodhya and Hastinapur, respectively.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra

Answer: Look, it is believed that the establishment of dharma will begin around 2026. This work will continue from 2023 to 2031. During this period, there will be a world war, calamities, and epidemics. All of this will happen. You are already seeing it happen. The exact timing will be decided by God. Some timings are mentioned in the Malika, but it is not right for me to reveal them in advance because it is God's plan.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, I am studying computer science. In the future, everything is going to be destroyed. So, should I continue this education, or should I study something else?
Answer: Chant God's name internally. Read the Srimad Bhagavatam for at least one hour. Do God's work and also do your own work (karma). Just as we eat, drink, and perform our daily chores, education is also a part of life in this age. You have to get an education. So, continue your studies, and at the same time, follow the path I am telling you about. This will be useful in the times to come.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: According to the Malika, what will be the contribution of Hanuman ji and the other Chiranjeevis (immortals) like Vibhishana and Ashwatthama?
Answer: The Malika mentions Vibhishana, Hanuman, and Ashwatthama. Hanuman will be present on Lord Kalki's chariot. During the partial destruction (Khanda Pralaya), Hanuman ji will be responsible for saving the devotees in the region from Badrinath to the banks of the Ganga in Kolkata. He will act on Lord Kalki's instructions. After the establishment of dharma, Hanuman and the others will merge into the body of Lord Vishnu (Kalki). This is what is written.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Should tea also be considered an intoxicant?
Answer: Yes, that is true. Tea will not be consumed [in Satyayuga]. You can drink it now, but without spices (masala). The kind of herbal tea that is offered in temples can be had. But the commercial tea that is available is not good for you. The Pandavas also used to consume a certain drink as an intoxicant.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, when Satyayuga (the Age of Truth) comes, what will be people's profession or job? When there is no technology, what will people do to earn a living?
Answer: Technology will be far more developed and peaceful. It will be a time of bliss and happiness, much better than now. There will be no harmful things. Technology will be so advanced, based on the power of mantras, that humans will be able to travel even to the sun, or anywhere in the universe—heaven, earth, the netherworld. People will work for one month, and the harvest of rice and wheat will be so abundant that it will be difficult to consume it all. It is written in the Malika that within 30 days, the crops will be ready and the earth will yield so much that it will be hard to eat it all. There will be no poverty, no rich or poor. Everyone will have good houses, food, clothes, and a good environment. There will be no need for doctors or hospitals. It will be a time of great joy.

Video Title: L3 कलियुग के अंत का संकेत देवी - देवताओं के मंदिरों से, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, it is said that one gets heaven (Swarga) or hell (Naraka) based on their karma. Where are these places located?
Answer: Above the Earth's equator (Vaisuva Mandala) is Svargapuri (heaven). Below is Martya (the mortal realm), and below that is Patala (the netherworld). These are the three realms: Swarga, Martya, and Patala. One goes to heaven by performing good deeds and to hell by performing bad deeds. By becoming very close to God, like the Gopis, one can attain the Lord's supreme abode.

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra

Answer: It's a blessing from God for a small child to see him. It's very good, Baba. To have a vision of God in such a short time, you are very fortunate. It is God's grace.

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, this is Ram Kumar Sharma. I have quit eating non-vegetarian food. Could you please guide my wife on this path as well?
Answer: You should support your husband in his dharma (righteous path). It is a wife's duty to follow her husband's path of dharma and principles. You should also follow this path. It will be for your own good because the age (Yuga) is ending, and there is nothing greater than dharma at this time. If you want to save your family and progress spiritually, you should become a ruler of your senses, read the Srimad Bhagavatam daily, and follow both your husband and the Malika.

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: This is Shubham Tiwari. Can you tell us about Lord Kalki's book or scriptures?
Answer: Lord Vyasa wrote about the Kalki avatar in the Sanskrit Bhagavata Purana. It states that Lord Kalki will appear when the rulers of the world act like robbers, exploiting their people, when rulers live in luxury while the people suffer, and when sorrow and disease spread. When the rule of kings becomes corrupt, unjust, and full of looting, then Kalki will incarnate. This is the situation in the world today, so the Lord has already incarnated. The Srimad Bhagavatam wrote about this in advance. In this era, Mahapurush Achyutananda, who was Lord Krishna's friend Sudama, has written the Bhavishya Malika about Lord Kalki. When the Malika is propagated throughout the world, the devotees will recognize the Lord and receive his message.

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, my question is about the Sundar Kand of Ramcharitmanas. Recently, people have started finding a small hair inside the pages. This didn't happen before; it started around the time Corona began in India and when the flag on the Jagannath temple was torn. What does this sign mean? Is it a sign of the end of Kali Yuga or of destruction?
Answer: This is a very good and sacred sign. Lord Ram will come as Kalki Ram; this is written in the Malika. The name 'Ram' will be associated with his name when he becomes the head of state. The scripture by Saint Tulsidas is our holy text, and this sign appearing in it is a sign of the establishment of dharma and the end of the age. This is the biggest sign, and I am very happy to hear it. Tulsidas ji also wrote about the signs of the end of Kali Yuga, stating that brothers will violate the sanctity of their relationship with sisters, people will kill each other over small matters, and unrighteousness will prevail. He wrote this on the orders of Lord Hanuman and Lord Ram. The sign appearing in his scripture today is a sign of destruction, telling people to be aware. All devotees of Ram in India should become alert because Lord Ram is giving this sacred sign: 'Look, change yourselves. I have taken incarnation on earth for the establishment of our Hindu dharma.' Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: What is written about Hanuman ji in the Malika?
Answer: The Malika says that during the great destruction by the five elements (earth, water, fire, air, ether), Lord Hanuman will lift the devotees from the region stretching from Gangotri-Yamunotri down to Kolkata and bring them before Lord Kalki. The core 12,000 devotees will reach Lord Kalki first. However, the other devotees who are left behind during the cataclysms—earthquakes, floods, fire from the sky—will be protected by chanting the Lord's name. Hanuman ji will save all these devotees and bring them to the Sudharma Sabha (divine assembly). In that assembly, all the gods, sages, and eternal devotees will be present, and Lord Kalki will establish the eternal rules. Hanuman ji will also assist in the destruction of evil forces, burning enemy armies to ash with the fire from his eyes. He will fully assist Lord Kalki in establishing dharma and saving the devotees.

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: This is Ashish from Bengaluru. You mentioned the names of places in North India for the 16 safe zones (mandalas). Will there be any in South India?
Answer: Yes, the place where Lord Ram established Rameshwaram will be the mandala that controls the South. Just as India has states, there will be 16 mandalas. Their central point, like a United Nations, will be in the Jajpur area of Odisha, which will be the center of the entire world. The Rameshwaram mandala will control the South. In that era, there will be no need for television or networks. Devotees will have divine vision and spiritual power. A time will come when, by pleasing the Lord, people will be able to fly and travel in celestial vehicles (vimanas). As spirituality increases, human power will also increase. There are many devotees in both the North and South, and they will all meet with the Lord's devotees.

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: My question is about the timeline. At the end of Kali Yuga, there will be the time of Kalki. Before Satya Yuga starts, there is something called Kalki's 'Ananta Yuga'. What is the time difference and what is written about this?
Answer: After 5,000 years of Kali Yuga, its 'Sandhya' (twilight) period begins, during which Lord Kalki takes incarnation. After the establishment of dharma, Lord Kalki, as Kalki-Ram, will establish 'Ramrajya' (the righteous kingdom of Ram) and rule the world for 1,009 years. This period is the 'Ananta Yuga' or 'Sangam Yuga' (Confluence Age). After these 1,009 years, the Ananta Yuga will end, and the proper Satya Yuga will begin. We don't know how long this Satya Yuga will last; the Lord will decide. The Ananta Yuga will last for 1,009 years, and the lifespan of all the devotees with Lord Kalki, as well as the 640 million people who survive the great destruction, will be 1,009 years.

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Namaste, Pandit ji. I want to ask, will Lord Kalki get married?
Answer: Yes, when the Lord comes as an avatar, he follows worldly customs. In this age, Lord Kalki will have one wife. She will be a combined incarnation of the power of Mother Lakshmi and Mother Vaishno Devi. He will marry her and will have only one wife, as he is Lord Ram. As for children, some things are mentioned in the scriptures, but ultimately, some decisions are taken by the Lord himself. It is not within our capacity to speak definitively on this matter.

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: I am Shweta from Uttar Pradesh. For a few years, my family has been moving towards a more spiritual and religious life. Is this a good sign? Secondly, how should we conduct ourselves in the future? We are pure vegetarians but still consume onion and garlic. Please guide us.
Answer: Firstly, regarding onion and garlic, eating them is not equivalent to killing a living being as they are produced by Mother Earth. However, they are considered 'exciting' foods that create heat in the body, though not strictly tamasic (impure). As long as Kali Yuga persists, if you cannot give them up, it is not a major issue; this habit will end with the age itself. Secondly, it is an excellent sign that your family is moving towards dharma. In this world, the greatest wealth is dharma. The one who possesses dharma is the happiest. I advise everyone to serve the cow mother, feed small creatures, donate to the poor, read the Srimad Bhagavatam, remain vegetarian, and take refuge in Lord Kalki by chanting his name. This will make your life immortal and save you. You are very fortunate that your family is united in this righteous path.

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra

It is written that she will enter human bodies as disease, and no one will have control. However, those who are in the refuge of the Lord, who chant his name and listen to the Malika, will be protected. You are fortunate to have had this vision. Bow down to the Mother and offer the smoke from burning coconut husk in her name as a sign of respect.

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra

Video Title: L4 कल्कि भगवान के साथ भेट करने का मार्ग, LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: A YouTube channel was saying that there will be a war between a demon named Kali and the Kalki avatar. Is Kali Yuga a demon?
Answer: Do not get confused by such things. Understand this properly: Kali Yuga is the current age.
