Video Title: L5 कलियुग अंत के बाद प्रकृति, पंचभूत, संत समाज में क्या बदलाव आएगा? LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: I am Saroj Kumar Nanda. I have a bit of confusion in my mind regarding karma (action) and bhagya (destiny). Please guide me a little. In the world, in Kali Yuga, is karma greater or is destiny greater? Which one should we focus on to move forward? Should we enhance our karma or our destiny? Please guide me.
Answer: Look, destiny is 'prarabdha' (the results of past actions). For instance, one child is born into a home with a golden cradle to play in, while another child is born to a mother who doesn't even have a small cloth to cover them. This is destiny. Because of destiny, a person gets a good family, a good home, a good caste, and a good religious establishment. But in every age, God has given importance to karma. There is 'sukarma' (good action) and 'kukarma' (bad action). It is written that one who does good deeds is fortunate. With God's blessings and by keeping the five senses in check, one should perform good deeds. See, it is very difficult to perform righteous deeds, but it is very easy to commit sins. Anyone can easily commit a sin, steal, or rob. But to follow the path of dharma for an entire lifetime, from birth till death, is difficult. If in between, a person commits a sin, their righteous merits are nullified. So, karma is the greatest thing in this world. But at this time of 'dharma sansthapana' (establishment of righteousness), my humble request to you is to read the Srimad Bhagavatam at home. Continue with your worldly duties, whatever they may be; we have no connection with that, it should be the law of the world. But read the Srimad Bhagavatam daily, read the ten avatars of God, meditate for 16 minutes, become a vegetarian, and in society, help the poor and the sad. Reduce your own meal for a day and share it with someone, be it an animal, a sad person, or a poor person. Give them something. Practice peace and truth. And all of you should take refuge in Lord Kalki, because time is running out. I don't say this to scare you, but people will yearn for this time. So I am telling you this much: remain in the refuge of God and accept Lord Kalki as your guru. This will be the guru dharma for Kali Yuga, and we will find fulfillment in our lives in this world, because we have to see God in this lifetime. At this time, God has also come for us.

Video Title: L5 कलियुग अंत के बाद प्रकृति, पंचभूत, संत समाज में क्या बदलाव आएगा? LIVE by pandit kashinath Mishra
Question: Jai Jagannath, Guruji. My question is, how can we make ourselves aware of the infinite power? And what is the contribution of this 'samay mandal' (era/time cycle) in a person's life? My question is how can we make ourselves aware of the infinite power and what is the contribution of this 'samay mandal' in our lives?
Answer: The 'mandal' of infinite power... the sages and saints who are the fathers of truth... In Satya Yuga, Treta, Dvapara, and Kali Yuga—in Satya Yuga, this formless penance was necessary for those who performed austerities. To awaken the infinite power, they could perform penance for many ages. After Satya Yuga came Treta Yuga. In Treta Yuga, people attained liberation through yajnas (sacrificial rituals), japa (chanting), and tapas (austerities). Then came Dvapara Yuga, and people found liberation by chanting the name of Lord Krishna. The dharma of love was propagated, and purity and cleanliness were illuminated in human society. But for Kali Yuga, Lord Buddha and Mahapurush Achyutananda have clearly written that only the name of God, the 'Nama Brahma', is the path. Chanting the Lord's name continuously in your heart... See, in the current situation, no one can perform penance for a long time, and it is also not possible. You are a woman; for a woman to go out of the village, into a forest, and perform penance alone is absolutely not possible in this sinful society. So, do what God has prescribed for this path. Chant the name of Lord Kalki, the 'Madhav' name. Read the Srimad Bhagavatam. And always see the Lord in all beings, and share the Lord's name and virtues. Implement the principles of truth, peace, and compassion in your own life. That is enough to reach God. The other paths have become obsolete. In the next 10 years, who knows what changes the world will see. And God has also arrived. I am telling you with certainty, God has come, and the 'Kalki Leela' (divine play of Kalki) is being revealed across the world. The Kalki Leela is happening. Mahapurush has written that Yogamaya will take a form... and in that form, she will not be under anyone's control. I won't state it explicitly, but understand this much... this control... I don't want to use the full language, but through the power of Yogamaya, disease will spread throughout the world. This is a part of the Kalki Leela. Mahapurush Satchidananda wrote this. In what form will Yogamaya come? She will spread through the air and on the earth, in various forms of disease. In the form of a pandemic, she will destroy. So, there is no time for austerities. This japa, tapa, yoga that saints talk about—meditate, do japa—none of it is needed in Kali Yuga. Only 'Naam Bhajan' (chanting the name), practicing truth, peace, and compassion. Do not sin. That's all. The people of Kali Yuga cannot do more. And definitely read the Bhagavatam. By reading the Srimad Bhagavatam, your lifespan will increase, discord in the family will end, and diseases and ailments will also be cured. It is such an important text. When the great destruction happens, it will awaken the divine power within us. And in Kali Yuga, the greatest dharma is to continuously chant the Lord's name. And the name 'Madhav Keshav Madhav' is the most sacred name for the end of Kali Yuga. It is written in the Malika that by chanting the name 'Madhav', there is no power in the world that can stop you. You can test it and see. But you must also follow the path of dharma that is prescribed. There is no time for other things now. When the time comes, we will do them. Not now.

Question: Pandit ji, my question is that 432,000 years of Kali Yuga are still remaining. And you are saying that Lord Kalki will come—no, that he has already come. Answer: Look, son, Jagannath, what you are saying... the age of Kali Yuga is 432,000 years, but out of those 432,000 years, Kali Yuga will only last for 5,000 years. For example, if a person's horoscope says they will live a long life, but that person commits sins and debauchery, they may die at a young age in a car accident or from a disease. Their life ends. Similarly, Brahma Dev and Manu decided on 432,000 years for Kali Yuga, but due to the immense increase in sin in Kali Yuga—cow slaughter, Brahmin slaughter, infanticide, feticide, matricide, patricide, deceit, falsehood, etc.—due to all these sins, the age of Kali Yuga has been cut short. Question: In one of your videos, you mentioned that the total duration of the four Yugas is about 12,000 years, with Kali Yuga being longer. Could you please explain the calculation and duration of the four Yugas and why Kali Yuga has a longer lifespan?
Answer: A gentleman from Ranchi asked this question. According to the scriptures, specifically the Surya Siddhanta, it is written: 'Tat dwadasha sahasrani chaturyugam udahrutam,' meaning the four yugas together comprise 12,000 divine years. The duration of a yuga is inversely proportional to the presence of dharma. The more dharma declines, the longer the yuga's duration becomes. In Satya Yuga, dharma stood on four pillars, so it lasted for 1200 years. In Treta Yuga, one pillar of dharma was lost, so its duration doubled to 2400 years. In Dvapara Yuga, another pillar was lost, so its duration tripled to 3600 years. In Kali Yuga, dharma stands on only one pillar, so its duration is four times, or 4800 years. The total of these is 12,000 divine years for one cycle of four yugas. According to the Malika, the lifespan of Kali Yuga is 5,000 years. According to Manu Smriti, it is 4,800 years. According to Garg Samhita, it is 4,800 years. According to Nirnaya Sindhu, it is also 4,800 years. The Malika states that when 5,000 years of Kali Yuga are complete, many signs will appear from the region of Jagannath Puri, a pandemic will spread across the world, and at that time, for the establishment of dharma, the Lord will incarnate and the devotees will gather.

Video Title: L6 विश्व में आद्य सत्य युग का, प्रजा शासन धारा और धर्म का विचार कैसे रहेगा? LIVE
Question: In a previous episode, you said that Buddha was the ninth avatar. But it's not established that he was the ninth avatar. In my opinion, Sai Baba was the ninth avatar. Please tell us what the Malika says about this, as it describes everything.
Answer: Son, I respect your opinion, as we respect everyone's wishes. However, as a Sanatani Hindu who follows the Malika, I must refer to our primary scriptures. The Srimad Bhagavatam clearly states in Sanskrit: 'Tatah kalau sampravrutte sammohaya sura-dwisham, buddho namnanjana-sutah kikateshu bhavishyati.' This means that when the age of Kali begins, to delude the enemies of the gods, the Lord will be born as Buddha, the son of Anjana, in the province of Kikat (Gaya). Furthermore, the poet Jayadeva, a great devotee of Lord Jagannath, wrote the Gita Govinda under the Lord's direction. In his Dashavatara Stotra, he wrote about Lord Buddha: 'Nindasi yajna-vidher ahaha shruti-jatam, sadaya-hridaya darshita-pashu-ghatam, keshava dhrita-buddha-sharira jaya jagadisha hare.' This means, 'O Keshava! O Lord of the universe! O Lord Hari, who have assumed the form of Buddha! All glories to You! O Buddha of compassionate heart, you decry the slaughtering of poor animals performed according to the rites of Vedic sacrifices.' Both of these are from our Sanatana Dharma. Regarding Sai Baba, the Malika does mention him. However, if I were to tell you what is written, you would not like it. Therefore, with all humility, I apologize but I cannot speak about it.

Video Title: L6 विश्व में आद्य सत्य युग का, प्रजा शासन धारा और धर्म का विचार कैसे रहेगा? LIVE
Question: I have two questions. First, a researcher has calculated the dates of the Ramayana and Mahabharata using astrological and geological data. Is his dating correct? Second, to prevent the wrong propagation of the Malika, can't we get it printed in Hindi and other languages and distribute it?
Answer: Regarding your first question about dates, our dharma is eternal. Before the Matsya avatar, Lord Vishnu instructed King Satyavrata to collect all the Vedas, Puranas, and herbs because a great flood was coming. After the flood, all these scriptures were revealed again. Dharma exists in every yuga. Places from past yugas still exist today. Vrindavan from Dvapara Yuga, which was over 5,000 years ago, is still here. The Sarayu river from the time of Lord Rama in Treta Yuga is still here. These are not just historical events; they are part of an eternal reality. We respect historians, but the scriptures follow their own eternal flow. Regarding your second question, that's a good point. We can propagate the Malika, but if we publish it as a book in Hindi, people will create Hindi and English editions and turn it into a business. That's why we don't publish it as an edition. Instead, propagate the message of the Malika. Look, son, time is very short. A cyclonic change is coming to the world by 2029. In this critical time, follow the path of the Malika to save yourself. Then, we can all work together in the Sudharma Sabha. Right now, the most important thing is how you and your family can remain safe. Follow that path. If you see a good person, guide them towards the Malika's path and this satsang. Continue your spiritual work.

Video Title: L7 महाविनाशक परमाणु बम से रक्षा पाने का उपाय। #kashinathmishra
Question: Why is it that a devotee of God suffers so much, while someone who is not a devotee lives their life happily?
Answer: The speaker explains this by referencing a conversation between Yudhishthira and Lord Krishna in the Srimad Bhagavatam. Lord Krishna himself said that those who worship Brahma, Mahadev, or the Goddess receive good results in this very life. For instance, one who worships Mahadev, in a short time, Mahalakshmi fills their home with abundance and prosperity. But for those who worship me (Lord Krishna/Vishnu), suffering comes to them because I absorb their karma. I take on their karma from many past lives to make them pure, virtuous, and beautiful human beings, trying to bring them to Vaikuntha (the celestial abode). That is why a devotee of Vishnu certainly faces hardships in this life. However, at the time of death, they go to Vaikuntha and attain eternal bliss. In the stream of human life, those who take refuge in Lord Vishnu attain liberation (mukti). They do not face torment, are not born into a lower caste, and receive infinite happiness. Therefore, God's devotees are sorrowful in this life. But to end all these sorrows, Lord Kalki will gather the devotees of the four yugas in this Ananta Yuga and give them infinite happiness. A time of happiness is coming for the devotees, and a time of destruction is coming for the sinners.

Video Title: L7 महाविनाशक परमाणु बम से रक्षा पाने का उपाय। #kashinathmishra

They become ghosts and spirits and wander for many ages. Similarly, for the people who will die in the coming destruction, whether in India or across the world, there will be no one left to perform their final rites. This is a result of the terrible karma they have accumulated in their past lives. Their rites will not be performed, and they will become ghosts and wandering souls, suffering for many yugas. This is the sorrowful fate that awaits them.

When the number of righteous people increases according to the scriptures, dharma is established. Thirdly, the time of Kali Yuga has also ended. So, the work of establishing dharma is ongoing. You see, there are COVID patients, houses catching fire, bikes catching fire on the road, forest fires, and houses suddenly catching fire for no reason. And there are recurring cyclones year after year, which are a great source of sorrow for human society. The oppressive rule of governments, which burden the people so much that it's difficult for the poor and middle class to survive, is also a sign of dharma's establishment. The war for this is near and will last for at least six years. In between the war, for the establishment of dharma, there will be great fires, intense heat, and massive earthquakes. It will happen in all regions. You are already seeing floods, unseasonal rains, and frequent landslides. This is the time of dharma's establishment. Greater calamities are yet to come. But if you have physical ailments, do not keep the fast. I say this because in Kali Yuga, just by chanting the Lord's name with devotion, we get the fruit of all yajnas, japas, and tapas. So if you are well and your body has no issues, then observe the Ekadashi fast, there is no problem. You can eat fruits. Even if you eat prasad offered to the Lord, it doesn't break the fast. The karma we did in our past lives is the reason we suffer from diseases. To deal with this, there is one solution: by continuously chanting the Lord's name and reading the Srimad Bhagavatam, all this can be overcome. It has happened for many people. As your dharma increases, diseases will gradually diminish. This is the solution prescribed by our scriptures.

Video Title: L9 विश्व के सभी भक्तों के बारे में (पद्म कल्प टीका ग्रंथ) भविष्य मालिका में वर्णन है।

Video Title: L9 विश्व के सभी भक्तों के बारे में (पद्म कल्प टीका ग्रंथ) भविष्य मालिका में वर्णन है।

Answer: Listen, mother, this is the end of an era. A time will come when everyone will become unemployed, but that time has not fully arrived yet. I suggest that your entire family, if you are all on the same page, should stop eating meat, fish, and eggs. Read the Srimad Bhagavatam at home every day and chant the name of the Lord, Shri Satyananda. Everything will be fine, and you yourself will see the change. Video Title: L9 विश्व के सभी भक्तों के बारे में (पद्म कल्प टीका ग्रंथ) भविष्य मालिका में वर्णन है।
Question: I am from Punjab. What will be the contribution of our Punjab and Sikhism in the change of the era and the establishment of dharma?

The great Guru Nanak was a supreme devotee of the Lord. He himself came to the Jagannath Kshetra, had a vision of Lord Jagannath, and to this day, Guru Nanak Dev's monastery and ashram are in Puri. We are all one; we are all Hindus. Many devotees of Lord Kalki are from the Sikh community in Punjab, Haryana, Delhi, and in every corner of India. Guru Nanak himself mentioned the Kalki avatar in his sacred texts. This means that the entire Sikh community should follow this. If your Guru described the Kalki avatar, you should contemplate it and follow it for your own good. Follow the path of the Lord and your Guru, and propagate Sanatan Dharma.

Video Title: L9 विश्व के सभी भक्तों के बारे में (पद्म कल्प टीका ग्रंथ) भविष्य मालिका में वर्णन है।

Video Title: L9 विश्व के सभी भक्तों के बारे में (पद्म कल्प टीका ग्रंथ) भविष्य मालिका में वर्णन है।

Answer: The Malika says, 'Ghoda kudiba, ghoda kudiba, ghoda ku hada naahi, Raja mandale kapi dekhi...' which means 'The horse will leap, the horse will leap, the horse has no bones, seeing the monkey in the king's circle...'. This is not about a literal horse but refers to the flag on the Lord's temple. The flag has an image of a monkey (Lord Hanuman) on it, and this will be a sign in the future.

Video Title: L9 विश्व के सभी भक्तों के बारे में (पद्म कल्प टीका ग्रंथ) भविष्य मालिका में वर्णन है।
Question: How can one practice devotion to Madhav (a name for Lord Krishna)?
Answer: Sit in one place and repeatedly chant His name. Visualize the form of Lord Krishna in front of you. He himself will manifest. When devotion deepens, it will be difficult to even speak. Just sit in one place and continuously chant the Lord's name, thinking there is no one else in the world but you and Madhav. Close your eyes, keep Krishna's form before you, and chant His name. Devotion will surely come. If possible, read the 'Gopi Leela' (the divine play of the Gopis) from the Srimad Bhagavatam. So much devotion will arise that you will sit and weep, and you will automatically attain divine knowledge (Brahma Gyan). You will experience a happiness that is not found anywhere else in this world.

Video Title: L9 विश्व के सभी भक्तों के बारे में (पद्म कल्प टीका ग्रंथ) भविष्य मालिका में वर्णन है।

Answer: The answer to your question is in the Bhavishya Malika, where the great sage Sachidananda wrote, 'Kolkata sahar jali podi hoibo khyara,' meaning the city of Kolkata will burn to ashes. There will be such a devastating war initiated by China that the destruction will be unstoppable. I will speak more about West Bengal later, as Chaitanya Mahaprabhu also wrote about it. The demonic people there will be destroyed. But the devotees who chant the name of Madhav will be saved, no matter how much fire, flood, or disease there is. People will realize the power of the name 'Madhav' when the time comes. What your wife saw in the dream is what is going to happen. The destruction by fire will be many crores of times worse than any flood. This is the word from Lord Kalki's heart; see it as something that is bound to happen.

Video Title: L9 विश्व के सभी भक्तों के बारे में (पद्म कल्प टीका ग्रंथ) भविष्य मालिका में वर्णन है।

Answer: I have said this before. First, every person in every household should read the Srimad Bhagavatam. Second, become completely vegetarian. This means no meat, fish, or even intoxicants like gutkha, paan, or bidi. Third, chant the name of Shri Madhav, the name of Satyananda. If you want to come to the Lord and survive the great destruction that is coming, following this path will save you. Just do this much.

Video Title: L9 विश्व के सभी भक्तों के बारे में (पद्म कल्प टीका ग्रंथ) भविष्य मालिका में वर्णन है।

Answer: Look, mother, it's like this: a person's horoscope might show a lifespan of 100 years, but they might die in an accident or from an illness at 40. We must then analyze why they died so young. Similarly, when the burden of sin increases, the lifespan of the era decreases. The great sage Sachidananda wrote in the Bhavishya Malika that due to the immense weight of sin, the Kali Yuga's lifespan of 432,000 years will be reduced to only 5,000 years. Sins like matricide, feticide, cow slaughter, and infanticide are rampant. How much sin is there? People drink the milk of mother cow as children and then slaughter her when they grow up. Is this dharma? Because of such sins, the age of Kali Yuga is being cut short and it will be destroyed.

Video Title: L9 विश्व के सभी भक्तों के बारे में (पद्म कल्प टीका ग्रंथ) भविष्य मालिका में वर्णन है।

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, I had a dream three or four days ago. I crossed a river, and its water turned green. Then I reached a very beautiful mountain. What does this dream mean?
Answer: Ma'am, this means that when the establishment of dharma happens in the coming days, only about seven or eight people will be left in each village; not everyone will survive. Those who remain will be saved by God in this way. You have been saved. If you stay on this path, you will be fine. Okay, Jai Ganesh.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: My question is, is there a description of Ahmedabad city in the Malika Purana?
Answer: Look, Gujarat is mentioned in the Malika. It is written about the Dwarkadhish region and that devotees should do their work there. It is also written that many saints and devotees will be there. The establishment of dharma will happen everywhere in the world—in Gujarat, across the country, and in Odisha. The five elements will cause destruction everywhere. But for the people of India to be saved, you must follow the path of the Malika. The devotees will do what is necessary. This is most important. Follow the path I describe, and it will be good for you. Jai Shri Prabhu, Shri Jagannath.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, I had a dream a month ago. I found a beautiful child with curly hair and was carrying him. I saw the Yamuna river flowing fiercely, but I crossed it. Then I reached my house, crossed a mountain and some kind of attack, and finally reached your house, but the child had disappeared. What does this dream mean?
Answer: Son, this means that when the great flood (jal pralay) occurs, God will save you. That is the meaning of your dream. Okay. Jagannath, please continue.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I had a vision of the Mother Goddess, and she was asking for a mantra. I told her that I don't take anything from anyone. What should I do?
Answer: Take refuge in God, and the Mother Goddess will be pleased. The Goddess herself is in refuge of the Lord. So, come to the Lord's refuge, ma'am, and the Mother will also be happy. There will be no problem. Just do this. Pranam. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I had a dream while I was praying. I saw a man in white clothes and a turban. He gave me something, but I couldn't see what it was, and he asked me to fix it. I don't understand who he was or what the dream means.
Answer: Saints and devotees are there to help you. You should continue your worship. The desires in your mind are not just from this life's karma but are rooted in your past lives. It's difficult to say more, but the more you remain devoted to God, the better. You have received a divine vision (darshan), so continue on your path. Everything comes from God.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I haven't studied Sanskrit, but I listen to some prayers from the Samaveda. Is this path correct for me?
Answer: The most sacred path is the Vedic tradition. The dharma that upholds the universe is Sanatana Dharma. It has existed for crores of years and still exists today. History itself, with its concept of 'BC' (Before Christ), proves that Sanatana Dharma existed before. It is the foremost path. Due to the current age (Kali Yuga), many religions have emerged, but when the next age (Satya Yuga) comes, only one dharma will remain: Sanatana Dharma. At the end of this cycle, only our Vedic Sanatana Dharma will prevail. Okay, ma'am. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, you mentioned a war between India and China. In which year will that happen, for instance, 2024 or 2025?
Answer: I have discussed this before in our Satsang and on the Kalki Avatar YouTube channel. The process of establishing dharma began in 2020 and will last for about 10 years. India's first war will be with Pakistan, and China will join them. Thirteen Muslim countries will fight against us. America will not help India, and five of our neighboring countries will also betray us. This process started in 2020 and will intensify with extreme weather events like torrential rains causing floods and intense heatwaves—look at the temperatures in America and Canada. The time is near. It will happen when God wills it, possibly between 2020 and 2028. The war with Pakistan is certain, but God will decide the exact time. The Malika states that Lord Kalki will decide when the war will happen after he appears. I don't want to elaborate on the war with China. The war with Pakistan was about to happen once, but Lord Kalki stopped it because his devotees had not yet gathered. Until they are united, the establishment of dharma will be delayed. However, this process, including the war of the five elements, will continue. Keep watching; everything will become clear. The words of the Malika are unchangeable and will come to pass. The time is near. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pranam, Pandit ji. I am from Basti, near Ayodhya. Is there anything written about our area in the 'Parikalpana' scripture? How can we know?
Answer: A 'Gyanmandal' (circle of knowledge) for Lord Kalki will be established in Ayodhya. The Malika mentions 100 such circles worldwide, and the Ayodhya circle will be one of them. It will host several thousand devotees who come through the Malika, and they will work to establish dharma in Ayodhya and the surrounding regions of Uttar Pradesh. As I've said before, the future ruler of Ayodhya will be a Suryavanshi king, currently performing penance in Kalapa Grama in the Himalayas, whom Lord Kalki will enthrone. A lot is set to happen there. Lord Kalki visited Ayodhya in his childhood and has been there again since. You already know about the purification that took place. Two years ago, Lord Kalki visited Ayodhya for two days, and that's when we knew something good was about to happen. Okay, son. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Lightning struck near the temple, but the temple itself was unharmed. What is the reason for this, and what does it signify?
Answer: The lightning strike on the deity's temple is a sign from the gods themselves, indicating that they have begun the process of establishing dharma. Devotees must understand this. The Malika clearly predicts that lightning will strike temples. This is like changing a kingdom's flag to mark the beginning of a new era. To end the age of Kali Yuga and begin Satya Yuga, the flag at the Dwarkadhish temple tore last year and again this year, and now this lightning strike has occurred. This is a message for the devotees from the Malika. If we fail to understand it now, a time will come when we will regret it, saying, 'Pandit ji warned us, but we didn't listen, and now we are facing the difficult consequences of our mistake.'

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, how can we join the Sudharma Mahasangh?
Answer: I repeatedly tell you in these sessions to first join the 'Vishwa Sanatan Dharma'. There is a contact number for it. You should speak with the saints and devotees involved in this work. After connecting with them and achieving a certain level of purity, you can then join the Sudharma Mahasangh. This is not a business; it is the propagation of Sanatana Dharma. Before God's full manifestation, He sends His devotees to spread His message. This promotion of the Malika is the promotion of Lord Kalki, who has already arrived. Devotees who understand this should all join. Together, we will celebrate the Malika and work towards establishing dharma. Therefore, I urge you to join the Sanatan Dharma WhatsApp group, understand and follow its principles and the Satsang, and then you can join the Dharmasangh. Okay, son. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am from Barrackpore, Bengal. Will Lord Kalki ever visit Mayapur, the birthplace of Chaitanya Mahaprabhu? Also, you had promised to speak about the Vaishnava sect today. Could you please do so?
Answer: Yes, that was supposed to be our topic for today. I was planning to discuss the Vaishnava dharma, but we had to change the subject due to the news of the lightning strike at the Dwarkadhish temple. Chaitanya Mahaprabhu's ancestral home was in Jajpur, Odisha. Lord Kalki will definitely visit Nabadwip, as it is the Lord's birthplace. The Malika also mentions that some Vaishnavas will engage in the nine forms of devotion (Navadha Bhakti), chant the holy name, and follow the righteous path. However, those who consume meat and fish will not be part of the establishment of dharma, though they will be saved. This is a very vast topic that would require two or three full sessions to discuss properly. We will discuss it in the future. For now, please accept the Lord's blessings.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am a devotee of Nitai-Gauranga and Radha-Krishna. You say that Lord Kalki has already arrived. One must worship a single form of God, so I am confused. If we are to take refuge in Lord Kalki, how can we continue to worship Radha-Krishna? Please clarify this.
Answer: When the era (yuga) changes, the form of God also changes. Devotees follow the specific incarnation of God for that particular era. During the time of Lord Rama, people worshipped Rama. During the time of Lord Krishna, they worshipped Krishna. Our scriptures mention 24 primary incarnations and many others. In Sanatana Dharma, when Lord Kalki arrives, we must follow him, chant his name, and adhere to his principles. A true devotee recognizes all of the Lord's incarnations. For example, Hanuman, who was devoted to Lord Rama, also understood and revered Lord Krishna. A good devotee will always recognize the current incarnation of the Lord. Please understand this. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, will there be electricity in the future?
Answer: Okay, son. There will be a much better form of electricity. It will be a kind that doesn't cause death or electric shocks and doesn't generate heat. God will create this type of electricity, which will be cool and available to everyone for free. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, I saw a video where you mentioned that for 31 days, there would be no worship or food offerings for Lord Jagannath. Could you please explain this?
Answer: This is a very profound and secret matter, and I do not wish to reveal it. Discussing it could create problems for the administration and for me, so I cannot elaborate. It is written that for 21 days, no food offerings will be made in the Lord's temple. As for when or how this will happen, only the Lord truly knows. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: My elder son had a dream two years ago where he, his father, and his uncle climbed a mountain while 'Om' was being chanted. At the top, they saw Lord Hanuman sitting in a bright light, feeding fruits to animals and birds. What does this dream signify?
Answer: Ma'am, this is an excellent dream, and it is confirmed by the Malika. In the coming establishment of dharma, my spiritual master, Lord Hanuman, will play a key role. He will take full responsibility for Lord Kalki's mission, saving devotees from Badrinath to Odisha. To end hunger, the Malika mentions that the leaves of a specific plant will provide nourishment for everyone. This is absolutely true. Currently, Lord Hanuman is in deep penance on a mountain, meditating for this purpose.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, during the world war, what will be the impact of the war and major earthquakes on Vrindavan?
Answer: Ma'am, I bow to the holy land of Vrindavan. The impact of earthquakes in Vrindavan will not be severe. However, there will be diseases and pandemics. Despite this, Vrindavan will remain safe. Jai Shri Madhav.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, how can we surrender to the Lord and take refuge in him? Also, how can we distinguish between the guidance of our mind and the guidance of our soul?
Answer: Son, in this age of Kali Yuga, the greatest path to surrender is chanting the Lord's holy name. There is no other way. Chanting the name is the ultimate form of surrender. Follow the teachings of the Srimad Bhagavatam, adopt a vegetarian diet, and perform acts of charity for all living beings, including animals and humans. By following this true path, you will achieve surrender to God. Additionally, you should join the dharma organization and contribute to its work.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, the WhatsApp group is full, and we are unable to join.
Answer: Okay, there is a contact number available, including one for a saint named Narendra. You should speak with the saints and find a way. The purpose of the Malika is to unite all devotees. Our mission is to bring everyone together under Sanatana Dharma. You should also participate in this work. Find people who genuinely want to take refuge in God and bring them into the Sanatana Dharma organization. We will all proceed together on this path.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am from Punjab. Can you tell us about Lord Kalki's visit to Ayodhya in 2018?
Answer: Yes, he was there. He stayed in Ayodhya for two days and visited the Ram Janmabhoomi site. He told the devotees that the remaining work would be completed in the future. It is not appropriate to discuss this in great detail. Son, these are divine secrets and shouldn't be revealed to everyone. You ask, and I answer, but the most important thing is to follow the Malika and the path I have shown. Take refuge in God. No one knows what the next moment holds; the world can change in an instant. This path is what will save us and our families. So, spread the message of the Malika and follow its principles. It is not right to speak openly about all of the Lord's secrets, and for that, I apologize. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am from Maharashtra. Is there anything written in the Malika about Mumbai, our economic capital?
Answer: Yes, the Malika writes about destruction in Mumbai. The city will be damaged by a combination of floods, earthquakes, and pandemics. However, I want to make it clear that those who follow the path of the Malika, remember the Lord, and perform their spiritual duties will remain unharmed. A very difficult time is approaching, with specific dangers for large buildings, but it is not appropriate for me to speak about this openly. There are many challenges ahead. If I were to reveal everything, it would cause widespread fear. It is better to be cautious in advance. Follow the path: first, read the Srimad Bhagavatam; second, follow the Malika; and third, spread the Lord's name. I can only give this much advice. The times are bad, so please be careful. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L10 चारों धाम से कलियुग अंत के संकेत , Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I heard in one of your videos that the Lord will descend on Earth with approximately 74,000-75,000 devotees. Has this already happened, or is it yet to occur?
Answer: I will answer this question. All the devotees have already taken birth. All the gods, goddesses, Yakshas, Gandharvas, and Nagas who are destined to assist in the Lord's mission have also taken birth and are already engaged in their respective tasks. The Malika serves as the medium to find and unite these devotees, because without its knowledge, they cannot learn about the Lord or the events to come. The path of the Malika is meant to save these devotees. Everyone has been born, and they will all be united.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: What does the Malika say about the 13-day cycle? You mentioned something about a 13-day 'paksha' (lunar fortnight). Did a 13-day paksha also occur before the Mahabharata? And how many 13-day pakshas will there be at the end of Kali Yuga? Please provide some information on this.
Answer: According to the Malika, the number 13 is significant. It refers to a 13-day paksha, 13 days of rule, a union of 13 political parties, and a union of 13 Muslim countries. The Malika states, 'A 13-day paksha will cause a war, creating great concern.' When this happens, Lord Kalki will think that the time to establish dharma has arrived. There will be a conflict over the establishment of dharma for 13 years. 13 Muslim countries will unite, and 13 political parties will unite to attack India. The unification of Muslim countries has already happened. Lord Kalki will establish dharma in the Kali Yuga. Keep in mind certain dates like the 13th, 27th, 7th, and 17th. On these dates, there will be great destruction in the world, and major works of establishing dharma will be carried out through the Lord.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: I have a few questions. Firstly, by God's grace, we have connected with you and this spiritual path. How will we know if we have become pure enough to join the Sudharma Mahasangh and participate in the establishment of dharma? Secondly, what about those of us who are on this path and are trying our best, but face obstacles like uncooperative family members? How will God fully accept us, and what can we do? Thirdly, I am a South Indian Tamilian from the Sri Vaishnava tradition, so we are already vegetarian. However, my relatives do not know Hindi and cannot connect with this stream. What about them? Lastly, you mentioned an organization in Rameswaram. How can we practically get involved and work for the establishment of dharma there?
Answer: I am very happy to hear you read the Vishnu Sahasranama. A devotee of Lord Vishnu is a medium to reach God. To answer your questions: In this Kali Yuga, Lord Kalki will travel to every country, and devotees from all over the world will connect with the Sudharma Sangh through the Malika. Lord Kalki will travel abroad to establish Sanatana Dharma, and his devotees there will be given full responsibility. So, the Malika will be preached worldwide. You should join the Sanatana Dharma WhatsApp group. When the time comes, you will be included in the Lord's 'near connection examination.' For now, follow the path we are showing. Read the Srimad Bhagavatam at home every day. Do not force your family members; if they join with faith, that is good. Perform Trisandhya—prayers at the three junctures of the day (morning, noon, and evening). If possible, offer respects to the Sun God, as this is part of our Sanatana Dharma. Regarding Rameswaram, there will be a 'mandal' (center) of Lord Kalki there. Devotees will gradually gather and join the Lord. Those devotees will then work to spread dharma throughout the South. Just as sages spread Lord Rama's name, in this age, devotees will spread Lord Kalki's message through the Malika. Regarding the language barrier, it is not a problem that your relatives don't understand Hindi. The saints who manage this satsang can speak with them in English, and I can as well. The language of Satya Yuga will be Sanskrit and Devanagari, but all other languages like English, Russian, Tamil, and Telugu will merge into it. They can contact the number provided and speak in English. Finally, a time is coming when events we have never seen, heard, or imagined will occur—great floods, fire from the sky, earthquakes. Chant the name of Lord Madhav for salvation. Follow the path shown in the group, and you will be fine.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: People say the final battle will take place in Israel. Is there any mention of Israel in the Malika regarding this?
Answer: I am preaching the Malika as written by Mahapurush Achyutananda for the devotees. According to the Malika, initially, Israel will be allied with India against a common enemy. However, during the World War, the entire equation will change. Israel will side with America, along with Pakistan, China, England, and Africa. On the other side, Germany, France, Japan, and Russia will be with India. The Malika does not state that the final war will be in Israel. The final, decisive war will take place in Odisha, with Lord Kalki. A coalition of thirteen Muslim countries, China, and Turkey will advance towards Odisha's capital, Bhubaneswar, through the holy land of Jagannath Puri. They will realize that Lord Kalki is controlling the world, and they will attempt to defeat him to establish their own rule. At that moment, Lord Kalki will summon his Sudarshan Chakra and annihilate millions of foreign soldiers on that very spot. He will then assume a fierce form, as radiant as a comet, mount his horse, and begin the work of destruction across the entire world.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: Is it true that Lord Kalki will come to Punjab and pay his respects at the Harmandir Sahib (Golden Temple) in Amritsar?
Answer: Definitely, yes. It is a matter of the Guru tradition. When the time comes for him to visit the Golden Temple, he will go, but no one will know. He will be in a human body, and no one will be able to recognize him. He will not reveal his identity to anyone. But he will surely come. In every yuga, the Lord has visited every holy site and pilgrimage center. Lord Kalki will also go. The virtuous devotees of the Sikh community, who are devoted to Lord Vishnu, will join him. Guru Nanak Dev himself wrote about the Kalki avatar, thereby giving a sign to the Sikh community that Lord Kalki is coming. The Sikh community will also join Lord Kalki in the establishment of dharma. He will certainly visit the Golden Temple, but he will go secretly, have his darshan, and return. No one will be able to recognize him.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: What does the Malika say about the Saraswati river?
Answer: The Malika states that all the rivers that existed in Satya Yuga, Treta Yuga, and Dvapara Yuga will reappear in India. The holy and sacred Saraswati river, along with other rivers that have disappeared or gone underground, will all manifest again. The waters of all rivers will become pure and sweet, which will be a source of joy for humanity. People will be able to practice agriculture, and they will live in peace and happiness. The climate will become cool; the intense heat will not be there. All the lost rivers in India and across the world will re-emerge, and the Saraswati river will surely manifest.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: You once mentioned that a war between India and Pakistan was about to happen but was stopped. Could you please shed some light on why it was stopped, given that it was destined to occur?
Answer: According to the Malika, that war will definitely happen. The Lord postponed it at that time for a specific reason: the devotees had not yet gathered. The Malika states that the great war will begin, starting with India and Pakistan, only when all the devotees have assembled. It was not the Lord's will for it to happen then because the required number of devotees for the Sudharma Mahasangh had not yet been reached. So, we have to wait. On one side, the process of gathering the devotees is underway, and on the other side, the process of the world's destruction is also proceeding.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: Please tell us what the Malika says about Singapore. I have been following you since 2016. We are vegetarian; only about 4-5% of the population here is. Will we have a place in the 'mandal' (spiritual circle)?
Answer: The entire world is divided into 16 mandals. For example, there is an Africa Mandal. Mahapurush Achyutananda wrote in the Bhavishya Malika that devotees who follow the Malika can join any mandal they wish. So, even if you are in Singapore, you can join the Delhi-Haryana-Punjab-Rajasthan mandal, or the Vrindavan mandal, or the Ayodhya mandal. You can join any of them. I also advise you to join the 'Vishwa Sanatan Dharma' WhatsApp group. Now, regarding the future: The eastern and southern regions of the world will be completely submerged in water. Very little of the east will remain. Only those who live the life of saints and follow the Malika will survive to become the seeds for the new Satya Yuga. Indonesia, Thailand, Hong Kong, Singapore, Japan, and half of China will be inundated by floods. The destruction from water will be far greater than the destruction from war. A time will come when a celestial body from the sun will break into three pieces and fall into the world's oceans. The water level will rise by 1200 to over 2000 feet. Even small places will experience floods and cyclones. However, the water will not touch the devotees. Lord Hanuman and Lord Balaram themselves will save the devotees from the water. If you are connected to the Malika, remain in dharma, and follow the path shown, such as reading the Srimad Bhagavatam, no harm will come to you.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: You said that most people in India will perish. How will we know if we will be saved or not? Is everything predetermined?
Answer: Listen carefully. Mahapurush has written in the Malika that only those devotees who are connected with the Malika will go to Satya Yuga. If you have faith in the Malika, follow its prescribed path, and work within the Sudharma Mahasangh, then you are on the right path to be saved. Some people will go to Satya Yuga in their next life. In India, 33 crore people will remain, and out of them, 72,000 people will directly come to the Sudharma Mahasangh. This is all part of the Lord's work and his decision.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: I feel that the great event will happen next year in the month of Bhadrapada. My heart has completely changed, and I feel detached from worldly illusions and attachments. What should I do?
Answer: No, if you are married and have two children, you must take care of them. Fulfill your duties and responsibilities towards them properly. Continue to uphold your family dharma; do not stop. Continue with the Lord's bhajan (devotional singing) and kirtan (chanting).

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: What is written in the Malika about Maharashtra? Also, everyone has a job and must perform their karma. Recently, a leopard entered our village. Is this a sign of the times described in the scriptures and the coming of the Kalki avatar?
Answer: In the final phase of Kali Yuga, all wild animals will enter populated areas and villages, causing great harm to humans. This signifies that just as humans no longer follow any rules, animals will also break their natural laws. They are meant to live in the jungle, but they will leave it and enter human settlements, causing destruction. This is indeed a sign that the time of destruction is near. Many devotees have been born in Maharashtra; they will join the Lord, participate in satsang, and work for the establishment of dharma. There are many devotees all over India, and they will all work together. The 'mandals' (groups) will have a single name but may encompass two or three states.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: What is written in the Malika for Bengaluru and the entire state of Karnataka? Also, how can we join the Sudharma Sangh? I haven't even joined your WhatsApp group yet. What is the process?
Answer: To join, the contact number is provided in the description of our YouTube videos. Please contact that number to join the Vishwa Sanatan Dharma group. We invite all good, saintly people to join the Sudharma Sangh and Sanatana Dharma. Regarding Bengaluru and Karnataka, you must understand that devotees and sinners exist everywhere, in every corner of India and the world. The coming destruction will be worldwide. The Malika specifically mentions that the southern region has many devotees. It also names major cities like Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, and Madras, describing the immense destruction that will occur there. I don't want to describe it in full detail to avoid creating fear. However, the work of establishing dharma will happen everywhere. In Bengaluru, Karnataka, Andhra Pradesh, and all other states, there will be floods, fire, earthquakes, and pandemics. Everything will happen. The pandemic will be the most widespread. No place will be spared because the entire world needs to be cleansed. The demonic people must be destroyed, and the saintly people must be saved. Therefore, follow the path of dharma. Do not worry about what happens to others. If we remain in dharma, God will protect us.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: Pandit ji, when will the period of Saturn in Pisces (Meena Shani) arrive?
Answer: According to our astrological calculations, Saturn is expected to enter the sign of Pisces between the years 2024 and 2025. The Malika states that when Saturn enters Pisces, the work of establishing dharma will greatly accelerate. It is set to happen in 2025. But before we reach that, we have to navigate through the remaining years. It is not that easy.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: You have said somewhere that according to the Malika, when Kali (the personification of the dark age) enters among the 16 Sardars (chiefs), a great flood will occur. Could you please elaborate on this?
Answer: There are 256 types of devotion, and within them, there will be 16 'mandals' (spiritual regions or groups). To control and manage these 16 mandals, there will be a 'Senapati' (commander or chief) for each one, who will be referred to as a 'Sardar'. These 16 Sardars will work for the establishment of dharma. When the 16 mandals are fully formed, the Lord himself will appoint a representative or head for each of these places. This decision rests entirely with the Lord. We must wait for that time to come.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: Have you had a direct vision (darshan) of the Lord himself?
Answer: It is not appropriate to reveal such things. If one were to reveal it, some people in the world would accept it with great devotion and surrender, but this is a very secret and sacred matter. It is not right for me, or for the sanctity of the Malika, to speak of it in a public forum. However, Mahapurush Achyutananda has written this: those souls who were sages in Satya Yuga, who were part of the monkey army in Treta Yuga, who participated in the divine play with the Lord in Vrindavan during Dvapara Yuga, and who have taken birth again in Kali Yuga—they surely know about this. It is they who are granted the Lord's darshan.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: I want to ask about Ramdev Pir in Rajasthan. Please tell us about him.
Answer: Look, I work for Sanatana Dharma, which is the greatest dharma of all. The Srimad Bhagavatam describes the 24 avatars of Lord Vishnu. The Bhavishya Malika states that there will be three avatars of Lord Krishna in this age. One was Sri Buddha Dev, who appeared in the middle era. The second avatar, as described by Mahamuni Vyasdev in the Srimad Bhagavatam, is the avatar of Sri Guru Dev. And the third is the Kalki avatar. When we study the scriptures, there is no greater or more authoritative text for Sanatana Dharma than the Srimad Bhagavatam. In that holy book, this is what I have read. I respect what you are asking and offer my salutations, but regarding the Lord's avatars, this is the extent of my knowledge from my studies.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: We worship the Lord in the morning and evening, but we are not 100% pure in our thoughts and words. What will happen to people like us who perform worship, but lies still escape our minds, and we sometimes speak harsh words to others? What is going to happen to us, and how can we change ourselves so that Lord Ram may forgive us?
Answer: Let me ask you, do you read the Srimad Bhagavatam? According to the path of the Malika, every single person who is destined to go to Satya Yuga will definitely read the Bhagavatam. One who does not read the Bhagavatam will never see Satya Yuga. This is the first principle of the Malika. It is fine that you read the Gita, but by reading the Srimad Bhagavatam, the anger you feel and the lack of control over your five senses will be brought into check. The Srimad Bhagavatam has immense power. So, start reading the Srimad Bhagavatam, and gradually, your sins will be cleansed. Follow the path that we are showing you; that will be good for you.

Video Title: L11 वैष्णव धर्मी भक्तों के लिए मालिका में क्या चेतावनी है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra |
Question: I am from Rajasthan and I need guidance. Who should I talk to in order to join the 'mandal' (group) that will be formed for Rajasthan?
Answer: You should contact the numbers of the saints that are provided in our YouTube video descriptions. They will guide you with everything. Our desire is that you all at least follow the path and perform your religious duties and programs. There are many so-called saints in India who are busy preaching their own version of dharma for business. What will happen when the time for the true establishment of dharma is at our doorstep? We don't know what will happen to society tomorrow. But if you are connected to the true dharma, it won't matter what happens to the world; it will not affect you. At the very least, the good people who wish to change should change now. This is the will of God.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: The 13-day 'paksha' (lunar fortnight) is starting this September. What will be its effect?
Answer: Look, it was written in the Malika that a 13-day fortnight will occur repeatedly. In one month, in one fortnight, there will be a full moon, new moon, and Sankranti. And in the same fortnight, a lunar eclipse, solar eclipse, new moon, and Sankranti will occur together. This will happen repeatedly in the world. This 13-day period will come again and again, not just once. It has happened before. According to the scriptures of the Malika, when Lord Kalki turns 13, a 13-day fortnight will come, which is now approaching. It is written in the Malika that when the 13-day fortnight occurs, devotees will gather, and on the other hand, Lord Kalki will think about moving forward with the establishment of Dharma. The Lord has already turned 13, and the establishment of Dharma has also begun. Remember, the 13-day fortnight has come before and is coming again. This is a good sign for the devotees for the establishment of Dharma, but for the sinners, it is a sign of destruction. Jai Jagannath, pranam.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: My question is, in every era, demons first appear before us, and then God manifests. So in this era, will Kali (the demon) appear in a human body, and then the Kalki avatar will appear?
Answer: Look, son, I have already explained this. Kali resides in five places: where there is gambling, falsehood, intoxication, greed for gold, and illicit relations. Those who enjoy these things for their own pleasure are the people of Kali. They will be considered the demons of Kali. To destroy these demons, Lord Kalki will take avatar, as written in the scriptures. So, the people who believe in and follow these five elements in their social lives are the demons of Kali. Lord Kalki will not go around with weapons in his hands to destroy all these people. He will use the five elements (Panchabhoota) - through floods, earthquakes, diseases, pandemics, and conflicts, they will gradually be destroyed. Kali will not come as a single demon. All those in society who practice these five vices are the demons, and they will be the ones who are destroyed. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am from Kharagpur. Will something happen here or not? Can you tell me?
Answer: Everything will happen in Kolkata and West Bengal too. A time will come in the world when only 50% of the people in India will remain, and in the world, only one out of four. We will see this establishment of Dharma. Right now, only small things have started. A time will come when only 4-5 people will be left in a village. This is also written in the Malika. This is the word of Brahma; no one can avert it. At that time, even what we are doing now might not be possible. The path I am showing may not feel good now, but when the time comes, there will be no one to manage the situation. So, whoever follows this sacred path will be saved. Whoever doesn't will be destroyed by their own will. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: My father has not given up eating meat. What should I do?
Answer: Okay, I see. Look, if your father hasn't given it up... our path is very simple and stable. We cannot force or compel anyone. Whether someone changes or not is their choice. But you have to come to this purity and take refuge in God. See, we came alone, and we will go alone. We have a family in this world, so live with them in a disciplined way and also show them your Dharma. Everyone has a right to their own religion. Tell them to follow their own Dharma and read the Srimad Bhagavatam. If your father doesn't agree, do one thing: read the 'Gopi Leela' from the Srimad Bhagavatam to your father. He might understand. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: It is written in my horoscope... a pandit told me that there is no need to earn money, and after 40 years, whatever is meant to be mine will be mine. Also, when I go to the temple, they say that I will become a great man. What do you say about this?
Answer: Look, the greatest purity of this era is humility, hard work, and action (karma). Keep doing your work. A being should do what is required at the right time. It's fine that it's written in your birth chart, there's no problem with that. But my view is that all humans should perform their karma. Earn with your own hands through hard work, feed your family, and do something for the world. In this world, everyone is great with God's blessings. So if it's written in your horoscope, then wait for it, but continue to do your work.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What will happen in Gujarat, and how can we reduce our sins?
Answer: Village after village will be destroyed by pandemics and buried. Along with that, there will be floods, cyclones, and conflicts. In all this, 70% of humanity will be lost, and there will be a great change in nature and the five elements. The demons will be destroyed—those who are sinners, who sin daily, and who sin after deliberation. To reduce the effect of this sin, it is first necessary to change yourself. Afterwards, our surroundings and the people who live with us will change. If we do it together, there will be some gradual change in the whole world. Those who change will survive, and those who don't, won't.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What does the Malika say about Patna, Bihar? Also, regarding the Hindi version of the Bhavishya Malika, people find it very difficult to understand and cannot derive the correct meaning. What should be done?
Answer: What is written in the Malika is that in Bihar, there will be more floods and earthquakes, which will cause great destruction and pandemics. But the devotees will be saved; this is written. As for the Hindi version of the Bhavishya Malika, it is indeed very difficult to understand. People will not be able to derive the correct meaning and will get confused. Therefore, there is no need for the book. Just follow the teachings as they are explained.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Greetings, Panditji. Could you say a few words about the 'Mandal'? I don't understand what it is. Also, you mentioned the use of the five elements, and it's very frightening. How can we protect ourselves and our families?
Answer: There is no problem for those who follow the path. Join the 'Vishwa Sanatan Dharma' group. Teach the Srimad Bhagavatam to all your family members. Follow the path of Dharma and righteousness, the principles of 'Satya Karma Dharma'. This is the greatest path to relief. That is what you can do. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: My question is, as you are saying, a very terrible deluge (pralaya) will come. So how can one survive it?
Answer: I am spreading this message for you all. I am telling you how human society can be saved and live joyfully. Join our 'Vishwa Sanatan Dharma' group, join the WhatsApp group, and stay in the flow of teachings. I am telling you, in the end, you will be saved only by following this path. Right now, this may seem bitter to people, but when the time comes, there will be no time to think. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is the connection between the King of Puri (Gajapati) and Lord Kalki?
Answer: God belongs only to the devotees. The king has come to this earth with blessings from a past life and is a devotee in this life too. His connection with Lord Kalki will happen when the time comes. See, Lord Kalki will not reveal his identity to everyone. When the time comes, the king will come to the refuge of God. It is written about this in the Malika. We must wait for that time. I don't know how many people will be there then or what will happen. At that time, there won't even be a network. But the devotees will experience this through their inner perception and their knowledge of the scriptures. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What will be the role of the ISKCON organization, which was established by Srila Prabhupada to spread Krishna consciousness, in the establishment of Dharma?
Answer: He brought about a great change in the entire world. I bow to him millions of times because he spread the name of Lord Sri Krishna throughout the world. It is our good fortune that such a divine soul was born in India. There are many devotees of Lord Sri Krishna in the world. But among them, not all will be saved. Only those who follow the Malika will be saved. Those who criticize the Malika and do not follow the word of God, God himself will decide their fate. It is written in the Malika that only the one who follows the path of the Malika and applies its principles in their social life is a true devotee, and only they will be saved.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Lord Ram had blessed Mother Vaishno Devi that when he comes as Kalki, he would marry her. So, has the Mother taken birth, and if so, where?
Answer: Son, in 2018, Mother Vaishno Devi met with Lord Kalki. According to the Malika, Mother Vaishno Devi has already taken birth in a human body in the Jagannath region of Odisha. When the time comes, Lord Brahma, Lord Mahadev, and Lord Vishnu will perform the marriage ceremony of Lord Kalki with Mother Vaishno Devi. It will happen in secret. This is written in the Malika.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: About 500 years ago, a pandit named Devayat Pandit prophesied that a day will come with a great war and disease, and then Sri Krishna will come from the north and kill the enemies with his sword. Is this true?
Answer: Many people have written about this. He knew about the Bhavishya Malika because he had divine powers. So, what he wrote is correct. That time is now upon us. According to that, follow the Malika. It will be good for you. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Which name or mantra should be chanted for salvation in this age?
Answer: In Satya Yuga, the name of Lord Vishnu was chanted. In Treta Yuga, devotees attained salvation by chanting the name of Ram. In Dvapara Yuga, they chanted the name of Lord Sri Krishna. Similarly, in Kali Yuga, those who chant the name of Jagannath will attain liberation. Now, Kali Yuga is ending, and Satya Yuga is coming. In this transitional period, the name to be chanted is 'Madhav'. The great saint Satchidananda has written about this. Chanting 'Madhav Madhav' constantly is the greatest path to salvation.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Which temple in Uttar Pradesh will be safe? Will Vrindavan and the Mathura region in Uttar Pradesh be safe?
Answer: Join the Satya Sanatan Dharma group, and the people in the group will connect you with the Sri Vrindavan Mathura Mandal.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Will computers and the internet stop working? With the arrival of the Kalki avatar, will internet access be reduced or completely finished?
Answer: First, according to the scriptures, the incarnation of Lord Kalki has already happened. After his incarnation, there will be many disruptions in the five elements and scientific technologies of the world. Because Kalki holds the key to the entire world, he can start things and stop them. So when the Lord has arrived, all modern technology and infrastructure will see a decline. But this is good for the devotees. The Lord has come to grant salvation. His name is 'Taranhaar' (The Savior). This is a message of happiness and peace for the world. It is very good. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Are Kalki and Imam Mahdi the same person or different? And will there be a fight between them?
Answer: According to the Srimad Bhagavatam and the path of Lord Kalki, Lord Kalki is the avatar. In the world, all religions will merge into one religion, Sanatana Dharma. Lord Kalki will not fight with specific people. He has come to cleanse the earth, free it from the flow of sin, and protect its balance. People from all religions—Hindu, Sanatana, Muslim—who follow Dharma will be saved by Lord Kalki. That is what will happen.

Video Title: L12 सारे विश्व मे जल प्रलय के तांडव होने का कारण क्या है? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: You said that in 2018, Vaishno Devi and Lord Kalki met. In 2018, there was a big dust storm. Is it written in the Malika that this was a sign of their meeting?
Answer: This is my own realization. The day the fire broke out on the Trikuta hills... it is written in the Malika that when a god or goddess leaves their abode, you will see fire in that region. Then you will know that the deity has left. In 2018, there was a fire on the Trikuta hills, people know about it. So, we consider that day as the day Mother Vaishno Devi left her abode. Following the Malika and its words, we say that was the day the Mother left her place for the establishment of Dharma and for the salvation of devotees all over the world.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Why was the Bhavishya Malika, which was started by the Panchasakha (five friends of Lord Chaitanya Mahaprabhu), written in Odisha, in the Odia language?
Answer: We will answer this question first because there is a duality in the mind about this. The Lord himself said, 'I will incarnate in the house of a Vishnu-worshipping Brahmin.' And which country will that be? The great saint Achyutananda wrote about this in his Bhavishya Malika, stating that the Lord's incarnation will take place in a location within this mortal realm, this universe, called Odisha. The Sambhal village is situated in that land. Saint Kapila also wrote in his Kapila Samhita that among all the countries in the world, the most sacred and holy land is India. And within this holy land of India, there is a state called Utkal (Odisha). There is no land on earth as sacred as Utkal. Lord Kapila knew well that the Lord's incarnation was to happen in the holy land of Odisha, making Odisha's soil the most sacred in the entire universe. Lord Krishna took his incarnation in Uttar Pradesh, and the Shrimad Bhagavat was composed there. Lord Rama took his incarnation on the holy soil of Ayodhya, also in Uttar Pradesh, and Saint Tulsidas, his great devotee, composed the Ramcharitmanas there. Similarly, when Lord Kalki's incarnation takes place on the sacred soil of Odisha, the scriptures about him, the Malika, were written in the Odia language. The great saint Achyutananda wrote, 'I will be born in the land of Utkal, in a human form, to gather my devotees.' The Malika will be propagated for the devotees, and through it, the establishment of dharma will occur. The Lord's incarnation will happen on the sacred soil of Odisha. The Panchasakha, especially Achyutananda, have repeatedly written this in their scriptures. The Kalki avatar will manifest in Odisha. He will save the devotees, and from the sacred land of Odisha, the message of the Malika will spread throughout the world. Listening to the Malika will create devotion and faith in the hearts of the people. Devotees will be reformed, and by listening, they will take refuge in Lord Kalki and join in the establishment of dharma across the world.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: In the Dvapara Yuga, at the time of Lord Krishna, there was a false Narayan named Paundraka. In the coming times, will we also encounter such false Kalkis, and what is the way to protect ourselves from them?
Answer: In every era, the Lord performs his divine play to save the devotees. For instance, the Shrimad Bhagavat mentioned that Lord Vishnu would be born to Vasudeva and Devaki, yet in that same era, some people gave Paundraka Vasudeva the status of God. Similarly, in this era, those who are true and righteous will come to the Lord. The Malika states that at the end of the Kali Yuga, 12 individuals will declare themselves as God, propagate their own version of dharma, gather devotees, build large organizations, and present themselves as God through grand speeches, spreading their name across India and the world. However, the true Lord's name will not be spread everywhere because he will work in secret. He will not propagate himself but will handpick his devotees. The Malika says that 12 individuals will declare themselves as God and will not follow the path of Sanatan Dharma. People, in their ignorance, will become their disciples. Many such people have already been exposed in India. Does God ever promote himself or make disciples? In which scripture is it written that God made disciples or gave a Guru Mantra? God comes to make friends, companions, and family. He treats devotees like his own family; they play with him, eat with him, and even share leftover food with him. The Lord performs his 'leela' (divine play), he doesn't come to create disciples or build organizations. But in the Kali Yuga, those who promote themselves, criticize the Malika, secretly make rich people their disciples, create trusts, and live a life of royalty are the false ones. Tulsidas wrote about this in the Ramcharitmanas, yet people don't understand. He wrote that in the Kali Yuga, so-called saints will amass great wealth and build grand ashrams, while householders will become poor due to their sins. What need does a true ascetic have for wealth? They are supposed to be renunciates. Yet, people run after them because God is not in their destiny. Those who have God in their destiny will find their way to Him, while others will take refuge in false prophets like Paundraka and lead their lives towards hell. The Malika clearly states that 12 false Kalkis or Gods will manifest themselves in India.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: A friend told me that around 2025, all the Muslim countries, along with China, will attack India and there will be a massacre of Hindus, Pandits, and Rajputs. In such a situation, why won't Lord Kalki save them beforehand? Why will he save them only after the destruction? This is my doubt.
Answer: This is a very good and relevant question for everyone, especially for all the devotees connected to the land of India. It's a valid question: why won't God save human society from the atrocities in India? But look, Baba, many atrocities happen within India as well. The people who do wrong things, what are they? They are also demons. The Lord needs a medium to eliminate all these people at once. Their destruction will happen through some medium, whether it's war or communal violence. But one thing is certain, and it is as solid as the Himalayas: the Pandits (the righteous devotees) are eternal. No one has been born on this earth who can even bend a single hair on a devotee's head. Lord Kalki will definitely save them; this is also written in the Malika.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, a small question. Our ancestors have always worshipped Lord Rama, Lord Krishna, and Mata Rani. Should we now stop worshipping them and only worship Lord Kalki? I have this doubt.
Answer: We are in the Kali Yuga. We worship Lord Rama, Lord Krishna, and the many other incarnations of God. Worshipping any form of God does not violate any scriptural principles. It is necessary for us, and we should do it. There is no fault or confusion in this. However, when God is present on Earth in a physical form, it is also necessary to worship and honor that form. If we don't, it becomes the Lord's 'leela' (divine play). When Lord Krishna was performing his leela in Vrindavan, the gopis called out to him, but the Brahmins could not recognize him. When they finally did, they could no longer get his 'darshan' (divine sight). This is written in the scriptures.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I read somewhere that Lord Kalki will reveal himself when he is 17 years old. According to you, what is his age now, and in which year does the Malika indicate he will manifest?
Answer: Look, Baba, sages and saints perform penance for many eras just to get a glimpse of the Lord. In the Dvapara Yuga, not everyone could recognize Lord Krishna. It was only after the establishment of dharma, when he eliminated Kansa and many other demons, that society recognized him as God. Right now, the process of gathering the devotees for the establishment of dharma is underway. When all the devotees are gathered and meet Lord Kalki, the Malika will be the medium; it will show the way. The Malika says that the Lord will perform his 'leela' in secret. The devotees will know, but he will not give 'darshan' (a divine appearance) to everyone. He will not roam from village to village showing himself to everyone. People will receive the fruits of their karma; those who have done good deeds will connect with the Lord. Therefore, this question I see on YouTube, 'When will Kalki manifest?', is not the right one. Who are these worthy people, performing penance, for whom God should manifest? Will he manifest for the sinners to give them salvation? That is not God's work. In this age too, saints will come to see the Lord and will participate in the establishment of dharma. But not everyone will get this opportunity. The Lord will not appear on media channels for all to see, like the false prophets who declare themselves as God. Lord Kalki will establish dharma through the Malika, gathering devotees just as we are all connected now. Only the devotees who are working in secret will get his 'darshan'. Not everyone will be permitted to come to his ashram, no matter how rich or powerful they are. The Lord will work in secret, gathering devotees from all over India and the world through his 'yogamaya' (divine power). Only the devotees will know; not everyone will. There will be no public appearance or manifestation.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: When will Kalki manifest?
Answer: Who are these worthy people performing penance for whom God should manifest? Will God appear for the many sinners in society, give them a vision, and grant them salvation? Is that God's work? In this age, saints will come to have a vision of the Lord and will remain for the establishment of dharma; they are immortal. But not everyone will get this facility. In Lanka, not all demons saw Lord Rama. Similarly, in this age, the Lord will not come on media channels for everyone to see, unlike the false prophets who declare themselves God. That will not happen. The Malika says Lord Kalki will establish dharma through the Malika, gathering devotees. He will work in secret, and only the devotees will know him.
