Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: News reports say Xi Jinping went to Tibet and stated that China will choose the next Dalai Lama. Is there any connection between the incarnation of Lord Kalki and the Lama, especially since the Dalai Lama has taken refuge in India? Please shed some light on this.
Answer: When an era ends, people go astray and do not follow the scriptures. When someone gets power, they enter God's temple wearing shoes. This is a sign of 'vinashakale viparita buddhi'—at the time of destruction, one's intellect becomes corrupted. Many devotees from Buddhism will also be saved; this is written in the Malika. But look, China's geography will be completely changed. Lord Kalki once mentioned this. One day, China made a comment about changing India's history. In response to a devotee's question, the Lord said, 'I will change China's geography on the world map and will cause destruction in their own country with the things they have created.' We are seeing this happen today. I am talking about something that was said 10 years ago, not recently. Those who do such things are inviting their own doom. Many Buddhists will also be saved. Let them do what they are doing; there isn't much time left. Within about 10 years, everything will become clear. The situation will become so difficult to handle, and every year you will see more destruction, and China will see it too. The Malika is the word of salvation for the devotees.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I live near Jajpur in Bengal, which is mentioned in the Malika. Can you tell me when the event there will happen? Can I go and attend it so that I can see the Lord and be saved?
Answer: This is a very good and sacred question. The Bhavishya Malika has clearly described this. It says that when Lord Kalki forms the 16 Mandals (groups of devotees), they will go to Jajpur. The 16 Mandals of devotees will gather there and perform a yagna (fire ritual). This will be the final yagna, where all the gods and human devotees who are part of the establishment of dharma will gather. Lord Kalki will also go there in his human body. People will see his extremely beautiful form and might think he is the son of a wealthy man, not God. This is also written in the Malika. The Lord will stay there for some time and then return; he will not stay for the entire duration. After the events at Jajpur, the work of establishing dharma will accelerate across the world. It is wonderful that your home is near Jajpur. When the time comes, you will surely meet the Lord. For now, join the Vishwa Sanatan Dharma's WhatsApp group and start the work of establishing dharma from Jajpur, because the Lord is destined to go there.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Which Mandal (group) will I be in? Which Mandal should I join?
Answer: Join the Kalika Mandal. The smaller states like Bengal, Bihar, and Assam will be combined to form the Kalika Mandal. The Malika has given precedence to the Kalika Mandal. The devotees in the land of Goddess Kali should join the Vishwa Sanatan Dharma. Talk to the saints mentioned in the description who are engaged in this work of establishing dharma, and join the Kalika Mandal. That will be good.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, which Mandal will we be in? (From Uttar Pradesh, Lucknow/Ayodhya)
Answer: There will be a significant 'leela' (divine play) of Lord Kalki in Ayodhya because it is his previous birthplace. Uttar Pradesh is a large state with Mathura, Vrindavan, and Ayodhya. To connect with the devotees there, join the groups mentioned in the description. The people there are working on this satsang. Join them and work for Vishwa Sanatan Dharma. That is good.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: We respect all gods and goddesses, but which name of God is most sacred and should be chanted in this era for salvation?
Answer: In this era, I will chant the name 'Madhav'. You can worship Lord Vishnu, Lord Krishna, or the Mother Goddess—worship anyone. However, the name of Lord Madhav is especially benevolent. The states of Madhya Pradesh and Uttar Pradesh will be part of the same zone.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Which Mandal will Jharkhand be a part of? Will it be with Odisha?
Answer: Jharkhand will be with Odisha's Biraja Mandal. You can connect with the devotees from Odisha. Alternatively, since you are Hindi-speaking, you can join and work with the Mathura-Vrindavan or Kalika Mandals. It doesn't matter where we are; we are all working for God and Sanatan Dharma. Every devotee is needed, and there is no difference. All the people of India will eventually be part of these 16 Mandals.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, you said that 64 crore (640 million) people will survive in the world. Is it necessary for the Malika to reach all these 64 crore people for them to be protected?
Answer: This is an excellent question, a primary question for all devotees who are listening. When the end of Kali Yuga comes, the Malika will be propagated. As the establishment of dharma draws near, the Malika itself may not reach all 64 crore people, but the name 'Madhav' will definitely reach them. They will be saved simply by chanting the name 'Madhav'. They may not get to see the Lord or participate in these discussions as we are doing today, but through the name 'Madhav', salvation will reach all 64 crore people across the world. The great saint Achyutananda wrote about this, saying that just by chanting 'Madhav, Madhav', people will be saved.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: According to the 'Bhakta Nirupan Tika' (A Treatise on the Identification of Devotees), what path should a devotee choose to be able to have a vision of the Lord?
Answer: Lord Rama said, 'The one with a pure heart finds me.' This means a person who sees no difference between any living being—from an ant or a dog to any human, even an enemy. They do not consider anyone in the world their enemy. They see the divine (Brahman) everywhere; they see God's form in everything. Therefore, they have no violence or anger within them. A key characteristic of a devotee is compassion for all beings in the universe, from inanimate objects to insects. They respect all of God's creation and see the divine in everything. They are simple-hearted. If someone says something to them, they don't over-analyze or criticize it. If it's good, they feel happy; if it's bad, they simply leave that place. And they have faith in God without any evidence or proof. Just by hearing His name, tears flow from their eyes. Their faith is absolute. In this Kali Yuga, the main paths are: being vegetarian, having blind faith in God and the Malika, and accepting the words of the Malika directly without any proof. This is the mark of a devotee. Anyone who opposes, argues, questions, or criticizes the Malika is not on the path of a devotee.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: We observe the Navratri fast and have recently brought the Shrimad Bhagavat home to read. What is the proper way to conduct this reading?
Answer: According to the scriptures, every person in every household should read the Shrimad Bhagavat. Reading the Shrimad Bhagavat repeatedly increases one's lifespan. It is a great practice. It's good that people organize readings, but I suggest that all members of your family should read it themselves. Those who will be connected with Lord Kalki will all be Brahmins and will all read the Shrimad Bhagavat. Read it yourself, and you will gradually understand it. Also, since this is the time for the establishment of dharma, if you have time, propagate Sanatan Dharma and the Malika. This will be the greatest service. The Lord has begun his work, and our primary goal should be to help pure souls like you, who are devoted to the Bhagavat, to spread the message of Sanatan Dharma across the world. During this Navratri, if all family members sit together and read the Shrimad Bhagavat, it will be excellent and will purify the earth. If a hundred people sit together and read it, it becomes even more sacred. Also, do some service for poor and destitute Hindus.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: The small children in the house cannot read, but if everyone sits in one place and one person reads it aloud while everyone else listens, is that acceptable?
Answer: That is very good. When the entire family sits together for the Lord's bhajan (devotional song/praise), that itself is absolute devotion. If the children cannot read, have them listen. Today in the world, parents don't have their children listen to the Bhagavat or recite the Hanuman Chalisa. As a result, the children go astray, disrespect their parents, and destroy their character by chasing desires. The house where everyone—the elderly, the old, the children—gathers to read the Bhagavat will become a great source of merit. Even those who cannot read should be made to sit and listen. Their lifespan will increase, and they will be saved during the establishment of dharma. This is a great life-giving elixir for us. It's excellent, please do this.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Should we not harbor feelings of enmity even towards the 'Mlechhas' (barbarians/sinners)?
Answer: A devotee's characteristic is to reflect on their own actions. We should think about how we can improve our karma, what good we did in a day, and what bad we did. This thought should always be with us so we can reform ourselves. The Mlechhas will be destroyed; their destruction is certain and inevitable. This is the scriptural law in every era. But it is not the characteristic of a saint to waste time thinking about them. A saint's characteristic is to always be immersed in the Lord's name, glory, bhajan, kirtan, and divine play. They repeatedly analyze their own actions, whether good or bad. God brought us to this world to improve our karma and then return to the divine abode. Once, Uddhava asked Lord Krishna what humans should do in this world. Lord Krishna told him that in this mortal realm, everyone from the heavenly planets to the earthly ones, even Lord Brahma and Mahadev, must one day leave their bodies. Death is certain for all. Therefore, humans should focus on good karma. Do work like Narada, who was born in an ordinary family but became the son of Brahma through his service. The Mlechhas will be destroyed, but that is not our responsibility. Our responsibility is to change the world. Even the dacoit Ratnakar became the great sage Valmiki. So, saints like us who work in the refuge of the Lord, our duty is to bring change and transformation to the world, to save people from sin. We have little time to think about others. Correct your own karma, chant the Lord's name, and see God in the entire world. Pray for the world to have good sense. That is all.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: No one can build a temple for God, but how have people kept him captive in Mecca-Medina? How will he be freed from there?
Answer: I have uploaded several episodes on YouTube about this. The Malika states that Mecca-Medina was once under Brahmin rule; it was a land of Brahmins. They were performing great deeds there. Over time, a Muslim came seeking refuge and a place to stay. The Brahmins gave him a place. Gradually, he worked to destroy the Brahmins and established Mecca-Medina there. It is a holy site for Muslims, but a time will come when Brahmin rule will be re-established in Mecca-Medina; this is written in the Malika. Lord Jagannath's Rath Yatra (chariot festival) will also take place there. A time will come when Lord Mahadev (Shiva) himself will manifest there and destroy the sinners of the world. This is also in the Malika. The Lord manifests only when sin reaches its peak. Just as Lord Krishna forgave Shishupala a hundred times before finally ending him, the Lord is giving society many chances—pandemics, diseases, wars—yet humanity does not understand and continues to sin. So, the Lord has come, and the establishment of dharma will happen. The Malika says a temple of Lord Jagannath will be built again in Mecca-Medina.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: There are some people who are vegetarian but do not believe in the Malika. What is written in the Malika for them?
Answer: Those who do not believe in the Malika have no place. They will go their own way. The Malika is for devotees. Those who are not devotees will not believe it; this is written in the Malika. So, just understand this much: there is no need to speak about the Malika in front of those who do not believe. This is not a commercial enterprise; it is the establishment of dharma. It is for the devotees, so only the devotees will listen. It is not necessary for others.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I listen to the Bhagavat Purana on YouTube, but I don't read the physical book. Is listening on YouTube sufficient according to our Sanatan Dharma?
Answer: There is no doubt that one gets merit from listening. However, do one thing. Whenever you get time during the day, sit in a quiet place, light a lamp and incense, offer praises to the Lord, and then read the Shrimad Bhagavat. This is our tradition.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Is there anything written in the Malika about Kota, Rajasthan?
Answer: The Malika has written about all states. The great saint has written in the Malika about which states in India will have wars on their borders.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: In every incarnation of Lord Vishnu, Goddess Lakshmi also incarnates with him. In the Kalki avatar, where is she? Is it Vaishno Devi?
Answer: Vaishno Devi, as a form of Lakshmi, will be attained by the Lord and will be Lord Kalki's wife. Just as in the Ram avatar, Lord Rama established Ram Rajya with Sita, Lord Kalki will establish a global Ram Rajya. Mata Mahalakshmi, in the form of Mata Vaishno Devi, will take refuge with the Lord. Mata Vaishno Devi has already left her abode. She has already left and has come to Earth in a human body. Lord Kalki has also established his place in Sambhal village, where he was born.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: You say Lord Kalki was born in Sambhal village. But on YouTube, they show Sambhal village as a place in the Himalayas where no one can go. How can one go there?
Answer: Listen, the Himalayas are not heaven. The Himalayas are a place for ascetics. There is no place in the Himalayas for an ascetic to do penance. What will you gain by connecting with an ascetic? According to the Malika and the Shrimad Bhagavat scripture, Lord Kalki has taken birth in a human body in Sambhal village in Odisha. This is written in the Shrimad Bhagavat and the Panchasakha's Malika. The birthplace of Lord Kalki has been fully described. The scriptures do not say that the Lord's birth will be in the Himalayas. Therefore, if you wish to work for Sanatan Dharma, join the Vishwa Sanatan Dharma group, and you will gradually gain experience and knowledge about Lord Kalki and the Malika.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: When will the union of Goddess Lakshmi (in the form of Vaishno Devi) and Lord Kalki happen?
Answer: Their union happened once when Lord Kalki went to have a 'darshan' (divine vision) of Mata Vaishno Devi. The Malika also says that Mata Mahalakshmi has already taken birth in a human body in Jagannath Puri. The work of Lord Jagannath, Goddess Parvati, and Goddess Lakshmi has begun.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: (Asked in Odia) How will we recognize the true devotees mentioned in the Malika? In Odisha, many people, maths, and temples are propagating the Malika. Who are the real devotees?
Answer: The great saint Achyutananda mentioned 16 Mandals (groups) of devotees across the entire world, including in Odisha. Many devotees have been born in Odisha, and many have been born across India and the world. The great saint Achyutananda wrote in his Bhavishya Malika that there are some secret texts held by the Lord himself. One such text is the 'Padma Kalpa Tika'. In it, the names of all the devotees, their parents' names, and their past lives are all written. The great saint wrote that this text is kept secret with the Lord. The 33 crore gods, along with Brahma and Shankar, decided to keep this text secret and surrendered it to the Lord in the sacred land of Biraja Kshetra (Jajpur). The great saint also wrote that along with this priceless text, the ornaments and jewels of Goddess Lakshmi, Lord Krishna, and Radha Rani were also brought by Lord Krishna and kept hidden in Biraja Kshetra. So, regarding those who claim to know the names of devotees now, I am not in agreement with them. I follow the Malika, which says this information is secret. When the Sudharma Sabha (Assembly of the Righteous) convenes, the Lord will read out the names. It is not appropriate to comment on this now. The true devotees are those who follow the Malika and have faith in the Lord.

Video Title: L13 भविष्य मालिका ओड़िआ भाषा में क्यों लिखा गया?  Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: There are some people who believe in the Malika, read the Bhagavat, and follow the path, but they are unable to quit smoking cigarettes. When I tell them, they say, 'What's the big deal if I smoke one cigarette? I follow everything else.' What is the solution for them?
Answer: Do the gods smoke cigarettes? No. I humbly request those people to quit these habits. This body is a divine temple, and such habits disrespect it. The devotees of Lord Kalki will need divine power. How will this body become pure and powerful? The devotees will have to fight against nuclear weapons. They will have to face hunger and thirst. This requires divine power and a pure body, because the gods will enter the human body. If the body is not pure, how will they receive the divine power that God will grant? That is why I humbly tell you all that if we do not keep our bodies pure, we will not be able to face the coming calamities. Then we will say, 'Pandit ji told us about the Malika's path, we followed it, but what happened to us?' I still request you to quit these things. Explain this to them. They are devotees, their minds are pure, and they have faith. Explain it to them a little, and bring about a change. Keep working on it; they will gradually change through satsang (spiritual discourse).

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: How can I meet the Lord?
Answer: First, where are you speaking from? (The caller says Deoghar, Jharkhand). The Malika has written about Jharkhand. To meet the Lord, you need His permission; I cannot do anything. I advise you to join the Sanatan Dharma organization that is being formed, as it will lead the entire world. People may not believe this now, but it is the word of God. Continue your spiritual practices, such as chanting the name of Madhav and reading the Srimad Bhagavatam. You must read the Bhagavatam daily, no matter what problems you face. Join our organization and contribute to the work. That is the path.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Our great mantra is 'Om Shri Satya Ananta Madhavaya Namah.' I want to ask, can we chant it while wearing slippers, whether sitting or standing?
Answer: Look, if it's convenient, it is better to chant the name after taking off your slippers. However, if you are in a situation or place where that's not possible, you can mentally take a dip in the holy Ganga and then chant the name. There is no issue with that.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I have one more question. I am initiated into a certain spiritual path where we worship the form of Krishna. I also chant this great mantra ('Om Shri Satya Ananta Madhavaya Namah'). Can I do both? Is there any problem with this?
Answer: Look, the divine play (leela) of Lord Shri Krishna that was left incomplete will now be continued in this Ananta Yuga. So, you have already held onto Krishna, which is excellent. Chant Lord Krishna's name as much as you like; it brings joy. Continue doing it, there is no problem at all. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: My question is about the Kalki avatar. Has he already incarnated, or is he yet to come?
Answer: According to our scriptures, the Lord's incarnation has already taken place on Earth. The Lord and His devotees will meet, and the Malika is the only scripture in the entire world that facilitates this union. Through the Malika, devotees will connect with the Lord. After they connect, the establishment of dharma will move forward, and the devotees will be reformed. This is what is written in the scriptures, and the time for it has arrived. I advise you to join the Vishwa Sanatan Group and work for dharma from your home.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: You have said that the Kali Yuga has ended, but wrongdoing and sin are increasing in the world. How can we say that the Kali Yuga is over?
Answer: Look, when a lamp is about to be extinguished, it burns its brightest. Similarly, as the age of Kali is ending, its influence flares up. When someone commits more sins, their life force diminishes, and they may die in an accident or from disease. As Kali leaves the universe, its influence expands and it fights back, causing turmoil and mental distress. The Malika scripture states that after 5,000 years, the afflictions of Kali will end. This is foretold, just as the Srimad Bhagavatam foretold the birth of Lord Krishna.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: My second question is, you say that Satya Yuga will come after Kali Yuga, but in one video, I heard you say that after this, the Ananta Yuga will last for 1,009 years. Could you please clarify whether Ananta Yuga or Satya Yuga will come next?
Answer: The Ananta Yuga that I speak of is the beginning of the Satya Yuga. In the Ananta Yuga, for 1,009 years, the devotees will survive. The Lord will make them kings and leaders, and that will be the complete and absolute Satya Yuga, during which the population will increase.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: So, does this mean that the Ananta Yuga is a part of the Satya Yuga?
Answer: Those who are refined during the Ananta Yuga, who become humans worthy of the Satya Yuga, they are the ones who will establish true happiness and create the full Satya Yuga.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: You said that according to the Malika, the sun will not rise for seven days. In that case, where will electricity come from?
Answer: The Malika is the path for the salvation of devotees. All the devotees will remain, while the sinners will be destroyed. There will be darkness for seven days and seven nights. After this period, the formless Lord will establish a new sun and a new moon in the universe. The new sun will bring peace to humanity with its cool rays, and the moonlight will be as bright as the sun at night. This is the nature of Satya Yuga. Furthermore, the devotees will not experience this darkness. The Malika says that Lord Kalki will give those who are with him an object to apply to their eyes, which will grant them divine light, making them unaffected by the darkness.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Seeing the injustices faced by figures like Mother Sati and Sita, and other women who have suffered, will women receive justice and equal rights in the Ananta Yuga?
Answer: Through a combination of modern science and mantras, humanity will become a thousand times more advanced. In the shelter of the Lord, everyone will have equal rights, just as in Rama Rajya. Lord Kalki will uphold the highest code of conduct (maryada), and justice will prevail. The Lord will make one lakh devotees the rulers of the world. There will be no problems with food, housing, or basic needs. The celestial architect Vishwakarma will build new cities. People will live in a state of supreme bliss, free from duality, greed, or conflict. Everyone will love one another.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: In Satya Yuga, all four pillars of dharma are intact, meaning there is no unrighteousness (adharma). If that's the case, why did the Satya Yuga end?
Answer: It ended because of pride and arrogance. Sages would incinerate someone with a word, curse others, control nature at will, and impose the death penalty for minor issues. It was this darkness of pride that led to the destruction of the Satya Yuga. There is no other reason.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Will an organization be formed in Chhattisgarh? What will happen there?
Answer: All devotees from across the world are gathering. You should join the main organization that is being formed, the Sudharma Mahasangh. All devotees, including those from Chhattisgarh, should join the Sudharma Mahasangh and the Shri Sanatan Group. Lord Kalki himself will decide who will be in charge. The important thing is to follow the path laid out by our scriptures.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What will be the future of other countries, and what about the devotees who live abroad?
Answer: According to the Malika, many European countries will become smaller islands, but the five oceans will remain. Countries like England, America, and Germany will exist as small islands. The devotees there will be saved by chanting the name of Madhav. Lord Kalki himself will go to those countries and give the responsibility of governance to the devotees. If you work for the Vishwa Sanatan Dharma Group and it is in your destiny, you will join the Sudharma Mahasangh, meet the Lord, and continue this work.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is written about Rajasthan in the Malika?
Answer: For the sake of dharma, Lord Hanuman is waiting there for the Lord. Rajasthan is the land of Hanuman ji, a symbol of his presence. Hanuman ji is there and will help the devotees.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I want to know why Lord Vishnu's incarnations are in Brahmin or Kshatriya families, but not in Shudra families?
Answer: Listen, Mother. In Satya Yuga, Brahmins rule. In Treta Yuga, Kshatriyas rule. In Dvapara Yuga, Vaishyas rule, and in Kali Yuga, Shudras rule. When Satya Yuga comes, according to the scriptures and Vedic law, it is the era of Brahmin governance. Therefore, the Lord incarnates in a Brahmin body. He has also taken avatars as animals and in all three classes—Brahmin, Kshatriya, and Vaishya—in different ages. Since the coming age is Satya Yuga, he incarnates as a Brahmin in accordance with the laws of that era.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Will Lord Kalki play the flute like Lord Krishna?
Answer: The Lord's divine play is different in every age. In this age, Lord Kalki's main tasks are to destroy demons, establish dharma, and reward his devotees by making them kings and giving them happiness. However, if a devotee with immense devotion connects with him, he will surely play the flute for them. For such a devotee, he will grant a vision of his form as Krishna. A devotee sees the Lord in the form that they worship.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I have been a devotee of Lord Vishnu for a long time. Recently, while chanting his name, I felt something enter me, and a tingling sensation started in my head. What was this?
Answer: You are a pure soul at the feet of Lord Vishnu. The vibration and sensation you feel in your body come from divine power. All true devotees will receive this divine power; some will experience it sooner, some later. This light of divine energy will manifest in every devotee who has a pure body, a pure mind, and has taken refuge in the Lord. This is a very good sign.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: When we read a holy book like the Bhagavad Gita or the Puranas, once we finish it, should we start reading it again from the beginning?
Answer: Yes, start it again with ease. Once you finish it, begin it a second time. You should continue reading it in a constant, uninterrupted flow. Let the practice continue.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am a teacher, and sometimes my friends or others say things that are discouraging or mock these beliefs. How should I handle this?
Answer: Do not argue with such people. If you encounter them, just say, 'Very well, brother,' and walk away. It is not necessary to engage with someone who does not want to listen to the Lord's words. The Malika also says that a sinner or an unbeliever will not appreciate these teachings. So, I say with humility, if someone lacks the willpower or devotion to listen, do not speak to them about these things. That is all you need to do.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: When will the Lord come to Mathura?
Answer: The Lord has already come and passed through Mathura.

Video Title: L14 सारे विश्व के भक्त कैसे और कहाँ एकत्रीकरण होंगे ? Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What should women who read the Bhagavatam do during their menstrual period?
Answer: During that time, they should not physically touch the holy book. Instead, they should chant the Lord's name mentally. This period of abstaining from touching the scripture lasts for about seven days.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, my question is, will Lord Kalki be born on Janmashtami?
Answer: Regarding Lord Kalki's birth, the scriptures have provided complete proof. It will be during the Shukla Paksha (the waxing phase of the moon). At that time, all the planets and constellations will be aligned in one place. It will be just like when Lord Ramachandra was born at 12 noon. The scriptures say the time was neither too cold nor too hot, a pleasant period for the welfare of the world. It was exactly 12 noon. All the planets and constellations were in one place; at that time, Lord Ram was born on earth. And Lord Kalki will also be born at a similar time, as stated in the scriptures. As for Janmashtami, we celebrate the Lord's birth because he took an avatar at that time in a previous age. In this current era, the Lord will also be fierce, meaning he will be a destroyer and will also cause annihilation. At the same time, he will uplift his devotees. Accordingly, the scriptures have written that the Lord will be present at that specific time, and his birth has already taken place on earth in accordance with that.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I have nothing, so what should I do?
Answer: The most important thing is your mind. If there is any conflict, any question, or any thought in your mind, it is necessary to renounce everything and donate first. It is also essential to forget what has been donated. The thought that 'I donated this once' or 'I donated that once' should not remain in your mind. It is not necessary to hold onto it. If it remains in the mind, the effect of the righteous act can diminish.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What should be donated?
Answer: Look, son, in this world, you should donate whatever you have, according to your capacity. Someone can donate a single fruit. Someone can donate gold. Someone can donate a cow. Someone can donate land and property. There is no fixed rule for donation—no specific quantity, limitation, or value. Even a donation of one or five paise counts as a donation. If someone donates even a single fruit to someone with a sincere heart—to an animal, a beggar, or a poor person—it is acknowledged by the Lord. On the other hand, a person might have crores of rupees but donates with conflict in their mind, just for show. So, the donation... I tell the children... please mute... I say this, among the categories for donation are the poor, the destitute, the helpless, and also the dogs, cows, and other creatures that are part of our world. You can donate something to them.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is the Lord's role in the events in Afghanistan? And what is the belief regarding Rajasthan?
Answer: The Lord... leave that. He has abandoned them because those who associate with them will be destroyed. Lord Kalki's establishment of dharma (righteousness) is for those who are suffering. I am talking about the whole world, where people are fighting amongst themselves. The energy of Kalki will have an effect on them. In this way, the sinners will be destroyed all over the world. The demons who have grown in Afghanistan, the smaller demons, and many others in the world... we are not concerned with them. But the point is, those who live righteously in Afghanistan, the Lord will surely protect them. Those who live in sin will be destroyed. A time will come, you all will see, and only dharma will be illuminated. Second, regarding the Indian government's policy... The second point is about the belief in India regarding Rajasthan. It is said that there will be many wars and tribal conflicts on the borders of Rajasthan. The Lord will save the devotees. Hanuman will save them on the Lord's instruction, and many great warriors will be with Lord Kalki in the 16 Mandals (regions). And in Rajasthan, there will be floods, earthquakes, and diseases. To be protected from these, one must follow the path of the Lord, the path of the Malika. Jai Jagannath. Please present the next question.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: The Taliban has taken over Afghanistan, and China is supporting them. Is this the beginning of the rise of adharma (unrighteousness)?
Answer: In the world, those who wear the mask of truth to mislead society and the world, their true form will be revealed. So, this time is a test of dharma. I will say only this much: this establishment of dharma will happen all over the world. A time will come in every country... what is happening in Afghanistan today will not be limited to one country; it will happen in every country. So, the Lord... follow the path of dharma. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What does the Malika say about Bargarh?
Answer: Bargarh is in the Sambalpur district of Odisha. It is a divine region. Its name is Maa Samaleshwari Mandal, and it will be established there. Chhattisgarh, Madhya Pradesh, and many other regions will be part of this Mandal. And it is written in the Malika... [recites a verse]... A flag will be hoisted at the mother's temple... and its... this sign has already appeared. It is visible from the temple. So, this is a sign of the establishment of dharma from the mother's temple. Follow it, open the Malika.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Please tell us about Ghatotkacha and the significance of Sambhal.
Answer: According to the scriptures, he was the son of Bhima. He did his work on the instructions of the Lord, and he had the Lord's blessing to make it a pilgrimage site. For our Hindus, it is a very important and the greatest pilgrimage site for devotees. And Ghatotkacha, on the instructions of the Lord and based on what he had asked for, the Lord made it a pilgrimage site. Now, Ghatotkacha will come again and meet Lord Kalki and will fight alongside India against all the countries of the world because his purpose was not completed... He will be with the Lord... and all of them will be with India... our Lord. There is no doubt about this.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I want to do the Lord's work. How can I do it?
Answer: First, I will address this. Work for the Ajay Mandal, do some work for Sanatana Dharma. Join the Vishwa Sanatan Dharma group... become a member... there is a number, contact that number to get added to the list. And after that, work for Sanatana Dharma for the whole world. So, the devotees who will work... please wait, I am speaking... Please wait, I will answer.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: We have heard in the videos of Muslim clerics that Ghazwa-e-Hind will happen. During Ghazwa-e-Hind, no temple in India will be safe, they will convert Hindus to Muslims, there will be a lot of bloodshed, and they will break the idols in all the temples. Is this possible?
Answer: Regarding your second question... all the religions of the world... I am not talking about any one religion... [recites a verse]... meaning only one dharma will remain in the entire world. In this world... at the beginning of creation, there was Sanatana, and in the end, Sanatana will remain. In every era, Sanatana will remain. There is no scripture that says any religion other than Sanatana will have a place on earth. This Kali Yuga is ongoing, and people will quarrel, have conflicts, and fight amongst themselves. That is why there are many troubles and religions in the world. When Satya Yuga arrives, there will be only one caste, one religion, and one flag. Look, in India... I had mentioned this in the previous satsang as well... people are committing sins in India, and in every country of the world. The sinful people will fight amongst themselves, but nothing can be done to the righteous people. And another thing, nothing can happen to the devotees of Lord Kalki who are in the stream of the Malika. This is written in our scriptures. And those who stay with Lord Kalki's righteous association, in Sanatana Dharma, the Lord will protect them. So, what they say has no meaning, no purpose. They present their views, but the scriptures and the one who created the world will establish Sanatana Dharma, and no other religion will remain on earth. Everyone should listen to this with open ears.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, it is heard that Lord Kalki has already taken birth in Odisha and is currently in his childhood, around 13 years old. There is some news and videos about this. Is this true? And can we have his darshan (a divine sighting)?
Answer: I respect your question. It's a very simple question. Look, son, the Lord's incarnation, according to the scriptures and the Malika I am narrating, has already happened. Mahapurush Achyutananda has written about this. Lord Kalki's incarnation... in 2005... a star was to rise on the moon. At that time, Lord Kalki... the king of the Puri region... at the time of his conception, a star rose on the moon, just as Mahapurush had written in the Malika. A star on the moon... So, according to that calculation, the Lord is 13 years old. The Lord has incarnated, but he is not visible to everyone. Only the good devotees, the pure devotees... it's not easy. See, all sadhus and saints build monasteries and ashrams to increase their followers and for business. And everyone meets them, and they do their work and speak. But when you will get the Lord's darshan... if you are a good devotee, I respect your wish. If your desire is so pure and you remain in the Lord's refuge with complete faith, then one day the Lord may give you darshan. But I don't think it's that easy for everyone. I am speaking for all. But remain in devotion, follow the path, propagate Sanatana Dharma, and work for the Sudharma Sangh. If the Lord's devotees, the Vanara Sena (monkey army), did their work, the Lord gave them darshan. So, you might also get it. But Lord Kalki's darshan is not so widely publicized. We certainly propagate the Malika. Why do we do it? It is written in the Malika that it must be propagated for the devotees, otherwise how will the devotees know? How will they recognize the Lord's path? And how will devotees form a group for Sanatana Dharma? Before the Mahabharata war, an organization was formed. And for the Kalki-Bharat war that is yet to happen, all the saints and devotees will gather. So, you remain in devotion. If the Lord's grace is there, he might even come to you and give you an experience in some way. But seeing the Lord is not that easy. I will speak of the path, the principles, the truth. But getting the Lord's darshan so easily... Many people come from Delhi, Maharashtra, and other states, but they don't get his darshan. Even people from Odisha don't get it. So, it is not that easy or public, unlike the deceitful saints of Kali Yuga who declare themselves as God and sit on TV shows to mislead devotees. But a true devotee, even if poor with nothing to eat, the Lord will bless. So, it should be like that, it will happen. Remain in his refuge, follow the Malika. When the time comes, if the devotee is pure, you will get darshan. Jai Jagannath. Jai Shri Krishna.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: When calamities like earthquakes happen, how will the devotees be saved?
Answer: It is written that the Lord will command Mother Earth, Mother Vasuki, to lift her head. When she lifts it, there will be earthquakes all over the world. At that time, wherever the devotees are, the earth will become like a mountain for them. Water, wind, and the five elements will not be able to touch them, and the devotees will be saved while the sinners will die. The second thing is, the Lord has come to save the devotees, hasn't he? He is the savior. Chant the name of Madhav. There is so much power in this name that it can crush a computer... it can neutralize atomic bombs. This is the power of the name. In the universe, this name... no matter how big the trouble, by chanting this name, one can be saved from floods, fire, earthquakes, and the five elements. The third thing is, we should also follow the path of righteousness. If we are not on the path of dharma, if we are unrighteous, the name will not work. Just as plastic has no electrical connection with iron, similarly, for a person of dharma who chants the name with truth, compassion, forgiveness, and purity, nothing will happen to them. Six districts of Odisha will sink into the sea, but the devotees will survive.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I want to know, when will Lord Kalki go to the Padmanabhaswamy temple in Thiruvananthapuram to open the door that has never been opened?
Answer: Mother, you have asked a good question. Lord Kalki... the Swaminathan temple, which is a temple of Narayana... when will its door open? Look, mother, I will tell you one thing. If the Lord goes in his own form, in a human body, and opens it, then the entire south and all the countries in the south, all the people there will come to the Lord's refuge. And dharma will increase, and all sinners will also be saved. But the Lord has said he is here to save the righteous, to save the Gopis. In this process, both Gopis and sinners would be saved. So, what you have said... look, mother, I will tell you one thing. The temple of Lord Narayana, the Swaminathan temple, its door will open, and it is a direct path to Patal Lok (the netherworld). What will you get? Do you want to go to Patal? No, no, no. Then you will get... So, those who need to come from there will come, and the Lord will arrange for it. It is in the Lord's hands. The second thing is, the Lord will definitely go to the Padmanabhaswamy temple. Lord Krishna had also toured his region. That is the Lord's domain. And when the Lord goes, no one will know. Even if we find out, we will not tell because the Lord goes in secret. The Lord does not reveal his identity to everyone. He goes for darshan where there is devotion and glory. He does not give darshan to everyone; it is very secret. He will surely go, we also know that. But the day he goes, he will go like an ordinary human, and no one will be able to recognize him. But you follow the path of the Malika. And work for Sanatana Dharma. If you are a Gopi, a Kapi (monkey devotee), if your heart is pure and you think, 'Yes, I will be part of the establishment of dharma by Lord Kalki and Sanatana Dharma,' then work for it. The Lord will one day give you the fruit of your actions and purity. Wait for that time.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Now, Krishna Janmashtami is approaching. Since the Lord himself has incarnated, how should we celebrate his birthday this time so that he may grant us his darshan soon?
Answer: For your second question about Krishna Janmashtami, thank you. In this life, along with the name of Lord Krishna, chant the name 'Madhav'. This is the most sacred name. Because Mother Bhagavati gave this name to Lord Krishna when he was born. First, Mother Bhagavati named him Madhav. But Garga Muni came and named the Lord Shri Krishna. This saddened the Mother. Mother Bhagavati asked the Lord, 'Prabhu, I named you Madhav, but your name has changed.' The Lord replied, 'Mother, I have kept this name for the salvation of devotees at the end of Kali Yuga.' Therefore... 'Shri Krishna' will be my name at the end of Kali Yuga and the beginning of Satya Yuga, and by chanting that name, devotees will be saved. So, celebrate his birthday, chant the name of Krishna. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I don't understand this experience I had. What message does the Lord want to convey through it?
Answer: Look, meeting a pure devotee like you has filled my heart with emotion too. Tears are coming to my eyes as well. This is very good. This is a union of purity on earth, and I also feel great joy. And the most important thing, see, the residents of Mathura are the Lord's family. And you are... so in every era, you have met the Lord, and you will meet him in this era too. There is no question about it. See, the Lord's childhood leela (divine play) is going on right now. The Lord is Bal Govind (child Krishna). That is why the Lord is giving you darshan in the form of Bal Govind. He is conveying, 'In this form, this time I will fight with a bow, I will wage war, and I don't have a flute in my hand.' So, through the power of your purity and devotion... in this, the Lord is saying, 'See, I am working in this form, and you people should do my work. Work for the establishment of dharma. Explain to many people. Try to bring purity and sanctity to the earth.' And from you... this is the Lord's message. Jai. Jai Maa. Jai Jai Maa.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, I want to know something about Chhatia Bata. In Puri, the deities are Jagannath, Balabhadra, and Subhadra. But in Chhatia Bata, Subhadra is not in the middle. What is the reason behind this?
Answer: Look, mother. In Chhatia Bata, the idols of Jagannath, Balabhadra, and Subhadra... they are on the samadhi (tomb) of Haridas Maharaj and later, Raghuvar Das and another saint who came. First, the idol of Jagannath Mahaprabhu was made over Haridas's samadhi. Later, the idols of those who passed away were made. So... the reason behind it... Look, Lord Kalki will not go to Chhatia Bata. The wooden forms of Jagannath, Balabhadra, and Subhadra will go to Chhatia Bata. A new temple will be built. The Rath Yatra (chariot festival) will happen there. The king and queen of Rutchi will organize the Rath Yatra of Jagannath there. But Lord Kalki will go to Barchana. [Recites verses from Malika]... Mahapurush Achyutananda has written this. The four-fold idols of Jagannath will be at Chhatia Bata. At that time, at Dashashani... understand this well... Dashashani is where the Baitarani river is. At Dashashani Ghat, ten thousand Brahmins had performed a yajna... that is why it is called Dashashwamedh Ghat, on the banks of the Baitarani river. And when Lord Jagannath comes from his kshetra (domain) to Chhatia Bata, at that time the devotees... the devotees will carry Lord Kalki on their shoulders to the village of Barchana. After the worship, the Lord will say... Mahapurush Achyutananda has written this... near Barchana, the Lord will say, 'I will stay here.' Why won't he go? The Lord will say, 'Jagannath, Balabhadra, and Subhadra are being worshipped there. Out of respect for them and the devotees' sentiments, I will not cast my shadow there today. I will stay in Barchana.' And from Jajpur to Barchana and from Haridaspur to Barchana, it will become a sea, and a huge gathering will take place there, where lakhs of devotees will eat. And from that time, Lord Kalki, as Nand Kishor, Anand Kishor, will establish dharma in the world. He has also mentioned this. So, Lord Kalki will stay there. The festival will be at Barchana, not at Chhatia Bata. The Lord will meet with his devotees in Barchana and will do the work of establishing dharma. And some people will... okay, mother?

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra

In this world, people... and for them, the Lord is Jagannath, Vishnu, Ram, Krishna. Besides them, there is no other. According to the tradition of our Hindu dharma, according to the Srimad Bhagavatam, the Lord's incarnations are for establishing dharma. And in Kali Yuga, there are three incarnations. The first incarnation of the Lord, the second is Lord Buddha, and the third is Lord Kalki. Besides this, nothing else is written in the scriptures. And whatever else is written... I won't take the name you mentioned because taking names also violates our dharma and tradition. So, I respect all saints and sadhus in the world. I respect your words and your feelings as well. But mother, in this world, there is no one besides the Lord who can grant salvation. That's the first thing. The second thing is, what is written about them... if I say it, you will not like it. Someone had asked this question. If I say what is written, you will not feel happy. You will feel, 'Why is he saying this?' So, what is bad and what people will not like, I do not say. But it is written. If you say so, I will send you a copy. I will tell my people, and you can analyze what is written. Okay, mother?

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: My question is, can we meet Lord Kalki by chanting the Hare Krishna Mahamantra?
Answer: To purify the mind, chant the Hare Krishna mantra, and also chant the name 'Madhav' for some time. This is necessary. He is one form, one avatar, but the names are different. 'Hari is infinite, his stories are infinite.' He is one form, but has infinite names. The name 'Krishna' will also remain, but 'Madhav' is necessary for this era. So, for this era, chant the name 'Madhav'. Do this work.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra

When dharma is established, Hanuman ji will go to protect the Lord's devotees. He will save the devotees who are trapped. And the remaining devotees will be brought to Lord Kalki for surrender. Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I work in the IT industry and interact with foreigners. I was thinking about how I could propagate this Malika in English, perhaps by creating a website. How can I be helped in this work?
Answer: Look, son. We propagate the Malika in Hindi. It is not propagated in English. We can also speak English, but there is no instruction from the Lord to propagate it in English. I had spoken to the Lord about this. He said that some people who are pure will be saved. But the sinners who kill cows daily... there is no other way but to propagate in India. Cow slaughter happens in India too. Sin happens in India too. But we have no choice. If it is not propagated in Hindi, how will the devotees know? The sinners will also listen. But we are not propagating for the sinners; we are propagating for the righteous. If it is propagated in English, it will directly reach the cow-killers. Because they are emotional, many people might change. So, if there is someone who is a saint, a gentleman, someone pure, who wants to become a vegetarian... if you are completely confident that they will become vegetarian and follow our path, then there is a way for them. Do that much and work for Sanatana Dharma. Because all the countries in the world will become small islands. Some devotees will remain there. But India will remain Akhand Bharat (undivided India). The India that will remain will include China, Pakistan, Afghanistan, Baluchistan, and Sri Lanka, forming a very large, undivided India. And other countries will be small islands. So, follow the path of the Malika. For the devotees and saints in India who follow Lord Krishna, it is important to reach them as much as possible, because Krishna is Kalki. It is necessary to reach them because India is a divine land, and there are many devotees in India who are unaware or are trapped with gurus on the wrong path. Save them. That will be better. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: The prophecies say that one should not eat non-vegetarian food, meat, alcohol, etc. Is there anything similar written about onion and garlic?
Answer: There are three types of food: Rajasic (passionate), Tamasic (ignorant), and Sattvic (pure). Onion and garlic are not considered Sattvic; they are Rajasic. They create heat in the body. They are not used in offerings to the Lord. They are completely Rajasic. And the food that is made with ghee and other rich ingredients, which kings used to eat, is also Rajasic. Tamasic food is that which involves the killing of living beings. So, you can eat onion and garlic when you are outside, son, there is no problem. It comes from Mother Earth; it is not from any animal. But it is stimulating and is not used in our temples. It is not used in pure monasteries and temples. It will not be used in Satya Yuga. But for now, if there is a problem, you can eat it. But do the work of dharma. Read the Bhagavatam daily. To be saved, this is the biggest medicine for devotees to get deliverance from sin and the coming destruction of Kali Yuga. The Srimad Bhagavatam is the first path. Second, perform Trisandhya (prayers at three junctures of the day), chant the name of Madhav. Chant the Dashavatara Stotra. And always donate something to the poor, the sad, and animals, every day. It is necessary. Whether it's 10 rupees or 5 rupees, or donate something from your own food. And make one person a vegetarian. It is written in the scriptures that if a person makes one person a vegetarian, they get the fruit of ten yajnas (sacrificial rituals). A person cannot perform ten yajnas in their life because it requires a lot of money, you won't find good Brahmins, good ghee, or such a pure environment. It takes a lot of effort. But by making one person a vegetarian, you get the fruit of ten yajnas in your own home.

Video Title: L15 कलियुग के बीच में ही सत्य युग का आगमन होगा। Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am associated with the Gayatri Parivar, founded by Pandit Shriram Sharma Acharya. What is their role, and will they meet Lord Kalki?
Answer: This is very good. See, we also chant the Gayatri mantra daily. The Gayatri mantra is the primary stream of Hindu Sanatana Dharma. Before reading the Srimad Bhagavatam or any scripture, we invoke Mother Gayatri. This is the first stream of Sanatana Dharma, and it is necessary for all devotees. However, in the Gayatri organization, only the chosen devotees, those who were Gopis, will meet Lord Kalki, not everyone. Because there are also people with desires, selfish people, curious people, and argumentative people. And we don't know who is doing what good work. It is only written in the Malika that from every dharma, every path of purity... Gayatri dharma is a part of our Sanatana Dharma. There is nothing wrong with it. But the point is, not everyone will meet the Lord because not everyone is entitled to it. Those who are entitled will have to follow the path. You will have to follow the Vedic stream and the Malika, the formless words given by Lord Kalki, to go to Satya Yuga. You can chant the Gayatri mantra, perform Gayatri yajnas, it is good for the world. But the position we are heading towards, they will have to work accordingly.

Video Title: L16.2 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: Why was the Sudharma Mahasangha created? What is its purpose?
Answer: This is described by Mahapurush Achyutananda in the Bhavishya Malika. When Lord Kalki takes his avatar on earth, the first thing he will do is establish the Sudharma Mahasangha. He will entrust his devotees with the responsibility of propagating its message and gathering true devotees. Unlike other religions and sects where founders preach themselves, the Lord will not preach directly. Instead, he will do so through his devotees and according to the Malika scriptures. The Sudharma Mahasangha will be formed two years after the Lord's incarnation to unite all his devotees across the world. Its purpose will be to gather devotees from all over India and the world and to propagate the principles of truth, peace, compassion, forgiveness, and the path of the Satya Yuga (Age of Truth). All of Lord Kalki's devotees will be connected through the Sudharma Mahasangha. This assembly existed in previous eras like the Dvapara, Treta, and Satya yugas, and it will be established again in this era.

Video Title: L16.2 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: What is the qualification to become a member of the Sudharma Mahasangha?
Answer: The single greatest qualification is devotion (bhakti). People who are wealthy, knowledgeable, powerful, or hold high positions will not be made members simply on that basis. The sole purpose of the Sudharma Mahasangha is to unite the Lord's devotees from all over the world; it has no other motive. Mahapurush Achyutananda has written about the number of these devotees. Out of the world's 8.4 billion people, only 3,000 devotees will become direct representatives of the Sudharma Mahasangha. These 3,000 will be the ones who follow Lord Kalki's orders and carry forward the work of establishing dharma (righteousness) in India and the world.

Video Title: L16.2 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा

This urge will arise from within their own hearts, and they will join on their own accord; they will not need to be persuaded or brought in. The Sudharma Mahasangha has already been formed. All devotees should join the Vishwa Sanatan Dharma, and those who perform good deeds and are deemed worthy by the Lord will then be inducted into the Sudharma Mahasangha.

Video Title: L16.2 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा

Therefore, the purpose of propagating the message of the Malika is for the salvation of the saints, the good people, and those who love the Lord. It is for them, so that they may be saved, understand the message of the Malika, and through it, be able to reach the Lord's abode.
