Question: Could you please extend the duration of this satsang (spiritual discourse) to be a little longer than one hour?
Answer: I will try. I respect your wish and will do my best. If God is merciful, we can extend it.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: Can you tell us something about celebrating the Lord's birthday?
Answer: About the Lord's birthday... Look, mother, you should continue your work in the Vishwa Sanatan Dharma and communicate with the Lord silently in your heart. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: When will the great yagya (fire sacrifice) take place?
Answer: Look, son, the time for the great yagya has been written by the great sage Achyutananda in his text 'Neelkanth'. This event will take place between the years 2020 and 2029. For some events, the great sage did not specify the exact time, but this yagya is known to happen during the period of the establishment of Dharma.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: I don't know how to read Hindi. You advised reading the Srimad Bhagavatam, so how can I do that?
Answer: Keep the name of Madhav in your mind and chant it. The Srimad Bhagavatam is available in many languages. It is written in English, Hindi, and many other regional languages. You should find and get a copy in your language. It is necessary to read it; it will be very beneficial for you. You will find it. If not, we can connect you with some people who can help you get a copy.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: Who will be the Lord's guru in this lifetime?
Answer: In this birth, the Lord's guru will be Parashuram ji.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: How will we or anyone in the world know about his guru, Parashuram?
Answer: Look, Lord Parashuram currently resides in a human body on the Mahendrachal mountain. However, it is not easy for you or anyone else to have his darshan (divine sight). If anyone were to see him, they would not survive, because it is impossible for an ordinary human to behold his divine body. But, when the Sudharma Sabha (Assembly of Dharma) is established with Lord Kalki, he will grant divinity to his devotees. Then, you will also be able to have Parashuram's darshan.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: Will Lord Kalki get married to Mahalakshmi?
Answer: Yes, the marriage with Madhav (Kalki) will definitely happen. In a previous era, Lord Ram had promised Mata Vaishno Devi he would accept her if she could recognize him in his next incarnation, but she was unable to due to his divine illusion, as her role in the Kali Yuga was still pending. Before the Sudharma Sabha is formally seated, Lord Brahma himself will come to the Lord's ashram and initiate the wedding ceremony. Lord Mahadev and Goddess Durga will also be present, along with a few chosen devotees. This is written in the Malika.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: We celebrate Janmashtami as Lord Krishna's birthday, and since Lord Kalki is the same as Lord Krishna, will devotees also celebrate Lord Kalki's birthday?
Answer: Yes, devotees will celebrate Lord Kalki's birthday. After the Sudharma Mahasabha (great assembly) is established, the Lord's birthday will be celebrated throughout the entire world. Now is not the time, as devotees have not yet fully joined with the Lord. But when the time comes, son, it will be celebrated all over the world.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: What is the Lord's favorite food?
Answer: Regarding the Lord's food, it is written in the Srimad Bhagavatam that whatever you offer with devotion is accepted. If someone offers a grand feast with millions of dishes, the Lord accepts it. And if a devotee offers just a flower and some water with love, the Lord accepts it like nectar. So, what can we truly offer Him? If you give even a little something with devotion, that becomes the best food for him. He has no particular favorite. What is truly dear to him is when a true devotee surrenders something to him with devotion. The Lord becomes eager to accept that offering. That is the main point.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: You have said that many of the current spiritual storytellers and gurus are using the Vedas and Puranas to sell dreams and build empires. How can we identify who is genuine among them?
Answer: Look, son, Tulsidas Maharaj wrote in his Ramcharitmanas that in the Kali Yuga, many so-called saints will appear. They will not be real saints but people disguised as them. They will spend a lot of money to create their own version of religion and will be engrossed in worldly desires, while telling others to be detached. What is the true sign of a saint? It is to live righteously. As for the many saints in the world today, Lord Kalki himself will judge who is good and who is bad when the time comes. It is not right for us to comment on this, as it is not within our authority.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: Should we donate to anyone, for instance, to gaushalas (cowsheds) or other causes run by people who seem to be very wealthy themselves?
Answer: Oh son, the one who takes donations for cowsheds drives a Mercedes car worth 10-15 million rupees. They use expensive phones and glasses, spending lavishly. What can I say? How can people who drive cars worth millions be called saints?

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: Will I get to meet the Lord?
Answer: You will meet him through your devotion, mother. Remain in devotion, stay in Sanatana Dharma, and when the time comes, if you are a good and true devotee, you will surely meet him. To wait patiently for the right time is the greatest duty. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: Does performing spiritual practices at a specific time, place, and posture yield greater benefits?
Answer: Look, your question pertains to a specific guru's tradition, so I will not comment on that directly. But I will say this: God is omnipresent and manifests through love. He has said, 'My devotee can be anywhere—under a tree, in a secluded place—if they worship me with devotion, I manifest and come to their aid.' For God, there is no specific vessel or time; His nature is infinite. The Lord is attained through devotion. You will receive the Lord's darshan and a place with him according to the purity of your devotion. However, if you follow a guru's tradition, you should continue to honor it. I will not speak further on that. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: As you suggested, I have started reading the Bengali translation of the Bhagavata Mahapurana. It is written in the text that by reading it, all of one's sins are washed away. Is this true?
Answer: That is a very good thing. This transformation will make you all into saints and great souls. But the key is this: from the day you start reading the Srimad Bhagavatam with all your heart, you must ensure that you do not knowingly commit any act that violates dharma. Maintain that resolve. The text you are reading is the most sacred. If you read it with the purity and truthfulness that I am describing, your life will become meaningful. You can even reach the Satya Yuga, and in the end, you will attain a very good destination. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: How does God choose His devotees? If a human were to choose, they would have certain criteria, but it is said God's ways are different and He accepts everyone, even those who might seem unworthy by human standards. How should we understand this?
Answer: God does not choose based on a human mindset. If we think like humans, we will be mistaken. The Malika says, 'What is day, what is night, what is my business? I have crores and crores of such devotees.' One must abandon their ego. The sin of killing and eating meat can be absolved through the combination of knowledge (gyana) and devotion (bhakti). The Lord's considerations are based on this, and He is the one who makes the devotee.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: Will the Lord come to Kangra district in Himachal Pradesh?
Answer: The Lord already traveled to Himachal in 2018. I don't know exactly how many places he visited, but he has already been there and will probably not go again. He might go during the establishment of Dharma, but if he goes at that time, you will only see fire; you will not be able to see his divine form. If you are seated in the Sudharma Mahasankha (great assembly), you can connect with Lord Kalki through it and have the darshan of his divine body.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: How can I meet the Lord? You say to chant his name, but how should I do it properly?
Answer: You should stay connected with the Sudharma Mahasankha, in the true Sanatana Dharma. When the time comes... I always say this: whoever was a devotee of the Lord in the Satya or Dvapara Yugas, if they are that same soul, they will surely meet the Lord and work in the establishment of Dharma. If you are such a person, you will surely get the opportunity. Chant the name of Krishna, and chant the name of Madhav during the trisandhya (three times a day: dawn, noon, dusk). Always chant his name internally.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: Can we get the Lord's bhajans (devotional songs) on WhatsApp?
Answer: The bhajans are written in Odia. You can also write bhajans yourself in Hindi with the name 'Madhav'. You can write them and listen to them. You see, the Lord's work is not widely publicized; the establishment of Dharma is happening in secret, so there won't be much publicity like with modern saints. This is the Lord's work, and it will be done secretly with his devotees. Just follow the path I am showing you. If you want the bhajans on WhatsApp, speak with Mohit, whose number you have. He can provide you with the Odia bhajans or even write them for you in Hindi so you can sing them.

Video Title: L16.1 सुधर्मा महा महासंघ के आभिमुख्य और विश्व सनातन धर्म की प्रतिष्ठा
Question: I live abroad. I know the Malika says Lord Kalki will be born in Odisha, but what about the people in Sambhal, Uttar Pradesh, who are also doing religious work but where corruption is also prevalent? Will the Lord do something about them?
Answer: It is written in the Malika that Lord Kalki will be born in 'Naya Sambal' (New Sambal, in Odisha), not in the old Sambhal (in Uttar Pradesh). As for the people there, mother, if anyone commits a sin, the Lord has come as the savior to protect Dharma. He will protect Dharma, and the sinners will definitely be destroyed.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: How will the connection between the devotee and God be established? How will devotees connect with God? And the biggest question is, when will all the devotees unite and meet God?
Answer: True devotees, who have been searching for God for many lifetimes, have already been born on Earth in this final era. The meeting between the devotees and the Lord will take place at a hill named Khandagiri. This place is in the Ekamra Kshetra (the region of the Shri Lingaraj temple), about 30 kilometers from the Shri Jagannath Kshetra. Lord Kalki will appear on this hill, and all his devotees will gather there to meet him in his youthful form. At this great gathering, devotees will recognize each other from their past lives in different eras like Satya Yuga, Dvapara Yuga, and their time in Vrindavan. However, only the truly pure devotees who sincerely follow the Vedic path and the principles of the Malika will be able to meet God; others will not even be aware of it. Great sages like Narada and Markandeya are already meditating at the base of Khandagiri, chanting Lord Kalki's name. By having the divine vision of the Lord, devotees will attain divinity and become immortal. Even though there will be great destruction from the five elements, the devotees will not be harmed because devotees are God's most precious wealth. The Lord takes an avatar specifically for his devotees, to save them and grant them peace and happiness. After establishing dharma and giving the devotees their rightful place, the Lord will return to his divine abode. This happens in every era, and it will happen in this one too. Therefore, it is crucial for all devotees to practice restraint and strictly follow every single rule of the Vedic path that is being explained.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: Guruji, I wanted to ask, you said the great cataclysm (pralay) will come. Will it also affect the devotees in Jammu and Kashmir?
Answer: Look, son, whether it's Jammu and Kashmir, Mount Abu, Badrinath, or any other landmass in the world, the effect of the cataclysm will be felt everywhere. Specifically in the Kashmir region, there will be the impact of communal violence, earthquakes, war, and floods. So, don't worry. Follow the Malika and chant the Lord's name. This is the most important thing for us at this time. Okay?

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: My family members don't believe. When I tell them they should perform prayers and worship, nobody listens. What should I do?
Answer: If no one listens, it is not necessary to tell them, because not everyone is destined to receive this nectar (amrit). This nectar is only for a few people. So, do not tell them. Focus on improving your own stream of karma. If someone doesn't listen, it's not necessary to tell them, as this violates the principles of our Malika. So never tell those people. Do what you need to do, there is no problem, and continue on your own path. Jai Jagannath. Jai Shri Radhe Radhe.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: Pandit ji, I wanted to ask one thing. I saw a video in which you were conducting a satsang, and there was a poster behind you with a photo of Kalki ji and a boy. What is that about?
Answer: Look, son, I understand. I want to say one thing. See, I have been working on the Malika and for Lord Kalki for a long time. I am working according to the tasks assigned to me by Lord Kalki. You are fortunate to have seen that. It's very good. If your heart's purity and your mind accept it, son, then follow it. That is what is good for you. Okay? Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: During the time of Dharma Sthapana (establishment of righteousness), what kind of cataclysm will happen in Rajasthan? Will it be the element of fire, or will there be an atmosphere of war? Which will have a greater impact on this land?
Answer: Look, in the coming times, Rajasthan will become green. That's the first thing. The desert area of Rajasthan will also be transformed. With the end of Kali Yuga and the beginning of Satya Yuga, all these changes will be visible. It will be like an ocean; it will rain for days, creating a sea. Similarly, in Rajasthan, there will be floods (jal pralay), fire cataclysms (agni-pralay), war (yudh ka pralay), and earthquakes (bhukamp ka pralay). All of these will continue to happen. But for the devotees to be saved, follow the path I am showing. Okay, son? Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: How will Lord Kalki get his horse, and where is it now?
Answer: It is written about this in the Malika. When Lord Kalki sets out to establish dharma, the world's population will have already been reduced by about 70%. At that time, to assist Lord Kalki, all the gods, along with Lord Indra, will present him with a horse named Baikuntha. This horse will roam the skies, traveling all over the world, carrying the Lord as he works to establish dharma. Okay, son? Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: Pandit ji, my question is, as you mentioned in today's introduction about the Khandagiri area, can we also call Khandagiri by another name, the Jalu region?
Answer: Yes, that's right. The Jalu mountain is there, and some sages and saints are chanting the Lord's name there. But regarding Khandagiri, Mahapurush Achyutananda has clearly described it. He narrated that the meeting will happen at Khandagiri, saying, 'Ekathara hoibe Khandagiri paase, ananta murti darshana karibe anayase,' which means, 'They will gather near Khandagiri and will effortlessly see the infinite form.' It is Khandagiri and nothing else. It is in the Ekamra Kshetra. The meeting of devotees and God will happen there in that manner. So follow what is said about this. Regarding the other place, when the time comes, you will meet God.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: Please tell us something about the Hirakud Dam.
Answer: That is a very good question. Regarding the Hirakud Dam, Mahapurush wrote that one day Hirakud and Paradip will merge. Paradip is a port in Odisha's Jagatsinghpur district, located on the sea. A day will come when the sea and Hirakud will meet. This will happen when China and Pakistan launch missiles at the Hirakud Dam, causing it to break. As it is written, 'Shatru dwara bhanga heba, Odisha ra chha jilla jala re budiba,' meaning, 'It will be broken by the enemy, and six districts of Odisha will be submerged in water.' India's largest dam, built by modern scientists in Sambalpur, will break due to missiles fired by enemies, China and Pakistan. Its water, combined with the sea, will submerge six districts of Odisha. There is no doubt about this. This is going to happen in the coming days. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: In the Bhavishya Malika, there is a mention of Shri Shri Anukul Thakur Ji. Please tell us what is written about him. Thank you.
Answer: This is a very good question. Regarding Anukulchandra, Mahapurush Achyutananda has written with great joy and sanctity. He wrote that he will be born in the state of Bihar and will propagate dharma throughout India and the world. He will bring salvation to many devotees and will do good work. It is also written that many people will worship him as a supreme guru and a divine person. Many good things are written. Okay, son? Jai Mata Di.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: I wanted to ask, if missiles are fired at India, how will the Hirakud Dam break? Won't divine power neutralize them?
Answer: It is written in the scriptures that modern weapons of war will be neutralized by the grace of God and the prayers of devotees. That is absolutely correct. But if there is no destruction, then how will the sinners in India, Odisha, and elsewhere be destroyed? If the Hirakud Dam doesn't break, how will the demons be annihilated? Those who harm their parents, eat meat and fish all day, commit heinous acts, fight with people, commit sins, don't believe in God, violate the Vedic path, and speak with arrogance instead of seeking God's refuge—they have to be destroyed, right? So this is the path of destruction. But for the devotees, there will be nothing to worry about. Okay, son?

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: How will people get food? Where will they do farming after such destruction?
Answer: The devotees will be saved, son. The sinners will be destroyed. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: King Virat had a very close relationship with Lord Krishna. Is there any description in the Malika about him in the present time?
Answer: All those who were devotees of the Lord—not just Virat, but also the five Pandavas, Satyaki, the 500 Balbirs, and all other devotees—have all taken birth on Earth. They will all meet with Lord Kalki. They will be introduced through the Sudharma Sabha during the establishment of dharma. Okay, son? Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: Where has King Virat taken birth?
Answer: Look, son, millions like King Virat have taken birth on Earth. God, according to His plan, will bring them forward.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: Pandit ji, my question is about politics. I have seen that the four symbols of Lord Vishnu—conch (shankh), discus (chakra), mace (gada), and lotus (padma)—are used as symbols by political parties. The conch, discus, and lotus have been used, but the mace has not. When its symbol is used, could you please shed some light on it?
Answer: They do use it. The Bajrang Dal.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: How can we feel or experience that we are true devotees, that we are on the right path, and that we are also the devotees from the four yugas? Will something unnatural happen that will let us know automatically, or how will we know?
Answer: Look, daughter, when anything is churned, its truth is revealed. If you churn your mind with patience, purity, and the name of God, you will come to know everything. Chant the name of Madhav and remain in God's service, and you will know everything.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: Maharaj, I always have this fear that because of living abroad, will there be any problem in participating in the Lord's work and walking on His path? Will we have to come back to India, or will the Lord Himself somehow bring such devotees onto the path? This question always frightens me.
Answer: I want to tell you that those who connect with the Malika, talk about the Malika, and come to satsang—it is a sign that they were devotees in the past and are destined to be devotees again. This itself is the first and biggest sign. The second sign, daughter, is to follow the path I am showing: become a vegetarian, read the Shrimad Bhagavat, and start performing Trisandhya (prayers three times a day). If you do all this, there will be no problem for you. You can live anywhere. However, when the establishment of dharma happens in the entire world, not much will be left. But the place where devotees reside will be saved. The devotee who follows the path with devotion and a pure mind in God's refuge will be saved. Okay, daughter? Jai Shri Hanuman.

Video Title: L17 भक्तों का एकत्रीकरण कहां होगा? और कल्कि भगवान के साथ कैसे भेट होगा?
Question: I want to join your Malika group. What do I have to do for that, Guruji? Please guide me.
Answer: Do one thing. For the Vishwa Sanatan Dharma, look on the internet; in the description of our videos, there is a link. Open it and join the Vishwa Sanatan Dharma. Wherever a devotee is in the world, the Lord will find them, and the Malika is their destiny. So follow it, join this group, and follow the principles. Everything will be fine, daughter. Third is when the sun sets, and darkness comes, and the day ends. So these three times are the three Sandhyas. 'Omkar' is the Lord's name, the Lord's power, and the greatest salutation to the Lord. You can chant it as much as you can. It is good for you to follow the practice we describe for the Sandhya time. It depends on you.

Question: Are Asuras (demons) superior to humans? In the fifth canto of the Bhagavat, it is written that Asuras are described as being much superior to humans. Please shed some light on this.
Answer: Look, the scriptures are written in many ways. But our Veda only says this much: those who are born on this earth based on the quality of Sattva (goodness) are human. And the human who performs actions based on Sattva Guna is the best among them. And if a person, after being born human, manifests Tamasic (dark/ignorant) qualities, they are said to be of a demonic nature. The Vedas have always rejected beastly power. So, according to the Vedas, it is necessary for a human to have humanity, i.e., Sattvic qualities. One who has demonic, Tamasic qualities is like a sinner. This is all I will explain; you can understand from this.

A strong jolt of worldly attachment comes, and the knowledge disappears. What will be the future of such devotees? Please enlighten us.
Answer: In this life, the greatest and most sacred thing is the holy name. Those who chant the name of the Mother will attain Brahma Gyan (divine knowledge) and have a vision of the Lord, and they will go to the Satya Yuga. It is written in the Malika that simply by chanting the name of Madhav, we will realize everything that is going to happen in the future. We can even see the coming times. But one must also follow the prescribed path: reading the Srimad Bhagavatam, chanting the names of the 10 avatars, the 16 holy names of Lord Krishna, and continuously chanting the name 'Madhav'. By doing this, the devotee's power and inner light will increase, and they will be able to see everything.

Regarding your second question, many have come to earth as avatars and brought change. However, it is not written anywhere that they will come again. Secondly, if a person performs good deeds, they are reborn as a human. Right now is the time for the establishment of Dharma, and Lord Kalki has descended. He is the Guru for the entire world. In this era, the tradition of individual gurus will not remain. Only the Lord himself will be the Vishwaguru (World Teacher), and he will establish Dharma across the world, meaning he will destroy sin. He will move forward on his own will. During this time, you should all connect with the Malika. If you are pure, you can also meet the Lord.

Video Title: L23 भक्ति के माध्यम से कल्कि भगवान का दर्शन मिलेगा
Question: Prabhuji, after the establishment of Dharma, you speak of the 'Kshira Sagara' (Ocean of Milk) where people will bathe. Will everyone be able to bathe there, or only a few? Also, as the establishment of Dharma proceeds, it is said that the Lord will kill the wicked. Will he use the Sudarshana Chakra for this?
Answer: Regarding the first question, at that time, Vishnu and Shiva will be present, the 'Panchaka' period will be ongoing, and the Sudharma Sabha (assembly of righteousness) will be in session. But only those devotees who were pure, who were with the Lord in the Dvapara Yuga, like the Gopis... The Lord will summon the Ocean of Milk to Earth in front of the Biraja Devi temple. Goddess Durga will guard it. At the gate, Durga's attendants will be present. Only those who get permission and a pass from the Lord will be able to go and bathe, not everyone. For the second question, the Lord, the wielder of the chakra... when all the Muslim and other armies, while fighting, reach the borders of Odisha and confront the Lord at Khandagiri, the Lord will first challenge them and then destroy them with the 'Kala Chakra' (Wheel of Time). They are not cursed beings; they are asuras (demons) by their own karma. In this age, there are crores of asuras due to their own karma. The Lord will destroy them to establish Dharma and bring forth the Satya Yuga. It is not necessary that they will attain liberation.

Video Title: L23 भक्ति के माध्यम से कल्कि भगवान का दर्शन मिलेगा
Question: Two days ago, I had a dream. I saw a woman who was eating men. She was well-dressed in a nice saree and everything, but she was eating people. What could this mean?
Answer: This means that since the Dvapara Yuga, Mother Mahamaya, Mother Kalika, and her attendants have been waiting. At the end of the Kali Yuga, the Lord is committed to giving them human flesh and blood. The divine powers that are engaged in the work of destruction, their work is currently underway. The diseases, pandemics, and calamities that are happening—the Lord has given them authority over these things. He has not given full authority to all goddesses; if he gave all of them the authority to destroy, the destruction would be unimaginable. For now, he has given this authority for destruction to a small number of deities. What you saw in your dream is that very work, and it is in progress. As Mahapurush Achyutananda wrote, the goddesses are carrying out the destruction, and humans are suffering the consequences of their sinful actions. This will increase further.

Video Title: L23 भक्ति के माध्यम से कल्कि भगवान का दर्शन मिलेगा
Question: I have tried to understand this many times. Mother Kali, Mahamaya... she is the Divine Mother, a part of the Lord himself. Being the Divine Mother, how can she eat meat and drink blood? This confuses me. How can a mother consume her own children and be non-vegetarian?
Answer: That's a very good question. In the Dvapara Yuga, when Lord Krishna was returning with the cowherd boys, Mother Mahamaya asked the Lord for some of his devotees for her to destroy. The Lord replied, 'In this yuga, they are performing leela with me in Vrindavan, so I cannot give them to you now.' The Mother then asked when her wish would be fulfilled. The Lord replied that it is written in the scriptures that in the Kali Yuga, people will become sinners. They will kill living beings, consume intoxicants, refuse to take refuge in Lord Kalki, and oppose the establishment of Dharma—meaning they will engage in sin, injustice, and corruption. The Mother will destroy them. The Lord himself is Vishnu, the savior of all. Why would he destroy them with his chakra? If the sinners are not destroyed, human society cannot survive on earth. The Mother comes to destroy the sinners and also to save the devotees. The Malika says she will save the devotees and destroy the sinners. When someone commits a sin, their destruction becomes necessary. This is not the Mother's fault, as she has a destructive form (Samhara Rupi) as well as a benevolent form (Vaishnavi Rupi). In her destructive form, she destroys sinners, and in her benevolent Vaishnavi form, she saves devotees. This has happened in every age.

Video Title: L23 भक्ति के माध्यम से कल्कि भगवान का दर्शन मिलेगा

Meaning, in the beginning, it will be a virtuous Yuga. Then after some time, they will make mistakes... this is the end of Kali Yuga. Then there will be Satya Yuga, and at the end of Satya Yuga, there will be Brahma Pralaya (the great dissolution), similar to when the Lord took the Matsya avatar (fish incarnation). So that time is also coming. If the Lord wishes, He can change anything. At the end of the Yuga, Satya Yuga comes, and there is a dissolution. So this is the Lord's stream; it depends on the Lord whether He will bring back the same Yugas after this or create a new one. It is His decision.

When someone digs for water, fire comes out. I haven't seen this in my own life, but when nature and a person's actions are in opposition, then for such people, fire comes out instead of water. And you are right, that fire cannot be extinguished. The Malika says so. My thoughts suddenly changed; such changes also happen in the world due to the consequences of karma. This is just a small sign; in the coming times, you will see many confusing signs in the world. It's a very good thing that you see this and understand it. Follow the path of the Malika, join Sanatana Dharma, and work towards spreading the influence of dharma in the world. That will be for the best. Jai Jai Maa.

Question: What does the Malika say about the future of West Bengal, the concept of Akhand Bharat (undivided India), and the atrocities against Hindus?
Answer: The partition of India that happened will be undone. All those parts that were with India, where the Aryan system of governance existed, all those countries will be with India. It will be one land, Akhand Bharat. China, Pakistan, Afghanistan... all these countries, except for Sri Lanka, including Bhutan, will form one large landmass under one rule, which is Aryavarta or Akhand Bharat. As for the atrocities on Hindus, their numbers are high there, and this is the age of Kali Yuga, so there will be attacks on dharma. Video Title: L25 वर्तमान के समय में बच्चे लोग को पिता-माता को क्या शिक्षा प्रदान करना जरूरी है?  LIVE
Question: According to the Puranas, the Nar and Narayan mountains will merge, closing the path to Kedarnath and Badrinath. In their place, Bhavishya Badri and Bhavishya Kedar will emerge. Can you tell me if this will happen before or after Lord Kalki's arrival?
Answer: According to the Malika and all the scriptures I have read, Badrinath existed in Satya Yuga. Lord Krishna's great devotee, Uddhava, walked to that region in Dvapara Yuga, performed penance, and attained liberation. In Satya Yuga, when the Sanat Kumars were born, the great sage Narayana gave them teachings there. The four brothers, who were avatars of the Lord, performed penance there. So, Badrinath existed in Satya Yuga, Treta Yuga, Dvapara Yuga, and it exists in Kali Yuga. The propaganda that the two mountains will merge and Badrinath and Kedarnath will close is completely false. Nothing like that is going to happen. The pilgrimage site will remain, and people will continue to go there. The four dhams—Badrinath, Dwarka, Rameswaram, and Jagannath Puri—were established by Adi Guru Shankaracharya. These four dhams will exist in every era. The situation at Badrinath will not be as it is now, but the path will remain. The mountains will not merge as described because it is the Lord's own domain and will remain so in Satya Yuga. There will be no change in it.

Video Title: L25 वर्तमान के समय में बच्चे लोग को पिता-माता को क्या शिक्षा प्रदान करना जरूरी है?  LIVE

So, in the time to come, you should work for the establishment of dharma and for the Kalki avatar. The Lord fulfilled your wish and your father's wish by sending him to that place twice. Now, for the establishment of dharma, the Lord has already taken incarnation. Follow the path we are showing, because Lord Krishna saved devotees in Dvapara Yuga, and Lord Kalki, as Krishna, has come in this age. You all should come to this path.

When Kali Yuga changes to Satya Yuga, devotees will meet the Lord directly, talk to him, and worship him directly. Devotion is the most important thing. Look, all devotees will have to take refuge in Lord Kalki because he will rule the world. When he has come to earth in human form, you all must take refuge in him. It is also necessary to follow his path with purity. That is why the Malika was written, that is why I am propagating the Malika, telling everyone about the end of the era. Otherwise, things would just go on, and the devotees and the Lord would never meet. That's why this dream came to you, so you can work well.

Video Title: L25 वर्तमान के समय में बच्चे लोग को पिता-माता को क्या शिक्षा प्रदान करना जरूरी है?  LIVE

Lord Kalki will keep the devotees on one side and carry out the work of destruction throughout the universe on the other side, through the five elements, through war, and through pandemics. Question: What happens after the four yugas? Is there a Brahma Pralaya where everything, including the sun, moon, and stars, dissolves into a cosmic ocean?
Answer: Yes, after the four yugas, there is a Brahma Pralaya, in which the sky, all the stars, the moon, and the sun, up to the infinite universes, become a cosmic ocean. Everything dissolves in it, and all things remain latent. Then the Lord creates a new sun, moon, stars, and everything anew. Right now, we are moving from Kali Yuga to Ananta Yuga, or Sangam Yuga. Soon, we will enter Satya Yuga. Satya Yuga will last for 10,000 years, or as long as the Lord wishes. After that, Brahma Pralaya will occur, and all humans and beings will perish. Then a new creation will begin. This cycle continues. It is written about in the Srimad Bhagavatam. Follow the path of devotion; only through devotion can one attain liberation. The path of knowledge only helps to understand things mentally, but devotion is born from the Bhagavatam. The Bhagavatam is a scripture that contains nothing but pure devotion. That is why it is called the Mahapurana among the 18 Puranas. One who reads the Srimad Bhagavatam gets the benefit of reading all 18 Puranas.

Question: What is Trisandhya and how should it be performed?
Answer: Look, Trisandhya is this: First, in the morning, at the juncture when night ends and dawn begins, at that time, chant the 16 names, the 10 avatars, and the name of Madhava. The second sandhya is at midday, at 12:00 PM, when the time transitions from 12 to 1, meaning when the afternoon begins. At that time, do satsang and chant the 16 names, the 10 avatars, and the name of Madhava. And in the evening, when the time changes and dusk arrives, that juncture is called Sandhya Bela. At that time too, chant the 10 avatars, the 16 names, and the name of Lord Madhava. This will bring you peace and happiness.

We wondered what would happen. We did nothing but remember the Lord in our hearts and sent a message to Pitaji (the speaker) about what had happened. The only message we received from there was, 'Whatever is in your heart, your faith will be proven. Go with faith, take precautions, cover your face, and there will be no obstacles.' Without a test, you cannot travel from one city to another. We traveled from one country to another without an RT-PCR report. This is purely a miracle of the Lord. This is just one thing. Pitaji also mentioned something about driving, and we were saved from death twice while driving. There are many other miracles of the Lord that we don't want to mention here. We will only say that the Lord has arrived on Earth. Before criticizing Pitaji's path, just try chanting the name of Madhav. Try drinking that nectar once, and then you will know. It is very easy to criticize.

Question: Pandit ji, I had a dream a few days ago that I was walking on a mountain, and there were many snakes lying on the path. They weren't harming me; they were just lying there as I walked on the mountain. What does this mean?
Answer: Actually, what this truly means is that such a time will come. It is also written in the Malika Shastra that the Nagas (serpent beings) from the Naga Loka in the netherworld will all come to Earth. Due to their influence and the effect of their venom, many areas will become poisonous. The snakes didn't harm you because you are a devotee. I am saying this to the pure and devout people: those who follow the Malika will not be bitten by snakes. They won't do anything; they will go on their way as you go on yours. So, a time is coming when the entire Naga Loka will come to Earth and will assist in the great destruction. They will participate in the destruction but will protect the devotees.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे
Question: Pandit ji, my question is about Punjab. What important role will it play in the establishment of Dharma? As we know, Punjab is a holy land where many of our Gurus have come to Earth. And my second question is, as you posted in the group, a meeting of Muslim countries is happening in Pakistan. Please tell us about that in detail.
Answer: Alright. When there were attempts to impose cruelty and defile the Sikh religion, the Guru tradition was established in Sikhism. Many holy and revered Gurus came and protected Dharma. The greatest proof of purity is that Guru Nanak Dev himself came to the Jagannath region and established his monastery there. In his writings, he wrote about the Kalki avatar. This means the entire Sikh community will be involved in God's work of establishing Dharma. Those who are pure and follow Dharma, people from the Sikh community will join together to work for Sanatana Dharma and will work with God in establishing Dharma. The second point is about the 13 Muslim countries gathering. It is written in the Malika that the '13 hat-wearers' will gather, and after that, the preparations for the world war will be complete. This is happening now and will be completed in the coming time. When it is complete, they will unite to start the India-Pakistan war. This work is in progress. The outcome is also written in the Malika, including how the battle formations will be created and who will join. They will all gather and fight, but in the end, Sanatana Dharma will be victorious. For that, you are working, I am working, we are all working together. God will help us and will protect this divine land of Bharatvarsha. Through the purity of the devotees and the grace of the Lord, Akhand Bharat (undivided India) will be created. All the parts that were divided—Afghanistan, Balochistan, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Myanmar, all our neighboring states—will be reunited with India. A time will come when the light of Sanatana Dharma will spread.

Question: You mentioned in the last session that he (the Kalki avatar) has already been born. According to that, why haven't we seen any of his divine plays (leelas) yet?
Answer: According to the Malika Shastra, the Lord's incarnation has already happened. It was written in the Malika that when the flag falls from the Jagannath temple, that is when Lord Kalki's incarnation will take place. Calculating from that time, according to the Malika, he will be 14 years old when his work of establishing Dharma will begin. The flag of Jagannath ji fell 15 years before 2008. So this is the proof. Secondly, regarding his 'leelas' (divine plays), look, your devotion is your power, your experience is your power, your inner self is your power. In devotion and surrender, follow the path I am showing you, and you will receive complete information about Lord Kalki.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे
Question: What is 'Anant Yug' (Infinite Era), and when will its effects be seen in the western region of Rajasthan?
Answer: The time between the end of one yuga (era) and the beginning of Satya Yuga, that small period when Satya Yuga begins, is called 'Anant Yug'. In other words, it is also called 'Adya Satya Yug' (the first Satya Yuga). This era will spread the light of truth and gather the pure devotees. After the devotees are gathered, Dharma will be established through Lord Kalki. After the establishment of Dharma and the destruction of sinners, Sanatana Dharma will be re-established. Then, the Adya Satya Yug will progress further, and gradually, after 1000 years, the full Satya Yuga will arrive.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे

Answer: Look, to attain God at this time, following the path of the Malika is the greatest duty. The Malika is the only scripture that writes about the end of Kali Yuga, the establishment of Dharma, the gathering of devotees, the union of God and devotees, and how Satya Yuga will begin. So, follow the Malika, and after that, everything will slowly become clear.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे
Question: You mentioned the gathering of 13 Muslim countries. In that context, what will happen to the Muslim community within our country and the anti-national people when these events unfold?
Answer: This is a very valid question. The Muslim people living in our country are our own citizens, which is a different context from those in other countries. I am speaking according to our current system of governance. But when Dharma is established, God will see only one thing, regardless of religion or creed: who has more sin. The one whose sin is greater—meaning the one who commits sins, is harmful to society, is a burden on the Earth, kills living beings, acts against Sanatana Dharma, and opposes the Vedas—only they will be destroyed. In this, God will not see any religion, policy, or caste. Only those who have more merit and purity will survive. I can say this much. The one who has Dharma with them will be safe.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे
Question: According to Sanatana Dharma, when one attains Moksha (liberation), they are not reborn. They go to Vaikuntha, the abode of Vishnu. My doubt is about Jaya and Vijaya, the two gatekeepers of Lord Vishnu. They were already in Vaikuntha, so how did they fall and have to be reborn three times as demons? If a soul goes to Vaikuntha, shouldn't it be free from rebirth?
Answer: A very good question. Just as a river flows and merges into the ocean, its forward motion stops, but the river itself continues to exist. Similarly, a person who attains Moksha goes to Goloka Vaikuntha and assumes a divine, four-armed body. They participate in the eternal divine play (leela) there in bliss. Moksha does not mean they will not be born again. It means they get a place and a divine body in Vaikuntha. When the Lord takes an incarnation on Earth, those same devotees are born again to participate in His earthly leelas, and they return to Vaikuntha afterward. However, if someone commits too many sins during their earthly life, they cannot go back. This cycle continues. It is written in the scriptures that before the Rama and Krishna avatars, the gods were asked to take birth on Earth to assist the Lord. So, it is not a final death but a purification of the body into a divine form where there is no fear of death. This cycle continues.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे
Question: I had a dream where a lamp representing India was being extinguished. What does this signify?
Answer: A lamp is a symbol of energy and light. This means the eyes of enemies will fall upon India. As India's light spreads and its power grows, problems will come upon it, and the 'lamp will be extinguished' in that sense. India will face problems from external enemies. But the establishment of Dharma will happen. The devotees will create Ram Rajya. This work must be done. The problems will not go away on their own; they will keep increasing year after year. You all must watch and follow the path of Dharma. Make people aware that Kali Yuga has ended and it is time for the establishment of Dharma.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे
Question: In the Dashavatara (ten incarnations), Shri Balarama is mentioned alongside Lord Krishna. Is Lord Krishna the supreme Mahavishnu and Balarama an avatar? What is the difference, and why isn't Balarama's incarnation mentioned for this age?
Answer: Look, Balarama, Mahadev, Sankarshana, and Lakshman are all manifestations of His energy. They are all one energy from Mahavishnu. In Kali Yuga, Balarama will not come because the Kalki avatar is a single, complete incarnation. Lord Kalki's body contains the combined energies of Mahavishnu, Balarama, and Brahma. Since Mahavishnu himself is coming, Balarama will not come separately. Kalki has come with all the powers combined. The Malika does not mention Balarama coming in this age. When it is said 'Krishna-stu bhagavan svayam' (Krishna is the Supreme Lord Himself), it means he was the complete form. Balarama was considered an avatar in the Dwapara Yuga.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे

In the name of Ma Kalika, a 'Kalika Mandal' (circle of Kali) will be formed, combining different states. Mother Parvati, in this form, will work for the establishment of Dharma not just in Kolkata but in the entire universe, taking all the goddesses with her.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे
Question: While the work of Dharma is ongoing, why are the devotees who are participating receiving nothing but hardship and sorrow?

Due to the influence of the Asuras (demons), devotees are facing problems, but this will only be for a short time. When the Lord establishes Dharma, this will change, and the devotees will receive infinite happiness.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे

Answer: For that, the greatest act of purity is to follow the path that I am showing. By walking on this path, the influence of sinners, the influence of enemies, and the problems that devotees are facing will be removed, and the devotees will live in bliss. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे
Question: Baba, you have spoken about many places. What will happen in Nepal? I wish to know.
Answer: In Nepal, most people follow Sanatana Dharma. Many are devotees of Lord Buddha, whose incarnation was for establishing Dharma. However, when I visited, I saw people eating meat, even though Lord Buddha himself opposed the killing of living beings. The scriptures are clear on this. The devotees in Nepal will be reformed and will join the establishment of Dharma under Lord Kalki. However, a very big, devastating earthquake will happen in Nepal. The devotees will be saved. Natural calamities like landslides, starvation, and cloudbursts will occur worldwide, including in Nepal. To be saved from these problems, you should read the Srimad Bhagavatam daily, perform Trisandhya (prayers at three junctures of the day), and follow the path we show. By doing this, you can come under the shelter of Lord Kalki and keep your family safe.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे
Question: There are many Hindus who perform charity and take the Lord's name, but when we ask them to join this path, they say, 'We already do good deeds, so no sorrow will come to us. We will be saved anyway.' Why do they refuse to join?

Then there are others who are indirect; they are good people who practice dharma, charity, and good deeds. They might even attain heaven according to their karma. But they are not participating in the specific work of establishing Dharma at the end of Kali Yuga. That is why they don't join. It's okay. There are devotees who will join, and there are ordinary people. You should still try to tell them.

The fire is a signal of this.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे
Question: Pandit ji, this pandemic that is going on right now, is this also part of the establishment of Dharma?
Answer: When sin increases on Earth, calamities come upon humans through their karma. There are two types: 'vyadhi' (disease) and 'mahamari' (pandemic). Diseases like cancer or diabetes are the result of an individual's past life karma. A pandemic, however, occurs when sin increases in society as a whole. This pandemic that has come is the power of the goddesses. It is now in its third phase; it will go up to the seventh phase. I have been saying this for the past two years.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे

He has already given a physical vision to some of our connected devotees according to their level of devotion. He will only give 'darshan' (vision) to those who have that level of devotion. Lord Kalki will never give a mass darshan to the public in this age of destruction. That will happen in Satya Yuga, but not now.

Video Title: L32 सत्य में रहने वाले भक्तो को निंदा-अपमान मिलेगा-- विष्णु भगवान संहार के लिए कल्कि रूप धारण करेंगे

He will be among his devotees, and only they will recognize him in his human form.
