Video Title: L54 - जोशीमठ, बद्रीधाम और उत्तराखंड के बारे में भविष्य मालिका में क्या वर्णन है?
Question: I was watching a video in which they were making prophecies but also saying that just because there are prophecies doesn't mean it's the end, because the Kali Yuga has only completed 5000 years. So people are unaware that the destructive phase has already begun. How can they be helped with this, and what can be done?
Answer: Look, mother, I have been saying this since the year 2000. In the time of dharma, the Kali Yuga has ended, and Dharma Sansthapana (establishment of righteousness) will happen. And at that time, those same hypocrites will say, 'We also said this.' Those hypocrites will be destroyed. They don't understand dharma, and they don't tell human society that the Kali Yuga has ended. They have no knowledge about Dharma Sansthapana or the scriptures. If they had knowledge, they would surely have said something. But the time will come. Wait for two years. Those same people will then say with their own mouths, 'Yes, it is coming.' And at that time, even God won't give them a place to be saved. Now is the time to change. This is not my word; it is what God has said. I am not scaring anyone. I am saying, 'Come to dharma.' I say, 'Follow the Malika.' I say, 'Perform Tri-Sandhya, read the Bhagavat, and human society will be saved.' They are ruining people. When the problem comes, people will then say... I am saying it today and standing like a rock. The time of destruction is coming. And the destruction will be so great that when the final moment of destruction arrives, people will become conscious and say, 'You were speaking the truth.' But at that time, there will be no one to save them. The path of our Malika—performing Tri-Sandhya, reading the Bhagavat, giving charity, and chanting the Lord's name—requires at least five to seven years of spiritual practice. Otherwise, one will not become worthy of the Satya Yuga. And those who say 432,000 years... Sage Garga himself wrote in his scripture, the Garga Samhita, that it will be 4800 years. Tell those who say this. If they haven't read it, why do they call themselves saints? We are showing the path for the salvation of humanity. Our goal is nothing else. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L54 - जोशीमठ, बद्रीधाम और उत्तराखंड के बारे में भविष्य मालिका में क्या वर्णन है?
Question: Father, please tell us something about Bombay. What will happen in Mumbai, when, and what will happen first?
Answer: A great calamity is about to befall Mumbai. And after April 5th... I don't want to say what will happen due to the effects of war, but understand this much: the population of humans in the world will be such that only three or four people will remain in a village. A situation like this is going to happen. Only those who have dharma, who have the words of the Malika, will become the humans of the Satya Yuga. And the time will come when the internet will go down.

Video Title: L54 - जोशीमठ, बद्रीधाम और उत्तराखंड के बारे में भविष्य मालिका में क्या वर्णन है?
Question: A saint once came to our village and said he was from Gujarat and made a prophecy. Are these kinds of prophecies from other saints true?
Answer: Look, I have no information about this. If someone is saying such a thing, it must be their own words; there is nothing like this in the Malika. And the second thing is, it is written in the Malika that great 'knowledgeable' people will come and say, 'I had a dream,' or 'I received a divine command.' They will say, 'God has appeared here,' 'The Goddess has appeared here,' 'Come to this temple,' 'Build an ashram here.' Many such people will come and mislead the world. It is written about this in the Malika and in every scripture. There is no proof or truth to this. Look, don't get sidetracked. Perform Tri-Sandhya daily. Read the Bhagavat. And chant the name of Madhav. This is the greatest protective shield for us. Many people will say such things here and there. It has no meaning, and the Malika has written about this.

Video Title: L54 - जोशीमठ, बद्रीधाम और उत्तराखंड के बारे में भविष्य मालिका में क्या वर्णन है?
Question: They are supporting the impure ones... there is a BJP government in Uttarakhand, and Modi has become their devotee... telling us to befriend them. They want to destroy us. What should we do about this?
Answer: Look, don't worry, brother. We can't do anything just by wanting it. But the one who does things has already started. There are 7 years left. In these 7 years, everything will change. So there is no need to worry. Just wait for the time and see what happens. Neither the village nor the town will remain. Only Sanatana and its devotees will remain. No one else will be able to do anything.

Video Title: L54 - जोशीमठ, बद्रीधाम और उत्तराखंड के बारे में भविष्य मालिका में क्या वर्णन है?
Question: Will those who have property, an abundance of money, and wealth be able to save themselves?
Answer: The wealthy, the respected, the knowledgeable... a time will come when people won't even look at wealth. It will have no meaning. People will go from house to house for food. So, the one who has dharma will be protected. I am telling you again and again. In the coming time, dharma will be the greatest power, not wealth. And a time will come when medicine will not work. If medicine doesn't work, what will you do? You will chant the name. Which name? The name we are telling you about. God has chosen certain people for this task. Perhaps God has given me a little grace, and I am distributing it to you. 600 years have passed; how many people came before me? So this is God's grace. With the end of the era, the propagation of dharma has begun, and it is increasing. The time will come when 64 crore devotees will gather. Otherwise, no one will be able to survive. I am doing this work alone. You should also join me and propagate the Malika. Because the people to whom God has given power, capability, and wealth, they say that the Kali Yuga has not ended. But what will our devotees do? So, we will all work together. In America, the temperature dropped to -62 degrees in half an hour. If it had become -70, everyone would have died. And such a time will also come. It is written in the Malika that snow will fall up to 12-18 feet, and many people will perish. Wherever there are devotees, it will be warm. God will stabilize everything for the devotees with His Yogamaya power. On one side, the sinners will be destroyed, and on the other side, the devotees will be saved. So understand the time and move forward. Dharma will remain, and nothing else besides dharma will remain.

Video Title: L54 - जोशीमठ, बद्रीधाम और उत्तराखंड के बारे में भविष्य मालिका में क्या वर्णन है?
Question: What will the situation be like here?
Answer: What is the meaning of Bhagavat Katha? A true Bhagavat Katha means the Bhagavat is read continuously for seven days. People leave their daily routines to sit and listen at all times. Nowadays, Bhagavat Katha is conducted with bhajans and songs, and the complete story is not told. The Bhagavat Katha that will happen in the Satya Yuga will be the complete one. Such a Katha doesn't happen today. In the Kali Yuga, people don't have that much time for their salvation. That is why it is necessary for you to perform Tri-Sandhya, to read one chapter of the Bhagavat at home yourself, and to chant the Lord's name. It is best for you now to work towards creating that Satya Yuga. And just coming to dharma is not enough. When the Lord's Malika is being propagated, some people don't accept it. They may be devotees for some time, but they will not want to live as a devotee of God for all four yugas. I will only say this much: if one is a saint, a devotee, a spiritual seeker, then it would be good for them to follow the Malika. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L54 - जोशीमठ, बद्रीधाम और उत्तराखंड के बारे में भविष्य मालिका में क्या वर्णन है?
Question: I am from Jamshedpur. There was a Bhagwat Katha here, and it was said that all the money collected is for cow service and for building a cowshed. Is it right to donate in such situations where we are not sure how the money is used?
Answer: What they do is their responsibility. There is no harm in giving to them. Donating is the greatest dharma for us. You should donate. If they use it in the wrong way, their sin will be upon them.

Video Title: L54 - जोशीमठ, बद्रीधाम और उत्तराखंड के बारे में भविष्य मालिका में क्या वर्णन है?
Question: Just as the Lord left his place... similarly, will the deity at the Balaji Temple in the South also physically leave?
Answer: He is Dwarikanath; there is no difference between them. So, understand its meaning: the sacred place, the pilgrimage site, will remain. But when it is time for God's incarnation, at such a time, God has already told us what to do. Don't think that Balaji is one God and Jagannath is another God. They are not different. Look, it is the time of the establishment of dharma, which means the destruction of sinners and the rise of dharma. At such a time, the path for you to be saved, to save your life and your family... if you have God's grace, then follow the Malika. Do what I say. Give in charity. Just as that mother was saying she donated ₹100, that is very good. If someone takes a donation and does wrong with it, the sin is theirs, it doesn't come to us. So, look, God is everywhere. And when God incarnates, He leaves all places, but the sacred site remains.

Video Title: L54 - जोशीमठ, बद्रीधाम और उत्तराखंड के बारे में भविष्य मालिका में क्या वर्णन है?
Question: My question is that we are supposed to embody dharma—truth, love, peace—but while we can control our actions with our body, the mind does whatever it wants. If the mind doesn't accept this dharma, what should we do?
Answer: After reading the Bhagavat for a few days, stability will come. And when the time is right, the mind will slowly move towards dharma. Until we read it, our mind will remain restless, and we will not be able to perform righteous deeds.

Video Title: L54 - जोशीमठ, बद्रीधाम और उत्तराखंड के बारे में भविष्य मालिका में क्या वर्णन है?
Question: What is the status of the 16 Mandals (circles of devotees) in Karnataka?
Answer: It is in the primary stage. It is necessary to gather all the members of the 16 Mandals. That is why we are propagating the Malika in many languages. The Malika will also be available in the languages of Karnataka. It will take some time. The 16 Mandals will have about 31 to 33 crore devotees. It has just begun and will take another 3-4 years. On one side, there will be destruction, and on the other side, the devotees will be gathered. Thus, the establishment of dharma will continue. The devotees will be saved, and the sinners will be destroyed. The 16 Mandals have been formed for now, but the number of members mentioned in the scriptures has not been reached yet. For that, we and you all have to do a lot of work. Because before God comes, his devotees do his work. If you are his worker, then you should also work in such a way that the Lord's task becomes easy and smooth.

Video Title: L54 - जोशीमठ, बद्रीधाम और उत्तराखंड के बारे में भविष्य मालिका में क्या वर्णन है?
Question: For performing a religious ritual like the parikrama at Giriraj-ji, is it valid if we pay a priest we know to do it on our behalf?
Answer: I will say this much, mother: wherever dharma is being practiced, participate in it. And the most important thing is that all the dharmas in the world will come under the Malika. There will be no other way. Look, mother, use your own consideration: is this right or wrong? And at a time like this, what is the most important thing for us to do? Act in a way that is auspicious for you and for the world. Every human has a conscience. And the conscience awakens when our mind connects with God. You all read the Bhagavat. Act with conscience, in which the light of dharma will reside. Our greatest duty is to work as the Lord's devotees have in previous ages. We need to work like the Vanar Sena (monkey army) did. Whatever dharma you practice, do it after consulting your conscience. When the conscience speaks, everything is good. So act according to your own conscience, mother.

Video Title: L54 - जोशीमठ, बद्रीधाम और उत्तराखंड के बारे में भविष्य मालिका में क्या वर्णन है?
Question: It is said that 16 Muslim countries will unite. What will our government, what will Modi ji do then?
Answer: This is not under human control. What is going to happen... what can the government do? You all have joined the Vanar Sena (the Lord's army). You are working for Him. [The answer implies that human governments are irrelevant in the face of divine will and that devotees should focus on their spiritual work.]

Video Title: L54 - जोशीमठ, बद्रीधाम और उत्तराखंड के बारे में भविष्य मालिका में क्या वर्णन है?
Question: Could you please tell us once more about the 16 Mandals, for the members? And the Bhavishya Malika that is being printed in English, will we all get it?
Answer: A very good question. This is a sign of God's will. The English book will be available. The number given in the description is for a boy named Mohan. Stay in touch with him and come to the online satsang to get the English book. And the most important thing is... this message is reaching you for your protection. No one in the world has the power to protect against a nuclear bomb. But the path we have for protecting ourselves is what God himself has spoken. Before the establishment of dharma, this will be propagated among my devotees. Upon receiving the Malika, a vibration will arise in their minds: 'Dharma will be established! We will do the Lord's work! We will meet God! Then Ram Rajya will come!' Those who are not devotees will oppose and criticize it. We have nothing to do with that because we have to save the devotees of God in India and the world. So many people abuse me. It doesn't matter. We should do good deeds and then return to the Lord. You should follow the Malika, join the satsang, and distribute the Malika book, which is nectar. By doing this, in a very short time, the full number of the 16 Mandals will be formed. And after the 16 Mandals are formed, the Lord will intensify the establishment of dharma. The problem in Uttarakhand that the mother was talking about, all those problems will slowly be resolved. And besides Sanatana Dharma, whatever else there is, they will also be forced to come to Sanatana Dharma. Because dharma itself is Sanatana. The situation in Joshimath is a sign from God. Our devotees are safe. This is the word of God, and you should have faith in it. There is no problem. God will see to everything. Just propagate the Malika and connect all our Sanatana Dharma devotees with God again. This is the most important work for you.

Video Title: L55.2 - भविष्य मालिका के अनुसार एशिया, अमेरिका और खाड़ी देशों के विनाश का समय आ रहा है।
Question: Will there be no effect in India? I want to know if there will be an effect, and if so, will the devotees remain safe?
Answer: Look, a nuclear attack will happen on India, and it will be massive. But it is written in the Malika. See, even before nuclear weapons were created, 600 years ago, it was written that a nuclear event would come. Our neighbors threaten us, saying they are a nuclear-powered country. But you said one thing right: a nuclear attack will happen, but nothing will happen to the devotees. This won't happen by changing in a day; for that, they will have to continuously chant for many years and become selfless devotees with complete surrender to the Lord. Disasters will come upon us, but we must remain in surrender.

Video Title: L55.2 - भविष्य मालिका के अनुसार एशिया, अमेरिका और खाड़ी देशों के विनाश का समय आ रहा है।
Question: My family members don't believe in these prophecies or in the Malika. So, by my prayers and recitations, will they also remain protected?
Answer: Many fruits grow on a single tree; some are sweet, some are misshapen, and some are a bit sour. Our family is the same. While performing our duties, taking care of our family is our biggest responsibility. Because it is written in the Srimad Bhagavatam that taking care of our family is our supreme duty. There should be no argument about this with the family. It's not necessary to compel or force anyone. A time will come when our family members will join us. However, at that time, they will not feel the full effect of the stream of purity. And that's okay, because time is very near. The establishment of dharma will move forward. The devotees will come on their own upon hearing the name of Ram. Those who are not devotees will not be affected no matter how many times you tell them. So I say, live according to your family's policies and customs. Don't have any arguments with your family about this. Take refuge in God. Don't say anything to the family. We came alone, and we will go alone. But since we have a family, it is necessary to perform our duties with respect, affection, and love.

Video Title: L55.2 - भविष्य मालिका के अनुसार एशिया, अमेरिका और खाड़ी देशों के विनाश का समय आ रहा है।
Question: I have two questions, Father. Last night, my wife and I had the same dream. In my dream, a cataclysm was happening, and I saw some people drowning. Similarly, my wife saw some of our relatives drowning, but we were safe. So I wanted to understand this. And I also need guidance on this: it is said an earthquake will happen in 2026, so will it happen before that or after?
Answer: Earthquakes will keep happening continuously. Diseases will come and go. Many young people will die, especially those involved in tantra, mantra, and goddess worship who are not under the refuge of Lord Vishnu, who eat fish and meat, and who are corrupt. The times will be bad for such people. And the major earthquakes will continue. There will be earthquakes before 2025; it's not that they will stop. They will continue, along with diseases and the effects of war. Everything will continue. But look, it is written in the Malika: wherever my devotees are, the Lord will raise the ground beneath them to save them. Nothing will happen to the devotees. And if devotees are drowning in water or face any problem, Lord Balaram himself, the Lord's brother, will rescue them and bring them to safety. So, nothing will happen to the devotees; the sinners will perish. Save your family, chant the Lord's name. Last-minute devotion will not work; this is written in the scriptures. Because sages and saints have to do penance for many years, a student has to study for a whole year for an exam. Our path is based on the same principle. For a person to sort out or cleanse their past deeds and purify themselves, they need to be in the refuge of God for at least several years, with purity, chanting, and reading scriptures like the Bhagavatam. This will purify their body, and when the body is pure, then they will be safe.

Video Title: L55.2 - भविष्य मालिका के अनुसार एशिया, अमेरिका और खाड़ी देशों के विनाश का समय आ रहा है।
Question: Pandit ji, you say that God has already incarnated. Do you mean God is...?
Answer: I have said this much: according to the Malika, scriptures, and Puranas, Lord Kalki has already incarnated. But devotees must find God through their devotion, emotion, and surrender. They will attain God through their devotion. Because when humans performed penance, when the Gopis sought the Lord, they did not find him immediately. Friends, you will have a vision of God. First, come into the stream of dharma. By doing what I say, God's grace will be upon you, and gradually, the light of knowledge will dawn. So, the most important thing is to first make yourself a 'Sudharma' (righteous one) in the stream of righteousness that we are talking about—Satsang, chanting, kirtan. Gradually, experience it for yourself, and you will gain the knowledge of whether this is right or wrong. Your experience and inner self will tell you at that time. So don't waste time on this, because time is very near. At such a time, nothing but dharma can protect us.

Video Title: L55.2 - भविष्य मालिका के अनुसार एशिया, अमेरिका और खाड़ी देशों के विनाश का समय आ रहा है।
Question: In such a situation [a dam breaking and flooding Haridwar], what future do you see for the population up to Delhi?
Answer: That's absolutely right. All the dams in India will not remain. The dam will surely break due to this earthquake, and the water will reach Delhi and Haridwar; this is also correct. But one thing is written in the Malika: 'The ocean will be on the mountains, the king of the sea will rage.' Devotees should not fear. Whether the water rises 100 meters, 200 meters, or even a thousand meters, the devotees of the Lord who are in the stream of dharma will all be safe. That is our dharma, and that is why the Malika was written. Who was the Malika written for? If all the devotees take a water grave (drown), then with whom will the Lord establish dharma? So, the devotees have been kept safe. And in the future, they will remain in the stream. Before the conflict and destruction, the Malika is being propagated. In Uttarakhand, there will be such rain... you spoke of the dam, but there will be such rain in Haridwar that a huge amount of water will come. I am talking about the rain. And every month, there will be cloudbursts and rain. Don't waste time. Because when we came, the protector who sent us, He gave us birth and has raised us till today. Parents do their part, but the ultimate doer is the Lord. So, don't worry. You all should joyfully remain in the stream of Malika. Join the Satsang. In our Satsang, we will tell you all the principles of Malika, and we will keep telling you the principles by which humanity will be protected.

Video Title: L55.2 - भविष्य मालिका के अनुसार एशिया, अमेरिका और खाड़ी देशों के विनाश का समय आ रहा है।
Question: Tears flow from my eyes [when I hear the Lord's name]. What is the reason for this, Pandit ji?
Answer: The name of God... It is great joy, it feels very happy. I also feel peace in my heart. One doesn't become a devotee just by listening to scriptures. It is due to the pious deeds of many past lives that a human is born on earth and receives the Lord's message. At such a time, I want to say this much: we have to follow the path, we have to become 'Sudharma' (righteous). We have to transform our human body of the Kali Yuga into a divine human body of 'Sudharma,' which will protect our body from nature, diseases, natural calamities, and excesses. When that sacred stream flows from the eyes, and in the end, if there is a union with God, then you attain that union.

Video Title: L55.2 - भविष्य मालिका के अनुसार एशिया, अमेरिका और खाड़ी देशों के विनाश का समय आ रहा है।
Question: I had two questions to ask you. First, by which year will this process of 'Dharma Sansthapna' (establishment of righteousness) be complete, and by which year will the 'Satya Yuga' (Age of Truth) arrive?
Answer: The work for the Rameshwar Mandal has begun. Many devotees have joined the Rameshwar Mandal, and some saints and sadhus who live in the forest have also joined. So the formation of the Rameshwar Mandal has started. As for the establishment of dharma, it began in 2020 and will continue until 2031. In 2032, the truth will be revealed, people will find peace, and the earth will be liberated from the burden of sin.

Video Title: L55.2 - भविष्य मालिका के अनुसार एशिया, अमेरिका और खाड़ी देशों के विनाश का समय आ रहा है।
Question: When devotees perform spiritual practices, chant, or praise the Lord, negative energies trouble them. What command has the Lord given to be protected from them?
Answer: Because obstacles increase when you do righteous work. Especially the influence of Kali in the Kali Yuga, it definitely creates obstacles when devotees perform righteous acts. But if our faith in the Lord remains strong... for some time, the demon exerts its influence so that the devotees fall, leave the path, and stop believing in the Malika. This causes many problems, illnesses, and diseases. When they chant the name, pain and suffering come, and then people ask how to get rid of the suffering. This continues for at least a year. By continuously chanting and following the path I describe, it will end. Because Kali (the negative force) wants people not to follow the path of dharma. Look, sometimes when I go to give a discourse, I get such a high fever that I have to take medicine and go. I know what force is doing this to me. Then I give the discourse, and everything becomes fine. Because righteous work is not that easy, and when you walk the path of dharma, external forces oppose you. We must first do our work and take refuge in Him. We know all this is going to happen; it is written in the scriptures.

Video Title: L55.2 - भविष्य मालिका के अनुसार एशिया, अमेरिका और खाड़ी देशों के विनाश का समय आ रहा है।
Question: How many years will it [the Sangam Yug or Confluence Age] last?
Answer: It is an age where the karma and dharma of a being are considered, where God and the devotee unite. And the union of God and devotees happens because the Lord takes all the problems of the devotees from all four yugas who are in trouble and creates a blissful Age of Truth (Satya Yuga) for them, bringing heaven to earth. For years, God himself will rule, and the humans who live at that time will shift to the complete Satya Yuga. And the complete Satya Yuga lasts for about 1200 to 2400 years. This depends on God's will. How long any age will last at a particular time is decided by God and the humans born in that age. So, such a time will come. The complete Satya Yuga will come after the Sangam Yug (Confluence Age).

Video Title: L55.2 - भविष्य मालिका के अनुसार एशिया, अमेरिका और खाड़ी देशों के विनाश का समय आ रहा है।
Question: I wanted to ask about a dream I had. My late father came and told me and my wife, 'Let's go for darshan (a holy visit).' He came on a mount that looked like an animal, I couldn't see its feet, it looked like a horse, but it was moving in the air. We went behind him on a vehicle. He took us in front of a temple of Mother Kali and left us there. I saw myself sitting in a gallery there. I couldn't understand it. I thought I should ask you its meaning.
Answer: No, you did not have a vision of the Mother Goddess; the Lord showed you his divine play. I want to tell you this much: ancestors think about the welfare of their people, their family. And right now, the Lord has given Mother Kali the complete responsibility for destruction. Your ancestors took you to Mother Kali, but you did not see her fierce (Rudra) form. This means it was a test from the Lord for many people.

Question: My husband asked a question I couldn't answer. If Lord Brahma first created Manu and Shatarupa and told them to populate the Earth, but the Earth was in the netherworld (rasatal), how did the demon Hiranyaksha already exist to have taken it there before the first humans were even created?
Answer: Before the creation of Manu and Shatarupa, the primordial demons Hiranyaksha and Hiranyakashipu were born from the womb of Diti. Manu and Shatarupa were created by Lord Brahma in Brahmalok. When Brahma sent them to Earth, they found it submerged in water. At that time, Hiranyaksha was in the netherworld (Patal Lok). The demons of that era had immense power. So, Manu and Shatarupa reported back to Brahma. At the prayers of Brahma and the gods, Lord Vishnu took the form of a boar (Varaha), fought and killed Hiranyaksha, brought the Earth back from the netherworld, and established it in its orbit. This is known as the Varaha Kalpa. After that, Manu and Shatarupa came to Earth, and the creation of humans began. So, Manu and Shatarupa were in the heavenly realm (Brahmalok) while the demons were in the netherworld (Patal Lok). Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L56 - राजस्थान जैसा रेगिस्तान अंचल में होने वाले परिवर्तन पर भविष्यवाणी | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Does this mean that the demons were not created by Lord Brahma and that they already existed?
Answer: The father of the demons is not Lord Brahma. No. They had already come into existence. Sage Kashyap had two wives, Diti and Aditi. From Diti's womb came the demons (asuras), and from Aditi's womb came the gods (devas) and sages. Manu was created by Lord Brahma. The demons, born of Diti, were living in the netherworld. Manu and Shatarupa, created by Brahma, were in Brahmalok. When they saw the flooded Earth, they informed Brahma, who then prayed to Lord Vishnu. In his Varaha incarnation, the Lord saved the Earth by defeating the demons. Just as Brahma and Mahadev are the first gods, Hiranyaksha and Hiranyakashipu were the first demons. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: At a time like this, what should we do? What actions will lead to the salvation of human society? How will human society be protected and find security from disease and illness?
Answer: No one can protect human society simply by giving shelter or blessings. For example, if you stop cooking in your own house, you might be able to order from outside for a day, but if that's not an option, you'll have to cook or you'll have to fast. Similarly, at a time like this, the most important thing for us is to change our actions (karma). We must return to the Vedic path. Those who come to the Vedic path will become truthful. The cold weather we are experiencing now will become much colder. Everything will intensify, like an electric current increasing from 440 to 840 volts. The amount of rain during the rainy season will be 50 times more than usual, leading to floods. There will be more snowfall and more earthquakes. No one will be able to protect anyone else; we will only find protection through our own karma. The Malika is the only scripture that can grant protection to human civilization. It will make you truthful, divine, and like gods, but it is essential for you to follow its path. We are in a time of great destruction. People might say this is always said, but when sin increases, destruction is inevitable. It is our duty to warn people about sin so they can reduce it. If sin decreases on Earth, the destruction will also be averted. But if sin keeps increasing, if people don't listen and don't follow the Vedic path, and act on their whims, then there is a God in this world who does His work to protect the Earth, human society, and all living beings. If all of humanity turns towards dharma, then the calamities and diseases that trouble people today will cease. However, people are caught up in their daily routines of earning a living and eating, and they are not ready to learn or listen. They only seek medical help when they get sick. This cycle continues. But by adhering to dharma, we will get protection. The mantras are not of the Kali Yuga (the age of darkness); in this era, only those who possess the pure Vedic path and the practice of mantras will remain the most protected.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: I have read the Bhagavata Mahapurana many times before, but this time, when I completed the seventh canto (Saptam Skand), a small strand of hair came out from within the book. What does this mean?

Those who change beforehand will be fine, but we cannot say what will happen to those who change at the very end. By reading the Bhagavata, God has given you this proof, showing you your suffering through that strand of hair. Nothing bad will happen.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: There is a person who has good values and culture, but she does not remember the Lord's name. So, is what she is doing considered dharma or not? Please explain.
Answer: Look, a true human who is a pure soul on the path of dharma is a very good thing. But in the age we are heading into, it's like if someone wants to go to America, they have to fly. Similarly, it is necessary to chant the name of Truth. If someone is a good person, a saint, a sage, doing good deeds, that is rare and valuable for the world. However, the Lord's name is the path to salvation. If they chant the name along with their good deeds, it will be very beneficial for them. It is necessary. If they have faith in God, what is the problem with chanting His name? Truthfulness is created by God, and God Himself comes to establish dharma. This is the time for Lord Kalki's establishment of dharma; He is coming Himself. At such a time, worshipping Him, praying to Him, and chanting His name is the rarest fortune for us. It is a matter of destiny. Whatever is happening is good, but adding this practice will make it even better.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: I am Darshan from Surat. When I perform Trisandhya with deep concentration, I used to feel vibrations originating from my stomach area. Now, it feels like they are coming from my chest, and I feel more vibrations in my face area. My body becomes cold, and the vibrations are more prominent in the upper regions, as if they start from there. I don't fully understand this. I've read a little that it might mean my energy is rising, but I lack complete knowledge. Could you please provide some guidance?
Answer: Creation happens, and your energy was created at the navel. It will rise up to your Trikuti (the point between the eyebrows). When it reaches there, you will completely surrender to the Lord. This is happening because energy is created at the navel and its journey culminates here (at the Trikuti). This is a very good sign. Continue on your path, and it will get even better.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: I had a dream about a cow, and milk was flowing from its udder. What is the meaning of this dream?
Answer: Milk is the stream of nectar; it sustains the human life system. After the mother who gives birth, the one who nurtures humans from the heart is Mother Cow. The milk flowing from her udder is a stream of nectar. This is the stream of the Vedas, the pure stream of dharma. This dream gives you a sense of that purity. It is a very good dream, mother. It is especially good for people who are performing righteous deeds. Stay in God's refuge, perform Trisandhya, and you will see more such good dreams. This is a sign of the coming of dharma. Okay?

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: My question is, when the great deluge (pralaya) comes, you said in the satsang that the Lord will move the devotees to a safe place. At that time, we won't have access to satsang or scriptures like the Bhagavata Purana, so how will we manage?
Answer: Look, son. For the protection of the devotees who practice satsang, Lord Kalki will form 16 Mandals (divine circles or groups). You all will become members of these 16 Mandals. Through these Mandals, the light of divine power will be present. Whatever the devotees in the Mandals need—how they will be protected, what actions to take—will be communicated to you as per the Lord's instructions. So, do not worry about that. For now, join the satsang. The formation of the 16 Mandals is underway and will be completed in the coming time. The devotees will stay within these Mandals and remain safe under the Lord's grace. With His blessings, the devotees of the 16 Mandals will bring dharma to the entire world.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: Can we perform the Gayatri Sandhya (chant the Gayatri mantra)?
Answer: In previous ages, everyone chanted the Gayatri mantra, but in the Kali Yuga, there are some specific provisions. Chanting the Gayatri mantra purifies the Earth and makes it heavenly. The sound that emanates from it spreads throughout the world, bringing great joy to the Earth and peace to the deities. Just as a filter purifies air and water, the five elements are purified by the effect of this mantra. You should definitely chant the Gayatri mantra; there is no problem. If you are Brahmins, it is necessary to do so. However, the path of Trisandhya that I speak of is what the Malika itself instructs to follow. I am telling you this as per God's will. This practice will protect you from all calamities related to the five elements, from the earth to the sky. Eventually, everyone will join this path, but not everyone will receive protection, because the bodies of those who have been on this path from the beginning will be more pure. What will happen to those who join later is up to God's discretion, not mine. But the great sage Achyuta has written that by following this in time, humanity and the world will be blessed.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: What will be the system of governance or the national flag in the coming Satya Yuga?
Answer: Yes, this is also written in the Malika. When the Kali Yuga ends, the Sudharma Sabha (Assembly of True Dharma) will be established, and a new constitution will be made for the world. The flag will not be red or yellow; a five-colored flag has been destined.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: Where are you speaking from?
Answer: Look, son, our work is to propagate the Malika. The Malika, which was originally written in the Odia language, has been translated by the grace of the Lord, and we are spreading its message for your benefit. Through your own devotion and experience, you will gain much more information about this. You will find many truths by reading the books. At a time like this, if you stay on the path, you will find the answers to your questions yourself. This is not an ordinary matter. The feats that even great saints and sages will perform, the ordinary people following our path will also be able to perform. The path must be correct. There should be no deviation in the path or in your faith. Then, you will come to know everything. Because beyond external knowledge from books, it is the inner knowledge—the knowledge from experience—that will teach you a great deal. The path I am showing you is for your good. Join the satsang. If you wish to know more, discussions are held in the satsang. You can contact the provided number to join.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: There is a lot of talk about the scarcity of food and other essential items in the future, and the devaluation of wealth. What are your comments on this?
Answer: This is a very good and interesting question for everyone, and it is necessary to have information about it. Look, the financial condition of 2023 will change. Its degradation will begin in 2026. The worldly wealth we possess today, like metals and other assets—it is all written in the Malika that a time will come when they will be of no use. But that time is not here yet; there is still some time. Worldly assets, wealth, and gems will all gradually lose their value over time until they are worthless. But do not take any action based on this right now. After 2025, I will speak on this again, and you will see it happening. A time will come when people won't even bother to pick up gold lying on the road. Of what use will it be? People will beg for food but won't get any. For every hundred people, only one might survive. How will humanity survive? However, for those on the path of dharma, God will arrange everything, including food. This is our firm belief, and it is written in the Malika that the Lord will protect His devotees in some way—those who stay on the path and believe in it. The end of Kali Yuga will be near when people start considering land, gold, and women as the greatest wealth, above all else. We already see land prices soaring. We see families breaking apart over relationships, as people prioritize these worldly things. This is a sign of the times.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: What does the Malika say about the devotees in Tripura and their future gathering?
Answer: The gathering of the devotees (referred to as 'Baos') will happen through the Malika. The more the Malika is propagated, the more devotees from all four yugas will gather. The gathering of devotees is already in progress. The devotees in Tripura will also gather; they will be part of the 'Kalika Mandal'. A Kalika Mandal will be formed, which will include devotees from Assam, Kolkata, Tripura, Nagaland, Mizoram, and several adjoining states. So, you should stay connected with our satsang, follow the Malika, and perform the Sandhya. It is good for you. The very fact that you are coming into contact with the Malika means you have some 'sanskar' (past spiritual merits). This sanskar is what is enabling you to speak with us in the satsang today. It is time to change oneself and, with time, change the world.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: You mentioned something about Bihar. Could you please elaborate?
Answer: Look, regarding Bihar... in the land of Bihar, Lord Hanuman is engaged in penance in many places. Some say he was born there, but he is still present there in penance, a fact not known to everyone. Lord Hanuman will emerge. That is why there are many Hanuman devotees in Bihar. The region will be greatly affected by earthquakes, and there will be much damage. The effects of the five elements and diseases will also be prevalent. This will not happen immediately but will unfold gradually. People will change slowly. On one side, dharma will be established, and on the other, these signs will manifest. By following the Malika and staying on the path, you must strengthen yourselves and begin the work of becoming truthful. A time will come when everyone will turn to the Malika and take refuge in the Lord, because when God Himself is incarnating to establish dharma, no one else will be greater than Him. The signs are already here. People may not believe it now, but in the future, they will admit with their own mouths that what was foretold has come to pass. But what is the use of believing then? Believing now can help people change. Now is the time. Later, during the time of struggle, there will be little time for transformation. At this time, no one is greater than Lord Kalki. All other deities have left their celestial abodes and have taken birth in human bodies, preparing for the establishment of dharma. You too will gain experience and knowledge about this through the Malika.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: What does the Malika say about children who perform Sandhya only once a day but also read the Bhagavata?
Answer: Look, the scriptures tell us the story of Dhruva. At a very young age, he went to the forest alone to perform penance. It is the duty of us as parents to guide our children. They go to school and study. If they get time in the morning, they should do it. If they are at school during the day, they can take just five minutes during a recess to do it. It is important to instill these values in them. These children will grow up to teach the world the principles of Sanatana culture.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: Could you please advise on a personal problem? (The question is unclear but seems to be about finding relief from suffering).
Answer: They will have to believe in and understand the path. Then everything will be alright for them. The message is being propagated. Those who remain in the stream of chanting the name 'Madhav' will receive the greatest relief. And God Himself will provide proof of this.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: What is your perspective on the current state of society and its laws, especially when they seem to contradict the principles of dharma?
Answer: Look, son, this is a republic. I am working as a propagator of dharma. The world will not change based on my personal beliefs, because we are living under the constitution and laws of the Kali Yuga. Many things will happen in the world that are not sanctioned by the Vedas or scriptures. But what can we do? This is the final phase of the Kali Yuga. Time will reveal everything, as we cannot act before or after the designated time. But I will say this much: a very good time is coming for the devotees. We must wait for that time and take refuge in Lord Kalki.

Video Title: L58 - जलवायु परिवर्तन का संकेत कलियुग की समाप्ति का प्रमाण।
Question: What is the future of Yogi Adityanath and what role will he play?
Answer: If Yogi ji does good work for the world—and a lot of good work is indeed happening, and he will do even better in the future—he will be rewarded. Good people must get good results. But where God will ultimately place someone is decided by the Lord, not by me. We cannot make that judgment. The arrival of the Satya Yuga is beginning. For this new beginning, the Lord is bringing good people to the earth and giving them the responsibility of governance. It is a pattern that before a major transformation, good people come to power and become rulers. You can experience for yourself the atmosphere changing ahead of the Satya Yuga. The Satya Yuga is coming very soon, and before it, we are seeing a shift in the flow of righteousness and changes in governance. This is auspicious for India and for the world.

Video Title: L59.2 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: A person from Haridwar, Uttarakhand, asks: Meat is consumed in her house, but she herself does not eat it. Can she join the satsang (spiritual gathering)?
Answer: This is a very good question. Sanatana Dharma will be illuminated throughout the entire world, and people of all religions will join Sanatana Dharma. Not just in India, but in all countries of the world outside of India, Sanatana Dharma will be established. There will be only one religion, and this will not happen by force. People will be compelled to come to Sanatana Dharma because of its propagation and its principles. Spiritual culture and the Bhagavatam will be read, and Lord Kalki will rule the entire world. So, people of all religions are permitted to come, but it is necessary for them to come into the 'dhara' (the prescribed path). They should adopt the Trisandhya dhara and come to the refuge of the Lord. When the time comes, everyone will come. We don't even have to tell them. If that woman wants to come, there are no restrictions or obstacles.

Video Title: L59.2 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Can we send her the materials that we read?
Answer: Yes, you can. You all can send it. She should do it. That's very good. This is how the Malika will be propagated. Its propagation is happening for this very reason, so that people of all religions and faiths will gradually join and together, a global Sanatana Dharma will be formed. Okay.

Video Title: L59.2 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I am Sandeep from Gurgaon. In the Dvapara Yuga, when God descended, even great sages, saints, and yogis who were prophets could not recognize Him; they considered Him an ordinary human. Even Arjuna himself considered him a friend, not God, until God showed him his cosmic form. Only then did he understand that Shri Krishna is the lord of the entire universe. So, we are beings of Kali Yuga with such fickle minds; how will people like us be able to recognize God? How will we come to believe?
Answer: In this Kali Yuga, humans do not possess that much capacity. People are limited to eating and drinking. They have some knowledge and a little bit of technical knowledge. That is why God himself composed the Bhavishya Malika Purana to guide people. In the Malika, God told Sudama, 'Look, this Malika that you are writing, when the Kali Yuga ends, it will be propagated. My devotees will listen to this Malika, understand it, and by following the Malika, they will come to my refuge.' This is because the Malika details the gathering of devotees, the place of God's incarnation, where and when Lord Kalki will incarnate, how devotees and God will meet, which devotees will form organizations, what the situation will be in between, by what name the devotees will be saved, and by which path the truth will be revealed. So, you should take refuge in the Malika, and through the Malika, you will also be connected with Lord Kalki. Those who listen to and watch the Bhavishya Malika, God will reveal many truths to them through dreams, and their own minds and bodies will align with God. Because this scripture was written by the Lord's will, it is being propagated by His will, and by listening to it and following it, you will also meet Lord Kalki. As this age ends, a new age will also begin. There is very little time. Join the satsang, follow the path, and follow the Sandhya. You will tell me about your experiences; you will also see what is going to happen.

Video Title: L59.2 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Guruji, I have been connected for many days through your YouTube and have received the first part of your Bhavishya Malika Purana. My question is, while reading it, you have mentioned the incarnations of the 'Pancha Sakha' (five companions) in both Satya Yuga and Kali Yuga, and Hanuman ji's name is included. But Hanuman ji is 'Chiranjeevi' (immortal) in all forms, isn't he?
Answer: In the Treta Yuga, Hanuman ji was with Lord Shri Ram as the 11th Rudra avatar of Lord Shiva. Lord Hanuman worked with Lord Ram in the establishment of dharma. The Pancha Sakha are the five main individuals, the five core elements of the Lord, who participated in establishing dharma, and Hanuman ji's name is included among them. This does not mean... Hanuman ji is a Rudra avatar, he is Lord Shiva himself who came to Earth. And in the Kali Yuga, at that time, Hanuman ji will come again to the Lord. By the Lord's will, he will oversee the work of establishing dharma across the world. He will save the devotees and destroy the sinners. Foreigners will also be destroyed. Vibhishana will come, Hanuman ji will come. In this sense, he is considered an incarnation. Lord Kalki's body will be like that of Lord Ram.

Video Title: L59.2 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Maharaj ji, one more small question. You mentioned on YouTube that Pakistan, along with 13 or 57 Islamic countries and China, will attack India, as written in the Bhavishya Malika. Is the name 'Pakistan' specifically mentioned, because Pakistan was formed only in 1947?
Answer: It is written. And Turkey and Iran... just the day before yesterday, Iran skipped a meeting in India. And regarding Turkey, I had spoken about it in 2020. I had said that a devastating earthquake will occur in Turkey, and I also explained the consequences. You can see that episode from 2020. I was specifically talking about Turkey. This means that Turkey will not help us in the future. It never will. The Lord's devotees are also present all over the world. To save all the devotees, the establishment of dharma is necessary.

Video Title: L59.2 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Could you please explain the 'Trisandhya dhara' (path of three daily prayers) that you mentioned?
Answer: Yes, that's a very good point. Our people conduct satsang and are connected to the path of the Malika. We also connect devotees from all over the world; the description and number are given below. The balance of the earth and the universe, the worship of deities, and the protection of the earth and cosmos are part of this God-given, Veda-based path. The first sandhya (prayer time) is from 3:30/3:45 AM to 6:30 AM. The second sandhya is from 11:30 AM to 12:30 PM. The third sandhya is at sunset. During these three sandhya times, one should chant the 16 names, recite God's Dashavatara stotram (hymn of 10 avatars), read from the Shrimad Bhagavatam during one of the sandhyas, recite the Durga Madhav Stuti, and chant the name of Lord Madhav 108 times. By following this path, even if some negative effects of the times befall us, the Lord will protect you. Because the Lord will see, 'Look, these people are performing Trisandhya, they are heading towards Satya Yuga, they have given up meat and fish and are moving towards dharma, so my blessings must be upon them.' To receive the grace of God, the grace of Lord Kalki, this path is essential for you all. You can contact the number in the description to get the full detailed procedure.

Video Title: L59.2 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: If someone is working, has a job, or is otherwise busy, what is the way to perform Sandhya at the specified times, like in the afternoon or evening?
Answer: Look, if you are at work or traveling, you might not be able to read the Bhagavatam at that time. In that case, you can read it at home when you return at night. Or, before sleeping, you can take it with you, wash your feet, remember the Lord and Mother Ganga, and then read the Bhagavatam for 5-10 minutes. As for the other sandhyas, if you don't have time to read the stotram, it is necessary to set aside two or three minutes. In this time, chanting the 16 names will take about 30 seconds, and the Dashavatara hymn... even chanting Madhav's name 11 times will suffice.

Video Title: L59.2 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, could you please tell us the 16 names?
Answer: You can record this, or you will find it in this YouTube video. Vishnu... Bhojan... Narayan... [transcript is incomplete]. That is why I say, if you don't have time, you can chant even 11 times and read the Bhagavatam at night. You will feel joy and peace, and the grace of the Lord will remain with you. Lord Kalki sees everything in the world, he sees which of his devotees are following his path. That is why the Malika was written. This is the path given by Lord Kalki. This is the path given by Lord Kalki, which was established 600 years ago, and I am just propagating it so that it reaches you.

Video Title: L59.2 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: It takes about half an hour to 45 minutes to complete the practice. Is there any problem with that?
Answer: Look, chanting the name... I say 108 times, but you can do it 1008 or 2008 times. The more you achieve 'mantra siddhi' (mastery of the mantra), the more experiences you will have. And I especially want to tell all the devotees who have come to Trisandhya, who will come, and who are following or will follow the path of the Malika, that the Lord will tell them everything in their dreams—what is going to happen and what is not. Their wishes will be fulfilled through this medium because this is the Lord's own path. We are just propagating it.

Video Title: L59.2 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, one more question. When we are at home, we perform the prayers. But afterwards, when we go to the market or leave the house, we keep remembering the Lord and chanting His name, for example, while driving a car, riding a motorbike, or sitting somewhere. But there is a slight doubt, as we are wearing shoes, and while wearing shoes we are driving and also chanting the Lord's name. Is this acceptable?
Answer: You can chant the name even while wearing shoes at your workplace. Look, these are external, physical things. There is no restriction for the mind to be in contact with God. The mind is a part of God, and the more we awaken it, the more we will receive God's blessings. So, at your workplace, whether you are wearing shoes, a certain dress, or driving a car, you can take 3-5 minutes in the market to do it. Or while driving, you can chant His name. However, when driving, I would advise against doing this in an isolated place where there is no one around, because as it is written in the Malika, the number of miscreants has increased. People will commit theft and robbery. So, keeping your own safety in mind, it is better to do these things in a safe place. However, if the Lord's grace is upon you, these things will not happen. But that doesn't mean we should perform these activities in an area influenced by demonic forces.

Video Title: L59.2 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, my question is that I have been following the path of Trisandhya for three or four days, and a strong desire arises in my heart to have a vision (darshan) of Lord Kalki. I can't bear it, tears come to my eyes, I feel so much eagerness.
Answer: A vision of the Lord can be had through his physical form, both with attributes (saguna) and without attributes (nirguna). A vision of the Lord can also be had by meditating on his form. So, wait for the time. It will happen when the time is right.

Video Title: L59.2 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Is it appropriate to handle worldly duties, like phone calls, during spiritual practice or satsang?
Answer: For the practice, it is necessary to set aside 10-15 minutes. During that time, you should at least do it with your phone switched off. After the practice is over, there is no issue with talking to your family for as long as you can. But it is not appropriate to do this in the middle of a satsang. If it becomes necessary for you to do so, then you should leave the ideology of satsang and Trisandhya. You should leave the path of the Malika; that would be better for you.

Video Title: L59.2 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: How much education is needed? I am not very educated and sometimes I can't even understand simple things.
Answer: If one person reads, another will understand. It's good, so read it. It's very good. We don't know what will happen in our country and the world, or when. As I said, in such times, those who follow the Trisandhya path will reach the Satya Yuga. And time will tell; there isn't much time, not more than 7 years. In such a time, we have no power other than dharma (righteousness). No wealth, no knowledge, no connections, no honor, no glory, no element, no power, no system will work. Only the 'dhara' (the prescribed path) will work. By following that path... [the time is up].

Video Title: L59.1 - श्रीमद् भागवत में कलियुग - अंत का प्रमाण | पं. श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Today, people have a question: Has the Kali Yuga truly ended? If it has ended, what is the proof? On what basis will people believe it? And how will Sanatana Dharma survive?
Answer: The answer and proof are found in the Shrimad Bhagavatam, which is described as the great scripture (Mahapurana) of Sanatana Dharma, a symbol of God himself, and the basis for faith and devotion. The speaker explains that the truly intense phase of Kali Yuga (Ghor Kali) began with the departure of Lord Shri Krishna to his divine abode. During that period, there was no light of Dharma, all Hindu pilgrimage sites were under the control of non-believers, people became anti-religion, and their sole focus was on their own sustenance, having abandoned the path of Dharma. The speaker implies that this intense phase is over, which serves as the proof, and that the survival of Sanatana Dharma is linked to understanding and believing in these scriptures.

Video Title: L60 - विश्व के किन देशों में खाद्य का अभाव होगा | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र के संग
Question: So how will the devotees be saved? How will they be delivered?
Answer: It is written in the scriptures that there are many such trees in our country and also abroad, by eating the leaves of which one will not feel hunger or thirst. But this is under God's control. Lord Kalki will reveal their identity to the devotees, and the devotees will find their location. It will not be available to everyone. When the world struggles with starvation, when there is no food and people resort to cannibalism—which is already happening in some countries—how will our devotees survive? The way for the devotees to survive is this: there are many such trees and plants whose leaves, when eaten, will prevent the devotees from feeling hunger and thirst. Video Title: L61 - 16 मण्डल गठन एवं भक्तों का उद्धार कैसे होगा? | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Lord Narasimha became so enraged that he set out to destroy the world. At that time, many devotees praised him and tried to appease him, but the Lord was not pacified. Why was this so? The Lord is known as 'Bhakta Vatsala' (one who loves his devotees) and is said to calm his anger upon hearing their prayers. So why wasn't he pacified after hearing their praises, and why was the Sharabha avatar ultimately necessary? That's the first question. The second question is: it is written in the Malika that some things are extremely secret, yet it is necessary for devotees to know them. In that case, all the devotees here should know these top-secret things, but why is it that we still don't know everything?
Answer: A very good question. Lord Narasimha's incarnation was a unique one. The Lord was very angry and had to incarnate at that time because of the torment of his devotee, Prahlada. He was in a state of extreme rage. At that time, Prahlada praised the Lord. All the deities asked Prahlada to pacify him, and upon hearing Prahlada's prayer, the Lord became calm. The proof of this is that the devotee is the greatest, most eternal, and truest to God. God incarnates for the sake of his devotees. If we become such devotees, the Lord can come for us in the same way.  Regarding your second question, the words of the Malika are secret. What is secret about them? Mahapurush Achyutananda, who was created from the body of the Lord, had said that the time had not yet come, and until this time, the Malika would remain secret. Now, that time has come. The five-faced Lord Kalki will come in various forms—earthquakes, floods, cyclones, solar flares, and diseases. You might say human civilization is being destroyed, but this is what our scriptures and Puranas have written. The Lord incarnates when sin increases. The most important dharma of Kali Yuga is compassion for all beings and chanting the Lord's name. These prophecies were secret then, but they are being revealed now. One more thing, Mahapurush Achyutananda wrote that details about Lord Kalki—his birthplace, his identity, how he will meet devotees, his address—all this is extremely secret, even from great sages. He wrote that the Malika will be propagated to the devotees, and those who listen with a simple heart will take refuge and move forward. So, the secrets of the Malika are now being revealed to you. The next 7 years are very crucial. Come into the stream of dharma. There are no group traditions. Just stay away from killing living beings, feticide, cheating, and troubling others. Until this change happens, destruction will continue. What we predicted from 2014 onwards, you are seeing it happen one by one. By following the Malika, all devotees of God in India and the world will find it easy to accept the Lord's path. Sanatana Dharma will advance.

Video Title: L61 - 16 मण्डल गठन एवं भक्तों का उद्धार कैसे होगा? | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

He will not be involved in worldly and social activities; he will be above them. His work is to weigh dharma and adharma, lifting up dharma and suppressing adharma. Video Title: L61 - 16 मण्डल गठन एवं भक्तों का उद्धार कैसे होगा? | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, how is he (Lord Kalki) different from them (other public figures)? And my second question is, as you just mentioned, if humans stop sinning, then the establishment of dharma will not happen and destruction will not come. So, was the Bhavishya Malika written for the very reason that dharma will be established and the Lord will incarnate?
Answer: A very good question. It has been written in the scriptures beforehand that Lord Kalki will come in a human body. He will appear like an ordinary human but will possess all 64 divine arts (kalas). He can do anything by his will. Mahapurush Achyuta has described his powers in detail. Lord Kalki will come in a human body, look like an ordinary human, and perform human actions. There will be divine plays (leelas) like in Vrindavan, with relationships of brotherhood and friendship, not guru-disciple. By his will, he can move the entire universe. With a single breath, he can move great mountains like the Himalayas. The light of millions of suns can emanate from his eyes. He can control any weapon with his mind; for instance, if a country launches a nuclear bomb, he can redirect it to destroy that same country. No one will be able to stand before his power. Lord Shri Ram came with 12 kalas and Lord Shri Krishna with 16, but Lord Kalki will be the complete incarnation with 64 kalas. His body will be a combination of Mother Yogamaya, Lord Balaram, and the Lord himself. The establishment of dharma by Lord Kalki is going to happen. You should all come into the stream of the Malika; there is very little time. If it is in your destiny to meet the Lord, you will follow the Malika. My belief is that only a true devotee, whose relationship with the Lord has existed for many ages, will read the Malika.

Video Title: L61 - 16 मण्डल गठन एवं भक्तों का उद्धार कैसे होगा? | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L61 - 16 मण्डल गठन एवं भक्तों का उद्धार कैसे होगा? | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Please tell us about the 'Tri-sandhya' practice.
Answer: I will tell you about the practice of Tri-sandhya (three twilights). It is for the three junctions of day and night. The first is Brahma Muhurta, around 3:00-3:30 AM, when morning comes and night departs. At this time, one should chant the Krishna mantra, including the 16 names, the 10 avatars, the name Madhava 108 times, and the Durga Madhava stuti. The second Sandhya is at midday, between 11:30 AM and 12:30 PM, when morning passes and noon arrives. The same mantras should be chanted. The third is at dusk, the 'Godhuli' time, when the sun sets and night begins. At this time, you must chant the mantras I mentioned. Those with less time can chant just the 16 names and the names of the 10 avatars. Through this practice, Narada Mahamuni became like a god. This practice of Tri-sandhya will be propagated again in India. By following this path, you will gain your own power to overcome all future problems, from diseases onwards.

Video Title: L61 - 16 मण्डल गठन एवं भक्तों का उद्धार कैसे होगा? | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Question: Why the name of Lord Madhav at this time?
Answer: According to the era (yuga) and the incarnation (avatar), people on Earth meditate on the many infinite forms of God. In this era, which we call the Sangam or Adhya Shakti Yug, the name Madhav is the greatest, most sacred, and redeeming stream for us. According to the scriptures, before the Lord's birth, Mother Bhagwati had named Lord Shri Krishna as Madhav. However, according to the circumstances of the time, on the instructions of Vasudev Baba, she went to Nandgaon and had Lord Shri Krishna's name changed from Madhav to Shri Krishna. This saddened Mother Bhagwati a little. The name is the greatest tradition. When she had kept the name, the Lord explained, 'Look, Mother, this name Madhav has been specially reserved for the Kali Yuga.' It is also called a tradition, and Lord Jagannath is also worshipped with the Madhav mantra. So the Lord told Mother Bhagwati that in the end, devotees will be redeemed by the name Madhav. The Malika scripture repeatedly describes this. The era is according to the name, the incarnation is according to the era, and by chanting the name according to the incarnation, devotees attain liberation. That is, they find a path to go from one existence to another, and some also attain liberation, Vaikuntha (the celestial abode), or heaven. So at such a time, this name Madhav is by Lord Shri Krishna's own will, and it is being propagated at the end of Kali Yuga. Therefore, in this era, we should chant the name Madhav.

The four castes—Brahmin, Kshatriya, Vaishya, and Shudra—will exist according to Sanatana Dharma and will run the world. There will be love and affection among all of them. In the current age, thousands of castes have been created, but in that coming age, only the four castes will remain, and there will be love, contact, purity, interaction, and mingling among them. Video Title: L66 - 'माधव' नाम कैसे पापों से रक्षा करता है? | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L66 - 'माधव' नाम कैसे पापों से रक्षा करता है? | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: How can we identify a true devotee who is destined for salvation in this era?
Answer: Suppose you tell someone, 'Look, according to the Bhavishya Purana, the Kali Yuga has ended. Now is the time for the establishment of dharma and the union of devotees with God.' If that person says, 'That's absolutely right, I've been dreaming about this, I get feelings about this again and again,' and tears come to their eyes, devotion arises, and they start following you, then you will know that this is a true devotee of the coming age who is to be saved. Another characteristic of a devotee, according to the scriptures, is that devotees are always silent and calm. They don't talk much and are also melancholic. They are constantly in contact with God in their minds. They perform external actions but forget the actions. They show no attachment to any object, whether social or material. They always chant the name and sing praises internally, without any show-off. They don't argue with anyone. They eat little and sleep little. The signs of a devotee are eating less, sleeping less, and remaining deeply immersed in devotion and love for God in their mind. It's not that someone becomes a devotee by sitting in a temple or a prayer room for 10 hours. They don't criticize anyone. A devotee's simplicity is their greatest strength, along with a sense of detachment. And most importantly, if there is a Bhagwat Katha, spiritual contemplation, or satsang happening somewhere, you will see them there first. This shows they have devotion and the characteristics of a devotee.

Video Title: L67 - कलियुग अंत एवं सत्ययुग आगमन पर विचार | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Since we are working 24 hours a day, how can we enjoy divine devotion and feel God's presence 24/7?
Answer: Everyone is busy with work, and attaining the Lord while working is the greatest goal. Do one thing: perform all your duties from morning till night, but forget about the results. Keep your intellect engaged in your work, but attach your mind and intellect to Lord Krishna. Through this, you will experience His presence. By performing 'Trisandhya' (prayers at three junctures of the day) and reading the Bhagavata, you will become a selfless devotee (nishkam bhakta), performing all actions without attachment. You will attain the Lord and His devotion. Sometimes, God may even give you a vision. So, do all your work, but keep your focus on Lord Krishna. You will also find success in all your endeavors.

Video Title: L67 - कलियुग अंत एवं सत्ययुग आगमन पर विचार | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: A little girl called me and asked, 'How can I attain liberation?'
Answer: By reading and listening to the Bhagavata, even if children are 10, 5, or 4 years old, they can become wiser than 50-year-olds. Their knowledge and memory power will increase, they will study well, and they will be good to their parents. If you want a child to be successful, bring them to the path of the Bhagavata. In this lies the greatest security and development for your family and children. All your child's negative attachments will be severed, and they will be protected from accidents and untimely death.

Video Title: L67 - कलियुग अंत एवं सत्ययुग आगमन पर विचार | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: You spoke of worldly life and spiritual life. My problem is that when I focus on worldly matters, the web of Maya (illusion) affects me. When I focus on the spiritual path, that aspect becomes very strong. But managing both together is very difficult, and I've felt stuck for years, even though I feel I can reach a high spiritual level. Please guide me.
Answer: Look, all the great sages in India, like Durvasa, Vashishta, and King Janaka, had worldly lives. This is called 'Grihastha Sannyas' (renunciation as a householder). The Lord says that if someone performs all their worldly duties but keeps their mind on Him and takes refuge in Him, He brings them to Himself very quickly. So, do your household chores joyfully and look after your family. You will feel Lord Krishna with you at all times, and your family problems will resolve on their own. Your spiritual development will happen alongside your family's development. God created humans to live in the world. Constantly chant the Lord's name from your heart while doing all your work. In this way, you can attain Lord Krishna in a very short time and you will get everything.

Answer: It's a very good question. Change... and those who change out of fear are the best. So, you should do one thing: have them talk to me sometime. It's not necessary, but talking to a pure soul, a pure person, becomes a form of satsang (spiritual discourse). If not that, then tell them to listen to my videos on the Kalki Avatar channel. It's not necessary for them to join the 'Dhara' (stream), they just need to listen. They should listen to the videos I have released, nothing else is necessary. No, our family is ours. Everyone works together for the family, you also work. Do as your family says, and follow the path with a human and devotional heart. Video Title: L71 - प्रेम - मंदिर में आग लगना एवं द्वारकाधीश मंदिर का ध्वज फटना | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: The path given by Lord Chaitanya Mahaprabhu is a very sacred one, which he established to save humanity at a time when sin was rampant. However, that was a different time. Now, Kali Yuga has ended, and it is necessary to follow the path of Lord Kalki, which is the Trisandhya stream. Lord Chaitanya did not preach the Trisandhya because it was not needed then. But now, to enter Satya Yuga, one must adopt the practices meant for the humans of Satya Yuga. You should continue your Vaishnava practices with devotion, but you must also adopt the Trisandhya stream, read the Shrimad Bhagavatam, and chant the name 'Madhav,' because Lord Kalki's name will be Madhav. Those who only follow the previous path may still be saved, but they will not get the direct association of Lord Kalki. To become a devotee of Lord Kalki and participate in his mission of establishing dharma, following his prescribed path is necessary.

Video Title: L71 - प्रेम - मंदिर में आग लगना एवं द्वारकाधीश मंदिर का ध्वज फटना | पं. काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Those who perform Trisandhya and read the Bhagavatam will become divine beings, the humans of Satya Yuga, and will be saved from the calamities and problems of this age. No matter what happens, the devotees will be saved.

Answer: The Bhavishya Malika is a collection of one hundred future-predicting texts. It is a vast body of work, and each of the hundred texts contains prophecies. These were written by the 'Pancha Sakha' (five friends of God) in the Odia language, but in such a coded way that even Odia speakers cannot easily understand them without divine grace. Besides the Pancha Sakha, other great saints in Odisha have also written future-telling Puranas. The main purpose of these prophecies is to prepare the devotees for the times to come. When the world is engrossed in materialism, wealth, and illusion, even great devotees and saints might get trapped in traditions. At such a time, God's incarnation will occur. The propagation of Bhavishya Malika will help devotees realize that the time of God's arrival is near, creating a spiritual atmosphere across India. It will provide information about devotion, God, and the world, and seeing the prophecies come true will strengthen their faith. The Malika is meant to unite devotees and provide a message for those who wish to improve themselves. It also describes the great destruction that will befall the earth, after which a new human civilization will begin. A 'Sudharma Sabha' (divine assembly) will be established on earth, where Lord Kalki, along with 33 crore deities, Brahma, and Shankar, will preside. Devotees will be able to see them directly. A new constitution will be created for the entire world, not just India. The world will become 'Vishwa ki Bharat' (The World's India), with India as the main country and others like America, England, and Japan as states. The center of governance will be in Jajpur, Odisha. The Lord's devotees will rule every country. The world will have one flag, the 'Panchrangi' (five-colored) flag of Sanatana Dharma. The new era will be based on five principles: Satya (Truth), Shanti (Peace), Daya (Compassion), Kshama (Forgiveness), and Maitri (Friendship). There will be no more civil wars or conflicts. Compassion will be paramount; even those who make mistakes unknowingly will be forgiven rather than punished, to allow their conscience to awaken. The world will truly become one family (Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam). Sanatana Dharma will be established not just in India, but across the entire universe by Lord Kalki. The Bhavishya Malika, dictated by the divine, is a more detailed and modified version of the prophecies found in texts like the Kalki Purana, written to be more easily understood by devotees in this age.

The Bhavishya Purana clearly states that not a single person who commits the sin of killing animals or eats non-vegetarian food will be able to transition from Kali Yuga to Satya Yuga. It is written in history that in our country, 600 years before Christ, the Nanda dynasty was ruling. Before that, only Hindus were present in the entire world. And I will shed some light on this. When Yudhishthira became king, he was the king of the seven continents (saptadweep). When Bharata was king, the entire universe was named Bharat after him. Due to the present times, Bharat has become smaller. And it is written in the Bhavishya Purana that Lord Narayana as Kalki will establish Sanatana Dharma across the entire world. And with the merging of all religions, only Sanatana Dharma will remain; no other religion will exist. It is written, and the words of the Malika are the absolute truth (Brahma Tattva), the word of God. There will be no change in it. The entire world will become Sanatana Dharma. Jai Mahakal.

Video Title: L93 - धर्म - संस्थापना के समय में मनुष्य क्यों अनजान है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
