This is because in Treta Yuga, the Ram avatar appeared, and in Dvapara Yuga, the Krishna avatar appeared. Now is the time for the Kalki avatar, and Kalki is Krishna himself. And your family... when you chanted the name of Madhav, the Lord gave you an indication, saying, 'Look, this is what is going to happen, and your entire family will be behind me.' You were a devotee in a previous life, which is why I am giving you this information. Believing this, you should follow this tradition of dharma and purity and work for the Lord's establishment of dharma. This is why he gave you this vision and indication. He doesn't reveal everything, but he indicates. Anyone who worships Krishna gets his vision, feels his fragrance, and receives his essence. The Lord has not left anyone behind. He chooses each devotee one by one and shows them what is necessary to make them realize their past lives. He has shown you as well. You are fortunate. You have come to the Lord's refuge. With the name of Madhav and the Trikal Sandhya (three-times-a-day prayers), remain in the Lord's refuge. The stream of your life was pure, and in this birth, it will become pure again. Video Title: L99 - मालिका पुस्तक के साथ कल्कि अवतार के प्रमाण | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

If people say it will happen at a certain time and it doesn't, it might happen a little later or earlier, because nothing will happen based on human words. It is all under the control of Lord Kalki. Video Title: L99 - मालिका पुस्तक के साथ कल्कि अवतार के प्रमाण | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L99 - मालिका पुस्तक के साथ कल्कि अवतार के प्रमाण | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: The Mlecchas (impure ones) also used to say that if Lord Kalki is God, why doesn't he come before everyone?
Answer: Look, in this Bhavishya Purana, Achyutananda has written that this is a great secret. These heretics say Kalki will come out in the open. Why? Devotees perform penance for millions of births and still cannot get a glimpse of the Lord, and in this age, do you think the Lord will just appear before these heretics, have a conversation with them, and debate them? Achyutananda has refuted this. He said it will be a mystery even to Brahma, Shankar, and the gods. Only the devotees who somehow receive the Bhavishya Malika will meet the Lord. The devotee and the Lord will meet. The Lord will never appear before the demons, sinners, or hypocrites. But the devotees will somehow get to see the Lord. He is not some media personality, political minister, or a big leader who will come and introduce himself and hold a big meeting. He is a sacred element of our Sanatana Dharma, which is beyond description. I don't have the words to describe it. And to think they will see such a great Lord so easily, and that I will reveal him so easily—that is not possible. Yes, you people speculate, I have heard it. That's why I am still giving you a chance: if you want to become good human beings, then have Odia people read what is written in the book, listen, understand, and then debate. If after seeing and knowing this, you still speak against it, then we will know that some anti-dharma conspiracy is at work. The Lord will counter this conspiracy, and dharma will surely move forward because when it is time for dharma to be revealed, no power can stop it. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L99 - मालिका पुस्तक के साथ कल्कि अवतार के प्रमाण | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

This way, the name Madhav comes out of my mouth, and so does the name Radha. So, if by mistake we take the name of Krishna or Ram, will God listen to our prayers?
Answer: Look, son... (recites a Sanskrit shloka)... 'Radha Madhav Ni Jayanti Jamuna Kure Ke'. This means that the first day Mother Radha Rani met Lord Krishna, the day Lord Brahma got Radha Rani married to Lord Krishna, on that very first day, Mother Radha Rani called Lord Krishna by the name 'Madhav'. She never called Krishna 'Krishna'; she always called him 'Madhav'. And the name 'Madhav' was reserved for Mother Radha Rani in the Dvapara Yuga. In this era, Lord Kalki has made the name 'Madhav' free for everyone. You all are fortunate to be chanting the names 'Madhav' and 'Radha'. This is your good fortune. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L102 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: Look, son, in the times to come, a situation will arise where there will be no food, no grain, no clothes, and no cure for diseases. People will think, 'What's the use of surviving?' In such people's bodies, the goddess Jogini will enter, and they will invite their own death. This is written in the Bhavishya Purana. It's a frightening thing, so I don't discuss it much. This will apply to sinful people; for righteous, good people, there will be no such problem. But such a time is coming in the future when people will give up their lives of their own will. And the reason for this will be the influence of the goddess Jogini, due to which people will lose their mental strength and resolve. Their spirit will be broken. When they don't get food and only find sorrow, they will say, 'Why live?' Such a time is coming in the future. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L102 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L102 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L102 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

So, for this complex question, I have no solution. But this much I can say: they should at least chant the name of Madhav. They are protecting our country. Video Title: L102 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

He comes like a human to establish dharma. For example, in the Prahlad avatar, the Lord came directly from Vaikuntha, took the avatar, and then left. Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

This is because those who are against the welfare of the world bring only sorrow. Righteous and holy people should inhabit the world, which is why God establishes dharma. So, pray for the illumination of dharma and the destruction of adharma (unrighteousness). Follow this path and perform the Sandhya prayers, and everything will be fine.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: This world is fundamentally perishable. Jobs, business, and life itself will one day end. Why did the Lord create such a transient world?
Answer: You are knowledgeable to ask such a question. The Lord created this transient world for the judgment of karma for all beings, from gods to humans. If beings had permanence, gods might become arrogant, and humans, without fear of death, might indulge in sin. This transient nature allows for change through karma. The earth is a place where the karma of all souls is judged. A being is born due to its karma, and when that karma is exhausted, it takes another birth. This world was created to uphold the law of karma. Those with a path to liberation are given a human birth. Those who do evil are born as lesser creatures. Without this system, there would be no order. It was necessary for God to create it; it is His will.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: What is Brahman, and how can it be known?
Answer: In the Gita, it was told to Arjuna that Brahman is indestructible; it is the form of light. The life force we see in every particle is a part of Brahman. Brahman is that which has no form and no description; it pervades millions of universes. For devotees, the Lord comes from Brahman in a manifest form (sakar) to give his vision. For sages, the Lord appears as the light of the formless Brahman (nirakar). Brahman is indestructible and unborn. For the needs of humanity, the Lord sometimes takes an incarnation on earth and assumes a manifest, human form. A human lacks the power to fully describe Brahman.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

The law of karma is under God's control. However, understand that at this time, many good and wise souls are being born for the advent of Satya Yuga (the Age of Truth). They will do good work for the new age. But ultimately, what happens to anyone is dependent on their karma, which is in God's hands. People are born into different families and religions, all subject to their karma.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

I have seen instances where devotees make an offering, and the entire plate becomes empty because God has accepted it. As the saying goes, 'The way the Lord manifests depends on one's devotion and love.' If you offer anything with devotion—water, fruit, flowers, or just your devotion—the Lord accepts it. This is why the world functions. The sun, the moon, the rains, the crops—everything flourishes by His grace. If you have true devotion, He will surely accept your offering.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Everything is under God's control, and people will receive fruits according to their karma. Just as gods are being born, so are asuras (demons). God will liberate everyone—the children and the old—but one's karma must be righteous. At this time, many pure souls are being born on earth because the era demands it.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: My sampradaya is the Sanatana sampradaya, the Hindu sampradaya. In the upcoming Satya Yuga, the one sampradaya will be the Madhava Acharya sampradaya. Devotees will follow the principles of Chaitanya Mahaprabhu: chanting the name, purity, devotion, and surrender. While many traditions were formed in Kali Yuga, in Satya Yuga, only the Madhava tradition will remain. The Bhavishya Purana writes about the Madhava Acharya sampradaya, and Lord Kalki's sampradaya will be called Madhava.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: Mother Mahalakshmi, in the form of Mother Vaishno Devi, has received a boon. At this time, she, as Mahalakshmi, will work alongside Lord Kalki in the establishment of dharma. The Bhavishya Purana states that Mother Mahalakshmi will be born in the Shri Jagannath Kshetra of Odisha.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

I have only said that a difficult time is coming, and people will be saved from it. Time is under God's control; when He acts is His will. The process of establishing dharma is ongoing. Devotees will be saved, sinners will be destroyed, and Satya Yuga will be created. Do not follow these dates you see online; they are not written anywhere. People may say these things to increase their likes and shares. Just perform the Tri Sandhya with devotion and remain in the Lord's refuge.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: If a person has done wrong things their entire life but now learns about this path and starts following it properly, even if out of fear, will God save them?
Answer: Look, even a great sinner like Ratnakar the dacoit became the great sage Valmiki because the consequences of past karma can be washed away by dharma (righteous living). If someone has done evil deeds but now wants to become good, there is still time. If they perform Trikal Sandhya and chant the Madhav name in this sacred stream, God's grace will surely be upon them. This is my belief.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: And what about those who have performed worship and good deeds their whole life but are not on this new path? What will happen to them?
Answer: A good person will surely get good results, there is no doubt about that. But the point is that Satya Yuga is dawning. According to the scriptures for this new age, all humans will have to follow the path of Trikal Sandhya. When the time comes, they will have to accept it. Trikal Sandhya is the fundamental, sacred Sanatani tradition. It contains the essence of the ten avatars, the 16 names of Mahavishnu, the 18 Puranas, hymns to the divine mothers, and the supreme name of God, Madhav. Following it will lead to welfare, liberation, and freedom from worldly bondage.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: What does the Malika say about the Kolhapur region (known for its Mahalakshmi temple)?

The Mahalakshmi of Kolhapur is not different from the Mahalakshmi in the Jagannath Kshetra; they are one and the same. Wherever Mahalakshmi is worshipped—be it in Odisha, Kolhapur, or Dwarka—she is the same one goddess, appearing in different forms in different regions. So, the scriptures do speak of Mahalakshmi's role.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Near the Koyna Dam on the Krishna river, the predictions of Halasiddhanath have for 15 years said that when the dam bursts, '9 lakh bangles will break.' What does this mean?
Answer: Regarding the Krishna river dam, the Bhavishya Malika states that all major dams in India and the world will face trouble from great earthquakes and the effects of war. The most important thing written is that devotees will be saved and sinners will be destroyed. Those who follow dharma will be safe, while those who follow adharma will face trouble. The yuga is changing, and the influence of Kali will end. Those steeped in Kali's ways will face disaster. Currently, the righteous are suffering, but in the time to come, the sinners will suffer. This is the law of the world; after darkness comes light. One must face the fruits of one's karma.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: For a devotee who is good and devotional but is not connected to this Google Meet or this specific community, how will they be able to enter Satya Yuga?
Answer: Good people are good, and God's grace is always upon them. But in the yuga we are heading towards, those same good people will eventually join this stream with time. I have taught from the Bhavishya Malika that 64 crore devotees will be saved. With time, everyone will join this sacred tradition. Even if good people haven't joined today, God's grace is with them. But eventually, all devotees in the world will come together under the Lord's rule in the Age of Truth. Where else would they go but to the Lord? Everyone will come.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Is any major upheaval expected to happen in India in November or December 2023?
Answer: Nothing significant in November 2023. In December, there is a possibility of an earthquake somewhere in our country. But apart from that, nothing major is indicated.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, when does Brahma Pralaya (the great cosmic dissolution) happen?
Answer: Brahma Pralaya occurs after one Brahma Kalpa is complete, which is when Lord Brahma goes to sleep. At that time, he ceases to sustain the earth. This will happen after the cycle of Satya, Treta, Dwapara, and Kali yugas completes and another Satya Yuga passes.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Regarding the world war, is it written in the Malika that the war will last for 6 years and 6 months, and India will join in the last 9 months?
Answer: No, nothing like that is written. The Bhavishya Malika states that Pakistan will first attack India. India has never initiated an attack. This conflict will then escalate, and China will get involved. Thirteen Muslim countries will unite with China, along with Turkey. America and NATO members will also join, and this will transform into a world war. This is what is written.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Are there two eclipses, a lunar and a solar one, falling in the same fortnight this month, between the 14th and 28th?
Answer: Yes, and this has happened before, even last year. Such astronomical events, like two eclipses or an Amavasya (new moon) and Sankranti in the same fortnight, are signs of the changing yuga. People don't understand that these are signals of the advent of Satya Yuga. Because of this, there will be many changes on earth, which will prove to be sorrowful and disastrous for sinners.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: You said that 64 crore people will be saved (33 crore in India and 31 crore worldwide). Is it necessary for all of them to be vegetarian or vegan?
Answer: Yes. Look, in the times that are coming, governments and world health organizations will themselves declare that eating fish, eggs, and meat causes diseases. Everyone will give them up. With time, everyone will change.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Just as there were incarnations like Rama and Krishna in previous yugas, will these same people be born again?
Answer: It is written in the Srimad Bhagavata Purana that the Lord's devotees and their families come with Him in every yuga. The Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana describes this. So, the same devotees and families who were with the Lord in Treta, Dwapara, and Satya yugas will work with Him at this time as well, and in fact, they are already doing so.

Video Title: L103 - शून्य में धूमकेतु का दृश्य होगा भाग - 2| पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I wanted to know about the Gita Govinda. What is the appropriate time to listen to it, and can we play an audio version for the Lord?
Answer: The shlokas of Gita Govinda are very dear to Lord Jagannath and Radha-Krishna, as they describe their divine Raas Leela. It is very pleasing to the Lord. You can recite it or play an audio for the Lord at night, during your worship time, perhaps between 9 and 11 PM, whenever you have time. The Lord becomes very pleased, and it brings great peace to the home and family. The Lord's presence is felt.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Who is a true guru, and please tell a little about self-realization?
Answer: Look, this is a profound subject, but I will tell you. The true guru in this world, in my opinion... (cites a shloka)... and God Himself is the best and truest guru for us. And how does God become a guru? When we hold God in our hearts and surrender all our actions to Him, then God, as a guru, stands in our conscience and tells us, guides us, and controls our actions. He is our guru. If you can reach such a state, you can fulfill your human life through divine principles and God's guidance. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I feel like I will meet the Lord very soon, and I'm crying a lot. What should I do? I can't understand anything.
Answer: Baba, this is the sign of a devotee. When devotion arises from talk of God and meditation on God, and tears come to the eyes, then the soul and the Supreme Soul have a subtle union. Your union has already happened, and you will surely have a physical darshan (sighting) in time. Don't worry, Baba. You perform the Trikal Sandhya, and in it, God will show you many things. Tell me what the Lord is showing you. He will come in your dreams, or even appear in person in different forms. So, follow that and there's no need to be anxious. Because whoever has received the Malika, whoever has received the Bhavishya Purana, has found God. And that is the greatest path, the path that leads us to the Lord. Okay? Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Father, which languages will be prevalent in Satya Yuga? Just as there are many languages in this era, what language will exist in the primordial Satya Yuga? Will it be only Sanskrit, or will other languages that we all speak also exist?
Answer: No, mother. This coming primordial Satya Yuga will be the age of the gods (devas). And the language that the devas speak is called Devanagari. The Devanagari language is a mix of Tamil, Telugu, Hindi, English, Sanskrit, and Odia. It is a linguistic element formed by combining all of them. The devas speak in that language. And when the devas come to Earth, God will make the Earth a place for them, so the Devanagari language will be used all over the world. It is a sacred language. In heaven, Brahmaloka, and Suryaloka, conversations happen in that very language. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: My question is, if we are performing Sandhya, what can we do to bring new devotees into the stream? Because even after telling people many times, they are hesitant to join. So what can be done?
Answer: Look, Baba, your intention is very pure, and we respect this sentiment. It's a very good thing. But look, Baba, when we do farming, we first prepare the field well. We add manure and repeatedly till the soil, turning it over. When the land is well-prepared, if we sow seeds, we get a good crop, good seeds emerge, and productivity is high. Similarly, the great sage Achyutananda has said to tell those who are devotees of Lord Krishna, devotees of Lord Ram, who are in the sacred stream. Perhaps out of 100 of them, one or two will come, because the number of devotees is very small. But it is necessary to tell everyone. Tell those who have curiosity, who have the desire and the will. Very good. May the Lord's grace be upon you. Move forward. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: My first question is, when will the India-Pakistan war begin? And three or four days ago in Shimoga district in Karnataka, there was a big clash between Hindus and Muslims. So, will this convert into a civil war? Is this the beginning?
Answer: Look, the India-Pakistan war will definitely happen. And this war will happen on the instruction of Lord Kalki. A part of the Mahabharata war is still pending. The war will begin merely on Lord Kalki's command. Right now, the gathering of devotees is in progress. From 2025, according to the planetary positions and the Malika, the time and situation for war is approaching. If Lord Kalki wishes, the war will certainly happen, or it could be delayed by a year or two, or happen a year or two earlier. It depends on God. As for the civil war, the situation for civil war exists all over the world, not just in India. The reason for this is Kali (the demon of the age), his evil qualities, his violence, and it is a form of Kali to bring about the destruction of mankind. This civil war will happen in every country and will take a very destructive form in the establishment of dharma. There is still time for people to stay away from civil war, because a civil war will benefit no one. Lord Kalki is coming to give fruits according to karma. God will consider everything—who did bad deeds, who did good deeds—they will surely get their results. We cannot change anything by wishing. Therefore, people should maintain peace in the world, live joyfully, and hold on to dharma, so that in times of calamity, they receive God's protection and grace. Because the demonic people will surely do wrong, and Lord Kalki will save the devotees. This is our belief, and it is also written in the Bhavishya Purana. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: In October, there are two eclipses scheduled to happen. What will be their effect?
Answer: Look, a new moon (Amavasya), Sankranti, a lunar eclipse, and a solar eclipse all in one fortnight... this is all part of the change of the era and the change of planets. The planets and constellations are currently disturbed, and there is no one to maintain them now; all the gods and devotees have been born on Earth. That's why all this is happening. Because of this, calamities will come upon the world. But it's okay, people should do their work, stay in the Lord's refuge. For salvation, we are propagating the Bhavishya Malika and teaching the Trikal Sandhya. Do that. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Is the establishment of dharma possible without destruction? You are saying there will be a world war and destruction in the world. Is it possible that the Lord might want to establish dharma without any destruction? Is there such a possibility?
Answer: Look, God never wants destruction. God never wants anything inauspicious. The Lord is the source of all happiness, auspiciousness, and peace in the entire creation. But if humans do bad deeds, if they oppress living beings, if they oppress other humans, if the Vedas are disrespected, if God is blasphemed, and if people who walk the path of dharma and truth face calamities and do not get justice... Tulsidas Maharaj wrote about this: 'Whenever dharma declines and arrogant demons rise, committing indescribable injustices against saints, brahmins, cows, gods, and the Earth...' When there is oppression against saints, devotees, brahmins, mother cow, the gods, and Mother Earth, then the Lord incarnates in various forms to relieve the suffering of the virtuous. He comes to save the saints, the pure, and the truthful. He gives good people a good place and punishes those who are harmful and cause suffering to humanity. If someone commits a sin and is not punished, the sin will keep increasing. If sin increases, the Earth's balance will be lost. The reason for frequent earthquakes in the world today is human sin. The reason for cyclones every month is human sin. The sea repeatedly floods the land, unseasonal floods occur in rivers, and heavy rains on hills wash away houses—all this is due to human sin. If this is not rectified, the Earth will not survive. And if the Earth doesn't survive, the question of human civilization arises. That is why all this is necessary. The Lord looks at dharma and destroys the sinners. He does no harm to good people. If someone does something wrong under the constitution of Kali Yuga, they are jailed or fined according to the constitution. Similarly, under God's law, they are also subject to punishment. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: How many Kalki avatars will there be in total, how many are yet to come, and how many have already happened?
Answer: According to the scriptures and the Malika, the Kalki avatar, the Lord's incarnation, has already taken place. And Lord Kalki has also begun the establishment of dharma. Right now, the Bhavishya Malika is being propagated for the union of devotees. We are propagating the Bhavishya Malika for the salvation of those who were truly devotees of Lord Krishna and Lord Ram. Through this, those devotees will surely be saved. This is the first step for the advent of Satya Yuga in the world. And extensive work will be done by the Lord in the times to come. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: What is the meaning of the name Madhav? And what color is Madhav in this era? For instance, he came in a dark complexion (Shyam rang) as Krishna. So what is his color now, and what is the meaning of his name, Madhav?
Answer: Look, 'Ma' is the form of Brahma, the form of the original nature, meaning Mother, Mother Radha Rani. And 'Dhava' means husband or lord. So, the lord of 'Ma' is Lord Krishna. You chant the name of Krishna, you chant the name of Radha, but in one name, Radha Rani and Krishna are combined, and that name is Madhav. 'Ma' is Radha Rani and 'Dhava' is her lord, her master, her husband, who is Krishna. And that name is Madhav. The name Madhav is the most revered, sacred, and powerful name in the world. Mother Radha Rani constantly called Lord Krishna by the name Madhav. The Gopis would say Govind, Krishna, Damodar, Madhusudan, but Mother Radha Rani always called Lord Krishna 'Madhav'. Arjun called Lord Krishna by the name Madhav. Mother Draupadi called Lord Krishna by the name Madhav because she knew that this name was the Lord's most liberating name. And for the salvation of all the devotees of Kali Yuga, the name Madhav is being propagated. And Madhav, at this time... (cites shlokas)... So, mother, when Lord Kalki has come, it is written about the Lord's complexion that it will be 'Chandra varna' (moon-colored). A mix of milk and blood color will be Lord Kalki's complexion. 'Chandra varna', like the color of the moon god, that will be Lord Kalki's complexion. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Will Mahaprabhu (the Great Lord) also come to Rajasthan?
Answer: Look, he will definitely go. This Akhand Bharat (undivided India) is the Lord's birthplace. Although he will be born in Sambhal, I am talking about the entire Akhand Bharat, not the current India. The Akhand Bharat is God's birthplace, and God will go to every region. And Rajasthan is a very holy state, where there is dharma, where people have good conduct. Lord Hanuman is there in the form of Balaji, and Lord Krishna's holy place, Khatu Shyam, is also there. So, God will definitely go. For the Lord, Rajasthan is a place for the salvation of devotees, and he will have to go there to save them. He will go. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Someone told me to meditate on where Lord Kalki is and what he is doing. When I meditated one day, that night my mother had a dream that a sanyasi, a yogi, was saying that he has just gone to study. He has gone to study and is studying right now. She had a dream like this. So what does this mean?
Answer: The dream you saw is true. When we meet sometime, we will talk about it. I cannot discuss this openly. But the dream you saw is correct, absolutely. There is no untruth in it. You will have more visions of the Lord, and you will surely learn about the Lord's divine plays. Because the principle that God has revealed... such devotees are one in a million, like you who received it. I also feel happy because it matches completely. Okay, Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: So when can I join the stream (the spiritual movement)?
Answer: Look, mother, the number that appears in our description... (to an assistant) please show the number, Baba... call any of those numbers and join the online satsang. They will provide the PDF for the Trikal Sandhya that I talk about. Perform the Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavatam, mother, and stay in the online satsang. Engage in God's work in Assam. Because to make this human birth meaningful, there is no greater wealth or asset than this. We have come for our own salvation. We are bound souls, and only God can free us from this bondage. At this time, it is very easy to attain God. Follow this stream, join the online satsang, and may God's grace be with you. Join the Lord's work from Assam, mother. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: In the Garg Samhita, I read that Sankarshan comes as Madhav, and Revati comes with him as Radha Rani. The name Madhav is also used for Balram ji (Sankarshan Baldev ji). It says he will also appear in the Kalki form to destroy demons. I want to ask about the secret behind this.
Answer: Look, mother, I told you that this Lord Kalki is a form of Balram, Brahma, Vishnu, and Maheshwar. Meaning, these three great elements will combine to become Lord Kalki. In Kalki's childhood, devotees will call him Madhav. When Lord Kalki performs the act of destruction, at that time everyone will know him by the name Kalki. This is written in the Bhavishya Purana. And this is an integral form of the Lord. At this time, brother Balram will not come separately. Because there is a scripture named Saurashtra Samhita. In that scripture, which contains the dialogue between Lord Krishna and his devotees, it is written that Lord Krishna will be on the left side and Balram on the right side, and both together will become Kalki. Therefore, Lord Krishna and Madhav, this tradition of Balram and Ram, its root is the Madhavi tradition. We have come from the Madhavi tradition, Sanatana Dharma has come from it. The secret tradition of Jagannath Mahaprabhu is the Madhavi tradition, Lord Krishna's tradition is the Madhavi tradition. And he has written about that same tradition in the Garg Samhita. Lord Kalki has come with the name Madhav to save the devotees. And in the Garg Samhita, a shloka is also written... (cites a shloka)... Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I saw Lord Jagannath with Mother Subhadra and Balram ji in a dream. Today, I dreamt that I am cleaning a Shivling. What does this mean?
Answer: Good, Brahma, Vishnu, Maheshwar. See, Mother Subhadra is the form of Brahma, Lord Jagannath is Lord Krishna, and Sheshnag is a part of Lord Shankar. And you seeing yourself worshipping Lord Shankar means he is giving proof that the time of destruction is near. Jagannath, Balabhadra, Subhadra... this means that at this time, God will carry out the work of destruction in some form. This is its essence. You are having a vision of Jagannath, Balabhadra, Subhadra and worshipping Shiva ji, which is wonderful. Bathe Shiva ji once with good cow's milk, it will be good and even more blissful. Okay, mother. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I wanted to know which 'mandal' (region/group) Himachal will be associated with? And what will be the role of Baba Bhole (Shiva) and Maa Kali, as they are highly revered in our area? Also, as you mentioned that many people will go to Satya Yuga, what should one do if they don't want to go to Satya Yuga but want to attain liberation directly and not be reborn?
Answer: Look, Himachal is near Uttar Pradesh, so it will be in the Shri Vrindavan mandal. For God-realization, meaning liberation from this life, even the gods perform Trikal Sandhya daily and read the Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana. If you want liberation, if you want to attain Vaikuntha, then do it selflessly, without any desire. Perform Trikal Sandhya daily, read the Bhagavatam, and constantly chant the name of Madhav. I believe that those who do this will have a peaceful death. There is one kind of death where people lie sick for six months or a year, suffering a lot before dying. But with the path I am showing, if a person follows it and chants the name of Madhav in God's refuge, I am sure they will have a peaceful death, meaning no suffering at the time of death, and after death, they will attain Vaikuntha. There is no greater traditional principle than this anywhere. And those who perform Trikal Sandhya and follow my rules, they know that God appears in their dreams, they become divine. Do that much, and you will surely get liberation. If your devotion is even better, this is the time of Lord Kalki's incarnation. The Lord will perform destruction and save the devotees. A beautiful Ram Rajya will be established between the devotees and God, and you can get a place there too. Therefore, take refuge in God. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I have been doing Trikal Sandhya for three months, but for the last three or four days, my right eye has been twitching a lot. What does this mean?
Answer: Okay, look, continue doing Trikal Sandhya. Some small problems might arise. Twitching of the right eye is good for men, and the left eye is good for women. It's nothing to worry about. Chant the name of Madhav and continue the Trikal Sandhya. This won't be a problem, and consider that a calamity has been averted. Okay? Okay, Baba. Okay. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Will devotion increase more by reading the Bhagavatam or by chanting the name of Lord Madhav?
Answer: Look, 'Kalau tad Hari kirtanat' means in Kali Yuga, chanting the Lord's name is key. By reading the Bhagavatam, the glory of God enters our bodily system, and every part of the body becomes pure. When the body system is pure and one chants the name, the fruit is even greater. If you only chant the name, the element needed to purify the body system comes from the Bhagavatam. By reading the Bhagavatam, the body becomes completely pure, and chanting the name with that purity yields even more blissful results. Okay? Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L104 -श्री कल्कि एवं सुधर्मा महा महा संघ के बारे में तेर जनम शरण में प्रमाण |पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I dreamt I went to my house, and there were red footprints in the courtyard. My Laddu Gopal (child Krishna deity) came and sat next to me, saying, 'Take me with you everywhere.' Then, two days before Janmashtami, I also found a peacock feather. What does this mean?
Answer: This means that this is the infinite grace of Lord Krishna upon you. And mother, wherever you go, take Laddu Gopal with you because the Lord gets lonely. The connection between the Gopis and the Lord is the same connection between you and the Lord. He doesn't want to leave you. This is wonderful. Salutations to you too, mother. Take the Lord with you and devote yourself to him.

Video Title: L105 - छतिया बट एवं जाजपुर में कल्कि भगवान का लीला प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Guruji, whenever I sit down to perform the Tri-sandhya dhara (three-times-a-day spiritual practice), I can do it regularly for a day or two, but then something always happens to break my routine, and I can't maintain continuity. Please grant me a place at your feet, and by your grace, let my Tri-sandhya practice remain unbroken.' Surrender completely to Madhav and your spiritual duties. The force of Kali Yuga creates obstacles in righteous work, but my belief is that with the Lord's grace, this will become easy for you.

Video Title: L105 - छतिया बट एवं जाजपुर में कल्कि भगवान का लीला प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

After bathing and purification, you should worship the Shrimad Bhagavat by offering incense, a lamp, flowers, or Tulsi, whatever is available, and then you can read it. You can read it anytime from Brahmamuhurta (around 3:45 AM) until midnight.

Video Title: L105 - छतिया बट एवं जाजपुर में कल्कि भगवान का लीला प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: You said that God has already incarnated on Earth and all deities have also arrived. But what about the good souls who want to be with God? When they die now, do they go to Vaikuntha (the celestial abode)? If they wish to go to the divine abode, where are those souls going?
Answer: Let me explain a small concept: there is 'Sakam Karma' (actions with attachment to results) and 'Nishkam Karma' (selfless action). People who perform actions while submerged in desire, attachment, and illusion are bound by the fruits of their karma. On the other hand, those who perform 'Nishkam Karma'—surrendering themselves, their families, and everything to God and then performing all worldly duties without any expectation of results—only they attain Vaikuntha. So, surrender yourself to God and continue to perform all your duties for your family, but do not desire any fruit from your actions. Offer all your actions and their fruits at the Lord's feet. Perform Nishkam Karma, constantly chant God's name, do Trikal Sandhya, and sing praises of Madhav. You will surely attain Vaikuntha.

Video Title: L105 - छतिया बट एवं जाजपुर में कल्कि भगवान का लीला प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: That is a very good desire. Within Vaikuntha, there is a realm called 'Goloka'. That is where Mother Radha and Krishna reside. All the devotees of Radha Madhav go to this Goloka Dham. There, they participate in the eternal Raas (divine play) and satsang with Lord Krishna and Radharani every day. That place is Vaikuntha.

Video Title: L105 - छतिया बट एवं जाजपुर में कल्कि भगवान का लीला प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: I am sharing with you only those elements that are necessary for human beings to transition into the Satya Yuga. The 16 names are for transforming humans into divine beings. Chanting the names of the 10 avatars for the establishment of dharma yields the same fruit as reading all 18 Puranas. The Durga Madhav Stuti helps a person receive the grace of Mother Radharani. We have simplified the process for this purpose. If you follow it, you will surely receive the benefits.

Video Title: L105 - छतिया बट एवं जाजपुर में कल्कि भगवान का लीला प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: We often say 'Mata-Pita' (Mother-Father) and 'Radha-Krishna'. Why do we say the mother's name first?
Answer: There is no such rule. There is no difference between mother and father. According to God's law, the mother has as many rights as the father; neither is lesser than the other. If our mother pays respect to our father, then the father should be revered first. And above our father is the Supreme Father, God, whose name all devotees chant. There is no difference. It is fine to say it as your mind wishes. Some say the mother's name first, some the father's. This does not imply any difference in respect or status.

Video Title: L105 - छतिया बट एवं जाजपुर में कल्कि भगवान का लीला प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L105 - छतिया बट एवं जाजपुर में कल्कि भगवान का लीला प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: My last question is about heinous crimes like murder, rape, and arson. Are these also a part of karma? Do they happen by the will of the Lord?
Answer: No, these things do not happen by the Lord's will. The Lord told Arjuna, 'Although the three gunas—Sattvaguna, Rajoguna, and Tamoguna—originate from me, I am not in any of them.' Humans are bound by their past karmas. People commit misdeeds under the influence of the five senses, to please their minds, and to fulfill their bodily desires. God has nothing to do with it. That is why the Lord established Lord Yama (the god of justice) to judge karma. One should perform good deeds (sukarma). Committing bad deeds (kukarma) makes one liable for sin and suffering. Those who do bad deeds will receive their fruit, and those who do good deeds will receive good fruit. God does not interfere in this. God made humans self-sufficient, gave them all the senses and the three gunas. If someone chooses the path of Rajoguna or Tamoguna, they will have to bear the fruit of their actions. God is not involved in this.

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: What is the identification of a true saint?
Answer: A true saint... well, a saint is a saint, it's not necessary to analyze it. But in this Kali Yuga, it has become necessary to distinguish between the true and the false. One who is free from greed, attachment, anger, ego, pride, and the five senses is a sanyasi, he is a saint. Achyutananda has written about this. It means one who becomes distant from all worldly objects, in whom spiritual power manifests over the material. One who has no pride, is not overjoyed in happiness nor dejected in sorrow, is not angered by anger, nor by actions, stays away from sin, considers all people of the world as their own, constantly works in the refuge of the Lord, and has no trace of attachment to the senses—he is called a saint, a sadhu, a sanyasi. This has become necessary in Kali Yuga. In past ages, all saints were equal, but in Kali Yuga, we see some deviation. Ask your own conscience. If your conscience says it's right, then accept it.

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

A time will come for nurturing the devotees when Mahalakshmi herself will prepare prasad, and the devotees will eat. That time is also coming. So, this dream you saw... as you have joined this stream, I have said before that in Satya Yuga, the sun will rise in the west and set in the east. As you have joined the Trikal Sandhya, the Lord showed you, 'Look, such a time is coming, and the Bhavishya Malika is true.' For this reason, the Lord gives small experiences to the devotees, showing them that such a time is coming so they can act accordingly. My aim is for lakhs of devotees to be saved. Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Okay.

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: Look, mother, you are absolutely right. In the entire world, we see many crore tons of iron, but how much gold is there? Each devotee of the Lord is like gold. And see, mother, Kali Yuga is going on right now, so Sanatana Dharma has become constricted. People are opposing the Vedas and scriptures; they oppose spirituality. They even question a holy text like the Bhavishya Malika. Because it is Kali Yuga now, dharma has become constricted. Dharma is Sanatana, and right now it has become smaller due to the influence of Kali Yuga. It will expand again, and in time, wherever you look in the entire world, there will be only Sanatana Dharma.

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I wanted to know about a dream I had after 15 days of starting Trikal Sandhya. I dreamt I was at Khatu Shyam and had a direct vision of him. Answer: Look, first, about the vision of Lord Khatu Shyam... the one who is Khatu Shyam is Barbarik. He has already been born, and Lord Krishna has also come. So the Lord is proving that the five Balbirs have been born. That's why you had a direct vision. And the creature you saw is Kaal (destruction) and the form of Kali. The Lord gives devotees experiences through dreams to make them steadfast. The creature didn't die because it is an asura (demon), and an asura will not die so easily. Kali will die in the end; he hasn't died yet. That's why it was shown like that. That was Kali, the power of Kali. So on one hand, the Lord gave you his vision, and on the other, you also saw Kali, meaning his time is up.

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Whoever in the world performs Trikal Sandhya receives experiences from the Lord at all times. This experience gives devotees the message that this is the principle to follow; through it, Krishna can be attained. There is no other way.

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I had one question. In the third canto of the Bhagavata Purana, the system of time calculation that is given, is it wrong?
Answer: No. Starting from the 'paramanu' and so on, and the 12,000 divine years of the demigods... if you calculate it, it comes out to 432,000 years. Yes, this is written in the Bhagavat. The age of Kali Yuga is 432,000 years, that is correct, there is no mistake in it. But because of sin and human actions, the age of Kali Yuga has been affected. I have explained what kinds of sins have caused the disintegration of Kali Yuga's age, and that Kali Yuga will last for 5,000 years. I have provided proof for this and have written it down one by one in the Bhavishya Malika Purana.

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: My question is, all the Puranas state that Kali Yuga is 432,000 years long, but the Bhavishya Malika says it is 5,000 years long. Vedavyasa wrote long ago that Kali Yuga is 432,000 years. If the Bhavishya Malika is proven true, wouldn't his words be proven false?
Answer: Look, understand this well. Lord Vedavyasa is God himself, an incarnation of God. He has written that the age of Kali Yuga is 432,000 years. This is undisputed. But, at a certain time, when the Sun, Moon, and Jupiter transit into the same zodiac sign, at that time, Satya Yuga will arrive. That has already happened in 2022-23. Vedavyasa presented both principles. One principle is what all people of Kali Yuga say. But the other principle, which is written within, is that when the Sun, Moon, and Jupiter transit into one sign, on that day, Krita Yuga (Satya Yuga) will come. That time has already passed. For this reason, the Malika is true, Vedavyasa is also true, and the Srimad Bhagavat is true.

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

When the Lord asked King Indradyumna what he wanted, he asked that the Lord's eating should never stop. Lord Jagannath gave this boon. So, at night, recite a little Gita Govinda to the Lord. Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

This is because the ancestors (pitrus) come to earth and see what religious rituals are being performed in their homes. While living, people are attached to worldly things, but after death, they search for dharma. They have understood that there is no truth in the world other than God. So, at this time, they have all come to earth and visit their homes. If no religious rituals are happening, they become sad. That is why, during this time, I constantly tell devotees to read the Bhagavat daily. The ancestors will come daily, listen, and bestow their grace. It will bring prosperity and good things. Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

If humans worship with devotion (bhakti), they receive grace. But if they do sadhana, they do not receive grace because it is distant from the path of bhakti, the path of scriptures, the Sanatana path. In past ages, there was no provision for sadhana in many scriptures. In Kali Yuga, because people lack devotion, they turn to sadhana. One who has devotion, who is a true devotee, should perform Trikal Sandhya. They will blissfully attain God, and their worldly desires can also be fulfilled through it.

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L106 - जगन्नाथ जी का 'छतिया बट' में स्थानांतरण (रूस देश के द्वारा) | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L107 - भविष्य मालिका में लिखा जा चुका था पं० श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी का नाम | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L107 - भविष्य मालिका में लिखा जा चुका था पं० श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी का नाम | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L107 - भविष्य मालिका में लिखा जा चुका था पं० श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी का नाम | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L107 - भविष्य मालिका में लिखा जा चुका था पं० श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी का नाम | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L107 - भविष्य मालिका में लिखा जा चुका था पं० श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी का नाम | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: When will God appear before everyone?

Question: Is it possible that if a pure devotee prays to God that such destruction should not happen and that there should be no problems, could that prayer be accepted? I mean, can God stop it so that nothing bad happens?
Answer: Look, God is doing what is necessary to bring about dharma. The Lord is not doing anything that would punish innocent people without reason. And my question to you is this: if sinful acts, the killing of living beings, and injustice increase in the world, and if the gods and the Vedas are disrespected, shouldn't humans do something about it? There is still time. If people follow the sacred path we talk about—performing Trikal Sandhya, reading the Srimad Bhagavatam, becoming vegetarian—then God can even stop the establishment of dharma (through destruction). But people must do good. If they do evil, the Lord is coming only to do good. He will do good. He is not coming to give sorrow to anyone. Only those who have done wrong will be punished. Not a single person who has not made a mistake will be harmed. And when the Lord of countless universes is coming, the judgment will be completely just. There is still time for people to change. At 12 or 1 AM, they catch and kill living creatures for food. How they treat little children... what can I say? Sometimes a son kills his father, a son kills his mother. Old age homes have multiplied. In old age, instead of being a support, children have become enemies. The parents who gave birth worked so hard to raise their children, and in their old age, they are beaten, abused, killed, and thrown out of their homes. How long can this sin continue? The earth is drenched in the blood of millions of creatures, which is the cause of earthquakes. If God, the creator of the world, doesn't come when He sees the world being destroyed... and major earthquakes will keep happening, destroying human and animal civilization. The earth will not survive. He is coming to protect the Earth. If the Earth remains, we can live on it. Mother Earth is crying. People are drowning in sin. Blasphemy against God is increasing. And big countries are flaunting their power. So, the light of dharma is essential in the world. If human civilization turns towards dharma, God will surely protect them. Jai.

By continuously chanting the name, reading scriptures, and performing Trikal Sandhya, you will become completely surrendered to the Lord. And then, no attachment or sorrow will arise from any of the world's obstacles. It will take some time. Those who perform Trikal Sandhya will reach such a state and become pure, selfless devotees like the gods. By doing this, God's grace will be attained.
