The name of Ram was for that era; in this era, Hanuman ji will save those who chant the name of Madhav. This is the proof of his mercy. Jai.

Video Title: L108 - जाजनगर में कल्कि जी का जन्म पट्टा मड़ाण में प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Father, I had a dream last night. In the dream, I saw that you were with me. A lion comes to you, and you pet it very lovingly, and then it goes away. So I wanted to ask, Father, what is the meaning of this? Why did I see something like this?
Answer: Look, God has given me the responsibility to save the devotees and to propagate the Bhavishya Malika for the salvation of the world. And God is showing this to you all. See, no matter how influential or powerful people in the world come, they cannot stand against us, meaning they accept our authority. If even the lion of the jungle accepts it, then human beings should also accept it. In this lies the welfare of humanity. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L108 - जाजनगर में कल्कि जी का जन्म पट्टा मड़ाण में प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I have three idols, but I am unable to serve them. I am unable to perform the service for the idols, I couldn't even do name chanting or anything. Please guide me about these idols. I have idols of the Lord, three idols of Radha Krishna, and one single Krishna ji. What should I do now?
Answer: You live in America, that's no problem. Look, many devotees from America are also connected to this righteous work. Let me tell you one thing: God goes to those who are dear to Him. That is, God goes to those whom He loves and who are close to Him. You were close to God, which is why you have received these idols of the Lord in your life. If the Lord has come to our house, then welcome Him. Perform Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavatam. If not much, mother, just offer a flower with love, a smile, and devotion. Say, 'Lord, you are mine and will always be mine. I am in your refuge.' There is no need for a specific time for worship, mother. It's not necessary to sit and worship for an hour. If we roam around all day but chant the names of Krishna, Radha, or Madhav in our minds, we get the same fruit as those who sit and worship. So, at the very least, if you find any small fruit or a Tulsi leaf, offer it to the Lord. And pray to the Lord, 'Lord, take me into your refuge.' Because, mother, the times are such that there is no other way but dharma. Before the element of destruction, the path to our salvation is nothing but God. You were a devotee of God, and that is why the Lord has come to your house. So welcome the Lord, worship Him, and stay with Him. He will bless you and grant you welfare. Okay, mother? Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L108 - जाजनगर में कल्कि जी का जन्म पट्टा मड़ाण में प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I wanted to ask for your thoughts on this... whenever I perform worship or prayers, tears come to my eyes. This happens every time.
Answer: It happens. We are far from the Lord, aren't we? So sometimes, the thought of Him comes to mind. Just as when a mother thinks of her child, tears of affection and love come to her eyes. Our relationship with Lord Krishna and Lord Rama is like that. And when that connection is made, when the individual soul meets the Supreme Soul, a stream of bliss flows. This is a good sign and a characteristic of a devotee. Continue with it, maintain it. And do the Lord's work. Perform Trikal Sandhya and take refuge in Madhav. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L108 - जाजनगर में कल्कि जी का जन्म पट्टा मड़ाण में प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: My problem is that you have said that in Trikal Sandhya, one cannot consume any kind of intoxicant. But in our circle, alcohol is not allowed, but everyone does smoke marijuana (ganja). Could you advise on this? My mind gets very disturbed when I don't smoke it, but when I do, I feel completely at peace and lost in the Lord's divine play.
Answer: In Satya Yuga (the Golden Age), no human will consume substances harmful to the body. We know about this from a scientific perspective; we can search on YouTube or Google how harmful it is. And when Satya Yuga is being established, everyone will become vegetarian, good human beings, divine human beings, god-like human beings. Being in Kali Yuga was a different matter. To go to Satya Yuga, you must stay away from these things. If you become god-like, you can become one of the 330 million gods and live as a human in Satya Yuga on this earth. Therefore, this is not about Kali Yuga; this is necessary to go to Satya Yuga. If your conscience says that you want to go to Satya Yuga and be with the Lord, then to attain the Lord, you will have to give up some things. If you give it up, it will be good. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L108 - जाजनगर में कल्कि जी का जन्म पट्टा मड़ाण में प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, there is a Premanand Maharaj ji from Vrindavan. He says that you just have to chant the name, and you will be saved by that alone. I wanted to know about that, is that correct? Meaning, just keep chanting 'Jai Shri Radha, Jai Shri Radha' while working or doing anything.
Answer: I have respect for him. But the thing is, to go to Satya Yuga, as per the orders of Lord Mahavishnu Jagannath, the eternal Pancha Sakhas have laid down a sacred rule. And this is the word given by God. For the welfare of humanity, Trikal Sandhya is necessary. There is no human on earth who can become a human of Satya Yuga without following this path. This might seem bitter to people. With change, we must respect the incarnation of God. And with the Lord's incarnation, to become a human of Satya Yuga, we must become a 'Brahma-gyani' (one who knows the Absolute Truth), because in Satya Yuga, everyone will be a Brahma-gyani, everyone will be a god. So we have to perform god-like actions. Chant the names of Mother Radha Rani and Lord Krishna as much as you want, it brings joy. What Premanand ji says is correct, it brings great joy. But to transition from this yuga to Satya Yuga, perform Trikal Sandhya at the times I have mentioned. And follow the rules I have stated. At other times, chant the name of the Mother, chant the name of Lord Krishna. The whole day is there. Trikal Sandhya is only for 30 minutes. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L108 - जाजनगर में कल्कि जी का जन्म पट्टा मड़ाण में प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I often see eagles (Garuda) around me. Sometimes two, three, four, or five of them. Is this a sign of something? Also, I get an image of a very large Mahavishnu, and I am in front of him with many people, like it's Kalki's army. I don't know if it's an illusion or real.
Answer: This is good. The Garuda bird is a descendant of Garuda, the crest-jewel of devotees of the Lord. If they come near you, it is good for you. Perhaps they think that you are also a devotee of Lord Vishnu, Krishna, or Rama. They come because they trust you. It is a good sign. And no, what you see is true. Lord Kalki has already descended on earth. The time for the establishment of dharma is underway. And for the devotees, the Lord gives his vision through some medium, whether in a dream or in some other way. This is good for you. Perform Trikal Sandhya, join the online satsang, chant the name of Madhav, and you will receive more essence. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L108 - जाजनगर में कल्कि जी का जन्म पट्टा मड़ाण में प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: On May 5, 2003, there was a planetary alignment that was very similar to Lord Rama's birth chart, with about six planets in exalted positions. A similar conjunction that happened in Treta Yuga occurred in 2003. (Implicitly asking if this was the time of Kalki's birth).
Answer: Listen, the time of God's arrival is a secret time. Mahapurush Achyutananda wrote about this, meaning even the greatest yogis, sages, and rishis could not find Lord Kalki's birth chart. It will happen in great secrecy. And the devotees will be able to recognize Him. The conjunction you mentioned is correct. But according to the Bhavishya Purana, the incarnation of Lord Kalki was to happen after 2005. The time was written to be anytime starting from 2005. And according to that, Lord Kalki's incarnation was to happen. Perhaps by God's will, it has already happened. And we come to know the true essence of God through the path of devotion and the practice of Trikal Sandhya. Jai.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I am not able to remember the Tri-Sandhya prayers. Even if I remember them, I forget. I feel very scared to start anything. It's been three months since I started.
Answer: Okay, write it down in a notebook or on a piece of paper. Then, read it from the paper. It's alright if you make mistakes; they will be corrected over time. There is nothing to fear or be sad about. Chant the name of Madhav, and everything will be fine. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I wanted to ask one thing. In the morning, I perform the Tri-Sandhya facing the direction of the sunrise. However, when I am in the office, I don't know the directions. So, I just perform it wherever I am seated, using the shorter method you've described. Sometimes, if I have time, I do the full version. My question is, is it considered a fault if I am unable to face east, the direction of the sun?
Answer: Look, the name of God can be chanted anywhere—in water, on land, in the sky, in all four directions, sitting in any posture—and you will attain God. There is no sorrow, no problem, no obstacle in this. Wherever you sit, whichever direction you face, sit according to your own will and chant His name. You will attain God. There is no issue at all.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Actually, I had a question. In a satsang two days ago, you mentioned that the king of Russia will bring Lord Jagannath to Puri. At that time, Lord Kalki will not go to meet him. A question arose in my mind: what is the reason for this? Since both are the same divine form, why will Lord Kalki not go to meet Lord Jagannath?
Answer: This is a very good question. Look, Lord Jagannath has devotees all over India and the world, and Lord Jagannath himself has incarnated as Kalki; there is no difference. But the point is, only those who are fortunate will get to meet Lord Kalki, the manifest Brahman. If Lord Kalki goes there, then everyone, both the virtuous and the wicked, will meet him. This means good and bad people alike will come for Lord Jagannath's darshan out of fear, and if Lord Kalki is there, they will see him too and take refuge in him. Therefore, to save the sinners, God will filter people using his Maya Shakti (illusory power). There is a place called Barchana, before Chhatia Bhat, on the way to Jajpur. Lord Kalki will stay there, saying, 'Lord Jagannath's worship and rituals are ongoing, so it is better for me to stay here.' For the sake of the devotees, Lord Kalki will stay there and will later proceed to wherever he needs to go. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, regarding the future of the world, it is said that earthquakes will increase, the Earth's axis will shift, the geography will change completely, and the sun will rise from the west. Mahapurush Anant Das ji has said his prophecies will come true. In this scenario, will only the pure souls from this spiritual stream be saved, or will pure souls from other paths also be saved? Will people from other paths also get to have a darshan (divine vision) of the Lord, or will it only be for those who are sincerely following this path with unwavering devotion?
Answer: Look, when God descends into the world, He is extremely compassionate. He eliminates the wicked and protects the saints. The great sage Achyutananda wrote a line in Odia which means that not a single devotee who is not under God's refuge will survive the destructive phase of Kali Yuga. It is my belief that by the time dharma is re-established, all devotees will be connected to Lord Kalki. A time will come when people will see no other alternative. Whether one is wealthy, respected, or knowledgeable, everyone will have to take refuge in Lord Kalki. They will have to accept the Trikal Sandhya, and it will become necessary to recite the 16 names, 10 avatars, and the Durga Madhav Stuti. People will see that they are attaining salvation by reading this, and it will slowly spread to everyone. By the grace of Lord Jagannath, the Bhavishya Malika will be translated into all languages across the world. Jai Shri Madhav.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Prabhu, I saw a line from the Malika which says, 'From '24, the calculating machines will turn upside down, computers and mobiles will stop working, factories will break down, schools, colleges, and treasuries will shut down.' So, Pandit ji, is this supposed to happen in 2024?
Answer: The 'calculating machines' refer to computers. Their predictions will fail; even supercomputers will become useless. But this is not happening in 2024. People twist the words of the Bhavishya Malika to increase their TRP and subscribers. I hear these things, but it is not happening so soon. Above all, Mahapurush Achyutananda has written that everything depends on Lord Kalki and when He decides to act. He has not given a specific timeline. The things being propagated today are meant to create fear among people. The Bhavishya Malika is a path to salvation; it is meant to bring peace and liberation to devotees, not fear. People interpret it based on their limited knowledge. Wait for the right time; there is still a while to go. By the Lord's grace and His will, no one knows when it will happen. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I had one more question. Among all the incarnations of Lord Narayan so far, except for the Narasimha avatar, all others have been quite calm and gentle. The Narasimha avatar was very fierce. What will the Kalki avatar be like? How will he treat his devotees versus how will he treat those who are engaged in wrong thoughts and evil deeds?
Answer: Look, for His devotees, God's form is calm, serene like a dark-blue cloud, pure, beautiful, and enchanting. For the demons, His form is destructive. Lord Kalki will carry out the act of destruction against the wicked like a great, radiant comet. To his devotees, he will give darshan in the beautiful form of Madhav, Neel Madhav. So, his appearance will be different for devotees and different for sinners. The Lord's manifestation is according to our devotion. For the purpose of destruction, Lord Kalki will maintain his wrathful form for some days, but for his devotees, he will appear in a simple and gentle form. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, please forgive me. It is necessary to have control over our five senses and four motor organs, right? We are trying to learn to love, wait, and obey. So, in the fasting that is to be done, does it mean we must also gain control over our senses and motor organs?
Answer: Look, that is correct. I will explain the principle behind fasting to you later. The purpose of fasting is to renounce worldly greed and the desire for sensual pleasures. That is its true meaning. Okay?

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I had asked this before: you said that medicines will stop working. As a doctor, I know that modern medical science, like allopathy, is still developing and diagnoses are not always accurate. We are pushed into a rat race from childhood, away from spirituality. So, for those of us who have found this path, how should we deal with medicines, which are chemical reactions? Should we take vitamins to balance things, or how do we gradually stop relying on them?
Answer: Your line of thinking is absolutely correct. But we are working in the spiritual field by the Lord's grace. In this Kali Yuga, it is difficult for people to survive without modern medicines. They are used in every home. The most important thing is that along with taking medicine, if people have devotion and surrender, like practicing the Sandhya I speak of, the medicine will be more effective. Furthermore, the Bhavishya Malika states that a time will come when doctors will lose their way, and both modern medicine and Ayurveda will fail. This will be the final stage of Kali Yuga, when the Lord takes the world under His control. At that time, only chanting the Lord's name and the Trikal Sandhya will work. That time has not yet come. It depends on God. Wait for that time; it will surely come.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I wanted to ask, you mentioned that many divine souls will come as per the Bhavishya Malika. I am a disciple of the self-realized saint Shri Asharam ji Bapu. Is there anything written about him in the Bhavishya Malika? My second question is, what does the Malika say about London, UK? Will it be completely submerged?
Answer: No, that will not happen. Regarding your first question, I have respect for all saints as they have helped transform many people. However, I have not read anything specifically about Saint Asharam Bapu. As for your second question, London will remain. Mahapurush Achyutananda has written that the Lord will go to London riding on Garuda. He will save the devotees there, bring back the Kohinoor diamond and the Kaustubha gem to India, and will make the devotees there the rulers in the new age (Satya Yuga) before returning to his homeland. This is written in the Jaiphula Malika. Okay?

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Father, I had a dream this morning between 4 and 5 AM. I saw my mother lying down, covered in what looked like blood from her chest to her waist. My elder brother suddenly showed symptoms of death, which scared me. In a second scene, I saw a basket with old 25-paisa coins. Someone was taking two, and I was taking one. As I was about to take a third, I told my mother, 'No, you take it too, or I will miss you.' What message is the Lord trying to give through this dream?
Answer: The meaning is that a disease is about to come to this Earth. And it could affect up to 75% of the people. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I have a question. Nowadays, we see a lot of love marriages. Are they right?
Answer: Look, son, I don't like to analyze love marriages much. However, if a couple marries with mutual consent, in the tradition of a Gandharva marriage as per our Vedas, then that marriage is in accordance with the scriptures. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Jai Jagannath, Pandit ji. Is there anything in the Malika about the ongoing war between Palestine and Israel?
Answer: Look, this is a precursor to the unification of 13 Muslim countries. Secondly, as I have mentioned before, an independent equation is being formed. Through this war, all Muslim countries are unifying. On the other hand, the good relationship between India and Israel will remain, but if America helps them more, they will likely follow America's lead. This is what the future indicates. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Prabhu ji, my question is, what are the signs of a good devotee, through which we can attain God? God has shown us the path to salvation, but how can we find God? What qualities should a good devotee possess?
Answer: Look, mother, the best quality is when we surrender all our worldly happiness, sorrow, wealth, attachments, ego, and pride at the Lord's feet and say, 'Lord, whatever is Your will is for my well-being.' When we do this, God takes full responsibility for us. This is called a 'nishkam bhakt' (a selfless devotee). This means practicing devotion without any personal desire. Offer the fruits of all your worldly actions at God's feet, and do not worry about whether He gives you the results or not. By doing this, we can become a close devotee of God. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: People here talk about their dreams. When someone sees something in a dream, is that also a form of God's grace? Does it mean God has informed them of something in advance?
Answer: Look, a dream is an element that can bring information about our body, our future, and our past lives. Ravana and Kansa saw Mahakal (the God of Time and Death) before they died; we read this in our scriptures. If someone has a vision of God in a dream, it is His grace. Sometimes, a dream can warn of a coming problem. So, it is a sacred element. If it is God's grace, He can inform someone in advance. Before Lord Krishna was born, He appeared in Brahma's dream to announce His incarnation. So, dreams can come before sorrow or happiness, or by God's grace, depending on one's devotion. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I've been following you for two years and my family and I practice Tri-Sandhya. But whenever I try to undertake a special spiritual practice (sadhana), I fall so ill that I have to be hospitalized. I also have strange dreams where I hear words I've never known, like 'Akand' or 'Uddhav'. In one dream, an old man in an old house told me to search for 'Askand' among many ancient scriptures. What does this mean? What should I do, as my health fails every time I try a sadhana?
Answer: Listen, mother. First, do not perform any special sadhana. Second, the dream about the scriptures refers to a secret place in Odisha where all ancient texts are kept. No one can go there now, but when the time comes, devotees will. Perhaps it is your destiny to go there. For now, wait for that time. Just perform the Trikal Sandhya. Do not do any sadhana. Sadhana can sometimes lead to God's wrath instead of His grace because it is a symbol of ego, an attempt to compel God. Trikal Sandhya is enough to make humans divine. So, do not go down that path. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Guruji, I wanted to ask if the 'Behad ka Param Gyan' (Ultimate Knowledge of the Limitless), which talks about concepts like Param Shiva and Param Vishnu, is related to the Bhavishya Malika?
Answer: Okay. Look, son, I have not read about such concepts in the Bhavishya Malika, so I may not have information on this. Concepts like Param Vishnu and Param Shiva belong to the path of knowledge (gyan marg), which is followed by sages. In this age of Kali Yuga, the path of devotion (bhakti marg) is essential for mankind's salvation. Following the path of devotion will bring bliss. This is my opinion; the rest is your choice. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Maharaj, I want to ask something that many people probably think about but don't say. Every person, including myself, has committed many sins, some knowingly. I don't do those things anymore, but the past actions trouble me and I can't sleep at night. I've heard that repentance is the greatest remedy and God forgives. Will we be saved?
Answer: Look, son, do not worry at all. Don't be sad or stressed. Second, as Tulsidas Maharaj wrote, everything in this world has flaws. Every human makes mistakes, knowingly or unknowingly, sometimes compelled by time and planetary positions. But there is a way to be saved. Perform the Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavatam, and constantly chant the name of Madhav. You are not a greater sinner than Ratnakar or Ajamila, who were great sinners. So, from today, stop worrying and live in bliss. Do as I have told you, and God's grace will surely be with you. Okay, son?

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pranam Guruji. My question is, can you give me a time span for when Lord Kalki might come and when this Kali Yuga will end?
Answer: Look, in Kali Yuga, no human or guru is greater than God. Regarding the time span you want to know, the period from 2025 to 2033 will be quite difficult. During this time, truth and untruth will be revealed, and a great change will come upon the world. Okay?

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pranam Pandit ji. My son gets time to do the Sandhya in the morning and evening, but not in the afternoon. He comes home from school at 2 PM, and by the time he does it, it's 2:30 PM. Will this be a problem?
Answer: Okay, mother, no problem. It's alright if it's a little late. Children's mistakes are not counted. It's fine. Tell him to do it whenever he gets time after coming home.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I have another question. When Kali Yuga ends, will the people who survive forget everything about the past?
Answer: No, nothing will remain in the minds of ordinary people, mother. Everyone will become a human of the Satya Yuga and will act accordingly. Only the most knowledgeable and the greatest devotees of the Lord will retain the memory. Ordinary humans will not remember anything.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: So, Pandit ji, will people forget all their relationships, like who their mother, father, brother, or sister is?
Answer: No, those who are in God's refuge along with their families will remain together. There will be no problem for them. The problem will be for those who get separated from their families.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: As a truck driver, I don't get much time, but I still try to do the Tri-Sandhya. I don't have a temple, just a photo, but I light an incense stick and do the prayers. Is this okay?
Answer: Do it with great joy, son. God's grace will surely be with you. You work so hard, what more can you do? Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Guruji, I started following Bhavishya Malika two months ago and began Tri-Sandhya today. I feel very active. I tried reading the Bhagavata Purana, but I don't know Sanskrit well. With a small child and household chores, I can't read it completely. What should I do in this situation?
Answer: Which language can you read well? If you can read Hindi or English, the Bhagavatam from Gorakhpur Press is available in Hindi, and it's also available in English. If you have the means, you can get it. Otherwise, if you wish to read it, speak to Mohan, and we will send you a copy. Okay?

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, in today's times, no matter how much you try to explain these things, people don't just disbelieve, they scorn it. They say, 'Even if we believe it, we don't want to accept it.' What is the reason for this?
Answer: Look, the gods try to explain to the demons repeatedly, but they don't understand, and in the end, they perish. As Kali Yuga is ending, those with a demonic nature will not understand, while the saintly will. I also face criticism for speaking the truth. It's okay. Those who are destined to believe will believe. The unfortunate ones will never believe. Perhaps it is not in their destiny. Okay?

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, this morning I saw that all the pictures of the deities in our home temple—Sherawali Mata, Lord Damodar, Radha Parthasarathi, a small Shivalinga, and Lord Narasimha—had fallen down. What could be the reason?
Answer: The reason is this, mother... do you and your husband perform the Trikal Sandhya? (Yes, three times a day). The deities are giving a sign that they are no longer confined to temples or homes but are now engaged in the work of re-establishing dharma. There is no calamity or problem in this. Place the pictures back, continue your worship, perform the Trikal Sandhya, and chant the name of Madhav. There is no issue.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Guruji, my question is, when Lord Kalki comes in Kali Yuga, how will we recognize him? How will even the supreme devotees recognize him?
Answer: Look, son, humans have the knowledge and power to recognize other humans. But to recognize the Lord, one needs devotion, surrender, merits from past lives (prarabdha), and divine knowledge. If you want to recognize Lord Kalki, perform the Trikal Sandhya, chant the name of Madhav, and with time and experience, you will surely come to understand him. Okay?

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, my daughter has suddenly fallen very ill in the last 10-15 days. She can't speak or walk properly. Doctors have run all the tests and say there is nothing wrong. Do you think an enemy could have done some black magic?
Answer: Okay, do one thing, mother. Recite the Bhagavatam at home and have her listen to the Trikal Sandhya. Worship Lord Krishna with the name Madhav, offer Tulsi (holy basil) to him, and then give that Tulsi to her. From what I can see, it seems some malevolent people have done something to her. Do this for her. Chant the name of Madhav. These things happen according to one's past life karma; otherwise, such magic wouldn't affect everyone. Still, if you have devotion, God's grace will be there. Okay?

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Guruji, for the last two or three nights, I have been hearing the sound of a very strange and different kind of bird. It's not a normal bird sound.
Answer: It is not just you; this sound will be heard everywhere across the world. It is a sign of the times (Kaal). This different sound is proof from Kaal that the time of destruction is approaching. The reason you are hearing it is that it is a sign for humanity that some evil is coming.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, Namaste. I wanted to ask, why is the current war (in Israel) happening?
Answer: The war that is going on... this is happening for the unification of all the Muslim countries.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Do you have any idea when Lord Kalki will incarnate?
Answer: Lord Kalki is not so simple that I can just give you an address. He is not a local leader. To know him, you must have devotion. Perform the Trikal Sandhya, chant the name of Madhav, and with time, the devotees who remain in this stream will meet the Lord.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: My question is, what will Lord Kalki's personality be like? Lord Ram is considered very calm, while Lord Krishna is seen as mischievous and diplomatic. What will Kalki's nature be?
Answer: Lord Krishna was the most compassionate. He made Sudama a king and saved the Pandavas. He was not diplomatic; he did what was necessary for the times. Lord Kalki will come in the form of an ordinary human, and by his will, he can create or destroy anything. In the final days, he will assume his divine form, riding a horse to cleanse the world.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Many people say that our Prime Minister, Narendra Modi, is the Kalki avatar.
Answer: If he were the Kalki avatar, why doesn't the whole world bow at his feet? If he were the Kalki avatar, he could turn an atom bomb to dust in his hand. He could move the Earth across universes or stop the sun and moon. If he were the Kalki avatar, he wouldn't need to contest elections. Do not say such things, son.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I wanted to ask, Lord Ganesha was supposed to have an incarnation in Kali Yuga named Dhumraketu. Will that happen?
Answer: Yes, definitely. Ganesha and all the other deities have already taken incarnation. They have all come in human bodies. All the deities have incarnated, and their powers have been absorbed by Lord Kalki. Now, Kalki possesses the powers of all the deities.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I want to know, will the Ram temple being built in Ayodhya face any trouble in the future, during the time of destruction and deluge?
Answer: There will be no trouble. Its construction is a sign of the coming Satya Yuga (Age of Truth). This temple will become the greatest symbol for the salvation of devotees. Our prayer to God is that He protects it during the deluge.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Baba, I am very afraid of the dark. We have heard about the seven nights of darkness, and it scares me. How can we overcome this fear? I am also somewhat afraid of Mother Kali.
Answer: Look, mother, there will be darkness for seven days and seven nights. The Lord will give his devotees a special collyrium (anjan) to apply to their eyes, which will make them unable to see the darkness. So, do not worry about it. Chant the Lord's name, do kirtan, and remain in devotion. With time, the Lord will take care of it. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Guruji, I am starting the Sandhya from the 16th. I have a job, so while I can do the morning prayer properly with a lamp, I cannot do the afternoon and evening ones in the same way, and I might not be properly purified. I get home at 7 PM, so can I do the evening one at 8 PM?
Answer: No, son, do this: wherever you are outside, mentally purify your body by chanting the name of Mother Ganga, 'Shri Gange,' three times. Then, you can sit and do the prayer anywhere. There is no need to light a lamp or incense. You will receive the Lord's grace and the full sanctity of the Trikal Sandhya. Okay?

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: They say that when a wife performs worship, her husband also receives the benefits. In the case of Trikal Sandhya, does everyone need to do it individually, or can I do it on behalf of my husband since he is busy?
Answer: Yes, mother, it is true that spouses share the fruits of good deeds. However, this is a path of individual devotion. While your practice of Trikal Sandhya will certainly increase your husband's lifespan, he will not receive the full spiritual benefit of it himself. And regarding him being busy, a time is coming when everyone will be sitting at home with nothing to do. So why not adopt this practice now? Keep trying.

Video Title: L109 - ''कलि आगत भविष्यांत'' में कल्कि जी के जन्म स्थान का वर्णन | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, the Bhagavad Gita mentions Karma Yoga. If we commit sins and then later come to the path of devotion, when this body dies and we get a new one, does our spiritual journey continue from where we left off?
Answer: I understand. Look, the 'prarabdha' (results of past actions) from previous lives carries forward. A person's current status—be it wealth, happiness, or success—is due to their prarabdha. The actions of this life prepare the ground for the next life, though about 30% of the results are experienced in this life itself. For devotees, however, God helps them clear their karmic account in this very life, so they don't carry a balance. For ordinary people, their karma determines their next birth. So, prarabdha is most important.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I have two questions. First, I don't eat non-vegetarian food, but sometimes we visit relatives where it is cooked. Can we eat the food at their house, especially since I practice Tri Sandhya?
Answer: Look, mother, food is sacred. If it's not mixed with any other elements and is prepared separately, you can eat it. There is no problem. What does it have to do with us if non-vegetarian food is cooked in their house? If they serve you pure vegetarian food, what's the problem? It's fine.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: My second question is, I don't use any intoxicants, but my mother consumes tobacco. Will this affect my Tri Sandhya practice?
Answer: No problem, mother, listen. We shouldn't interfere with the habits of our elders and seniors. You do your work. If your parents change over time, consider it God's grace. There's no issue at all. You can continue your Tri Sandhya. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Our tenants are Muslims, and they eat non-vegetarian food. Does this mean our house will remain impure, even though my daughter and I practice Tri Sandhya? Since they live upstairs in our building, I wonder if we should change tenants if I want to put up the Lord's flag.
Answer: No problem, mother. What does it have to do with you? They do it in their home, you do it in yours. You live on the first floor, and the tenants are above. You can put the flag near your first-floor window. There is no problem.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I had a dream where I was in a dark cave with a man I didn't know. He lit a fire, and suddenly a Durga Madhav idol appeared, and an aarti began. He told me, 'Look, this is how an aarti is performed.' What does this dream mean?
Answer: Mahapurush Satchidananda wrote, 'In the cave, hymns are being sung day and night... the Lord plays his games there.' On Khandagiri mountain, where the Lord's ashram is, there is a big cave. The Pancha Sakha wrote that hymns and kirtans are happening inside the cave, and Lord Kalki will play his secret games there. It is a great joy that you had this vision. Remain devoted to God, and you will receive the Lord's grace. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I needed to talk to you on the phone. Can we talk tomorrow? At what time should I call?
Answer: Yes, we can talk today as well. I can talk after this Google Meet. Call after 11 o'clock.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, who will be Lord Kalki's guru? Who will educate him?
Answer: Lord Kalki's guru will be Lord Parashuram. Lord Parashuram will bestow the 64 arts upon Lord Kalki. He will provide all the divine weapons, including the Shankha, Chakra, Gada, and Padma. Lord Kalki will ask, 'My Lord, what offering (Guru Dakshina) can I give you?' Parashuram ji will reply, 'I don't need any offering. Just destroy the demons who are destroying dharma in the world and establish an independent, truthful society. I will be happy with that. That will be my offering.' Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: As we are spreading the message of the Malika, many people ask us that since the final destruction is near, if we start practicing Tri Sandhya now, will we be saved? There is very little time left.
Answer: There is still time. That's why we do these Google Meets; otherwise, they wouldn't be necessary. There is time. The devotees who practice it will be saved. This is the greatest life-giving herb (Sanjeevani) for humanity. If people accept it, the world and human civilization will benefit. There is no problem. Do it with joy. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Prominent spiritual figures like those from Bageshwar Dham and Premanand Maharaj ji never say that Lord Madhav has arrived and the final destruction (Pralay) has begun. Why don't they say it?
Answer: Satchidananda says with firmness and warning to mankind, 'Even the greatest yogis and sages cannot fully comprehend the Lord. If they cannot, who in this world will know?' How will people, born as ordinary humans in the midst of the world, recognize Lord Kalki? What happened in the past and what will happen in the future is not known to everyone. Only those who were devotees of Lord Krishna in Dvapara Yuga, Lord Rama in Treta Yuga, and Mahavishnu in Satya Yuga will come. Besides these devotees, no one else will. Understanding even a hint, like a grain of sand, about Lord Kalki will be difficult. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I haven't completed 100 days of Trikal Sandhya yet; it's only been two weeks. Can I continue it?
Answer: Yes, Baba. Keep doing Trikal Sandhya.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Guruji, what is the age limit for people who can do this?
Answer: There is no age restriction. From children to bedridden people, anyone can do it. It is an open nectar for everyone. Whoever drinks it will find joy. For those who don't, time will tell what happens.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I am a student and have just learned about this. I can do Tri Sandhya in the morning and evening, but doing it in the afternoon will be difficult for me. Is there a solution?
Answer: Look, mother, during the afternoon, it will only take three minutes. You don't have to do the full Tri Sandhya. Just chant 'Durga Madhav' 12 times, the 16 names... it will take a minute at most. And the ten avatars of the Lord: Matsya, Kurma, Varaha, Narasimha, Vamana, Parashuram, Ram, Balaram, Shri Buddha, and Shri Kalki. Just do this much and chant the Madhav name 108 times. You can do it anywhere in two or three minutes.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, as mentioned in the Malika, will all schools and colleges shut down from 2024?
Answer: I never said anything like that would happen in 2024. Partial destruction (Khanda Pralay) is happening and will continue. A great calamity is coming for the world after 2025. It could also happen in 2025 because of planetary alignments, which will cause many destructive events on Earth. This destruction will continue until 2032-33. The Lord will save the devotees on one hand and destroy the demons on the other. So, there is no need to be scared. Do your duty, hold on to dharma, and practice Trikal Sandhya with joy. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: We live in Delhi NCR and are very afraid that a big earthquake is coming. We saw in the news that it might come around the 28th, and we feel it will come at the end of this October. Is this true?
Answer: Look, mother, such a big earthquake is not going to happen right now. But earthquakes will definitely happen. There is still time for a major earthquake. After at least 2026-27, there will be a big earthquake in the world. The earthquakes happening now will be around 6.0-7.5 magnitude. Most importantly, those who chant the Madhav name during Trikal Sandhya, Lord Madhav will protect them. So why fear? We are in Madhav's refuge.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I am scared for my family because only I practice Tri Sandhya. My parents and brother do puja, but not this.
Answer: It's okay. After one or two major events, they will also change with time.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I had a dream where I saw people in dirty clothes struggling in mud, while I was running and chanting 'Jai Shri,' easily climbing steep slopes. I also saw an idol of Mother Kali with money and a dagger in front of it, and people had stopped there out of greed. What does this mean?
Answer: Look, Mother Kali will carry out the act of destruction. And you saw the effect of the Madhav name. Mother Kali will also save the devotees; there is no problem. All the wealth will go under the Divine Mother's control. Even now, she is engaged in destruction, and devotees are saved by the name of Madhav. You were chanting Madhav's name in your dream, which means you have Madhav's grace. Remain in devotion, and you will receive more of the Lord's grace.

Video Title: L110 - यशवंत दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के  जन्म नाभि मंडल, जाजनग्र में होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: The Malika says that in the end, only 33 crore people who follow the Tri Sandhya path will be left in India. Will these 33 crore people become the 33 crore gods and goddesses and be the seeds of Satya Yuga?
Answer: Look, all the gods and goddesses have taken birth in human bodies as ordinary humans. Those same humans will purify their bodies through Tri Sandhya, and then divinity will enter them through the Lord's Yogamaya power. Then, those people will become immortal and ageless and become the inhabitants of Satya Yuga. This is written in the Malika. The 33 crore gods and goddesses are born on Earth in human form. Those who are connecting with us are probably those same souls. The divinity has not yet manifested. The purification of the body will happen through Trikal Sandhya and reading the Bhagavat. By Lord Kalki's grace, they will become divine.

Question: I want to ask, for people who have committed an act like suicide in the family, do they also attain liberation through Trikal Sandhya?
Answer: Listen, mother, a person doesn't end up in a lower existence, like a ghost or spirit, from the actions of a single day. This state is attained through the karma of many years. However, performing Trikal Sandhya for even one day will have some positive effect on them. If they were suffering, listening to it will increase their dharma. After listening for a long time, they will attain liberation.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: Listen, mother, the greater the devotee, the more suffering they face. A smaller devotee does not face much suffering. God tests until the very end, just as he tested Mother Draupadi. Therefore, do not grieve. Remain in the refuge of Madhav. One day, the sun will surely rise.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: Once he joins, no tantra in the world, not even the most powerful, will be able to do anything to him.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: And Gurudev, about my elder brother who has not attained liberation... I tried everything. His Shraddha (last rites) was performed in Gaya, and I even observed Ekadashi for him. He is still present in the family, at my sister's house, and is always crying. What should I do?
Answer: You are right, he has not attained liberation. The rituals were not performed correctly. I understand you are in America and cannot come here to perform the Pind Daan (ancestral offerings). Let me think about what can be done for his soul to find peace. Give me some time. For now, if you read the Srimad Bhagavatam for seven days and pray, 'O Lord, please liberate my brother from the state he is in,' it will help. We cannot ask for Vaikuntha (the highest heaven) for someone, but we can pray for them to be released from their current condition. Also, every day, feed a cow or any small creature, whatever fruits you have. You don't need a formal resolution; just do it from wherever you are, and it will work. If we ask for the Lord's grace, it happens.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: In your Gurdaspur session, you mentioned performing a Havan (fire ritual) during our daily worship at home. Could you please explain the procedure for it?
Answer: This is the Pancha Mahayagya, performed to satisfy the five elements (Panchabhoota), the ten directional deities (Dash Dikpala), Lord Mahavishnu, and the village deity. You won't be able to perform the Havan with all the strict rules, so just do this simply: using pure desi ghee from a cow and small pieces of wood, perform the Havan for about 10-15 minutes. Make offerings first to Lord Mahavishnu, then Lord Shankar, then Lord Brahma, then Mother Parvati, Mother Mahalakshmi, and after that, the village deity and the five elements. Offer as many oblations as you can. The Lord will be pleased. It is difficult to follow all the Vedic procedures, and it's not necessary in this Kali Yuga. Doing this much will yield results.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: What kind of wood should be used?
Answer: You can use teak wood or sheesham wood. There is another one... I don't know its name in Hindi... the Sal tree, which are very large, thick trees. Anyway, you can use any wood except for Neem and Bel. I will find out the Hindi name of that other tree and let you know.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: A 'shanti' (pacification ritual) has been prescribed for my daughter. They say her birth occurred in the 'third padam,' which is considered a 'dosha' (flaw) for the parents. Is this true?
Answer: Listen to me, my son. A daughter, a cow, and land are obtained only through good fortune. When I was born, an astrologer told my parents that I would be the cause of my mother's death and she would die at a young age. But my mother lived well until she was 77 and attained a noble end. There is no such thing as this 'dosha'. Does your wife, the child's mother, read the Bhagavatam and perform Trikal Sandhya? Tell her to read the Srimad Bhagavatam and perform Trikal Sandhya. There will be no problem. Live joyfully.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Guruji, I feel very scared. Wherever I go, I feel like someone is with me, watching me. I can't stay alone. And when I watch reels on my phone, more reels about ghosts and spirits appear than those about God.
Answer: Listen, a young man you knew, perhaps a friend or an acquaintance from your village, who had an untimely death, is the one causing this trouble. You have been doing Trikal Sandhya for 15 days, right? He will leave; he won't come anymore. Continue doing Trikal Sandhya, read the Srimad Bhagavatam, and chant the name of Madhav 108 times before you sleep. The presence that follows you like a shadow will go away. You feel like someone walks with you, comes with you, sits with you, right? This happens to many people, but now that you have come to the Lord's refuge, it will leave.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: Yes, if there is a ghostly presence in the house, it affects the children as well. So, give him the name of Madhav too. You have been doing Trikal Sandhya for 15 days now. Before sleeping, chant the name of Madhav and speak directly to the Lord, 'Prabhu, please remove him from me.'

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: Yes, the Bhagavata Katha... no, the Gopi Geet, for both your maternal and in-laws' side? Yes, of course, you can do it. There is no problem at all. It is a very joyful thing to do.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I've been doing Trikal Sandhya for about a month and a quarter. I didn't feel this way before, but now I feel a kind of fear from my own shadow. If I see the shadow of my hand or foot, I get startled for a moment, then I realize it's just my shadow. This never used to happen before.
Answer: Do you perform Trikal Sandhya regularly? You must also do the noon Sandhya. Listening to the audio is not enough. Do you read the Bhagavatam? You read the Bhagavad Gita? Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I had a dream in July about a great deluge (pralaya) with very high river waves and a light so bright that my eyes couldn't look at it. I've had such dreams many times. Please guide me on what this means.
Answer: Listen, mother, if the Lord comes in a dream and reveals himself, you should understand that by God's grace, He is giving you a vision of Himself in the form of a child. And the deluge you saw signifies that massive floods are going to happen in the future. God shows such visions in dreams to those who perform Trikal Sandhya. He gives them visions. It is a joy that He is giving you His vision and showing you what is to come. This is very good; it happens to those who perform Trikal Sandhya.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: Listen, mother, another name for the Bhagavatam is 'Shruti,' meaning it originated from the Vedas. You won't be able to retain everything from the Srimad Bhagavatam in a single day. Whether you remember it or not, whether you understand it or not, you will still receive the full benefit. Just keep reading.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: These are gods and goddesses. They come in different forms to see the devotees who are in the Lord's refuge. At first, you might have wondered why this is happening daily, but now it doesn't seem normal. They change their forms and come. This happens, mother, because in the current times, all deities are hiding their true forms and roaming the earth. They observe the devotees and visit their homes. This will continue, and in the future, you will see them in their manifest forms, and you will know that a goddess has come to your home.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: How did your husband's grandfather (his father's father) pass away? Was it from an illness at an old age? His soul has not attained liberation; that is what is being seen. The spirit of your husband's grandfather has not been liberated. To resolve this, conduct a seven-day reading of the Srimad Bhagavatam at home. Complete the entire reading and make him listen to it. He will depart and attain liberation. The issue is with his father's father. Perform the Bhagavata Katha in his name. Do it for seven days, and also pray for all your ancestors up to seven generations. Complete the entire Bhagavatam with all family members sitting together.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

He was cursed and will attain liberation in the Kali Yuga. It is true that his time is coming. When the time comes, he will awaken and perform his duties.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: My child has asked me to ask you: Just as the Lord has a horse, will he also have a parrot with him?
Answer: When the Lord comes, many birds and animals will be with him and will enjoy his company. In Satya Yuga, all creatures will be able to speak, so it will be an independent environment. It is not necessary that the Lord will keep any specific creature. Lord Kalki can do anything he wishes, even from his home, without needing a horse. The horse will become his vehicle in the end when he assumes the Kalki avatar to establish dharma. But who will be with the Lord is not fixed, because when the Yuga changes, all creatures, including tigers and lions, will be able to speak. It is up to the Lord whom he keeps with him.

Video Title: L111 - मालिका में एवं तत्त्वबोधिनी में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I was asking about the eclipse that is happening tomorrow. Will it have an effect in Bihar or anywhere else in India?
Answer: I am actually in Punjab for a discourse, but yes, the eclipse will likely have an effect in Bihar. During the time of the eclipse, try not to go outside. Also, do not eat during the eclipse itself. You should eat food that was prepared three hours before the eclipse begins.

Video Title: L112 - बलराम दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: A few years ago, my elder brother and his wife passed away. We have been facing constant problems in the house ever since. What should we do?
Answer: Did you perform their last rites (shraddha) properly? It seems there might be a 'Pushkar dosha' (an astrological affliction related to death). When this is not addressed properly, one death follows another in the family. The rites should have been performed by a good Brahmin; it seems there were some mistakes. To remedy this, you should perform the 'Pushkar' ceremony. This can bring peace to your home and salvation to them. If you haven't done it yet, chant the name of Madhav, perform Trikal Sandhya, and read the Srimad Bhagavatam. When you get a chance to come to Odisha, perform Pind Daan (ancestral offerings) for them in the Biraja Kshetra. That will grant them salvation. Also, you can write the Shri Narayan Kavach from the 8th chapter of the 6th canto on a leaf, wrap it in a yellow cloth, and that might bring some control over the situation. But do what I suggested first; that will be more beneficial.

Video Title: L112 - बलराम दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: Read the complete Bhagavatam in seven days. Feed a cow or other animals daily. Read the entire Bhagavatam with devotion over seven days. During this period, you must sleep on the ground on a simple mat, not on a bed. Both you and your husband should do this. Complete the entire Bhagavatam reading in seven days for him. First, establish a Kalash (holy pot) and worship it. You don't need to call anyone; you can do it yourselves. Chant the name of Madhav and say, 'O Madhav, we are reading the Bhagavatam for him. Please grant him liberation.'

Video Title: L112 - बलराम दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: Daughter, you must change your habit of sleeping at 12 or 12:30 AM. Try to sleep by 10 or 11 PM. Sleeping so late is not good for your body. Make an effort for this. The more you exert yourself, the more rest your body needs. It will be fine, you will be able to wake up joyfully.

Video Title: L112 - बलराम दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, we're hearing that today in the Jagannath Puri temple, there was a dispute among the Brahmins, and as a result, drops of blood fell on the Ratna Singhasan (bejeweled throne). Is this mentioned in the Bhavishya Malika?
Answer: Yes, 'Rakta chita padi baje Ratna Singhasan' (Drops of blood will fall on the bejeweled throne). This has happened before, and it has happened again. Whenever blood falls near the Ratna Singhasan of Lord Jagannath, the master of countless universes, or anywhere inside the main temple, it signifies that rivers of blood will flow in the world due to war. This is a disastrous sign for the world. The words of the Malika have been proven true once again. It happened once before, and now it has happened again.

Video Title: L112 - बलराम दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I recently heard a discourse by Premanand Ji where he explained the benefits of celibacy, which is absolutely correct. Today's generation watches inappropriate films and engages in masturbation, losing their vital fluid. Their conduct is worse than that of animals. How can they overcome these habits and become devoted and attracted to God? Since our ultimate goal is salvation, how can they progress on the spiritual path?
Answer: Son, the forms of Kali (the demon of this age) are desire, lust, alcohol, and eating meat and fish. Those who engage in such acts are called 'Mleccha' (barbarians). What Premanand Ji said is wonderful; I also saw that episode and enjoyed it very much. This is essential for our youth. To maintain celibacy, one needs God's grace, along with practices like yoga, pranayama, and Trikal Sandhya. Not waking up during Brahma Muhurta (the pre-dawn hour) often leads to problems with celibacy. Therefore, by waking up during Brahma Muhurta and performing Trikal Sandhya, the youth who develop this habit can joyfully overcome these evils. But this is the Kali Yuga, and people reflect its nature. Still, many people are good, and with time, as the Lord's work progresses, they will become better. Those who engage in such acts are called Mlecchas.

Video Title: L112 - बलराम दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: Look, daughter, a time will come when the ocean water will bring a tsunami, and on the other hand, the dams will be full from the rain. Video Title: L112 - बलराम दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L112 - बलराम दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L112 - बलराम दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L112 - बलराम दास मालिका में कल्कि जी के जन्मस्थान का प्रमाण | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

We have to listen to the people who brought us into this home, we have to obey them, listen to them, and balance them. And when the new daughter-in-law comes, you will have to balance her as well. Because, son, there is no peace in the world these days. And secondly, there is conflict in every house. Big conflicts happen. Whatever abuses are hurled, it happens in every house. Question: Today, while I was just sitting, a thought came to my mind, or rather, it felt like God put this thought in my mind. In the Satya Yuga, Lord Shri Ram killed Bali by hiding. In the Dvapara Yuga, when Shri Krishna was sleeping on a riverbank, a hunter shot an arrow into the sole of his foot. These two stories are interconnected, right? So, a question arose in my mind: when God himself cannot escape his own karma—meaning he did not break the law of nature—he is God, he could have done anything. He didn't break the rule because he himself said, 'Karmanye Vadhikaraste Ma Phaleshu Kadachana'. He did not separate himself from that principle. So, Pandit ji, in this era, how can a human being expect to escape from things that are destined to happen?
Answer: Look, son, regarding Lord Rama killing Bali in secret... the arrow passed through seven palm trees and then struck Bali. Before Bali's death, the Lord asked him, 'If you wish, I can give you your life back.' But Bali refused, saying, 'I don't need it, Lord. I am seeing you before me. There can be no better time to die than this.' So he attained liberation. However, his son, Angad, was given a blessing by the Lord: 'Just as I have done this to your father, when I am born as Krishna in the Dvapara Yuga, you will be born as the hunter Jara Savara. The karmic consequence of my action towards your father will be fulfilled through you, because I am not beyond karma.' But the point is, Lord Ramachandra or Lord Krishna show the world that one must perform karma, and that they too are subject to it. But in this age, God gives humans many chances and also forgives a lot. Vibhishana had done many demonic deeds before meeting Lord Rama. But when the Lord took Vibhishana under his refuge, he made him a king and granted him immortality. And at the end of Kali Yuga, Vibhishana will come to meet Lord Kalki, and Lord Kalki will send him directly to Vaikuntha. So, if devotees make any mistakes, the Lord forgives them. The Lord is an ocean of mercy and forgiveness. Don't worry about it. If something has happened through us, our Trikal Sandhya and chanting God's name will resolve that too. He will surely deliver His devotees. The Lord says, 'Even if someone comes to me after killing a million Brahmins, I will not forsake them if they take my refuge.' He has the authority to forgive. So, one must take refuge.

The name 'Bhagavata' is formed by combining both their names. But it is true that it is not written about Mother Radharani. It is about the Lord's lineage and his divine plays (leela). Her eternal divine pastimes with the Lord are not described in it. For that, there is a separate scripture called 'Gita Govinda'. The main protagonist of Srimad Bhagavatam is Mother Radharani, which is why it is named 'Srimad Bhagavatam' after her. So, this is the essence of Mother Radharani. Her name is there at the beginning, but not inside. And what you are saying about Sukadeva going into samadhi... look, only those who have the purity and devotion of the Mother can know her. This is a matter of devotion. We cannot describe or prove it through scriptures, but it is not written. The first name is 'Srimad Bhagavatam', and Mother Radharani is in it. Okay?

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: What is the difference between 'Jiva' (a living being) and 'Atma' (the soul)?
Answer: The 'Jiva' refers to a living entity—from humans to tiny ants. A being is considered a 'Jiva' as long as the 'Atma' or soul resides within it, making it active. When the soul leaves the body, the 'Jiva' becomes inert, meaning it dies. The soul is the divine element that resides in the body, giving it life. When the soul departs, the 'Jiva' becomes lifeless.

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: It's alright that your father isn't doing it yet. Do you pay your respects (pranam) to him in the morning? It is wonderful that you love him so much. Pray to Madhav and ask Him to bring your father into His refuge. Madhav will make it happen.

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: The case against your mother is false, especially since the medical report states the cause of death was a heart attack. Do not worry. Since you have taken refuge in Madhav, the case will be dismissed. Tell your mother not to worry either. You will be victorious in this case; there is no problem.

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Lord Kalki will give the command for these weapons to be given to them. The weapons are not in just one place; some are in Odisha, some in Punjab, and some in Rajasthan.

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

People who want to be saved must hold onto dharma, do good deeds, and take refuge in Lord Kalki. If they don't, they will see time getting progressively worse.

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

As for the photo, you can keep a picture of Lord Krishna, Lord Ram, or Lord Jagannath. All are one. Worshipping any of them will lead to God-realization. The most important thing is to perform the Trikal Sandhya and chant Madhav's name.

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

I wish well for everyone and pray they become good people. What happens to them is up to God. My duty is to continue this work until my death. Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: Leave everything to God. Maintain a distance from those who dislike you and surrender the situation to Madhav. He will take care of it. In this age of Kali Yuga, people cannot bear to see others happy. Control your anger, continue your prayers, and trust that Madhav will ensure dharma prevails.

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

A person destined to change can do so in a single minute. Everything is predetermined. Everyone's history is with God, and events unfold according to His plan.

Video Title: L114 - एकाम्र वन खंडगिरि में कल्कि लीला का प्रकाश होगा | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

What is the meaning of this dream? The snakes were black.
Answer: Look, mother, do you perform the Trikal Sandhya (three-times-a-day prayer)? That's why God is showing you these things. 'Kaal' (the personification of time and death) is now coming to the earth. Kaal has entered every house. At this time, only those who follow dharma can see it. Since you perform the Trikal Sandhya, you were able to see it and you are removing it, so it won't harm you. If it had harmed you in the dream, it would have meant something different for you. But it does nothing; it just comes and goes. The reason is that Kaal has entered the entire world, affecting all of human civilization. And this Kaal is going to bring great disaster to people. There is no problem for you. It's fine. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: Look, the Goddess Mother is going to every house, and devotees are getting her darshan (divine vision). The reason for this is that the Goddess Mother is engaged in the act of destruction. Such a time is coming, and devotees are getting a glimpse of it, a preview of what is to happen. You are getting the darshan of the Goddess Mother because she is engaged in her work on earth. There is no sorrow in this; it is a joy. Bow to the Goddess Mother and perform the Trikal Sandhya as I have told you. Such bad times are coming, which is why devotees are getting her darshan. Jai Jagannath.

Jai Jagannath. If there was something specific, I would have told you to do this or that. But since there is nothing like that, what can I say? Okay.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Then I heard a voice call 'Vasudev,' and my son Vasudev came and said the Goddess Mother was calling. We went to another temple where I saw the Goddess, about six feet tall and radiating bright light. She had no weapons and wore a long lotus garland. She came out of the sanctum and stood before me. Answer: Look, first, the vision of the Lord in the form of a fish with a turban signifies that the Lord is now causing a 'jal pralay' (great flood). A great flood and water-related destruction are going to happen all over the world. This is the sign, because in the Matsya avatar (fish incarnation), the Lord brings about the dissolution of the universe. This time it won't be a universal dissolution, but a deluge will happen. Second, the vision of the Goddess Mother, where she looked at you and then left, means that she is visiting the homes of all devotees. This happens; the Goddess Mother goes to the homes of devotees and tests them to see if they chant the name of Madhav. This all happens as proof and will only happen to devotees. The devotees connected with us are working for the Satya Yuga (Golden Age), and the Lord and Goddess Mother give them this assurance that they are on the right path. And the time of destruction is coming. Jai Jagannath.

Answer: Okay, mother. You will definitely have a vision of the Lord. Just wait for some time, you will have a vision in the future.

Answer: You will, mother, you definitely will. It will happen with time. Wait. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I've seen a couple of channels on the internet saying that this Bhavishya Malika has no truth to it.
