What is the reality behind these claims?
Answer: In every era, demons have worked against divine tasks and Sanatana Dharma. The Bhavishya Malika is the word of God. I request you to ask your own conscience: am I speaking the truth or a lie? Millions are dying, floods are happening, diseases are spreading, and signs are appearing from Jagannath Kshetra. Are these signs not calamitous? If not, what is the meaning of Sanatana? It doesn't matter what they say. The Malika states that Pandit Kashinath Mishra will propagate dharma, and that is what I am doing. This is my path to liberation. Such people will keep talking; otherwise, how will the battle between dharma and adharma happen? We have the responsibility to protect human civilization. Those who speak ill are themselves evil. Our work is to propagate dharma. They haven't even read the Malika in its original Odia language, so how would they know? We were the first to propagate this to the world. If your conscience says they are right, you are free to leave this path. If you feel our path is right, then stay. The choice is yours. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pranam, Pandit ji. I want to share my experience. During your assembly in Gurdaspur, I was listening to the sermon when I felt the Lord's presence and smelled sandalwood. A few minutes later, there was a short circuit at my home. I felt a major incident was about to happen, like the whole house would catch fire. But only two things burned, and the rest of the house was safe. I feel that the Lord saved us. This is my belief.
Answer: It is a great joy, mother. See, a true devotee will surely be given a sign by God. In this world, many people will run after falsehoods instead of the truth. This is Kali Yuga. But God gives such experiences to his true devotees. I am very happy to hear your experience. It is a great joy. May God help you attain Him through your faith and devotion, and may God's grace remain upon your family. This is my prayer to God. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Maharaj ji, I had a question. Last night I had a dream. I don't remember it fully, but I read the Shrimad Bhagavat Purana and follow the Sandhya Dhara. I often meditate on the 'Shrivatsa' mark on Lord Vishnu's chest. In the dream, I vaguely remember seeing the Shrivatsa mark on the idol of the Lord. What is the significance of this?
Answer: This means that Lord Vishnu bears the Shrivatsa mark, and seeing it is equivalent to seeing the Lord himself. By God's grace, you had this vision. It is a great joy. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, since you can see everything, can you see how much Madhav ji loves me? Is his grace upon me? And if I have any shortcomings that I can correct, please tell me so that I can attain him sooner.
Answer: Okay, mother. Increase your devotion even more. Madhav ji's grace is upon you, and it will remain. You have devotion, faith, and surrender. Everything is fine. Whatever you are doing, you are doing it right. There are no such mistakes that I need to point out. Joyfully sing praises to the Lord, perform the Trikal Sandhya, and everything will be alright. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, all these diseases that are coming, will they also spread to all of us devotees?
Answer: Look, mother, if a flood comes, it doesn't distinguish between the rich and the poor. Devotees are great because of their dharma, and their place is high. Still, diseases will come to the body, stay for some time, and then go away. For the sinners, however, it will come and destroy them. Okay, mother. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I had a son a month ago, but he is very susceptible to the evil eye ('nazar') and remains very troubled. Can you tell me why this is happening? I recite the Madhav name in his ear, but he cries a lot and is very distressed.
Answer: Where you make the baby sleep, is there a window nearby? Keep that window closed and put up a screen. He is being affected by an external gaze. For that, place a flower offered to God or a Tulsi leaf near him. And put a black 'tika' (dot) on his forehead. Nothing will happen. If it happens again, then tell me, and I will advise you further. Okay.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, my second question is: In the Durga Madhav Stuti, is Goddess Durga referred to as Madhav's wife? If so, how should we understand this? Many devotees of Shiva might get upset.
Answer: Look, Mother Durga is Mother Radha Rani. She is 'Prakriti Swarupini' (the form of cosmic energy). That is, Prakriti, Yogamaya, is the Lord's cosmic energy. That Yogamaya Shakti is Radha Rani, and Madhav is Krishna. It is written for their divine play (lila). Mother Durga herself was Mother Radha Rani, the authority of Yogamaya Shakti. Because from God, one is the form of nature (Prakriti) and the other is the Supreme Being (Param Brahma). Together, they become Mahavishnu. And the one who is the form of nature is Mother Radha Rani, who is also Mother Durga. Okay. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I have a personal question. It's been six months since I joined the Dhara, but no one else in my family has. We have a lot of arguments, mainly because my brother-in-law doesn't work. My husband wants to help him set up a McDonald's franchise and wants my support. I am hesitant because I know they serve meat and fish. Should we take this step just to help him, or should we stand firm on our principles and be against it?
Answer: Look, mother, does your husband follow this path? These are very bad times. In the coming era, businesses related to hotels and restaurants are not going to do well. If you invest a lot of money now, it might run for a few days, but disasters are coming—diseases, war, natural calamities—which will cause businesses to shut down for long periods. It would be better for him to open a variety store, a medicine store, or a grocery store. Such businesses will run until the very end and will not close down. In that, there will be both dharma and employment. Jai Shri Madhav.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: My name is Vinod, from Delhi. It's been a week since I joined the Tri Sandhya. I spoke to you a few months ago and have been following your instructions. I am in great trouble; everything is ruined, my business has shut down, and I have nothing. I don't know how to raise my children. Whatever work I try to do, I incur a loss.
Answer: Okay. Look, the time you are going through right now is not very good. So, you do one thing: perform the Trikal Sandhya and continuously chant the names of Madhav and the Durga Madhav Stuti. Then, by the grace of God, you will find some good work and earn a living. Don't be sad. Wait for it; it will surely happen with time. You should read the Shrimad Bhagavat Mahapurana. Do it. God will be merciful. Wait. Okay.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I am Gita from Delhi. Two days ago, I dreamt of two snakes in a pathetic condition. Someone said they were my ancestors (pitr) and told me to take them and serve them. I did, and they became well. But then an enemy came and attacked them. What does this dream mean?
Answer: Look, mother, there are some flaws related to your ancestral realm (pitr-lok), which is why you are seeing your ancestors suffering. Because of their past karma, they return to that same state. The attack signifies their karma's effect. For the salvation of your ancestors, complete a full reading of the Shrimad Bhagavat at home within seven days. Perform this ritual with the prayer for their liberation. Your family members should do it together yourselves, without calling a priest. Do it and take refuge in God. After that, tell me what happens. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I am Satish Kumar Mishra. I'm in some trouble. A friend wanted to buy a second-hand car from another friend. I just connected them. They transacted money, but the seller took the money and didn't give the car. Now the buyer is holding me responsible and asking me for the money. I'm stuck in the middle. How do I get out of this?
Answer: Look, take refuge in Madhav and pray to the Lord. Nowadays, do not become a middleman for anyone. Don't do work for others, because due to the influence of Kali Yuga, all humans have become selfish and deceitful. Interact less with friends and give more time to your family and devotion to God. The times are not good. Anyway, take refuge in Madhav. Pray that with the Lord's mercy and your devotion, things will be resolved. Jai Shri Madhav.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I want to ask about my father. His health has been poor for 10 years; his right side doesn't work properly, and he can't walk well. My mother and I are in the Dhara, but my father is a great devotee of Hanuman ji. There is no cure for his illness yet. What can be done?
Answer: Look, mother, the greatest element I have is the Trikal Sandhya. If someone performs the Trikal Sandhya and chants the name of Madhav, in my opinion, whatever the issue, there will definitely be some recovery. And if the trouble is due to some external element, like a tantric practice, it will be removed very easily. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I am from Nagpur. I dreamt that I went to a temple of Lord Shankar. A 22-year-old priest in orange clothes came out and gave me a neem fruit, saying, 'Take this, it will solve all your problems,' and he was very happy. What does this mean?
Answer: Look, the sacred wood ('daru') for Lord Jagannath's idol is made from the neem tree. This is a spiritual sign and God's grace upon you. Have you joined the Trikal Sandhya Dhara? The body of Lord Jagannath is made from the neem tree. This vision, coming from Lord Shankar's temple, is like a direct blessing for you to take refuge in Lord Vishnu. Okay, mother.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: For a long time, I have been trying to tell my husband about what you say about the Kalki Purana, but he has absolutely no faith. His export business is not doing well, so his entire focus is on work, and he doesn't want to listen to anything else. What should I do?
Answer: Yes, mother. Right now, you see, there are problems in the Middle East, with the US, and in our business with Canada. The times are such. Still, if you want the financial condition of your house to improve, talk to Mohan. Tell him Pandit ji said to send the Mahalakshmi sutra. You and your husband should read it. With that, the financial situation of your house will change. Okay. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, you say that one should not read the Shrimad Bhagavat in bed. We live in small houses in Delhi, and a doctor has advised me against sitting on the floor for long due to leg pain. So I read daily with some back support, with my legs straight. Is there any problem with that? Can I continue reading this way?
Answer: Faith is the biggest power, mother. If you read, there is no inconvenience, no problem. You can read.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: One more thing, I used to have a lot of dreams when I first joined, and I used to remember them. Now, even if I try, I can't remember my dreams. I want to share them, but I can't recall them. Is there something wrong or anything to be scared of?
Answer: No problem, mother. Many dreams come. The dream that is necessary for you, God will make you remember it. The ones that are not necessary and have no meaning, it's okay if you don't remember them. The ones that are important, God will surely make you remember. No problem. Okay.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I wanted to ask, the Dashavatara Stotram, the Durga Madhav Stuti, and the 16 names of Lord Vishnu that are in the Tri Sandhya Dhara—in which text are these written? Are they in the Bhavishya Malika or some other scripture? I'm asking because I've heard the Durga Madhav Stuti for the first time.
Answer: Look, the essence of Trikal Sandhya is an element from all the scriptures, including the Shrimad Bhagavat Purana. It is a practice that the Devas, Yakshas, and Gandharvas perform daily in their respective realms. Trikal Sandhya is performed everywhere, from heaven to Vaikuntha. For salvation from the age of Kali, this is a sacred element. Those who follow this path will find it easy to go to the Satya Yuga. That is why we propagate this element. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Father, I am from Chandigarh. We attended your assembly in Gurdaspur. On our way back by bus, during heavy rain, our bus had a very bad accident and almost overturned. It was a terrible trauma, and I'm still shaken. I don't understand if we made some mistake, or if Madhav ji saved us. Please guide me.
Answer: First, tell me, are you all okay? Did anyone get hurt? (She says not even a scratch). Look, mother, God saved you all from that accident. Because you were on that bus, people were saved. If even one righteous person is on the boat of dharma, others are saved. Even today, our musicians' bus had a tire burst, yet nothing happened. They told me, 'See, Madhav is saving us.' Mother, wherever you are in trouble, the Lord will save you. Because you had come to the Lord's sermon, what could happen to you? God is with you. There is no fear. Go with joy, chant the name of Madhav, nothing will happen to you. You were saved from a great calamity. Okay.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, yesterday I dreamt that my wife and I were searching for food during a time of scarcity. We found a vehicle with potatoes and tomatoes, took some, and went to a field to plant them. We found a place that was half water and half dry and started planting them there before I woke up around 4:30 AM. What does this mean?
Answer: Look, my boy, in the coming times, there will be a shortage of food—potatoes, tomatoes, grains, wheat. People will face trouble because of this. This dream confirms it. It is also written in the Bhavishya Malika that people will not get food to eat in the future. Devotees who chant the Lord's name get such visions and information before these times come. There is no negative element for you in this. Such a time is coming. Okay. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L115 - देवी मां और योगिनी गण का संहार | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, when I try to meditate, my mind keeps wandering. I am unable to concentrate.
Answer: Look, by repeatedly chanting the name of Madhav, the mind will become steady and stable. How long have you been practicing Trikal Sandhya? (He says 2.5-3 months). Okay, no problem. Whenever you have free time during the day, chant the name of Madhav in your mind and visualize Lord Krishna within. After doing this for about a month, your mind will become stable. The restlessness will go away. Okay. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, my question is, when the Mother tests her devotees, she will ask for the 'Brahma Ekaksh Mantra' (the single-syllable mantra of Brahma). Is this mantra 'Om', 'Kleem', 'Kreem', or which mantra will be asked of us?
Answer: Look, the 'Brahma Ekaksh' is of two types: one that is chanted aloud (Japa) and one that is not (Ajapa). According to the Oriya scriptures, the essence of Brahma is chanted internally. Externally, what I tell you is the name 'Madhav'. The name 'Madhav' itself is the syllable of Brahma. Chant it for salvation from the Kali Yuga.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I have a question. What will happen in the new year, 2024?
Answer: The new year will be joyful for devotees. Their religious feelings will grow, and more people will move towards dharma (righteousness). In 2024, more people will turn to dharma than in 2023, although some will also go astray. Simultaneously, the great cataclysm of the five elements will trouble humanity, especially floods, fire, and earthquakes. Animosity will increase worldwide. People and nations will move towards war, and several new war fronts will open. So, such a time is coming. While the times are getting worse, people are also turning towards dharma. On one hand, righteousness grows, and on the other, sin also increases. It will continue like this.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: On Durga Ashtami in Bikaner, between 9 and 10 AM, there was a terrifying sound. Many people are calling it the 'Bhairavi Daak' (Call of Bhairavi), which was also heard in Odisha. What was that sound? It seemed like lightning, but it probably wasn't.
Answer: Look, the 'Bhairavi Daak' has not happened yet. What you heard was all the gods and goddesses calling to each other, making their sounds for the establishment of righteousness (dharma). If the true Bhairavi call had occurred, people would have died. The great roar of Mother Bhairavi has not yet descended upon the Earth. Right now, the various Mother Goddesses in villages, cities, and countries are communicating with each other. When the time for Kaal Bhairavi's roar comes, people will die just from hearing it. Some will turn black, some will go deaf, some will die, some will go mad, and some will fall unconscious. This has not happened yet; it will happen in the future. The time is not yet here. Devotees will not hear it; only sinners will. The Mother's call will be heard by sinners, who will be tormented, while devotees will remain in bliss. It has not happened yet, but it will.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I want to know, on the path of devotion, what should one do to open their divine sight (divya drishti), other than practicing Trikal Sandhya?
Answer: You can only progress through Trikal Sandhya. You practice it yourself, so you must have experienced the element of purity it brings to your mind. In my view, there is no other practice that can take you from a human state to a divine one. That is the only way. Hold on to that practice. If you perform Trikal Sandhya three times a day, God's grace will be upon you.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Are all the people who read the Srimad Bhagavatam, chant holy names, practice Trikal Sandhya, and are part of the Sudharma Sangha considered true devotees?
Answer: No. Look, the distinction between a devotee and a non-devotee is ultimately up to God. However, I can say that many people practice Trikal Sandhya out of fear while simultaneously engaging in wrongful acts. If their evil deeds outweigh the purifying effect of Trikal Sandhya, how can they become devotees? So, not all of them are true devotees. Thousands of people are practicing, a very large number. The current guidance is for everyone to practice Trikal Sandhya for three years. After that period, it will become clear who the true devotees are.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I have another question, Guruji. You mentioned virtues like compassion, forgiveness, and peace ('shanti'). As college students, we have fun and joke around with friends. How are we supposed to practice this 'peace'?
Answer: Peace means that an atmosphere of tranquility should emanate from your words. It should be reflected in your language, actions, and conduct—at home, in society, and at your educational institution. A calm, gentle, and pure person is defined by their speech. Therefore, control your words. Speak only when necessary. Chant the names of Ram, Krishna, and the greatest name, Madhav. And practice Trikal Sandhya.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I joined the Madhav Prabhu family two months ago and have given up non-vegetarian food. However, my daughter still eats eggs, and I have to cook and handle them for my family. How can I properly practice Trikal Sandhya in this situation? Also, how can I convince my family to join this path, as they are unwilling to believe in it?
Answer: First, I thank you for holding onto your principles in such a challenging environment. People like you who pass God's tests are rare. A time will come... the people of Kolkata are devotees of Lord Jagannath and know the tradition of Chaitanya Mahaprabhu. If fish and eggs are not offered in the Jagannath temple, your family should also think, 'If the Lord doesn't eat it, why should we?' Even if they continue, with the great calamity that is approaching the Earth, they will eventually give it up. You have made a start. Continue your Trikal Sandhya. Do it in your room, on the rooftop, or in any secluded place you can find. It's alright. Every person will face the consequences of their own actions. Eating an egg is like killing an embryo (feticide). The sin is comparable to aborting a child in the womb. People will eventually understand. Don't be sad and don't pressure anyone. Next month, there is a discourse in Kherpur. If you and your family can attend, I believe some of them will surely have a change of heart.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Guruji, where are you located? I would like to meet you in person.
Answer: You are already seeing me now! Look, son, I will be in Ayodhya from March 2nd for a seven-day discourse on the Srimad Bhagavatam and Bhavishya Purana. You can come then, and we can meet and talk. There will also be events in Gujarat in December, and in Delhi and Rajasthan in January. In UP, there will be a discourse in Sri Vrindavan. The schedule is fixed until March. If it is convenient and you have the means, you are welcome to come. Otherwise, you can speak with our representatives to make arrangements.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: My health is poor, and I had to move back to my village. How will I be able to meet you?
Answer: It's alright. We will surely meet when the time is right. For now, practice Trikal Sandhya and spread its message to others. Tell everyone about it. People of any religion or faith can practice Trikal Sandhya.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: [When I try to spread the message of Trikal Sandhya,] people say it's all false. [What should I do?]
Answer: Yes, that is true. Not everyone is righteous, nor is it in everyone's destiny to accept this path. Not everyone is a saint. The people who call it false are, in a way, correct from their perspective. 70% of people will dismiss it. Perhaps only 15% will accept it, and they are the fortunate ones. Don't worry about what others say. You just continue your practice. We will meet again.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: When will the Sudarshan Chakra manifest in the Kali Yuga, and what will its purpose be?
Answer: Listen. The Sudarshan Chakra is already manifest; devotees can see it with their inner eye, the eye of knowledge and devotion. Wherever God's destruction takes place, the wheel of time (Kaal Chakra) is at work. It is never openly visible. Perhaps only one devotee in many billions has ever had a direct vision of it. It moves in secret, carrying out destruction, and it will continue to do so.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I have a job, and because of my work schedule, I can only manage to do the Sandhya prayer once a day, not three times. Also, I can't memorize the Dasha Avatara Stotram and Vishnu Sahasranama, so I just read them from a text. Is this okay?
Answer: Listen. For the prayers, you can write them down, use a PDF, or take a printout and read from it. If you sit and read it regularly, it will eventually be committed to memory. However, you must perform the Trikal Sandhya (three-times prayer). We eat three or four meals a day, spending about 15 minutes on each. Think of this prayer as spiritual food, food that will purify you and prepare you to be a person of the Satya Yuga (Age of Truth). You must partake of this as well. It's very good that you are doing it once, but try to do the other two times as well.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: In the 'Durga Madhav Stuti' (praise), it seems to describe Madhav's form as being that of Durga. Could you clarify the meaning of 'Durga Madhav'?
Answer: Look, Mother Durga is Yogamaya (the divine power of illusion). It is with the power of this Yogamaya that the Lord establishes righteousness (dharma). Madhav is Krishna. Both Krishna and Mother Yogamaya will work together to establish dharma throughout the world. That is why we chant the 'Durga Madhav Stuti'.

Video Title: L116 - बार बार भूकंप आना किस आपदा का संकेत है ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Will Lord Madhav grant his devotees the 'Vishwaroop Darshan' (the vision of His universal form) this time?
Answer: Look, only Arjuna was granted the vision of the universal form. According to the scriptures, perhaps no one else has ever seen that complete, magnificent form. The Kali Yuga will end, but people will not get to see God's universal form, His true nature. Of course, if someone takes refuge in God with deep devotion, that is a different matter. We have not performed the kind of penance or righteous acts that Arjuna did, so it is not possible for all devotees to receive this vision simultaneously. Moreover, there is no need for the Lord to reveal that form now. It was necessary for Arjuna at that time, which is why the Lord showed it. So, don't expect that. Just continue practicing Trikal Sandhya, devotion, and chanting Madhav's name, and everything will be alright.

Video Title: L117 - श्री जगन्नाथ संस्कृति की उत्पत्ति ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I have a question about Brahma Gyan (divine knowledge). In the Bhagavad Gita, the Lord says that whoever remembers me at the time of death directly attains my abode. However, our Sadguru, whom I don't want to name, is currently in Jodhpur jail in connection with a case. He is a saint with Brahma Gyan, and he says that after attaining Brahma Gyan, one gets moksha (liberation) directly. So, Pandit ji, is the situation of a person attaining the Lord's abode by chanting the name of Narayan or Ram at the end of their life different from attaining Brahma Gyan, or are they the same?
Answer: Look, let's first go by the scriptures. According to the scriptures, Sukdev attained Brahma Gyan. Sukdev was the first listener of the Srimad Bhagavatam, and through his sacred stream, we are listening to the Bhagavatam today. He received Brahma Gyan from Lord Shiva. Lomash Muni on Sumeru mountain also attained Brahma Gyan; he is immortal. Kaga Bhusundi is also described as immortal and residing on Sumeru mountain, having attained Brahma Gyan. So, one who attains Brahma Gyan does not die. They can take any form at will, they can do anything, meaning they are beyond the gods. But when it comes to mukti (liberation) or moksha, that is different. If someone attains moksha, they go to Goloka Vaikuntha. And how is moksha attained? It is said that after accumulating the fruits of good deeds over many births, when the karma becomes pure, the sages and saints perform actions and make efforts in every birth. They carry that karma to the next birth, and then the next. After that, when death comes in the final birth, if the name of Ram or Krishna or the Lord comes to one's lips at the final moment, one attains liberation. For that, one has to take birth again and again and perform actions again and again. But the Gita also says that if a person, even while living in the world, loves me, surrenders everything to me, and always performs selfless actions without attachment to the fruits of their actions, and constantly chants the Lord's name, then when they die, they also attain liberation easily, in a very short time, in one lifetime. They get a place in Vaikuntha or Goloka. This is the grace of the Lord through karma. Therefore, karma is necessary. No matter how much knowledge one gains or how great a scholar one becomes, one does not attain Goloka Vaikuntha or moksha through that. Brahma Gyan, as I said, is beyond the gods. To attain liberation, we must perform karma, and that karma should be connected to Lord Krishna. Those who are connected to Krishna, who love and are devoted to Krishna, and who constantly consider Krishna their everything, upon their death, they attain Krishna's abode, which is called liberation.

Video Title: L117 - श्री जगन्नाथ संस्कृति की उत्पत्ति ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: My question is, and I am always disturbed by it, in this Kali Yuga, does one incur sin merely by thinking of an act? For example, if we feel like consuming alcohol and we calm our mind, or if we feel the desire for a woman and we calm our mind. Or does the sin apply only when we perform the act? Please guide me, Maharaj ji.
Answer: Look, just as this thought comes to your mind, it also comes to the minds of many people in this material world. I'll give you an example. When we are driving on the road, many vehicles are moving, and there is always a probability of an accident, but it doesn't happen to everyone. If the car is controlled well before an accident, it is saved. Similarly, a human's karma and mentality are like that moving car. Our mind has three aspects: a 'suman' (good mind), a 'viman' (averse mind), and a 'kuman' (evil mind). The 'suman' always wants to do good deeds. The 'viman' is averse to success, and the 'kuman' leads to evil deeds. If we can control that car with the purity of our mind so that no evil occurs, then no sin is incurred at all, because it's a natural thing. Such thoughts come even to the minds of sages and saints, and they control them, just as you do. So be happy, there is no sin in this. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L117 - श्री जगन्नाथ संस्कृति की उत्पत्ति ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

And there is one more yuga, the yuga of devotees and God, which we call Ananta Yuga (Infinite Yuga), also known as Sangam Yuga (Confluence Yuga). That Ananta Yuga comes after Kali Yuga. It is a gathering of devotees from all four yugas. In it, there are no demons and no sins. There are only devotees and God. The yuga runs with both of them together for a thousand years. Video Title: L117 - श्री जगन्नाथ संस्कृति की उत्पत्ति ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, you mentioned in your discourse that Lord Jagannath is a symbol of three religions. Can you elaborate?
Answer: Not three religions, He is the symbol of all religions of the countless universes. That is why once a year, the Patita Pavana Ratha Jatra (chariot festival) takes place. Regardless of caste, religion, or creed, people of any religion or faith can hold the rope of His chariot and pull it. They can have his darshan (sight) and receive his prasad (consecrated food). That is why Lord Jagannath comes out of the temple to give darshan to everyone. People of any caste or religion in the universe can have his darshan. That is why He is the confluence of all religions.

Video Title: L117 - श्री जगन्नाथ संस्कृति की उत्पत्ति ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, you had also mentioned the symbol of the Christian religion, the cross. Where is that on Lord Jagannath?
Answer: Look, it is not necessary for me to point this out. I had not taken the name of any specific religion. The Lord is the universe, and his qualities and glory are omnipresent. He is the one deity in the world who comes out in a chariot festival, and people of all religions pull the Lord's chariot, have his darshan, and make offerings. He comes out because it is written in the Puranas that the Lord leaves the temple for the salvation of all humans in all universes, as many people are unable to enter the temple for various reasons. That is the essence of it. It is not necessary to think too much about it. Understand as much as you can.

Video Title: L117 - श्री जगन्नाथ संस्कृति की उत्पत्ति ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, you had said that if people even now stop sinning and follow the path of dharma, then God will not need to intervene to re-establish dharma (implying the destructive phase won't happen). Is such a thing possible?
Answer: This is completely true. If people turn towards truthfulness, if those who perform Trikal Sandhya and chant God's name and live in righteousness move towards Satya Yuga... if everyone does it, then Satya Yuga will be established. Why wouldn't it be? God is always forgiving. There is still time.

Video Title: L117 - श्री जगन्नाथ संस्कृति की उत्पत्ति ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, God has already arrived on Earth, so then this devotion...
Answer: Whether God will come or not... He is about to come. I will say this much: the transition to Satya Yuga is going to happen, the darshan of God is going to happen, and the union of God and devotees is going to happen, according to the Malika scriptures. For that, devotion, surrender, and the vision of one's own inner self are necessary. I will not deliberate further on this line of thought.

Video Title: L117 - श्री जगन्नाथ संस्कृति की उत्पत्ति ? | पण्डित काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Maharaj ji, a question is arising in the minds of many people: what is the significance of the recent lunar eclipse at the international or national level? Please guide us.
Answer: Look, the lunar eclipse that happened at this time... such things also happened during previous yuga transitions, and it is happening now as well. And you can see it very clearly: a big world war is going to happen. That's it. What do we have to do with it? We came alone, we will go alone. Let's do good deeds, take refuge in the Lord, follow the path, and work for the welfare of humanity and the entire world. Okay. Regarding this, why should we tell people? It is not our goal to tell people what will happen. Our goal is the salvation of humanity. That is our purpose. If we tell other things, people will talk and get scared. So what is the need for that? That's why we don't. We only tell what is necessary and good for you.

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: You say we should give charity, but to whom should we give it? Sometimes people on the street beg for money, but they might use it for alcohol or drugs. That kind of charity isn't good, is it? It becomes a 'tamasic' (ignorant) donation. So how do we identify the right person to donate to?
Answer: Look, you should donate when your conscience (vivek) tells you to. Ask your conscience, and if it agrees, then give without any problem. And look for people who are disabled, handicapped, who have no means, or who don't have the strength to work. Help such people and also help senior citizens. Donate after consulting your conscience. Donate for the welfare of cows and for other animals and living beings. Do it this way.

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Guruji, my question is, I have two small children who are 9 years old. They cannot perform the Tri-Sandhya (three-times-a-day prayers) right now because children's minds are restless. So how should I handle this for them? For a mother, her children are precious. If I perform it, will my children get the merit (punya)?
Answer: Look, the mother's merit will surely be passed on, but only about 10%, not more. A mother's duty is that when you perform Tri-Sandhya, you should make your children sit next to you and listen. Tell them about the divine plays and glory of God. Gradually, the children will form an emotional attachment. Once they are attached, they will keep asking for more. We can change children in less time than it takes to change adults because the purity of a child's mind and their mental force is very fast. They change very quickly. So, make your children sit with you, teach them, and let them listen. It will be good for them, and they will also change with time.

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Hello Pandit ji, my question is about the sinful souls whose bodies the Lord will destroy, and those who will take refuge in the Lord. After their bodies perish, what will be their fate? I want to know about this.
Answer: Those who have an untimely or unnatural death (ap-mrityu) will not attain liberation (mukti). They will wander as ghosts and spirits because it is difficult for humans to be saved from an unnatural death. No matter how many purification rituals or funeral rites (shraadh) are performed for them, it is difficult for them to receive the benefits. Mostly, it is the sinners who face unnatural deaths. The saints and sages who take refuge in the Lord never have an unnatural death. Yes, death happens, death is certain for mortals, but unnatural death happens only to sinners. And those who die an unnatural death will not get liberation; they will wander as spirits, ghosts, and ghouls. As for those who have a natural death, they will be fine.

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I wanted to ask a question I've had for a long time. Is there anything mentioned about Sant Asharam ji Bapu in the Bhavishya Malika scripture? He is currently in jail; when will he be released?
Answer: Look, this is under the court's jurisdiction. This is the Kali Yuga, and in this age, the matter is pending in court, so I cannot comment on it. Yes, if we sit together sometime, we can talk, but not on this platform. However, we wish that God saves all the saints and sages of the world who have done good work for society. And I can say one thing: whoever is in any kind of trouble, if they chant the name of 'Madhav' daily, God will bless them, His grace will be upon them, and everything will become easy. You can experience this for yourself.

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Regarding the previous question about the 'mlechhas' (impure people), you said that if they die at the hands of the Lord, it will be an unnatural death and they won't attain a good fate. But we have seen that when Krishna and Ram annihilated demons, those demons attained liberation. So, if someone dies at the hands of the Lord, will they not be liberated? Will they not attain a good state?
Answer: Look, mother, when the Lord killed demons like Ravana, Kansa, and Kumbhakarna... that was different. For instance, Ravana was in his third birth as a gatekeeper of the Lord. But the point is, at this time, the people who die, their death will be at the hands of Goddess Devi and the Jogini Matas; the Lord will not do it himself. He will get it done through a medium. Their death will not be directly at the hands of God. It will happen through the five elements: disease, pandemic, disaster, flood, and fire. If someone dies directly at the hands of God, that's a different matter, but that is not what's happening now. At this time, the Lord has come to establish dharma, and when dharma is established, not everyone gets liberation. For example, in the Mahabharata war, not everyone who died got liberation, because liberation is based on one's karma. In this era, the 'mlechhas' will be annihilated. 'Mlechha' is not a caste; it refers to those who do bad deeds, have evil intentions, and spread evil. For them, the Lord, through the five elements and Goddess Devi, will carry out the act of destruction, so liberation is not guaranteed.

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, I read in a Hindi-Odia version of the Malika that when the Goddess (Mata ji) takes a test, she will test the 'ekakshar' (single-syllable) mantra, Ashtanga yoga, and other such practices that we don't know about. We are only performing Tri-Sandhya. How will we be saved if we don't know these other practices?
Answer: Mother, that is why we propagate the Trikal Sandhya (Tri-Sandhya). For those who perform Trikal Sandhya, the Goddess Devi comes even in their dreams to test them. This itself will be the mantra test. People don't know this and say different things, but nothing like that will happen. The Goddess will only ask about the Trikal Sandhya. Those who can recite it, the Mother will save them.

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, there was one more thing. A mantra was written there: 'Hare Kalki Hare Kalki, Kalki Kalki Hare Hare. Hare Ananta Hare Ananta, Ananta Ananta Hare Hare.' But the mantra we are chanting is the 'Hare Madhav' one, like 'Hare Krishna'. What is the difference between these mantras?
Answer: Mother, look, I'll tell you. The practice includes the Durga Madhav Stuti, the 16 names of the 16 avatars, the main shloka of God's 10 avatars, and the name Madhav from the Bhagwat ji. This is what is prescribed.

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: (Paraphrased from mixed Odia/Hindi) Someone named Anand has written about the Lord's 'dham' (holy place) according to his own will. If someone acts on their own will, what does the Lord have to do with it? What is the point of this?
Answer: Things that people create by their own will may or may not be God's will; we don't know. But Anand has said that people can make their own decisions about his 'dham' as if it were a playhouse. You should think of it that way.

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Pandit ji, you mentioned that the age of Kali Yuga has been reduced by thousands of years due to various sins. By that logic, wouldn't Kali Yuga never complete its full lifespan in any cycle, because sin is always at its peak and dharma is diminished in this age?
Answer: Look, when any human does bad deeds, their lifespan decreases, and when they do good deeds, it increases. Ravana had a boon to live for 220 yugas, but due to his sinful actions, he died within a few years in a single yuga. Similarly, not everyone commits the sins of Kali Yuga. But because the number of those doing wrong is high, Kali Yuga's age has been reduced. Achyutananda has already written about this. For this reason, Kali Yuga has ended. It is over. It will take a little time, about 10-12 years, for Satya Yuga to arrive. This is why you see unseasonal phenomena, like mangoes and flowers growing out of season. There are changes in the world's plants, in humans, and in animals.

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: I feel a little ashamed to say this, but I was in some bad company and picked up some bad habits, like masturbation or watching pornography. How can I quit this?
Answer: Baba, look, the greatest principle for a human is celibacy (brahmacharya). Evil spreads very quickly. That's why you must stay away from bad company. To overcome this, understand that one drop of semen is formed from 100 drops of blood, and it shapes a person's mind, actions, character, and future. Therefore, whenever any evil thought comes to your mind, sit and meditate on God. Chant the 16 names of the Lord. Your mind will become stable, and you will become a good person. Everything will be alright. Whenever an evil thought comes to mind, just sit with your eyes closed and chant the 16 names. Everything will be fine.

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

But in my opinion, the cycle of yugas continues. The duration of an age is affected by human actions. This is all under God's control, not ours. Video Title: L119 - विश्व के लिए 2024 कैसा होगा? | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी

Answer: What is written in the Malika is this: 'The age of Satya will arrive, but no one will know.' This is from a dialogue between Garuda and Lord Krishna. It means that Satya Yuga will begin while Kali Yuga is still ongoing, but most people will not realize it. Only the true devotees, those with the spiritual qualification, will understand. Others who lack this qualification will not be able to comprehend it; they will argue, debate, and even criticize those who speak about the Malika's prophecies. Only the devotees will know that the age has changed.

Video Title: L122 - त्रिकाल संध्या का तत्त्व | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: We are from Kolkata and perform the Trikal Sandhya in Bengali. Is that acceptable?
Answer: Yes, performing it in Bengali is also fine. There is no problem with that.

Video Title: L122 - त्रिकाल संध्या का तत्त्व | पण्डित श्री काशीनाथ मिश्र जी
Question: Father, I recite the Sandhya prayers very quickly. Is that acceptable, or should I do it slowly?
Answer: Do it in the way your mind feels is right. There is no problem with that.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: I have a question. According to your Bhavishya Malika, does it mean that you and I, and all of us, are going to die?
Answer: No, not at all. I have never said such a thing. See, I always say one thing: people should turn towards Dharma (righteousness). The meaning of Dharma is to donate according to one's capacity, to chant the Lord's name when one gets the time and opportunity, and to wish for the welfare of the world without getting caught up in 'mine' and 'yours'. Read the Bhagavata Purana, perform Trikal Sandhya (prayers at three junctures of the day). Those who practice truth, righteousness, justice, peace, compassion, forgiveness, and friendship will face no problems. However, evil people will not be able to survive. The upcoming 'Atichara Gati' (accelerated transit) of Jupiter will promote Dharma. Such transits of Jupiter also occurred during the First and Second World Wars, which caused a lot of misfortune in the world, but Dharma survived and is still present today. So, those who want to move forward with the times should hold onto Dharma. The Bhavishya Purana was written for the welfare of humanity, not to distress people. It's like when we are sick, we take medicine and see a doctor. All these principles are for your salvation, for the salvation of humanity, not for people to die. But those who remain in adharma (unrighteousness), who are a burden to the world, who are tyrannical, who think evil for the world and only think of themselves—there will be no place for them.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Pandit ji, my question is, you mentioned from the Malika that the Gopis, ascetics, and monkeys from previous eras will come under the Lord's refuge and will attain a superior position in the coming Satya Yuga, meeting the Lord, etc. This is a very pure concept. But, for instance, what about those who weren't among them? Does the Lord not add them to His refuge? I mean, those who came from Goloka Vaikuntha Dham, their number remains the same, right? The same devotees who existed in previous eras will be there in this era too. Does this mean no new devotees will be added? This is the question, please clarify.
Answer: Look, your question is very good. I will explain. The cycle of eras and the cycle of time are in motion. With the cycle of time, many people become good, and some also become bad. The Gopis, ascetics, monkeys, and the devotees who were with Lord Mahaprabhu Buddha Dev, those who came from Goloka—they will certainly be saved and will also receive high positions. Some devotees will become kings, some will become the Lord's council members, and some will work to establish Dharma throughout the universe. This will happen. But along with them, those who become good over time through the scriptures, the Puranas, and the processes of Sanatana Dharma will also come under the Lord's refuge. They too will go to Satya Yuga, and from Satya Yuga, they can even go to Vaikuntha.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: There is a very great saint, his name is Premanand Maharaj, and I listen to his sermons. I have also been connected with you for about a year. In his sermons, and in ISKCON's sermons, and even in the Bhagavata Purana, the description of Kali Yuga is for 432,000 years, but you say it is 5,000 years. This is a big contradiction.
Answer: Look, what I am telling you today, a time will come when the entire world, the entire universe, will believe it. Because I speak from the scriptures. The scriptures are our history, our future, our present, and the solution for human life. What I am telling you today is according to the scriptures, and a time will come when all scholars of the scriptures will also happily accept it. It might just take a little time.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Father, I want to join the Satsang stream. What can I do? Please guide me, Father.
Answer: Look, below this YouTube video, there is a number for a boy named Mohan. Talk to him, and he will tell you the rules you need to follow. Follow those rules, and it will be for your welfare. See, this knowledge is for the salvation of humanity. God created this knowledge in secret and also had it written that at the end of Kali Yuga, this Bhavishya Purana would be propagated, which is what we are doing. This is the greatest welfare-bestowing knowledge for humanity, the greatest nectar. Do it, and get in touch with Mohan as needed. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Father, I perform Trikal Sandhya, read the Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana, and chant the name of Madhav—I do all three. However, I am unable to attend the assembly (sabha). Will I not get to see the Lord?
Answer: Look, listen. I have told you people to speak with Mohan, and Mohan will arrange for you to speak with me. I have spoken. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Father, my question is, I am from Rajasthan, and we have a strong tradition of not washing our hair on Thursdays and avoiding certain other tasks. Do all these beliefs apply in the current times?
Answer: Look, mother, Thursday is the day of Mahalakshmi. On Mahalakshmi's day, if someone washes their hair, it involves discarding dirt from the head. According to the rules of our Sanatana Dharma, one should not wash their hair on Thursday. We can do it on other days. If there is a need or an emergency, it can be done. But this tradition in your Rajasthan is good. We must follow that rule. In Satya Yuga, all the rules of Sanatana Dharma will have to be followed. Right now, the time is not right, so with time, we will have to follow this. Okay? Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Pandit ji, this is Abhishek. I am going to propagate the Malika in my city. Pandit ji, please give me your blessings so that I can do this work of the Lord. I feel a strong inner inspiration to do this propagation work so that Dharma can be established quickly and devotees can be united.
Answer: My blessings. I have great respect for your feelings, and may God's grace be upon you. If all the devotees work together like this, then truth and righteousness will spread very quickly in the world, leading to the welfare of humanity. So, definitely do this work. But look, you don't need to go to Moradabad or Sambhal. They also listen. You should work in the area near your place of residence. It's not necessary to go too far. According to your means, wherever there are nearby places, religious centers, a temple, or a good religious institution, you can distribute very small leaflets. Just say that the era is ending, Satya Yuga is coming, and in this time, perform Trikal Sandhya. If you want to know more, follow the Bhavishya Malika for your welfare. Distribute small leaflets like this, which will cost very little. Do it in nearby places; it's not necessary to go far. It would be good for people to do this work wherever they live. You should also do it. You have God's grace and my good wishes. Jai.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Jai Shri Radha Madhav, Guruji. I want to know, you said that if we perform Trikal Sandhya and read the Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana, we will get answers to all our questions. I have been doing this continuously for six months. Am I doing it wrong, which is why I'm not getting answers, or is there some other reason?
Answer: Look, when you eat a sweet, you can taste it properly only when you sit down and eat it. If someone eats a sweet while walking around, they don't get the real taste. Similarly, if Trikal Sandhya is performed at the right time and all its rules are followed, I believe that one can have a vision of God in one month, let alone six, and God will tell them about future events. If it hasn't happened for you, don't worry, God will bless you. Another thing is that all the rules of Trikal Sandhya must be followed: chanting the 16 names, the Dashavatara, the Durga Madhav Stuti, and reading the Srimad Bhagavatam. And one must have complete faith in God, unwavering devotion, and abandon the sense of 'I, me, mine,' violence, anger, and ego. Sages and saints performed penance for ages and still couldn't get a vision of God, but you all are going to get it in this age. Do it, you will surely get it. Many thousands, even lakhs of people have had visions, and you can too. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Pandit ji, regarding the incident that happened at the Mahakal temple on Rang Panchami, a pandit there said that Mahakal has now awakened, and only those who walk the path of truth will survive, as Mahakal himself has descended for destruction. Please shed some light on this and inform us if Lord Mahakal has truly awakened.
Answer: A very delightful question, daughter, you have asked a very good question. This is necessary. Look, I was in Chandigarh and I spoke about this during the Bhagavata Katha. The time when the fire broke out in the Mahakal temple was during Brahma Muhurta. A fire also broke out at the Jagannath temple during Brahma Muhurta, and a stone fell from the Jagannath temple during Brahma Muhurta about 20-25 days ago. And in the Mahakaleshwar temple, the fire broke out during Brahma Muhurta, the time when the deities are worshipped. The reason for this is that Lord Kalki is the Rudra (destructive) form of Lord Shankar. And Lord Shankar has proven that 'I too have set out for destruction.' My servants, those who serve me, who worship me, they faced trouble, the incident happened to them. It happened to 13 people, who are close to God, and the number 13 is the number of Satya Yuga. Any establishment of Dharma is linked to numbers like 1, 7, 13, 27—these are very powerful and influential numbers. And it happened on that day. I had said before that Mother Vaishno Devi had come in 2018 for destruction and the establishment of Dharma, which is why diseases spread throughout the world. And Lord Shankar has left his place. In Odisha, the largest seat of Lord Shankar, Mani Baba, his trident, the one on top of the temple, also flew away in the wind a few days ago, within the last two or three months. So, Lord Shankar has set out for destruction. This is a warning for humanity. The message from Ujjaini Kshetra, from Mahakaleshwar, is that human civilization is heading towards a great war. Sinners will be burnt to ashes, and the righteous will be saved. Shankar will save the devotees and will surely destroy the sinners. This is proof of the times. Whether anyone believes it or not, this is consistent with the principles of the Bhavishya Purana. This is the truth.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: My question is, just as the 16-syllable Mahamantra for Kali Yuga was 'Hare Krishna Hare Krishna... Hare Rama Hare Rama...', similarly, can we chant our Lord's Kalki Mahamantra on a mala? Devotees say that chanting the Mahamantra increases devotion. Is it right? Can we chant the Kalki Mahamantra?
Answer: Look, mother, the Mahamantra that was propagated by Lord Chaitanya Mahaprabhu should be chanted by everyone. It is necessary in our Sanatana Vaishnava tradition. But at this time, at the end of the era, a new era is about to begin, and Lord Kalki is coming. His name will be Madhav. Madhav is Kalki, and Kalki is Madhav. If the Lord of the infinite universes is coming, we should welcome him and chant his name. Because the Lord is coming, and if we are devotees, we should honor the name he is coming with. And the name 'Madhav' is the greatest element, the power that will take humanity from Kali Yuga to Satya Yuga. Achyutananda and the Panchasakha have written this in the Bhavishya Purana. That is why we are propagating this name. You should also chant the name Madhav during Trikal Sandhya and whenever your mind feels like it. But also chant the Mahamantra; do not leave it.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Father, the question is, what can we do at our own level to stop the killing of living beings (animal slaughter)?
Answer: Look, the Garuda Purana, Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana, and Vishnu Purana's Bhavishya Malika clearly state that one who kills a living being never gets a human birth again. Not only that, they have to suffer the torments of Yama for an entire kalpa (eon). We have been given this human life for the path of liberation. Therefore, humans who want to make their life meaningful should refrain from killing living beings. You can write headings like this and distribute them to people. If you can make even one person a vegetarian, you will receive the fruit of 100 years of penance. It brings great welfare to one's human life. Someone might be a billionaire, but if they have nothing else, if they make one, two, or five people vegetarian, their life is fulfilled.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Father, there are two girls, aged 14 and 15, from Ahmedabad who love to perform Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavata, and watch your Malika videos. However, their parents strictly do not let them follow this. So, both girls follow the stream secretly. They seek blessings from you, Prabhuji.
Answer: Look, I'll say one thing. You can talk to Mohan about this, but I'll tell you one thing. Practicing Dharma is not so simple. If parents are opposed, one should not oppose one's parents. I am not saying that anyone should oppose their father and mother. Yes, if the parents are not against Dharma itself, then one can practice it secretly. Because practicing Dharma not only brings welfare to the individual but also to the world. If children practice Dharma, their parents also benefit, and the family also benefits. In a house where Trikal Sandhya is performed, all faults are removed. My blessings are with them, God's blessings are with them. They should perform Trikal Sandhya. When the time comes, may God make their parents join as well. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Guruji, my question is that for the past few days, I have been unable to perform Trikal Sandhya. Some circumstances are arising because of which I am unable to do it. It feels like Maya (illusion) is enchanting me. I am also unable to attend the sabha's satsang, and my mobile phone has also broken down. These circumstances are arising for me.
Answer: Look, what can I say about the mobile phone, son? You said it yourself. See, when anyone makes mistakes in Maya, or strays from Dharma, or when bad thoughts enter the mind, then even the phone breaks. So you have understood. From now on, don't do this and perform Trikal Sandhya properly, and things will get better. Because to practice Dharma, Maya creates difficulties and obstacles. It can even divert people from their path. But this happens, son. Human life has five senses, and to control these senses, God gives punishment. You should know you have received punishment. If you don't improve and continue on the same path, then it's a different matter. Whatever has happened, move forward. Perform Trikal Sandhya. If you are unable to perform Trikal Sandhya, then chant the name of Madhav throughout the day. When your Dharma increases, you will be able to perform Trikal Sandhya again. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: I wanted to tell you that I had a dream two days ago. The whole atmosphere became strange, its color was incomprehensible. People were running here and there. The ground was so dry that huge cracks had appeared, big enough for a tree to fall into. The entire land was full of such cracks. There were earthquakes, and suddenly a dam broke and a flood came. I was standing on that barren land, watching people run. As I looked up at the sky, a huge meteor came with great speed. Someone pulled me aside so I wouldn't be crushed. As I was pulled, a second meteor came right after, and I was crushed under it. As soon as that happened, my dream broke. Why did this happen? I want to know this from you.
Answer: Look, mother, those who perform Trikal Sandhya, who are devotees, God shows them that such times are coming. Today, a young man went to propagate the Bhavishya Malika to people of great traditions in India. The whole world is not on the right path. Before the great destruction, there is no eternal principle in the universe for the welfare of humanity other than the principles of the Bhavishya Purana, I am telling you this today. The people who reject the Bhavishya Malika today will fall at your feet and ask for salvation because that time is coming. Because humans learn only by seeing. But Achyutananda told the devotees in advance. And devotees who have such dreams are being shown what is going to happen. I have said before that so many meteors will fall from the sky that homes, families, and cities will burn. Forests will burn, there will be earthquakes, fire-deluge, wind-deluge, and war. A time of great destruction and disease is coming in 2025, 26, 27. It will be a time of great danger for humanity. I am telling you now, there will be no salvation. This is what is going to happen, and you are being shown this. Stay in the refuge of God. The devotees should become strong so that Dharma can be established and victorious over the demons. Jai Shri Madhav.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Pandit ji, as far as I know, on March 29, 2025, Saturn will enter Pisces, but...
Answer: On Saturday, March 29, 2025, at 5:30 PM, the transit of Saturn into Pisces will happen. And Achyutananda had written about this transit of Saturn in Pisces: 'Mina Shani Guru Baare Padihi, Anka Dhruba Dhruba Bhadra Maasare, 13 Dina Paka Dhariba Graasa.' This means that during the time of Saturn in Pisces, a time will come in the month of Bhadra when calamity will grip the Earth. The Third World War, diseases, and disasters are coming during the time of Saturn in Pisces. For the protection of humanity, there is no other principle in the world besides the Bhavishya Malika. The time will come, and people will contemplate it, but the salvation of humanity is necessary beforehand. We are not concerned with any big traditions; we are concerned with the welfare of humanity, the welfare of human civilization, and the salvation of devotees. Those who want to become good, should become good. And those who came as good beings from Goloka, from the four yugas, they are also good. Because the times are very bad. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: What will happen in Assam, Father?
Answer: Look, in the state of Assam, Goddess Kamakhya resides. A group of devotees called the 'Kamakhya Mandal' will be formed. And Mother Kamakhya Devi will save the devotees and will hunt down and kill the demons by entering their homes. She will not spare them. There will be massive floods and earthquakes in Assam, the likes of which have never been seen before. But the devotees will surely be saved. And this Bhavishya Malika is being propagated for the salvation of the devotees. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Guruji, I have an experience to share. Since childhood, I have been going to a nearby Hanuman ji temple. It feels like Hanuman ji is giving me signs about the future, that sin is increasing. Is this a sign, Guruji?
Answer: Devotees receive signs. Thoughts come to their minds, and the Lord shows them things in dreams. This is a good warning for devotees. If you receive a sign from God, you should follow it. Perform Trikal Sandhya, and to become a human of Dharma and truth, chant the name of Lord Madhav and read the Bhagavatam. You will be blessed.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Jai Shri Mata Pita Shri. I perform Trikal Sandhya and have been following the Bhavishya Malika for two-three months. I believe everything. I have given up meat and fish, but I still end up smoking three or four cigarettes every two-three days. How can I quit this?
Answer: Look, it is very good that you have quit meat and fish. It's excellent. See, you have given up meat, fish, and everything. Only cigarettes remain. When sages and saints went for penance for God-realization, which means the welfare of human life, their own welfare, they would renounce food, home, everything. What a great sacrifice! When your mind craves a cigarette, tell yourself, 'The sages renounced food and everything for months, years, even lifetimes. This is just a small thing for me to give up.' If you think like this and sit and chant the name of Madhav for a minute or two, the craving will go away. Tell yourself, 'This is not good for me, and I have to attain the Lord, go to Satya Yuga, and become a divine human. So this is bad for me.' With Madhav's grace, it will happen gradually. It's very good, son, give it up. Because Dharma is attained through sacrifice. You have made such big sacrifices; if you can't make this small one, then sit and chant the name of Madhav. At that moment, put a chocolate or a clove in your mouth, and your mind will be diverted. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Pandit ji, you say in the Malika that when Lord Madhav receives power from Lord Parashuram, he will alone hold the power of Balaram and everyone else. But I saw on a YouTube Odia channel, Prarthana TV, where they propagate that both Balaram ji and Kalki ji will come, and both will get two horses from a yajna, meaning two will come. But you say that Kalki ji will come alone. Please clarify this a little.
Answer: Achyutananda, in his Valmiki Kalpa Granth, has written: 'Dakshina skandhare Balaram, Bama bhage Rahibe Chakradhara.' This means Lord Krishna will be on the left shoulder and Balaram on the right, and both combined will become Kalki. It is also written: 'Sweta murti, sweta baasa, sweta aswa bahana... Shankha chakra dhara deva.' This means holding the conch, discus, mace, lotus, plough, and pestle, Lord Kalki will come in a single form. And in the Srimad Bhagavatam, Lord Vedavyasa has written that Lord Kalki, riding a horse named Devadatta and holding a sword named Nandaka, will carry out the destruction. Balaram will not carry out the destruction. This is what Vedavyasa ji has written, and what he has written is final. I don't know how much knowledge others have. I am deserving to spread the Malika; this right has been given to me by Achyutananda, my name is written. So the knowledge we have is by the grace of our Lord and Guru. And what others say here and there... Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: I am speaking from Faridabad. After attending the sabha, I had a dream. I saw a young man enter a room with many other youths of his age. He stopped at a door, then came into the room. He was wearing a dhoti with a border and a yellow angarkha (upper garment). He sat on a small stool. I was sitting in front of him but couldn't say anything. He was just looking. In my heart, I felt he was the Lord, but I couldn't speak. After some time, he said, 'Everything will be fine.' This was an early morning dream, Pandit ji. Please tell me about it. He was in the form of a youth.
Answer: Look, an early morning dream is a sweet dream. And the Lord came and gave you a good blessing. Perform Trikal Sandhya. It is the Lord's grace, and you have received the vision of Madhav. There is nothing greater than this. You are fortunate. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: I had a question for you. You said in your discourse that the 33 crore who will be saved will be deities (devatas). Since we are connected with the Sudharma Sangh, do we also fall into that category of deities you speak of? That was the question.
Answer: Because those who join the Sudharma Sangh are either deities, or residents of Goloka, or residents of Vrindavan, or were the monkeys with Lord Ram in Ayodhya, or were sages and saints in Satya Yuga. There is no one else besides them. It is absolutely correct. It has only one meaning: those who join the Sudharma Sangh, believe in the Bhavishya Malika, and perform Sandhya are in that same category of deities. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Pandit ji, I had a question. I saw a dream in which I was completely drenched in blood, and I had a sword in my hand. I was sitting outside the door of my house, waiting to see who would come next. I had this kind of tendency within me, even though this is not my nature. Please shed some light on this.
Answer: Look, a time will come when people will enter homes and harass and trouble others. God has shown you what will happen at that time. If needed, we will also have to fight. That time will come, and it is going to happen in the near future. God showed this to you in advance because a time of destruction is coming. Before the destruction, devotees receive warnings. Seeing such things, one should perform Trikal Sandhya and take refuge in the Lord. If you wish, go. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L124- 2024 का राष्ट्रीय निर्वाचन धर्म की जीत
Question: Pandit ji, this is not my question, it's someone else's. I just want to tell you something. A person came to your Chandigarh discourse for the first time. When you were on the Vyasa Gaddi (speaker's seat), they saw you in the form of a Naga Devata (serpent deity) with its hood spread out. They don't even do Trikal Sandhya, but have started now. We found out later, otherwise we would have introduced them to you. We have given them the Trikal Sandhya instructions, and they have started in the last few days. And every week on Tuesday, around 2-2:30 AM, they have a direct vision of Hanuman ji. What does this mean?
Answer: Look, in the surrender of devotion, some have come from Naga Loka (serpent world), some from Surya Loka (sun world) or Chandra Loka (moon world). Some are devotees, some are deities, some are residents of Goloka. As they come according to their devotion, each devotee has a different identity. And devotees get to see other devotees; they recognize each other, and their hearts accept it. This feeling of devotion is God's grace. It is a great thing that he had this vision.

Video Title: L125- 2025 के मीन - शनि के योग बारे में मालिका में पहले से प्रकाश था | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: Father, you mentioned the timeline of 2032, right? So, let's say there are some great souls who have enough power to stop this event. Also, the original Bhavishya Malika is not with anyone. So, will this really happen by 2032?
Answer: Look, in the Srimad Ramcharitmanas, the great sage Valmiki had already written about the incarnation of Lord Ram. What mantras should be chanted during Trikal Sandhya, which I explain, might be written differently in other texts. But what I explain is that according to the Yuga (era), the mantras for Trikal Sandhya also differ. Accordingly, I tell the mantras as per the current Yuga, and we explain what is necessary for human salvation. In the Trikal Sandhya that I describe, one must chant the name 'Madhav' 108 times, the 16 names once, the Durga Madhav Stuti once, the Dashavatara shloka of God once, and read one chapter of the Srimad Bhagavat Mahapurana once during the day. This will take humanity to Satya Yuga. Just follow that. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L128 - विश्व में क्या परमाणु युद्ध होने वाला है? कब? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: My question is, I am from Gujarat. My family and the people around me are very good and follow dharma. But the problem is when I tell them about the current situation on Earth and what is written in the Bhavishya Malika, they don't join because they are all attached to their own religious paths. Many are associated with organizations like Brahma Kumaris, which also talk about the end of Kali Yuga, and they say they will stay with them and be saved. But a time is coming when all religions will merge into one dharma, Sanatana Dharma, whose leader will be Lord Kalki. The organization that devotees will join will be named 'Sudharma Maha Maha Sangh'. By joining it, devotees will become immortal and live on this earth as citizens of Satya Yuga. Whoever has it in their destiny will come. Those who don't have it in their destiny will not come even if you tell them a million times. Therefore, wait for the time. You are doing good work, performing Trikal Sandhya; this is a great grace of God. Only those who have the grace of Lord Vishnu and Lord Shankar get to perform Trikal Sandhya, and you have received it. You people are fortunate. Those who don't understand, perhaps God will grace them, and they too will understand. If they can't, it means it's not in their destiny. We cannot change anyone's destiny by trying.

Video Title: L128 - विश्व में क्या परमाणु युद्ध होने वाला है? कब? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: Pandit ji, I am trying to memorize the Trikal Sandhya prayers. I am not very educated, and I keep forgetting some parts. How can I memorize it?
Answer: No problem, mother. Listen, read it from a text. Write it down on a piece of paper and read from it. You will memorize it with time, there's no issue. It's good that you are performing Trikal Sandhya. Vrindavan is a holy land of Lord Shri Krishna and Radha Rani, and you are also there. By performing Trikal Sandhya, people and devotees there will also be able to attain Radha Rani and Krishna. Okay? Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L128 - विश्व में क्या परमाणु युद्ध होने वाला है? कब? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा

Video Title: L128 - विश्व में क्या परमाणु युद्ध होने वाला है? कब? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: Pandit ji, I am Abhishek from Bareilly. When I meditate, I see my elder brother who committed suicide in 2017. Then two pandits come and give me kheer and halwa. I feel so much pity that I give him the halwa and kheer to eat. Even in the dream, I tell him, 'You committed suicide, which is a great sin. You are suffering the consequences of your karma, but everything will be fine.' So, Pandit ji, I want to ask, can I perform the recitation of the Shrimad Bhagwat Mahapuran with a 'sankalp' (vow) in his name?
Answer: Look, that's a very good thing. You can take a vow (sankalp) and read the Bhagwat yourself for seven days to work towards his liberation. That's the first thing. Secondly, for his liberation... you know how Trikal Sandhya is performed at home? The ancestors who haven't attained liberation often appear in dreams or make their presence felt. Through the effect of Trikal Sandhya, he, who was not capable of communicating or making you feel his presence for a long time, gained some spiritual merit. That's why he was able to come into your dream and say something. So, don't worry. For seven days, all the family members at home should give up garlic, take a vow, and recite the Bhagwat for his liberation. His liberation will surely happen. This is a very good deed; do it. Also, through Trikal Sandhya, his purity is increasing, and his soul is gaining the strength to move forward. Okay?

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: Father, in the Shrimad Bhagwat Mahapuran, the seven-day recitation has a very long and detailed procedure described, like inviting Brahmins and taking the vow in a specific way. So how can we do it so that the full procedure's benefits reach my brother?
Answer: Look, nowhere in the Bhagwat does it say you must call a Brahmin to recite the katha at your home. You can do it yourself. One who is virtuous, staying away from desires and lust for seven days, surrendering yourself at the feet of Lord Madhav, the whole family can get together and complete the Bhagwat katha in seven days. Read it completely and take a vow. On a tripod, place a small earthen pot with some offerings like ghee bhog. Place it there. On top of that, place another small earthen pot. It will be there for seven days to listen. Tell him to come and listen. Then, recite the Bhagwat. He will depart, and his liberation will be achieved.

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: Pandit ji, I have started Trikal Sandhya on your advice. I want to know, in how many days will we see its effect?
Answer: Look, if you have devotion, surrender, and purity, you will definitely get some sense of it even after performing this Sandhya for seven days. You should do it. In my opinion, within a month, one can even have a 'darshan' (divine vision). The Lord often reveals things about the future in dreams. You will surely feel it. You will also get it. Do it with complete rules and devotion. This is not a 'sadhana' (spiritual practice for a specific goal). It is a 'dhara' (a stream or flow). It's not a sadhana where humans have expectations. There are no expectations here. It is a stream for the salvation of humanity and to prepare people for the Satya Yuga.

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
