Answer: Look, son, for those who have taken a Guru Mantra, the time for the Guru Mantra is different. Your Guru Mantra is not at the same time as the Trikal Sandhya. So, at the time of Trikal Sandhya, do the Trikal Sandhya. Do your Guru Mantra according to how your Gurudev has instructed. Okay?

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: I want guidance. I don't eat it, but for other people, could you please shed some light on why one should not eat non-veg?
Answer: Look, a very good question: why not eat non-veg? See, 'Jiva bhuta sanatanah' (the living entity is eternal). In the Purushottam Yoga of the Bhagavad Gita, Lord Krishna told Arjuna, 'Jiva bhuta sanatanah.' Any being that has life, that moves, eats, drinks, performs actions, even if it cannot speak, is eternal. According to their karma, some get the birth of an animal, some a smaller creature, and some a human. So how can one eternal being eat another eternal being? That's the first principle. Second, every living being has a soul, and because of that soul, the being performs its karma. And due to the fruits of karma, one gets 8.4 million births—some as a fish, some as a goat, a chicken, an elephant, a horse, a tiger, a cat, or even plants. Such births are received according to one's karma. What karma? Those who have killed living beings, committed sins, harmed others, done wrong, not worshipped the gods, not worshipped the Lord, not followed dharma, and opposed dharma—they get such births. When that creature is experiencing the fruit of its karma, what right does a human have to deprive it of its karmic cycle and eat it? Therefore, the scriptures say that in the 560 million species of living beings, the authority of Brahman, the authority of God, exists. And if we kill and eat a body in which God's authority resides, we incur the sin of 'Brahma-hatya' (killing a Brahmin/Brahman), and there is no remedy for the sin of Brahma-hatya. Therefore, it is not the rule for one living being to eat another. The rule is for one living being to help another. It is written in the Shrimad Bhagwatam and Puranas that humans should take care of all living creatures and cooperate with everyone. But how have we become aggressors? How have we become terrorists? How have we become troublemakers? This is a demonic quality. One who has demonic qualities kills living beings. A true Sanatani has never killed a living being and has never been associated with the karma of those who do. Therefore, one living being should not kill another. It is written in the scriptures and Puranas that every living being has the life element, the Brahman element. So, those who kill Brahman have to wander through demonic and lower births and suffer the torture of Yama for 8.4 million births, experiencing great sorrow. Therefore, a human is a living being, and another creature is also a living being; they are just big or small due to their karma. We should look after them, protect them, like the relationship between a father and son. This is happening because of Kali Yuga, but it will not continue in the future.

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: But there's one thing. If someone used to eat non-veg before but has now stopped and is walking on the path of dharma, does the sin they committed ever get erased?
Answer: Look, just as taking medicine for one day doesn't cure a disease—it takes many days—similarly, to cleanse a person's karma, it takes many days of Trikal Sandhya, good deeds, charity, righteousness, virtue, chanting, contemplation, kirtan, and remembrance. Through these, the sin diminishes, and a time comes when one becomes completely stainless. It doesn't happen in a day; it takes time. By doing this, through our conduct and our actions, the influence of dharma gradually starts to overpower the sin.

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: Guruji, my question was that you say there are 33 crore (330 million) deities, while others say there are 33 'mukh' (chief/types of) deities. Could you please shed some light on this?
Answer: Look, to run the world—not just this world, but countless universes, including realms like Patala Lok, Rasatala Lok, Talatala Lok, Bhutala Lok, Bhu Lok, Bhuvar Lok, Svar Lok, Jana Lok, Surya Lok, Chandra Lok, Swarga Lok, and the realms of Yakshas and Gandharvas—for all the living beings residing in these many realms according to their karma, God has created 33 crore (330 million) deities. And Achyutananda, in his scripture 'Shunya Panjar Granth', wrote about '56 koti jiva jantu, koti 33 dev'—meaning 560 million species and 33 crore deities. He wrote about 33 crore gods and goddesses. Among these 33 crore deities, if we count, there are the eight Vasus, 16... 64 Siddhas, 16 thousand sages who became deities... 16 thousand... so it adds up to 33 crore. People don't know this. These 33 crore gods and goddesses are not just on Earth; they watch over, sustain, and manage the entire cosmos with the grace and blessings of God, with divine power, with the power of Brahman. This is also written in the scriptures. In Odisha's Jagannath Bhavishya Malika, Achyutananda has mentioned 33 crore gods and goddesses. It is written in many scriptures; it's not just made up. Okay?

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: When we want to start the Ekadashi fast, what are the rules, and how can we begin it properly? Do we have to stop eating a day before, or how should we do it?
Answer: Do you perform Trikal Sandhya? (Yes, yes, father.) Okay, listen. If you want to observe the Ekadashi fast, no problem. Joyfully, wake up at Brahma Muhurta, leave your bed, take a bath, offer salutations to God and Surya Dev (the Sun God), offer water, perform Trikal Sandhya for some time, chant the mantra, that is, the name of Brahma Madhav. Then, according to your capacity, you can have one meal at one time, either between morning and noon or before sunset. You can have 'anna prasad' (grain-based food), fruits, roots; you can eat anything. At other times, you can drink water. But you must eat only one meal, not a second one. Then the next day, you can proceed as usual.

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: Father, can we eat rice on Dashami (the day before Ekadashi)? And what should be avoided on Dashami?
Answer: Look, grain is a boon from Mahalakshmi. Lord Jagannath eats grains daily. All deities eat grains. There is nothing wrong with grains. Anyone—sadhus, saints, sages—can traditionally have grain prasad. Grain is an element given by Mahalakshmi; you can eat it. But the grain you eat should be raw grain. For example, the parboiled rice available in the market should not be eaten. Rice that has not been boiled, that raw rice can be milled and cooked to be eaten.

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: You said that Madhav is Kalki and Kalki is Madhav, and you advised chanting the name 'Madhav'. So, how many malas (rosary rounds) should we do in a day?
Answer: Look, because of Kali Yuga, people have become confined to the mala, wondering how much to chant and how much not to. See, there is no rule for worshipping God. The more you chant, the more auspicious it is for you. Due to Kali Yuga, it has been limited to the mala, meaning we do 16 rounds, 5 rounds, or 8 rounds. What happens with this is that ego and pride enter the mind: 'I do this many rounds.' But if you do it countless times, the feeling comes to the mind, 'I might have missed some, let me do more.' This brings more devotion, and faith and devotion increase. Instead of depending on counting, that is, without relying on calculation, chant the name with an open mind, whenever you get time. This will bring well-being to the person, and God will also see that you have not set any rules for chanting His name, like chanting this much or that much. This should not be there.

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: When I read the Shrimad Bhagwat Mahapuran, it says that Lord Shankar, Lord Vishnu, and everyone... all the deities are one and the same, that 'you are great, you are great.' So, I don't understand whom to worship.
Answer: We are humans; we have come to this earth for salvation. The gods are great, what do we have to do with that? This is all the path of knowledge. Look, Lord Shankar is a part of Lord Mahavishnu, and so is Lord Brahma. At the time of dissolution (pralaya), Lord Shankar brings about destruction—he is Lord Vishnu. At the time of creation, He creates the universe in the form of Lord Brahma—he is Lord Vishnu. And at the time of sustenance, Lord Vishnu sustains as Narayana—he is Lord Vishnu. Why should we see any difference? We shouldn't see any difference at all. All the deities—Brahma, Vishnu, Mahesh—are one. And all have been glorified in the Bhagwatam. What does it matter to us? We should strive to receive their grace. If we go by that principle, then all are one. It's just that for the operation, creation, and dissolution of the universe, God has appeared in different forms. What does it matter to us? Whoever Lord Shankar is, He is God. Whoever Lord Brahma is, He is God. They are one and the same, okay?

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: Father, my salutations at your feet. In the Dvapara Yuga, when the Mahabharata happened, 64 crore (640 million) people died. And here in Kali Yuga, 64 crore are going to be saved. What is the significance of this, father?
Answer: In the Mahabharata war, 64 crore died, and in this birth, in this era, 64 crore are going to be saved. Yes, look, the number for the establishment of dharma varies from one era to another. This is the number for the establishment of dharma. As for how many died at that time, I haven't read it thoroughly in the scriptures. If you say so, son, look, the 64 crore who died came because of their karma. And this is about the Mahabharata war. In this era, one part of the Mahabharata war is still remaining. And in that remaining part of the war, those who were supposed to die but didn't, all of them will die in the future. Okay?

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: Pandit ji, I wanted to ask that since the end of Kali Yuga has begun, and when the 'Meen Shani' yog (astrological conjunction) happens... those who are in devotion and doing Trikal Sandhya will not be harmed. But as the end of Kali Yuga is approaching, will Kali make people commit sins? Will it affect the minds of those who are not in devotion and make them commit sins automatically, or will it force them to commit sins? I wanted to ask something like this.
Answer: Those beings who do bad deeds or knowingly make mistakes in their actions, God has already given them a warning. The era is ending, times are changing, and diseases, illnesses, wars, communalism, and sorrow and pain in the world are all increasing. This is a warning for humanity. And if they do not mend their ways after the warning, the being will definitely have to suffer the fruits of their karma. Every being suffers their own karma. The devotees who do good deeds, perform Trikal Sandhya, do charity, righteousness, and meritorious acts, and take refuge in Madhav, Lord Madhav will protect them and make them the people of Satya Yuga.

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: When we don't do Trikal Sandhya and read the Bhagwat Mahapuran... it's 2024 now. I have seen that until 2025 comes, Kali affects our minds and makes us commit sinful acts. So those who do Trikal Sandhya etc., won't commit sins. But as the end of the era approaches, like in 2026, 2027, will Kali deliberately make people commit sins even if they don't want to? How will this happen? How will Kali's influence work?
Answer: The influence of Kali is such that even righteous people have lost their way. Even virtuous people are getting involved in misdeeds. The reason for this is Kali Yuga's desire, lust, and greed. The first form of Kali is disease and greed. It will create greed in the human mind, immerse them in desire and lust, immerse them in intoxication, and by spreading anger and ego in the human body, it will bring people to a state of confusion through communal forces and social elements. Some good people will end up doing bad deeds, and they are already doing so. To be protected from this influence of Kali, to be protected from the filth of Kali, Achyutananda and the Panchasakha composed the Bhavishya Purana, which we are propagating. And those humans who perform Trikal Sandhya will have God's grace, and the influence of Kali will not be able to do anything to them. They will remain beyond all worldly and material elements. They will have no greed, attachment, or illusion. They will simply work while taking refuge in God. Therefore, by performing Trikal Sandhya, this filth of Kali will be removed from human civilization, and the influence of Kali will also cease. That is why all of you should perform Trikal Sandhya.

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: The thing is, when a person eats another creature, it's a sin. But there are other creatures in the jungle or in the pond, where big creatures eat smaller creatures. Will they be saved? How will they be saved since one creature is eating another?
Answer: Look, some creatures have committed such bad karma that they have taken birth in a form that will be eaten by other creatures, and through that, their karma will be exhausted. And the other creature that is eating, that creature has no knowledge, no intellect, no discretion, no experience, no contemplation. It eats the other out of greed for food. Similarly, some humans who have committed bad deeds and great sins are born as fish or other small and large creatures. They will be eaten by other creatures many times, and through that, their karma will be exhausted, and then they will cross the 8.4 million births. So, this is not for humans. The other animals that do this are ignorant. And in that act, the karmic fruit of both creatures is considered. The one who eats is judged, and the karma of the one who is eaten is also judged. Then they take a new birth. Birth is received according to the fruits of karma.

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: Father, I wanted to ask that in the Bhagwatam, both knowledge (gyan) and love (prem) are discussed. But when Uddhava goes to Vraj to meet the Gopis, it is said that love is superior to knowledge. So, I want to hear from your lips how love is superior to knowledge.
Answer: Look, knowledge is like a market, a marketplace where there is knowledge of many things. Every piece of knowledge is related to another. The more you analyze one piece of knowledge, another piece of knowledge will emerge from it. But love is an element where there is no 'I', 'mine', 'you', 'yours', no material elements, no greed, no attachment, no ego—nothing. There is only sacrifice. And a person attains God through sacrifice. What kind of sacrifice? Suppressing—that is, sacrificing—desire, lust, attachment, pride, ego, greed, and all the senses. That is the benefit of love—sacrifice. In knowledge, there is no sacrifice. It's just like going to a market where they are selling 100 types of vegetables. We can only bring back as much as we can fit in our carry bags. We can't bring everything, and our mind will be left wanting, thinking about all the things we couldn't get. Knowledge is an element just like that. So, those who wander in knowledge never find satisfaction for their minds. They never attain nirvana, they never get liberation, moksha, or God. God comes through love. And the other form of love is sacrifice. When a person sacrifices all worldly attachments and offers love at the feet of God, God is attained.

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: Father, I wanted to say that it's been 10 months since I started doing Trikal Sandhya, but I have started getting very angry again. I get very angry over every little thing.
Answer: Look, Kali is having an effect. You have done Sandhya for 10 months, which is very good. But when you get angry, think that this body is going to perish one day. So, on whom and for what should I be angry? The body is transient; one day it will merge with the five elements. So why think about this body? This body creates everything. So, forget this body. Say, 'This body will not remain, why should I be angry? O Lord, grant me liberation and take me.' To reach this state, continue with Trikal Sandhya. And when you get angry, sit down and look straight at Madhav. Say, 'Lord, there is no one in this world for me. Maya is consuming me. Keep me away from Maya.' And the people you get angry with, move a little away from that place and sit alone for 10-15 minutes. The anger will go away. And say, 'The world is an illusion. We have just come here to perform our karma, so on whom should we be angry? We have to do our karma and leave. If we get angry, it will create an obstacle in our karma.' Just think that our karma... this anger is the biggest bondage. It is stopping us from moving forward. So how to control it? Say, 'This is an element that is forcing me to be troubled. I am not that element. I am of the divine element.' Think this constantly. And the anger that comes from the body, say, 'This body is transient, where will the anger go? Where will greed, attachment, and illusion go?' Think about all this. Because the body is ephemeral; one day it will be cremated in fire and merge with the five elements. The anger you feel will go with your karma. Therefore, it is our biggest enemy. Renounce it.

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: If a love marriage is done with the parents' consent, is it still a sin? And nowadays, inter-caste marriages also happen. After that, do the ancestors get salvation when the husband and wife perform any rituals for them?
Answer: Look, daughter, according to the stream of our Vedas... see, Brahmin, Kshatriya, Vaishya, Shudra—all are created by God, all are one. But in marriage, the Vedas have said that a man from a higher caste can marry a woman from any lower caste. This marriage is also sanctioned by the Vedas because when a daughter from a lower caste marries into a higher caste, her caste is elevated. There is no degradation of caste because the worldly dharma is followed according to the husband. But if a woman is from a higher caste, it is not the rule for her to marry into a lower caste. In that, the family dharma (kul dharma) is violated, it leads to 'varna shankara' (intermixture of castes), and in that worldly system, the ancestors do not get liberation, and it also violates the rules of the Vedas. So, men of higher castes can marry into lower castes, but for women of higher castes to marry into lower castes—for example, if a Brahmin woman marries a Shudra or a Kshatriya, she becomes a Kshatriya. Her caste is being degraded. And this degradation is a condemnation of the birth that a person has received according to their karma in the worldly Vedic stream. Meaning, after being born in a high caste, she is going to another caste. In this, the family dharma is destroyed. Every caste is one. At Lord Jagannath's temple, 36 types of sevaks (servants) serve him; people from every caste serve. Every caste should be respected. But marriage should happen according to one's own caste and gotra (lineage), as it is written in our Vedic stream. That should be followed.

Video Title: L130 - ईरान और यूक्रेन में युद्ध रुकेगा या तीव्र होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्रा
Question: Our question is that when our parents don't give us permission for satsang (spiritual gathering), sometimes we feel a little irritated. So, should we obey them? If we obey, then that is also a form of dharma, that we are obeying our parents. But on the other hand, if we obey them, then in a way we are not walking on the path of dharma because we are not going to the satsang. Could you please shed some light on this?
Answer: Look, daughter, this irritation that comes in the human mind is all due to the senses, because we have not yet realized the element of knowledge. When we realize that we have little time, and in this short time, we have to remain in the refuge of God while also performing our family duties and worldly duties, and then we have to depart, then all these things will go away. Therefore, daughter, if any conflict or irritation comes to your mind, sit and chant the name of God. And in that, think that this body has come to go to the refuge of God, to get liberation from the bondage of karma. Therefore, God is our greatest Lord, master, friend, and relative. So, worship Him. By worshipping Him, this thought will always come to your mind: the world is all an illusion, so on whom should I be angry? On whom should my mind be influenced? If the world is an illusion and Brahman is the truth, then a time will come when your faith in the truth of Brahman will be established. Then, whatever happens in the world, you will say, 'Leave it, what do I have to do with this? I have to leave.' People who are on a journey do not stay on the road, because their time will be wasted. A time will come when your mind will also reach this state, when you become absorbed in the love, devotion, and feeling for God. So, constantly try and pray, 'Lord, keep me away from Maya. The world is an illusion.' Because of this illusion, many types of questions and distinctions arise in the human mind. In truth, there is no distinction, no question. So, ask God, 'O Lord, give me that truth.' Ask God, and God will do everything.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Father, I was saying that according to the Bhavishya Malika, it first reaches the devotees. Answer: Look, who is a complete devotee and who is not is written in the Bhavishya Purana. And who is a devotee and who is not, the time is coming to test it. Between 2025 and 2029, many diseases will come. The great traditions, the great devotees we speak of, will have to hold on to Trikal Sandhya to fight; otherwise, time will not be on their side, I am telling you beforehand. Secondly, those who are true devotees will understand the Bhavishya Malika. Those who are not devotees will not understand it, will not respect it, and will not even consider it. I sent the Bhavishya Malika to the great traditions of India; I know what reaction I received. That's why I have all the information about what is going to happen and what is not. But a true devotee is one, as Achyutananda said, 'Ananya jahi mahima prakash ja.' This means that the true devotees of Lord Shri Krishna will find great joy in the Bhavishya Malika. They will accept it, understand it, and also follow it. Therefore, wherever God wishes for it to be propagated, it will surely be propagated there. There are many people in Vrindavan and Mathura who believe in the Bhavishya Malika, perform Trikal Sandhya, and have formed circles. And for those who don't need it, who are not worthy—meaning those who do not have the right as devotees to the Bhavishya Malika—even when it reached them, they did not accept it. What does it matter? Our job is to propagate and save the devotees. The one who is a devotee will understand; the one who is not a devotee will not understand.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Pandit ji, I had a dream where I saw Goddess Durga with 8 or 10 arms, the Lord, and Goddess Saraswati all together. The Lord was playing a game of hide-and-seek and I couldn't catch him. Later, I saw a reflection of Mahaprabhu Balabhadra in the washroom, and I still see it. Please shed some light on this. Should we consider this impure because the reflection appears in the bathroom? Or is this a divine play (leela) of the Lord?
Answer: The dream you had is a play of both Durga and Madhav. Mother Durga, Mahalakshmi, Yog Maya, sometimes take the form of Saraswati, sometimes Mother Mahalakshmi, and sometimes Mother Mahakali, according to their will. They manifest in infinite forms throughout the universe. This is the time for the establishment of dharma by Durga and Madhav, which is why you had this dream. And how you saw the Lord but couldn't catch him, and about the bathroom... For us, a bathroom is a bathroom, for us, it is unclean. But the ultimate element is one. God is always everywhere; God is in every particle of the earth. Therefore, this is a matter of the mind's purity and God's imagination. Strengthen your Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavat Ji, and as you progress with time, you will have many more dreams in which God, the gods, and goddesses will tell you about the times to come.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।

It can also be due to a cough, cold, or pain; get that checked too. And perform Madhav's Trikal Sandhya; you will surely get the Mother's protection and grace.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: I am from Maharashtra, I spoke to you to get your blessings.
Answer: Okay, mother, the blessings are surely there. But you all should follow dharma, purity, and my stream of thought so that you will definitely receive God's grace, and with that grace, you and your family can move forward.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: I had a question related to my life. It is written in that book that electronic items will stop working. Does this also mean that our careers will be gone? I am in an MBA program, does this mean that many people will become unemployed?
Answer: Look, son, that time has not come yet. The situation will start to form from 2025. But God gave us birth and also our karma (actions). If there is a change in the whole world, we will also change. If electronics don't work in the whole world, then what will we do with electronics? But that time is not now. 2032-33 is the time for the establishment of dharma. So for now, just study, work, and do your karma. As the world changes with time, we will also change. Suppose the price of gold today is 5000, but a time will come when no one will buy gold even for 1 rupee. Work is necessary according to the times. Do your work; you have studied, so get a good job. When the world changes, we will move into the next era with the new changes, and there we will receive God's grace and live in bliss. It moves with time. You do your work, do your duty. And along with your duty, also practice dharma so that this body can survive and enter the next era.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Guruji, for the last two or three days, I've been having a dream where I see a person chasing me like a demon, and I run away from him in fear. And another person calls out to me loudly, saying 'Devi Kanya, Devi Kanya' (Divine Maiden). This has been happening intermittently. What does it mean?
Answer: Listen, this is the effect of Kali (the demon of Kali Yuga). You are performing Trikal Sandhya, that's why Kali is chasing you and scaring you, as if to say, 'I will not spare you.' But you are receiving the grace of the gods, as they say, 'She is a divine maiden, what is the use of going after her?' The gods have come to earth, they are performing Trikal Sandhya, and you have also joined them. So this is proof that through Trikal Sandhya, the demon Kali and his influence can destroy sinful people, but he cannot do anything to the devotees.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Father, I also see in my dreams people slaughtering cows on the side. I get very angry and ask, 'Why are you slaughtering the cow?' And they repeatedly tell me, 'Devi Kanya, save us! Devi Kanya, save us!' What does this mean?
Answer: By God's grace, something might happen in the future, so I will not discuss this openly, mother. Secondly, those who slaughter mother cow are the demons. On one hand, God is showing their sin, and you are also seeing the deity of sin. At the same time, the light of dharma is also manifesting, as the gods make you feel that, yes, this can be done. A time will come when you all, with divine power, can punish and destroy those in the world who slaughter mother cow and commit sins. So, time is the greatest factor. Remain at God's feet; you have seen a good dream. Okay.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: My question is this, Acharya: when the war between India and Pakistan happens, according to the Bhavishya Malika, will China, along with 13 Muslim countries, attack India at the same time, or will it attack after the war is over?
Answer: No, it will be at the same time, together. First, Pakistan will attack, and along with that, China will attack within a day or two. They will fight together, and then the 13 Muslim countries will also join them and fight against India at the same time.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Greetings, Father. My question is, when we perform Trikal Sandhya, we sing 'Keshava dhrta-buddha-sarira' in the Dashavatara Stotra. Is this referring to Lord Buddha or Gautama Buddha? There is a lot of confusion because Lord Buddha is also described in the Bhagavatam.
Answer: Look, the Buddha who came in the middle ages, who is also called Gautama Buddha, is not a different Buddha. Because only one Buddha came in the Kali Yuga. The Lord has three avatars in this age: Buddha Dev, Chaitanya Bhagavan, and Kalki. So, this is the same one; it is clear in the Bhavishya Malika. The one who is Gautama Buddha is the same Buddha; there is no difference. It is about that same Buddha avatar, who came to earth as the son of Anjana in the city of Kīkaṭa. He was our Lord, an avatar who came to protect dharma and oppose the killing of animals. For some days, dharma spread, but after that, people became immersed in sin. Now, they are taking Buddhism in a different direction. But a time will come when even the good saints in Buddhism will take refuge in Lord Kalki.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Did you recognize me? This is Nilesh from Ulhasnagar.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Pandit ji, I want to tell you about my dreams. One was from a few years ago, where a voice from the sky said Lord Krishna has taken birth in Sambal village in Odisha. In another recent dream, a Brahmin told me I was Duryodhana in my past life and showed me the death of Abhimanyu. What is the meaning of this, Pandit ji? I have been very confused since then.
Answer: Look, I'll tell you. The eternal Pancha Sakha, the Pandavas, and all the great warriors from the Mahabharata war like Arjuna, Duryodhana, Karna, Shalya, and Jayadratha have all taken birth on earth. And they will all stay together. There will be a war with Pakistan and China. One phase of the Mahabharata war is still remaining, and their wishes will also be fulfilled. This time, they will not be separate; the Kauravas and Pandavas will be in one place, with dharma, with God, and they will fight against the demons and mlecchas. Perform Trikal Sandhya, stay in the refuge of Madhav, so that your life can be saved.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: I had a dream between 3 and 4 AM. I was longing for the Lord's darshan, and in the dream, he came to my house wearing a black t-shirt and shorts. I served him simple food, which he ate happily. He said our relationship is from birth after birth. His knees were hurting, so I massaged his feet. What does this mean, Father?
Answer: Mother, are you performing Trikal Sandhya? I had told you that those who perform Trikal Sandhya will get a vision of God. And according to the scriptures, Lord Kalki's age is 17, and he likes to wear black clothes. That is why he gave you a vision in that form. You are fortunate. To let your fortune grow, remain in devotion and perform Trikal Sandhya. Those who perform it have received the darshan of Lord Jagannath; what is the need to go to his temple? Trikal Sandhya is such a great power that what sages could not achieve in thousands of years, a person in Kali Yuga can achieve in a few days or a month—they can get a vision of God and His proximity. You have received the vision of Lord Kalki's avatar in human form. You are very fortunate.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Father, I want to share a very significant experience. A few days ago, I was crying in front of my Kanha ji, whom I consider my brother, saying I just want to meet him. That very same night, a friend called and asked if I wanted to go to Vrindavan, and now I am going in June. It happened right after I cried to him.
Answer: Yes, daughter, very good. Look, it wasn't a dream, it's real. In truth, the region of Vrindavan was from the Dvapara Yuga. At this time, Lord Kalki has taken birth in Sambal, which we call Bauddha Vrindavan. Because wherever the Lord resides, that is Vrindavan. You have God's grace upon you. The Bhavishya Malika was composed 600 years ago so that when Lord Krishna comes, devotees can recognize him. You are very young; perform Trikal Sandhya, stay in the refuge of Madhav. In the future, you may also be able to contribute to the Lord's establishment of dharma.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Pandit ji, this is Akash Thakur. As you said that in 2026 there might be a war between India and China or Pakistan, I was thinking, for the service of my country, can I, as an ordinary citizen, go to defend my country?
Answer: Look, serving the country is the duty of every citizen. You have a very good intention. But this is a time for serving the country, for salvation, and for righteous deeds. The devotees also need to be saved, so this is also service to the country. Go and serve according to your capacity. And perform Trikal Sandhya, because protecting human life is the biggest question. To protect humanity from the coming diseases and calamities, Trikal Sandhya is necessary. Therefore, perform Trikal Sandhya, and serve the country according to your capacity, in a way that your family, your parents, and your body all remain in a state of bliss and happiness.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Father, I have a question that many people have. For those of us in household life, as husband and wife, in this age of Kali Yuga, we are unable to control the act of sexual intercourse. So, for those in household life, is there any fault in this or not? Please shed some light on this.
Answer: You have asked a very good question. It is written in the Srimad Bhagavata Purana, there is a rule for Sanatanis. The rule is that after having children as needed, a husband and wife should not live in lust and desire. However, in modern life, people are unable to stay away from that act because today's environment distracts them. But try as much as you can to maintain some distance. All husbands and wives should stay a little away from this lust and desire because this is our Sanatana rule, as it destroys a person's celibacy (brahmacharya). The less contact, the better. The Satya Yuga is coming, so you all should also slowly move towards self-control. This is not good.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: If I tell someone to give up meat and alcohol, they feel that this is the work of holy men and women, and that they cannot give it up in their society. If I try to explain what is going to happen in the future, they are not ready to understand. They feel it will happen, but there is a lot of time. How should I deal with them?
Answer: Look, we are looking for those devotees who have worked with God for four yugas, so they can come in contact with God. The devotees who come selflessly, without thinking whether it will happen or not, are the true devotees. We don't tell anyone that destruction is coming, so you should turn to dharma. The Bhavishya Malika is for the salvation of those devotees who were with the Lord in his divine plays in all four yugas. The people you talk to, it is not in their destiny; they are unfortunate. Destruction will definitely happen. God has held it back because the devotees have not yet been saved. When it increases, they will see destruction everywhere, but then it will be of no use. The devotees will come before that. Just look for the devotees and speak to them; it is not good to discuss with other people. What is the use of telling the demons?

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Guruji, when I started Trikal Sandhya last November, I had dreams of Lord Shrinathji, Lord Jagannath, and Mother Lakshmi. In one dream, Mother Lakshmi even threatened me with a sword for not doing Trikal Sandhya properly. But now, to be honest, I have become very lazy and am not able to do the morning Sandhya. I feel that the hope God had in me before is now diminishing.
Answer: Look, Mother Mahalakshmi is also Durga and Kali. She placed that sword on your neck because destruction is coming. Perform Trikal Sandhya. People who do not perform it will not survive on earth, I am warning you again and again. The world will have to accept the principle of Trikal Sandhya. Therefore, perform it at the right time to be protected from the coming calamity. You say you don't have time... this is the element to conquer death! To conquer death, Trikal Sandhya is the only element; there is no other. Humans will have to accept it. Those who don't will see destruction. Just as you received God's vision before, you will receive it again. Perform Trikal Sandhya, don't be lazy, you are young, move forward. May God's grace be with you.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: I have a question. You said that in the end, 640 million people will survive. Then, in a video, you warned people, 'There is still time, mend your ways.' What is the benefit of warning them if it is already certain that 640 million devotees will survive?
Answer: Absolutely, everything will happen by God's will. But the scriptures say not to twist their meaning but to present them clearly and firmly to the people of Kali Yuga. The more firmly you state it, the more good it will do. The people of Kali Yuga are lazy, greedy, lustful, and always want pleasure. To bring them onto the right path, the scriptures must be described clearly. We do that. Those who have it in their destiny will accept it. The unfortunate ones don't even listen.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Father, just five minutes ago I lit a lamp. I had kept a peacock feather in the temple, and it fell on the lamp and started burning. My daughter started crying, 'Mama, run, there's a fire!' What is this a sign of, Father?
Answer: Do you perform Trikal Sandhya? As you perform Trikal Sandhya, Lord Krishna is giving you proof that the peacock crown will no longer work; destruction will now take place. The burning of the peacock crown in your house is a warning for you devotees that the Lord will carry out destructive work in the future. You will have no trouble, don't worry. You perform Trikal Sandhya, what is there to fear? If anyone performs Trikal Sandhya, they have no fear. Live well. Sit and chant bhajans 108 times at night and receive Madhav's grace.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: I was asking, Father, an acquaintance of mine has two cats, one is black and one is golden-colored. Can I adopt them?
Answer: Look, one should take care of animals, but don't get attached to them. Respecting every animal, raising them, feeding them—this is human duty. But don't get attached; keep your attachment to God. Yes, for the sake of karma, you can raise them, meaning for their service. Serving animals is also good.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Pandit ji, I used to be very devoted, but now I have duties and studies. When I do my devotion, my focus shifts from my duties, and when I do my work, my focus on devotion lessens. Answer: God speaks, God listens, God eats. Didn't I tell you, last month a daughter from Punjab fed God khichdi? Where is it that God doesn't listen or eat? You must increase your devotion. Do your work and studies too. Devotion will increase with Trikal Sandhya. 30 minutes of Trikal Sandhya in a 24-hour day can save your life. Even those who fail exams or interviews have become worthy of employment by performing it. You have to give 30 minutes a day. By doing so, along with a person's salvation, God also fulfills their material needs. Perform Trikal Sandhya, devotion will come, and God's grace will be there.

Video Title: L131: क्या अमेरिका और चीन मिलकर भारत के विरुद्ध समझौता करेंगे? भविष्य मालिका में क्या लिखा हुआ है।
Question: Pandit ji, a year and a half ago, I fell into lust and committed very bad deeds. By the Lord's grace, I heard his stories and stopped sinning. I even took initiation and my devotion was going well, but lustful desires troubled me again. While no major sin was committed, small sins like masturbation keep happening. Can a lowly and wretched person like me also be saved or not?
Answer: Look, son, God saves everyone. He saves sinners, the righteous, and devotees. That is why the Bhavishya Malika says this scripture is for the salvation of all. You are not a sinner. Sometimes, a person does wrong deeds, but the person is not bad, the soul is not bad. There is still time. Perform Trikal Sandhya, stay in the refuge of Madhav. With time, that bad habit will change, and you will become good again. It's okay, son. Make God your guru, become a disciple of God, then you will be saved. Therefore, perform Trikal Sandhya.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Why is this climate change happening?
Answer: This is happening because of the change of eras (Yuga Parivartan). It is written in our scriptures that at the end of Satya Yuga, Treta Yuga, and Dvapara Yuga, major changes in the weather occurred on Earth. The situation we see today—increasing heat, unseasonal rains, deserts turning green—is a sign of this. This is happening because Sanatana Dharma will be established across the world, and with its light, even the desert regions will become green, beautiful, and sacred. This is a sign of the changing era. The temperature is rising, large forests are catching fire, and this will continue until unrighteousness, sin, corruption, and atrocities are eliminated from human civilization. This change of era will bring great transformations and also great calamities for humanity.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I wanted to ask... my father is having an angiography. Please ask everyone here to pray for me and my father, so that everything goes well and he has no problems.
Answer: Okay. For everyone connected in this satsang, her father is in the hospital and is in some trouble. I request all devotees to pray to God for her father's well-being and successful treatment. May God's grace be upon him. This is service to humanity; there are no 'ours' and 'theirs,' everyone is our own. So I request you all to pray.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I have a question. I often get stuck between my mind and my heart. I am enjoying devotion now, and my mother has also joined the stream. When I meditate on the Lord, I feel good, and negative thoughts are much less frequent than before. But sometimes, while I'm meditating and feeling good, a negative thought about the Lord or something else suddenly pops into my mind. When I look into my heart, I see nothing like that, only the Lord. I get stuck wondering, if there's nothing like that in my heart, where did this thought suddenly come from?
Answer: When a conflict or any disturbing external negativity enters your mind, at that moment, sit and chant the name 'Madhav' 108 times. Take refuge in Madhav, in the form of Lord Krishna or Lord Rama, whichever form you prefer, and chant 108 times. Then, the feeling of devotion will return.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: What is the difference between love and devotion?
Answer: The difference between love (prem) and devotion (bhakti) is that when love for God comes first, devotion will follow. We become attached to whom we love. First, understand that God is the only one who will liberate you in this world. Awaken love for God, sing praises of His glory, and read about His divine plays (leelas) in the scriptures. As you continue to read, with time and God's grace, Mother Bhakti (the goddess of devotion) will come and reside in you, and devotion will arise. The scriptures mention three ways to attain devotion: first is idol worship, second is reading scriptures, and third is contemplating or reading about the Lord's divine plays and glory. Devotion comes from these three elements. You can read scriptures, worship an idol of the Lord and offer your devotion, or attain devotion by glorifying the Lord and chanting His name. Chanting His name will take time; it won't happen in a day or a month.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: We are facing a lot of problems at home with our business and with illnesses. Please give your blessings so that everything becomes alright.
Answer: Okay, do one thing. Conduct a seven-day reading of the Bhagavata Purana at home. The whole family should get together and chant the name of Madhav. This will resolve your family's problems. My blessings are fully with you. Organize a seven-day Bhagavata reading at your home with all your family members. Feed the mother cow some roti daily. With purity of mind and body, read the Bhagavata for seven days. Distancing yourself from worldly feelings, pray to the Lord, 'O Lord, please fix our family's situation.' There is a slight fault in the soil of the land where your house is built, which is causing this. Do this, and it might be the remedy. Also, chant the name of Madhav, and tell everyone to chant the name of Mother Mahalakshmi 108 times for the business to improve.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My question is that here in Canada, Mother Cow is subjected to a lot of cruelty, not just by those who eat meat, but also in the dairy industry. So, I have this dilemma: by drinking milk and eating cheese, which are necessary for children, are we contributing to more cruelty towards Mother Cow? Are we responsible for it? What should we do?
Answer: You've asked a very good question. First, pray to Lord Krishna every day. Say, 'Lord, please establish Dharma as soon as possible and protect Mother Cow from this cruelty.' This is in God's hands, and when devotees pray, God will surely do something. Second, consuming products made from Mother Cow's milk, like cheese, does not bring any sin upon you, because Mother Cow is a mother. Just as our mother feeds us milk and raises us, Mother Cow sustains humanity her whole life by giving her milk. There is no sin in this. Those who do wrong, it is their karma; we have nothing to do with it. You can eat cheese and drink milk; there is no sin. But pray to God for the swift establishment of Dharma and the protection of Mother Cow. Until Sanatana Dharma is established, it will be difficult to stop cow slaughter on this earth. So, take refuge in God; the time is near. If you ever get time, you can also do some small service in a Goshala (cow shelter). This strengthens our religious power as Sanatani Hindus.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: What is the meaning of the five colors in the Panchrangi Dhwaja (five-colored flag)?
Answer: They represent Truth (Satya), Peace (Shanti), Compassion (Daya), Forgiveness (Kshama), and Friendship (Maitri). There will be truth, peace, and compassion—meaning compassion for people even if they make mistakes, compassion for all living beings, and opposition to the killing of animals. Forgiveness means even the biggest sinners can be forgiven. And friendship means the whole world is one family (Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam). This is the flag of Sanatana Dharma. Lord Krishna established Dharma in the Dvapara Yuga with this flag. The same flag, through the Sudharma Mahasangh, will establish Sanatana Dharma throughout the world. Therefore, the flag of Lord Kalki will be this five-colored flag. Devotees should first hoist it in their own homes.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Before I knew about the Bhavishya Malika, I had faith in a certain guru. Can I still take initiation (diksha) from them now, after knowing about the Bhavishya Malika and being in this stream?
Answer: In the current times, I would say that time is short. One should take refuge in Lord Krishna or Lord Kalki. It will be difficult for any other tradition (parampara) to save humanity. For liberation, take refuge in Lord Kalki, chant his name, and perform Trikal Sandhya. There is no time left. A time of great change is coming. The period from 2025 to 2032 will be a great test for human civilization, and during this time, no other tradition will be able to protect you. If you want to fulfill the purpose of your life, you must perform Trikal Sandhya.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: It's been four months since I started doing Trikal Sandhya, but I don't have any spiritual experiences or visions of the Lord. I feel like there is some shortcoming in me. When I hear about others' experiences, I wonder why it's not happening to me.
Answer: Okay. If you want to have a vision of the Lord, then read about Lord Krishna's 'Dwarika Vijay' (Victory of Dwarka). There is a chapter in the Srimad Bhagavatam called 'Dwarika Aagman' (Arrival in Dwarka). Read it every month. And pray to Lord Madhav. See, until you take complete refuge in Madhav and have faith in him, how will you get a vision of the Lord? So, along with that, chant the name 'Madhav' 108 times. You will surely have a vision of the Lord.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: When I do Trikal Sandhya, sometimes I feel sleepy. I pray that I don't fall asleep, but when I close my eyes, I start seeing scenes. I feel very bad about this. Is this due to some negativity, or is it that I cannot bear the power of the Trikal Sandhya?
Answer: See, when you perform Trikal Sandhya, the deities (devatas) arrive, and Nidra Devi (the goddess of sleep) also arrives. Due to the influence of the deities, some people yawn, and some feel sleepy. This is a very good, positive sign. Continue doing it because it is having an effect on you. As you keep doing Trikal Sandhya, with God's grace, this will stop happening later. It happens for a few days in the beginning. This is not negativity; it's a good sign. Continue.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I just want to have a vision of the Lord. How can I get one?
Answer: You will surely get a vision of the Lord. The Lord gives visions in dreams during Sandhya. He will definitely give it, but wait for the right time. If someone wants a vision, they should chant the name 'Madhav' 108 times before sleeping and ask Madhav for a vision. Then tell me what happens. You will surely get a vision. If anyone wants a vision, chant the name 'Madhav' 108 times before sleeping and say, 'Lord Madhav, please give me a vision.' A vision is certain, and it does happen.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: When I do Trikal Sandhya, I yawn a lot, and tears just keep flowing from my eyes, they don't stop. I feel that perhaps I am making some mistake, and that's why this happens.
Answer: It doesn't just happen to you; it happens to me too, my child. This is because the deities (devatas) enter the body. You are not making any mistake; it is a good thing. The 33 crore gods and goddesses will enter human bodies, turn them into deities, and create the Satya Yuga. Those who perform Trikal Sandhya will each become a deity. The power of 33 crore gods and deities comes during Trikal Sandhya, which is why you yawn. It is very blissful. This is a good sign.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Is the pandemic coming in the month of Vaishakh? Is it coming after the 13-day fortnight (paksha)?
Answer: A pandemic will come in the month of Vaishakh. After that, as I have said before, on March 29, 2025, at 5:20 PM, Saturn will transit into Pisces (Meen Shani). Before or during this transit, which will last for three and a half years, a very destructive disease will come. There will be 64 types of diseases. Seven times, the sound of death will disturb human civilization on Earth. We heard the sound of death once with Corona. The sound of death that will come next will be true death. When the disease comes, it is the Lord's responsibility. He will save the devotees and those who do Trikal Sandhya on one hand, and punish the sinners on the other.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Just as Lord Rama was born in the Raghu clan (Raghukul) and Lord Krishna was in the Yadu clan (Yadukul), in which clan will Lord Madhav be born?
Answer: Madhav will take incarnation in the Suryavansh (Solar Dynasty). And his old gotra (lineage), all the rules, and the planetary positions will all align in the same way as before.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I have been trying to talk to you for a long time. I've gathered the courage today to ask for your blessings.
Answer: Okay. May the grace of Lord Krishna and Lord Jagannath be upon you. To protect yourself from the coming problems on Earth, read the Srimad Bhagavatam daily. This is my blessing. My blessing is the reading of the Srimad Bhagavatam because this one element for the welfare of humanity was hidden, which I have now revealed. The blessings are always there, but do as I say, and you will be blessed.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I want to ask about an experience I had in a dream. I was holding Lord Madhav's feet, and he showed me his complete cosmic form (Virat Roop) in the sky. Immediately after that, I had a vision of Goddess Durga. What does this mean?
Answer: The Lord showed his cosmic form to Arjuna, and he has now shown it to you. The vision of Mother Durga Devi means that the Lord will establish Dharma by assuming his cosmic form. The sage Ananda has written, 'He will assume the cosmic form.' The Lord gave you a vision in his cosmic form; you are very fortunate.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My brother and father work very hard, but their work doesn't succeed. What should they do?
Answer: God puts people with similar karmas in the same boat. If they are not getting the fruits of their labor, tell them to perform Trikal Sandhya and chant the name of Madhav. Then they will get the results. People who had nothing have seen great progress and development in their lives through Trikal Sandhya and purity. So tell them to do it. First, chant the name of Madhav, then move forward and do this as well. Doing everything will surely bring results.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: You said that the Lord will be born in the Suryavansh (Solar Dynasty). But Suryavanshis are Rajputs. You also said he will be born as a Brahmin, but Brahmins are not Suryavanshis, are they?
Answer: The Lord will first be born in a Brahmin clan. The family he is born into will be a Brahmin family. From the day the Lord is born, that lineage will become the Suryavansh. This is written in the Bhavishya Purana. Whichever clan or caste the Lord is born into, His lineage remains the Suryavansh. It is written in the Bhavishya Purana that the Lord will be born in a Brahmin clan, and when He is born, His lineage will become famous as the Suryavansh.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I am in the stream, but it's not possible for me to give up onion and garlic right now. I wish to wear a Kanthi Mala (sacred necklace). Can I do so?
Answer: Yes, if you want to wear a Kanthi Mala, you can. Onion and garlic are not non-vegetarian, but they are not used in temples. Even those who eat them can wear a Kanthi Mala. According to the rules, when you are eating onion and garlic, you should take off the mala and keep it aside. After eating, you can wear it again.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Has the Lord been born?
Answer: Your feeling that He has come is true. Perform Trikal Sandhya daily and chant Madhav's name 108 times before sleeping. Madhav will give you a vision in your dream and tell you whether He has come or not.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I asked if the Lord has been born because I wanted to know when His childhood plays (Bal Leela) will take place on Akhanda mountain, and when the devotees will be able to participate.
Answer: I told you, chant Madhav's name 108 times before sleeping and ask, 'Lord, have you come?' If the Lord tells you in a dream, then let me know. Before sleeping, chant Madhav's name 108 times and ask Madhav. He will tell you in a dream.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: With your blessings, I am completely well now and can do Trikal Sandhya three times a day. Please bless me so that I can have a vision of Kanhaiya's Madhav form. He gives me visions in other forms, but ever since I asked for his Madhav form, he hasn't appeared to me.
Answer: Okay, ask Madhav, and Madhav will give you a vision in his Madhav form. You will get a vision of Kalki Madhav. Go.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Can the world war be avoided? War is a very bad thing.
Answer: The world war can be avoided when human beings stop slaughtering Mother Cow. When humans stop killing cows, the war will stop. If they don't, God will definitely start the war. The pot of human sins is overflowing. So it depends on humans whether there will be a war or not. But in my opinion, humans have become arrogant, egoistic, and drowned in sin, corruption, killing animals, alcohol, and lust. The establishment of Dharma is necessary. If Dharma is not established, this Earth will break into pieces. Therefore, the savior will definitely establish Dharma. It is still in the hands of humans; if they change and cow slaughter stops, there will be peace. If they don't, God will not spare them.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: When will the gathering of the saints happen, and in which year?
Answer: In Kali Yuga, all the saints are divided. No one accepts anyone else; they speak against each other. Everyone thinks they are the most knowledgeable. When the Lord arrives, they will all come together out of fear. Once a great destruction, a great Tandava (dance of destruction), happens in North India, in the Himalayas, and after seeing Lord Kalki's destructive form, all the saints will gather. Right now, due to the influence of Kali, they don't get along.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I heard on your channel that all the gods and goddesses have now left the pilgrimage sites (Tirtha sthan). Is there any merit (punya) in visiting them now?
Answer: See, the gods and goddesses have left their places; it is written in the scriptures. However, the place itself has glory; the pilgrimage site has its own sanctity. Therefore, going to temples and visiting pilgrimage sites is a Sanatani tradition. You should follow that as well. And what is written [about them leaving] is also correct.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Regarding the recent fire incident at the Mahakal temple in Ujjain on Holi, the priests there were saying that Mahakal has now awakened. What is the meaning of this?
Answer: I have been saying since 2018 that Lord Shankar has engaged in the act of destruction in his destructive form. This is proof. What happened in Ujjain, in the Lord's temple—the burning of thirteen Brahmins in the fire—is a sign that the Earth is going to burn in a world war. Human beings should mend their ways and become conscious. It will be for their own good; otherwise, bad times are coming. To better oneself, one must take refuge in the Lord.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: We are told to exercise, then do Trikal Sandhya. But when I sit to do it, there's a strong tingling sensation in my legs, and I can't sit for more than 15-20 minutes. What should I do?
Answer: You can do Trikal Sandhya in any situation. You can do it sitting on a chair, lying on the floor, or lying on a bed. You can do it while traveling in any vehicle. If your legs hurt, sit on a chair or do it with your legs stretched out. Sit with your legs straight and do it. What's the problem?

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My brother, my mother, and I are connected to the stream, but my father is not. My parents have a strong desire to do something for our ancestors (pitrus) so they can attain liberation (mukti). What can we do?
Answer: May God help those who are not connected to join the stream. And those who are connected should perform Trikal Sandhya. Peace will come to that family, they will receive God's grace, and they will progress. They will also be protected from the destruction of the changing era. Therefore, time is the most important factor.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Are there any specific remedies or places for performing Shraddha (ancestral rites) for my grandfather?
Answer: Yes, you can perform Shraddha. You can do it in Prayag, at the Ganga river, in Nabhi Gaya, Bodh Gaya, Pada Gaya, or even at Godavari. You can perform Shraddha anywhere. Your father can perform the rites, and you can assist him.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Have all the divine warriors been born? I feel I am one of them. Has Pradyumna ji been born?
Answer: All the deities, Yadavas, Gopas, and Gopis have been born. But how do you feel you are Pradyumna? He was such a great warrior that he had the power to dry up the ocean. Do you have such power? He had the ability to travel anywhere in the universe in a moment. Do you have any such ability? It's good that you feel this way. But you must perform Trikal Sandhya and take refuge in Madhav for the times ahead.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Is it necessary to be a vegetarian for 15 days before starting Trikal Sandhya?
Answer: No, anyone can start Trikal Sandhya at any time. However, along with starting it, one must give up killing animals, eating fish and meat, alcohol, tobacco, and other intoxicants. Otherwise, Trikal Sandhya will not have an effect; its influence will not enter the body.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Will there be 64 pandemics or 7 pandemics? I've heard different numbers.
Answer: There will be 64 types of diseases. The pandemic will come seven times.

Video Title: L132: ज्यादा धूप और सऊदी में बारिश का कारण क्या है? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My faith is firm that the Lord has come in a human form. But some unrighteous social media pages spread negativity, trying to prove it's all a fraud. Despite having received personal proof from the Lord, my mind sometimes gets disturbed by this and thinks, 'He just looks like a human.' How do I deal with this illusion (maya) and overcome this doubt?
Answer: Your faith must be firm. If we keep conflict in our minds, God will increase that conflict because He always tests His devotees. Even great sages like Vashishtha will not be able to recognize Lord Kalki, so how can an ordinary human? That is why the Bhavishya Malika was written. Therefore, remove this conflict from your mind. Tell yourself, 'Madhav, whoever you are—a piece of wood, a stone, a plant—my faith in you is unshakable.' You will surely receive God's grace. Remove the conflict from your mind and move forward. No one except Madhav will establish Dharma on this Earth. Understand the times. Time is not in our hands. Go and take refuge in the Lord.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Will human civilization be completely wiped out by the coming nuclear war? Will human civilization be completely destroyed?
Answer: A nuclear war will certainly happen, but human civilization will not be wiped out. This is because at the end of Dvapara and Kali Yuga, there is a 'Khanda Pralaya' or partial disaster, not a complete one. Human civilization will be protected, the world will benefit, and a beautiful environment will be created. So, while the impending nuclear war will bring disaster, the core of human civilization will be saved. Not all of humanity will perish. In every country in the world, human civilization will survive. The most will survive in India because it is the land of the gods, where God and deities reside. The more foreign enemies attack India, the more the devotees and people will be saved by God's grace. On one hand, the Indian army will fight, and on the other, the gods and devotees will also fight, and humanity will be delivered. Therefore, there is no need to fear this coming calamity. This change is happening by God's will and as a result of people's karma, to fully establish Sanatana Dharma in the world. This change will bring freedom, protection for the devotees, destruction for the sinners, and the re-establishment of Sanatana Dharma across the world. So, people do not need to be afraid of the nuclear war.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, please give your blessings so that we may soon have a vision of the Lord.
Answer: May God's grace be upon you. Perform the Trikal Sandhya and keep moving forward; everything will be fine. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, sometimes the mind wanders while performing Sandhya. What should be done?
Answer: Trikal Sandhya is a form of penance, and it is difficult for people in the Kali Yuga to perform penance. External and negative elements of the Kali Yuga will surely make the mind wander. Don't worry about it. Just keep doing it. As you continue, a time will come when your steadfastness, devotion, and faith will increase, and you will see that the Lord is standing right in front of you. This also happens. So, in the beginning, just keep moving forward.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: In the Bhagavat, Narad Muni's previous life is mentioned. Before that life, was he a normal human like us, or was he already Narad Muni? Or did he become Narad Muni after that birth with the Lord's blessings?
Answer: In his previous life, as described in the Bhagavata Mahatmya, Narad Mahamuni was born as the son of a maidservant. His father passed away in his childhood. After his father's death, his mother worked at the house of a Brahmin landlord. His mother also passed away, but before her death, by serving the sages during Chaturmasya at the Brahmin's house, Narad received a seed mantra and the grace of the Brahmins. With that grace, he later performed penance through the medium of Trikal Sandhya. After a thousand divine years, during the time of Brahma's sleep (Brahma Pralaya), Narad was born as a mind-born son of Lord Brahma. So, he went from being a human to a demigod, and from a demigod to an incarnation of the Lord. Prahlada was also once a human and attained the post of Indra. Dhruva was also once a human and became the king of the Shishumara chakra in Goloka Vaikuntha. In this way, humans become gods, gods become humans, and humans also attain liberation.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My maternal grandmother is ill. Please give her your blessings so she can get well soon.
Answer: My blessings are always there, but the thing is, you should make your grandmother listen to the Trikal Sandhya at the three designated times of the day. At other times, have her listen to the Srimad Bhagavatam. Through this, and if she is able to speak, ask her to chant the name 'Madhav'. Doing this increases a person's lifespan and provides protection from calamities.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, none of my work is getting done. I remain ill and have diabetes. How will I get better?
Answer: We bring illness upon ourselves through our own karma. Every human body has every disease, but when our karma, specifically our dharma (righteous action), decreases—just as a lack of drinking water harms the body—illness arises. For protection from illness, we must perform Trikal Sandhya, chant the name 'Madhav', read the Srimad Bhagavatam, attend satsang, practice dharma, give charity, and engage in chanting and kirtan. Do all of this. The most important thing is to chant the name 'Madhav'. The more you chant it, the more grace all of humanity receives, and you will receive it too. So, chant the name 'Madhav' and perform Trikal Sandhya. I have faith that through this, even someone who has no strength can become very powerful.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My question is, as a great saint says, if someone speaks against your Guru or God, and you are capable, you should punish them right then and there. But we see many who say bad things about you and Lord Kalki, and those who are capable don't punish them. What is your view on this?
Answer: Look, that is his sentiment, his sacred words. I will not comment on it, as it is not the proper tradition of Satya Yuga to engage in such discussions. But I will say this much: in this world, humans should abandon the concepts of 'I, me, mine, you, yours.' If any person says such things or criticizes someone's guru, it falls into this same category of 'I, me, mine, you, yours.' This is not beneficial for the world, and the people of Satya Yuga will not possess this trait. We have said from the beginning that people must change this way of speaking and think of everyone as one beautiful family of brothers and sisters. No guru should be criticized; every guru is respectable. Understand it from this perspective.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My son and I were watching a zombie movie where a person bites another, turning them into a cannibal. My son asked if something like this could happen in reality or in the future.
Answer: Look, this is a fictional, made-up story. It has no connection to the principles of Sanatana biology or any real disaster. These kinds of stories are more prevalent in foreign countries, and they create them for entertainment. No such disease is coming, and nothing like that will happen. Don't be afraid of it and don't think about it. It's just for people's entertainment. No such disease is coming.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I have no questions, I just want your blessings so that our devotion to the Lord continues to grow and we are unable to commit any offenses. Please bless us so our devotion increases.
Answer: That is wonderful. My blessings are always with you. When you perform Trikal Sandhya, ask the Lord, 'O Lord, please grant me pure and unwavering devotion, one that is free from worldly illusion and attachment.' The Lord will surely be merciful. You have my blessings; God will definitely shower His grace.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: The Lord has two mantras: the Ekakshar mantra and the Kalki Mahamantra. Which of these two should I chant? And should it be chanted as a formal spiritual practice with a vow, or can it be chanted casually at any time?
Answer: Look, I don't recommend the Ekakshar mantra or the Kalki mantra. I recommend Trikal Sandhya and the name 'Madhav'. The Ekakshar (one-syllable) mantra is the name 'Madhav'. There is only one Lord, no other. That one Lord is the original, eternal Vishnu, and He is our Madhav. Therefore, continuously chant the name 'Madhav'. In that alone, you will find your spiritual practice and fulfill your life's purpose.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Our relationship is deteriorating. Will it get better or not? We want to improve it.
Answer: If you want to improve it, perform Trikal Sandhya. Every day, read the Gopi Leela from the tenth canto of the Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana before you go to sleep. And pray to Krishna and Radha Rani for a happy family life.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My question is, can we worship Shri Shri Thakur Anukulchandra?
Answer: Thakur Anukulchandra is indeed mentioned in the Bhavishya Malika. It is written: 'Manor kirti prakashiba, Anukul naam dhariba, deshe bideshe bhakta ashibe, satsang karibe.' Achyutananda wrote about Thakur Anukul Baba, saying he would establish a very good tradition across the world, conduct satsangs, and uplift humanity. Achyutananda also wrote that some of Anukul Baba's devotees would attain Lord Kalki. Look, mother, India is the land of gods, saints, and perfected beings. At various times, many perfected saints and sages take birth in India and work for the welfare of humanity. However, they are a medium of God. At this time, God Himself is coming, not a devotee of God, to establish dharma. Therefore, you should remain in the refuge of God. If you are in Anukul Baba's tradition, in his guru lineage, then continue to follow its rules with respect, as you wish.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Besides performing Sandhya Dhara and reading the Bhagavat, what else can we do to further increase our strength of righteousness (dharma bal)?
Answer: Mother, increasing 'dharma bal' is a very good thing. Questions like this should be asked. This is the most important thing for a human. What is the human body? It is made of the five elements—water, wind, fire, and earth—and will one day merge back into the earth. You are asking how to increase devotion, which is excellent. Look, mother, whenever you sit, expand upon the Lord's glory, name, and form in your mind and contemplate them. Continuously chant the name 'Madhav'. Never stop chanting 'Madhav'; chant it in your heart. Your devotion will grow, and Madhav's grace will increase. Achyutananda has said that by chanting the name 'Madhav', people will be liberated from the cycle of birth and death. We have two paths before us: one is to be repeatedly born in the cycle of life, wandering through sorrow, happiness, and calamities. The other is to go beyond the cycle of life and attain Vaikuntha. For those who want to attain Vaikuntha and seek protection from calamities, sorrow, and disease, they should continuously chant the name of Madhav. There is no name greater than this.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My daughter is two and a half years old. In my family, I am the only one on this spiritual path. Other family members feed my daughter eggs, and I am unable to stop them. What should I do? Is this right or wrong for her?
Answer: Look, mother, the people who feed her the egg will incur the sin. She is an innocent child; what does she know? The karmic fruit will go to those who feed her. You should not fight with them, because fighting will create conflict in the home. Instead, have your child listen to the Srimad Bhagavatam so that she herself refuses it, saying, 'I don't want to eat this.' Have her listen to Trikal Sandhya, because transformation comes from 'sanskar' (spiritual imprinting). Give the child these 'sanskars' so that she opposes it from her own mind and you don't have to fight. If you fight, you will face trouble. So, give the child these 'sanskars' and follow what I have told you.
