Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: In my home, I am strongly discouraged from practicing my devotion. Please give me your blessings so that my devotion may increase and my family members may also be inspired to follow the path of devotion and support me.
Answer: You have my blessings. Perform Trikal Sandhya and chant the name 'Madhav'. If people at home object, do not discuss matters of dharma with them. Just do your own karma. Live peacefully with your family members. Fighting with anyone is not good. The work of dharma is done with a peaceful mind. You do it. You have my blessings.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: People say that one must be initiated by a guru ('gurumukh') to receive the fruits of their worship. I have not been initiated yet. Is it necessary for me to do so?
Answer: In my opinion, at this time of establishing dharma, humans should surrender to Lord Kalki, Krishna, and Ram. God will do what needs to be done. At this time, as Lord Krishna said in the Gita: 'Sarva-dharman parityajya mam ekam sharanam vraja... Aham tvam sarva-papebhyo mokshayishyami ma shuchah.' (Abandon all varieties of religion and just surrender unto Me. I shall deliver you from all sinful reactions. Do not fear.) Lord Krishna said to abandon all religions, paths, castes, and principles and take refuge in Him. And God Himself is coming now. Therefore, refuge in anyone else is not necessary. Forget about it.

Video Title: L133: क्या परमाणु युद्ध में धरती का संपूर्ण विनाश होगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: In 2021, when there was a 13-day lunar fortnight (paksha), the COVID-19 pandemic was at its peak. I've heard another 13-day paksha is coming in June this year. Since such an event also occurred before the Mahabharata war, does this signify that a major disease or disaster is coming again?
Answer: The 13-day paksha is indeed a sign of war, destruction, and death in the world. It signals that a great calamity is coming to the Earth. But what should we think about it? We are all connected to the Lord's work, we perform Trikal Sandhya, and we follow the path of Satya Yuga. For those who follow this path, there is no problem. The problem is for those who do not. Therefore, one should take refuge in the Lord. Achyutananda also wrote that when this 13-day paksha comes, the Lord's work of destruction will increase.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Guruji, I have been married twice, and now I am doing my post-graduation. I wanted to know about my future.
Answer: Look, study well, and you will have a good future. Also, perform the Trikal Sandhya to receive Lord Madhav's grace. Okay?

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I wanted to ask, you had mentioned that if we are unable to bathe, say early at 5 AM, we can meditate on Mother Ganga and begin the Tri Sandhya. But when girls are on their period, we are considered impure. Can we take Mother Ganga's name and remember her even at that time?
Answer: Mother, during menstruation, it is forbidden to go to the temple, but it is not forbidden to chant the Lord's name. You cannot read the Bhagavata at that time, but you can chant the Trikal Sandhya mantra. You can do it at the proper time, but not in the temple or prayer room; do it in your bedroom or another separate place. You can remember Mother Ganga, and you can remember Lord Madhav's name and do bhajan (devotional singing).

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Guruji, when Satyug (the Golden Age) arrives, Lord Vishnu will bring his Ksheer Sagar (Ocean of Milk) to Earth. Will all the remaining 64 crore people be able to meet Lord Vishnu, or only a select few?
Answer: Only those who have been devotees of the Lord across all four yugas will unite with Lord Vishnu. The devotees from Satya Yuga, Treta Yuga, Dvapara Yuga, and Kali Yuga; the deities who reside in heaven; the Yakshas and Gandharvas who reside in their respective lokas; those who reside in Surya Loka and Brahma Loka—these chosen devotees and deities have taken birth on Earth at this time. They will assist Lord Kalki. The other people who survive will become worthy of having the darshan (divine sight) of Lord Kalki.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Will there be a gathering in Jajpur? Can we go?
Answer: You can come for the discourse. For the Jajpur discourse, contact the number given below. After contacting them, you can come. Anyone can come. For the Jajpur Bhagavat Katha, whichever devotees wish to come, it is an invitation for all. You should provide your name and the number of people coming so that the organizers can make arrangements for your stay. You will not have to spend a single penny. Your stay and food will be provided by the Vishwa Sanatan Dharma organization.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I wanted to ask something. Yesterday morning, when I started the Tri Sandhya, I suddenly felt scared of Mother Kali. When I closed my eyes, I felt as if she was about to appear in front of me. So, I opened my eyes to complete the prayer. When it was over, the fear disappeared. Why did this happen?
Answer: Mother Kali's grace depends on one's devotion. You remembered Mother Kali because we perform the Trikal Sandhya to pass the test that Yog Maya, or Mother Kali, will take of all devotees. This Trikal Sandhya is necessary to pass that test. That's why you remembered her or felt her presence. This is a good thing. Mother Kali bestows her grace upon and blesses those who understand her. This gives strength to humanity. For this reason, it is good that this thought or feeling came to your mind. There is nothing wrong with it; in fact, it is a good thing.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I want your blessings. I say this while touching your feet.
Answer: Mother, you have my blessings. May God's grace remain with you. But you must follow the Trikal Sandhya and the sacred path I have described with all the rules, so that the blessings of Lord Mahavishnu and Mother Mahakali, Mother Durga, remain with you, your family, and your home. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, in a previous meeting, you mentioned that by reading a specific story from the Bhagavata Katha for one month, one can have a vision of God. Could you please tell us again which story that is?
Answer: You should read about Lord Krishna's departure to Dwarka. Read it for one month and pray to Lord Madhav—don't say Krishna, say Madhav—'Lord, give me your darshan (divine vision).' You will receive the vision. You will definitely get it.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I am calling from Nashik. My sister and I got the opportunity to serve by spreading the message. We have started Trikal Sandhya again regularly. We just want to express our gratitude and ask that the Lord's grace and blessings remain upon us. We just want a place at his feet.
Answer: You will surely get it, Mother. Your devotion, your service, and your actions will definitely bring God's grace. You have done good work today, and for that, you have my praise. I pray to God that his grace remains upon you. Anand. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I perform Tri Sandhya and also read the Bhagavata, but when I chant the name of Madhav, I lose focus in between. What should I do about it?
Answer: Look, Mother, when we do this, the illusion and influence of the Kali Yuga is present, which is why a person's concentration breaks. Sometimes devotion fades, sometimes we forget, sometimes we feel sleepy or yawn. These things happen. There is nothing wrong on your part; in fact, it's a good sign. Continue chanting the Lord's name as you do. A time will come when you will do it with complete devotion. Perform this Trikal Sandhya keeping the vision of Lord Mahavishnu and Mother Durga Devi in your mind, and you will get good results.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, my family is slowly joining this path. Please bless us so that my family joins properly, and please keep your blessings upon us.
Answer: I wish for the welfare of all humanity. You should also pray, and I will also pray that our entire family comes together on this path. My blessings are fully with you, Mother. Take refuge in Madhav, and Madhav will fulfill your wish.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I just want my love for the Lord's feet to grow, and I need your blessings.
Answer: You have my blessings. Perform the Trikal Sandhya with complete devotion. Read the Bhagavata. Chant Madhav's name in your heart and mind from morning to evening, whenever you get time. Through this, you can attain complete surrender at the feet of the Lord. And constantly, in Madhav's refuge, ask only for this: 'Lord, grant me pure devotion.'

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Guruji, Lord Vishnu has 10 avatars. Among these, why do we chant the names of Shri Ram and Shri Krishna the most? Why are they worshipped more than the other avatars?
Answer: Look, Mother, the avatars of Lord Ram and Krishna are 'Lila Avatars' (avatars of divine play). In these avatars, the Lord performed 'lilas' with his devotees. The other avatars were more focused on specific purposes: Matsya avatar for establishing dharma, Kurma avatar for supporting the earth, Varaha avatar for saving the earth, Narasimha avatar for saving Prahlada, and Parashurama avatar for establishing dharma through war. The Ram avatar was a 'Lila Avatar,' involving governance and interacting with devotees. After Ram came Balarama, also for establishing dharma. Then came the Buddha avatar for promoting good conduct and opposing animal sacrifice, which remained within the guru tradition. After Buddha, the Kalki avatar will come, and Ram Rajya will be established. The more 'Lila' there is in a Lord's avatar, the more people's hearts are drawn to them, as is the case with Ram and Krishna.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, my question is that a lot of bats come to our place. They fly onto the roof, into the upstairs room, and into the open courtyard. What is the significance of this?
Answer: Look, the coming of bats is auspicious. It is a good sign; there is nothing bad about it. It is said that wherever they reside, Goddess Lakshmi also resides there. The evil goes away.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I perform Tri Sandhya. I used to read the Vishnu Sahasranama as well, but since I started Tri Sandhya, I've been unable to manage it with household chores. I am going through a lot of trouble, Gurudev. I need your blessings. My son has also lost his way, and life is very difficult.
Answer: Listen, you have 'Pitra Dosh' (ancestral affliction) in your house. There is a flaw in the soil of your house. Conduct a seven-day Bhagavata reading at home with all the family members. Don't invite anyone from outside, and not a single penny will be spent. In seven days, read the entire Bhagavata. All the afflictions will be removed. Chant the name of Madhav in your house and perform the Trikal Sandhya. Things will get better.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, I have a question: to whom should we narrate the Bhavishya Malika?
Answer: That's a very good question. The Bhavishya Malika should only be told to those who have a genuine curiosity and desire in their heart to listen. It should be shared with those who repeatedly ask to hear it in earnest. It is not necessary to tell everyone, because it is a scripture for devotees and is written only for devotees.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, we perform the Tri Sandhya, but for the past two months, we have been very troubled by our own family members. Despite so much worship, there is an atmosphere of constant quarrels in the house. We are very distressed.
Answer: Okay, do one thing for the unrest in the house. Before sleeping, chant the name of Madhav 108 times. And 11 times, chant the stotra of Abhaya Narasimha Mahaprabhu: 'Tava kara kamala vare nakham adbhuta srngam... jaya jagadisa hare.' Do this after mentally bathing in the Ganga or by washing your feet and sprinkling water on your head. Ask Madhav, 'Lord, grant me peace.' You will surely receive it.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I want to ask about the seven-day reading of the Bhagavata Katha that we do at home. Should we read both Part 1 and Part 2, or all twelve cantos?
Answer: You must read all of it. Distribute the chapters among all family members. It should be an 'Akhand Pathan' (unbroken reading) that continues day and night. For seven days, along with the reading, you must have sattvic food and sleep on the floor, not on a bed. Chant Madhav's name at the beginning and the end. By doing this, all problems in the house are resolved, and humanity is saved.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Maharaj ji, I am so troubled. My brother drinks, and I am very worried. He doesn't listen to anyone.
Answer: Look, Mother, people are born according to their karma, and they will certainly perform their karmic actions. No one can stop them. If you want peace, perform the Trikal Sandhya, chant Madhav's name, read the Bhagavata, and pray to Madhav. You will get good results. You do the Trikal Sandhya, and everything will be fine. You will see things get better in the future.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I perform all the rituals, including chanting on a mala (rosary). If I can't sleep at night, can I chant on a mala? Should I keep a separate mala for this, or use another one?
Answer: The tradition of chanting on a mala was for the Kali Yuga. In my tradition, we don't count. You can sit and chant the mantra or name for as long as you can; don't count it. Satya Yuga is coming, and all humans will chant the name all the time, not by counting. A mala helps with concentration, so you can use it, I have no objection. But you can also chant with your mind as many times as you want without a mala. Just don't count it, because worshipping God with devotion does not require counting.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, sometimes my mind doesn't focus on worship and prayers. It feels like there's some doubt or illusion with me. I don't understand.
Answer: The influence of Kali Yuga repeatedly troubles devotees, creates confusion, and makes the mind restless. This will continue to happen. We shouldn't be concerned with it. Follow the rules as I have explained them. Perform the Trikal Sandhya and read the Bhagavata. Whenever your mind gets distracted, close your eyes, meditate on the form of Lord Mahavishnu, and chant the name of Madhav. Everything is found in that alone.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I had a dream this morning before Tri Sandhya. I saw a tall building shake violently during an earthquake, and then a flood washed away all the surrounding houses and people. But everyone in that building, including children who didn't even know about Tri Sandhya, was saved. What does this mean?
Answer: Because of the Sandhya, wherever a righteous person resides, other people there are also saved. This dream is a warning for humanity about the problems that will come. The people who were saved in the dream will be saved in the future by performing the Trikal Sandhya. God may spare them once or twice, but not every time. When a devotee is protected, the building is also protected. This is the principle of Trikal Sandhya. As long as there is a righteous person on a boat, that boat will not sink. As long as there is one righteous person in a place, destruction will not come there. This is certain.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, my exams are going on. I have an exam tomorrow. Please give me your blessings so it goes well.
Answer: Mother, you have my blessings, praise, and thanks. May you move forward, and may the Lord's grace be upon you. Chant the name of Madhav continuously.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I also have an exam tomorrow, and my exam time is between 11:30 AM and 1:00 PM. How can I perform the Trikal Sandhya at that time? Can I just chant Madhav's name in my mind? I cannot leave the exam.
Answer: No problem. You can perform the Sandhya after your exam is over. Before the exam, go after chanting Madhav's name. The exam will go well.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: The more we move towards worship and religion, the more difficulties we face. But I see that people who are not religious are happier. Why is this so?
Answer: Look, Mother, a person reaps the fruits of their past karma. Those who did not give charity or do righteous deeds in their past life suffer in this life. That is why I say, do good deeds like feeding a cow daily. We have to bear the fruits of our past karma. The Trikal Sandhya and worship you are doing will surely bear fruit. This is the end of the yuga, so the influence of Kali is strong and troubles even the devotees. But don't worry. Chant the name of Madhav with devotion, and your problems will disappear. It's not necessary to worship for 10 hours. Even 10 minutes of prayer with devotion will give you the full result.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I need your blessings so that I can spread the message fully in Bhopal. It feels like time is very short, and I want to help new devotees learn about this.
Answer: May God's grace remain with you. You have my praise and my blessings. May God bless you. Anand.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Guruji, my 14-year-old daughter is not getting well. Her allergy problem is not getting cured despite many treatments. She gets rashes all over her body from anything she eats or drinks. Please bless her.
Answer: Okay. Is there a temple of Narasimha Mahaprabhu there? If not, go to any holy temple, like a Lord Shankar temple. Take a 'bel' leaf that has been offered to the deity and apply it to the parts of her body where she has the allergy. Secondly, chant the 16 names. Also, make her listen to or perform the Trikal Sandhya. Pray to Madhav that this illness leaves her, because everything happens through devotion. Even diseases like cancer are cured by Trikal Sandhya.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Many people are performing Tri Sandhya, but their actions are not right, and they have deceit in their hearts. Will the Lord protect them as well?
Answer: Look, all humans are under the influence of Kali Yuga; they have deceit, conflict, and ego. But by continuously performing the Trikal Sandhya, those people will eventually become saints and deities. It takes time. The power of the Trikal Sandhya mantra will remove these negativities, and the person will become righteous.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Madhav Mahaprabhu said, 'You stay in dharma, and I will never leave your side.' As a student, what actions can I perform to remain in dharma?
Answer: The greatest dharma is to respect, take care of, and obey your parents. Fulfill this first dharma. The second dharma is the Trikal Sandhya. The third dharma is to spread the holy name of God in society. You are studying, so just do that much, and your righteousness and purity will increase.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: There are a lot of fights and quarrels between my parents over small, trivial matters for no reason. Can you suggest a remedy for this?
Answer: Does this happen more on specific days like Saturday or Tuesday? (Questioner: No, it happens every day). Okay, no problem. If this happens between your parents, have them perform the Trikal Sandhya. The external negative influences on their minds will be removed, and then you will live in peace.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My two children don't believe in worship. They sleep during the day and stay awake at night. Our financial situation is also unstable. Also, my younger daughter is frequently ill with skin problems and swelling in her eyes that treatments haven't cured.
Answer: One who sleeps during the day and stays awake at night cannot be peaceful. Have them perform the Trikal Sandhya or read the Bhagavata; this will bring purity to their minds, and they will change over time. The financial problem will also be resolved. If they don't believe, tell them to just chant the name of Madhav for their own good. Goddess Lakshmi will not be pleased with those who stay awake at night. Regarding your daughter's health, all illnesses are due to karma. To be saved from karma, the one solution is Trikal Sandhya. Those who perform it will be the happiest people in the world.

Video Title: L134: आगे उत्तर मेरु में बर्फीला प्रलय होगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: The morning routine that has been prescribed, sometimes I get late while doing it, and the Tri Sandhya happens between 6:00 or 6:30 AM. Is there any problem with that?
Answer: No problem. Try to do it on time, but if not, God understands. Just make sure you do it.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, due to the influence of Kali Yuga, humanity is getting more and more entangled in its effects. It's natural that their 'dharma bal' (strength of righteousness) will be almost zero. There are many such people who lack this strength. What does the Bhavishya Malika say about how such people can increase their 'dharma bal'?
Answer: You have asked a very good question. The strength of righteousness must increase. As long as there is no 'dharma' (righteousness) in a person, they are not safe. And the protection of humanity is the greatest 'dharma'. To increase our 'dharma bal', we need to do three things. First, Trikal Sandhya. Second, reading the Bhagavat Ji. Third, making small donations. It's very simple. Trikal Sandhya will take 30 minutes a day. Reading the Bhagavat Ji will take at least 10 minutes. You can read the Bhagavat Ji anytime from Brahmamuhurta at 3:45 AM until 12 midnight. Along with this, from your earnings, donate a roti, five rupees, two rupees, one rupee, or 50 paise—whatever you can afford—to a cow, an animal, or a sad and hungry person. This will increase your 'dharma', and when 'dharma' increases, diseases won't be able to harm us, no calamity will be able to harm us, and even the destruction of the five elements won't be able to harm us. 'Dharma' is the most powerful, and therein lies righteousness.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My question is, I had heard that the Mother will conduct a test based on the 'Yogandha Siddhanta'. How will we be able to pass that test? I was a little scared about this.
Answer: She will test you directly and also indirectly. That is, the Mother will test you subtly through diseases and illnesses, and she will also test you directly. That time has not come yet; I will explain it later. But right now, the subtle test is ongoing. Diseases spread subtly, road accidents happen subtly, and unknown problems also arise subtly. This is all the Mother's test. This happens at the time of the 'Yuga' transition. To be protected from this, you all must follow the principles of Trikal Sandhya, which are rare even for the gods. By doing so, you can pass that test and achieve the well-being of your soul and your life.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Guruji, I wanted to ask about my mother. She remains very ill. She performs many recitations and prayers, but her practice gets interrupted due to her illness. What should she do?
Answer: Look, Ma. The cure for your mother's illness lies in spiritual principles. No matter how much a person recites, worships, or performs religious acts, it is not like the principle of Trikal Sandhya. So, make your mother listen to the Trikal Sandhya, or have her read it. Tell me what results you get from doing that. There are video and audio recordings available. Contact the number given below, get the recording of Trikal Sandhya, and make your mother listen to it. That might help.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pitaji, I have a question. My mother has passed away. My father and the rest of my family, my brother and sister-in-law, don't really keep in touch with me. Because of this, my heart remains very sad. I want to ask how I can get out of this situation.
Answer: Look, sorrow comes to every human being. But do one thing: we came into this world one day, and we will leave one day. In between, many relationships are formed and many are broken. The goal of human life is salvation from this life, that is, freedom from the bondage of the life cycle. The bondage of the life cycle means wandering through 8.4 million births again and again. Another principle is to not wander through these 8.4 million births but to move towards the ultimate truth (Paramarth). Those who become great, who get good results in exams, don't give their time to anyone. Similarly, a person who moves towards liberation does not see small things, social matters, or material things. They are always attached to God, and by staying attached, they achieve the well-being of their life and their soul. Therefore, you should also do Trikal Sandhya. All attachments will break, all illusions (maya) will break, all sorrows will break. And at the same time, make it your sole goal to move towards the ultimate truth. Strive for it continuously. This will be the greatest good for your life in this birth. Jai.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: We have heard in your discourses that the people who survive at the end of time will also be judged later. Can you explain this in a little more detail?
Answer: Ma, if we have unknowingly made mistakes, mistakes we were not aware of, those mistakes are not judged. The judgment begins from the moment we know, from when we gain the knowledge of action (karma) and inaction (akarma). And if a person, in their life, continues to perform actions based on truth, righteousness, and purity, then their past deeds are also nullified. Therefore, for your salvation, never think about how many rosaries you have chanted or how many good deeds you have done. Instead, always think of doing everything well and keeping everything based on truth. The Lord will one day extend his hand and take us. He will surely take us in due time. Act with that faith, and there will be no fault in it.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My only question was, what is going to happen to Vrindavan during the 'Panchabhoota Pralaya' (the great dissolution of the five elements), Pitaji?
Answer: Look, during the Panchabhoota Pralaya, the dissolution of the five elements will also happen in God's four primary holy sites (dhams), including his supreme abode, Shri Vrindavan. It will happen in Balaji as well. In Ujjain, it has already started to some extent. It will happen at the Jyotirlingas, at all the Devi Kshetras (divine feminine sites), and at all the Dharma Kshetras (religious sites). But regarding Vrindavan, Ma, it is written in the Bhavishya Malika that Vrindavan will first experience a water deluge. We saw it two years ago, and one year ago, the Yamuna river flooded in Vrindavan. In the future, there will be such a flood of the Yamuna that it will cause great damage to humanity and to Shri Vrindavan. Then, all the devotees of Vrindavan will accept and think that something is about to happen, because this is the land of Banke Bihari, so why is the Yamuna so angry here? Then, the residents of Vrindavan, the devotees living there, will realize the Bhavishya Malika's prophecies about the change of era and Kalki. In the future, the Yamuna's water level could rise by 30 to 50 feet, and after such a deluge, righteousness will be restored in Vrindavan. Jai.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Sir, Pandit Ji, I am a resident of Kolkata, originally from Bihar. My question is, is there any description of Maa Jwala (the Goddess of Flame) in this Bhavishya Malika?
Answer: Yes, it is written about Jwala. There is a composition about Jwalamukhi Devi, the goddess with a face of fire. She was worshipped in many places in India through her subtle power or in temples. A time will come when fire will emerge from her mouth, and the entire world, its people and creation, will be caught in it. Many people will burn in the fire. And the city of Kolkata will suffer the most damage in the fire deluge, meaning war and the destructive work of the fire god and fire mother will be most prevalent there. This is also written. That's all. Jai.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit Ji, I am Akash from Ayodhya. For the last two and a half to three months, I have learned about Bhavishya Malika and have also started Trikal Sandhya. When I tell my family to also do Trikal Sandhya because the coming times are very bad, and when I tell them things from the Bhavishya Malika, they laugh at me and say nothing like that will happen. Please tell me a solution for this.
Answer: It is also written about this in the Bhavishya Purana. The number one devotee will hear it once and run after it. But the devotees who are number two, three, up to ten, they won't understand until they are metaphorically beaten from behind. Secondly, if your family members don't agree, tell them to read the Shrimad Bhagavat Ji, not the Bhavishya Malika. After reading the Bhagavat Ji for a few days, the influence of 'dharma' will enter their minds, they will receive God's grace, and then they will ask, 'What does the Bhavishya Malika say? Tell us.' This is how you can bring them around. But don't talk too much about the Bhavishya Malika. Just tell them to read the Bhagavat Ji. This will bring a change. Then, with purity of mind and body, they will say the Bhavishya Malika is correct.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I had one more small question, Pandit Ji. I chant 'Sitaram Sitaram' and take their name. Because of this, I am unable to chant the name 'Madhav'. So, can I just chant 'Sitaram Sitaram'?
Answer: Look, chant 'Sitaram Sitaram' all day and all night, all the time. But at the time of Trikal Sandhya, make an effort, even if it's difficult, to chant the 'Madhav' bhajan. This is because it is written that in this era, the salvation of devotees lies in the name 'Madhav'. And Madhav himself is Kalki. The one who is Lord Ram is also Madhav. Therefore, the name of God is chanted according to the era ('yuga'). And the era is changing, so hold on to the name of Madhavnath as well, so that as Madhav comes, we can hold on to him, and our lives will become simple. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I wanted to know the glory of the name 'Madhav'.
Answer: The glory of the name 'Madhav'. Very good. The name 'Madhav' has three letters: 'Ma', 'dha', and 'va'. 'Ma' refers to Mother, Mother Radharani. Her Lord, her husband, is 'Dhava', which means Krishna. 'Ma' is the form of Brahma, the root of nature, the form of Brahma, Yogamaya. This is the first letter of the name Madhav. And 'Dhava' is Krishna. The 'dha' of Lakshmi, the husband of Radharani, is called 'Dhava' in Sanskrit. Therefore, the name Madhav is formed. Together, they are Radha-Krishna. In the world, she is Yogamaya. Vishnu's chakra destroys, but the chakra that Mother Durga Devi holds is the Radha chakra. That chakra will destroy the sinners. Therefore, the essence of the name 'Madhav' is great, and those who chant the name 'Madhav' will be liberated from the bondage of birth and death in this world. Jai.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pitashri, I wanted to say that there is so much conflict in my house. Conflict arises with everyone over small things. People get angry with each other over trivial matters. If there is a solution for this, what should we do?
Answer: This is a very good question. There is conflict in every house, in every family. Husband and wife don't get along. Father and son, father and children don't get along. Conflict arises over small things in the house, spreading like fire. And the fights between them are like the fight between India and Pakistan. The reason for this is that Kali Yuga has entered every house and is troubling people. To uproot and throw out Kali Yuga, everyone in the house should sit together and read the Bhagavat Ji. One person reads, and everyone else listens. Just the 'Gop-Leela' (divine plays of the cowherds) of the Lord, and nothing else. Do this for 10-15 days. See how much peace comes into the house. After that, great peace will come, and after that, you will also attain liberation.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Gurudev, I have two questions. First, what is described about Prayagraj in the Malika? And second, it is said that 33 crore gods and goddesses have also taken birth. What will they be like? Are they among us?
Answer: Prayagraj is the greatest pilgrimage site. In the Malika, Achyutananda has written that Lord Jagannath bathes in Prayagraj every day during Brahmamuhurta (the pre-dawn hours). And the Prayagraj region will become the manifestation of 'dharma'. As for your second question, have the 33 crore deities taken birth on Earth? In my opinion, according to the scriptures, according to the Bhavishya Purana, and according to all evidence, all the gods, the Lord, Yakshas, Gandharvas, sages, saints, and perfected beings have all taken birth on Earth. And at this time, the work of establishing 'dharma' is increasing. The time for the union of all devotees and gods is through Trikal Sandhya, to meet with Madhav. All have come in human form. They will become gods again, and from gods, they will become the divine beings of Satya Yuga. Jai.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: So my question was, what is the simplest way to have a vision (darshan) of Madhav Ji?
Answer: The simplest way, very good. Look, human life is simple. And the greatest simplicity in the mind is faith in God. The greatest simplicity is complete faith in God in the mind, meaning God is father, mother, brother, friend, protector, and also the giver. So, simplicity towards God means complete faith. Simplicity means no scripture, no logic, no proof is necessary. Just the faith that 'He is my Lord.' And when the mind says, 'My Lord is mine alone, and He is the one who brought me here and He is the one who will take me,' then Madhav will take you. You will become close to Madhav. The medium for this is Trikal Sandhya, because to know the truth, Trikal Sandhya is also necessary. Jai.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I have one question. It's been about a month and a half since I connected with your Bhavishya Malika and Trikal Sandhya. My problem is that I get very angry. As you said, Kali Yuga is in every house. Because of my anger, I have a lot of fights with my mother and father. Due to this, I lose in everything—be it studies or Trikal Sandhya. I am unable to memorize the Trikal Sandhya, and I'm having problems with my studies too. Please help me.
Answer: Read Krishna's 'Gop-Leela' (divine plays of the cowherds) for at least three months. You won't get angry. Try it and see. Jai.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pitaji, I just need your blessings and nothing else.
Answer: There is great joy. My blessings are always with you, Satyanarayan. Work for the salvation of the people of Rajasthan. You all are working to spread the Bhavishya Malika in Rajasthan; continue that work and take it forward, so that the people there can connect with Lord Kalki. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit Ji, I have a five-year-old daughter. I try to teach her the Trikal Sandhya, but she doesn't pay attention. She is very restless and doesn't listen. Please suggest a solution for this.
Answer: Parents tell children many stories, and sometimes they also tell ghost stories, which scare them. So, tell your daughter, 'Look, you have to move forward in your life, you have to fight all calamities, you have to earn well, and eat good food.' Children are tempted by food. 'And if you want to study well and become a great human being, then do Trikal Sandhya, so that nothing bad will happen to you. Look how many of our ancestors and people from our village passed away in accidents and difficulties. If you want to follow the full stream of life and move forward, then do Trikal Sandhya.' She will sit and listen. First, narrate it to her and tell her about the glory of Lord Krishna. By doing so, she will become a child like Dhruva and Prahlada. Jai.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pitaji, my question is that when we read the Shri Bhagavat Mahapuran, do we have to read the aarti written on the last page daily, or only after the entire book is finished?
Answer: No, no, there is no need to read it daily. There is no need to read the 'Phal Shruti' (description of benefits) every day. Just read one chapter of the Bhagavata. And if you have time, read the 'Gop-Leela' as well. You will feel very good and find joy in it.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I needed your blessing. I have gained a lot of knowledge, but faith and love have not yet developed within me. My environment is also not good. What should I do?
Answer: Look, if you want feelings of faith and love in your heart, then Lord Shankar and Mother Parvati bestow these feelings. You receive their grace. The scripture says, 'Bhavani Shankara Vande Shraddha Vishwas Rupino' (I bow to Bhavani and Shankar, the embodiments of faith and belief). Faith (Shraddha) is Mother Parvati Devi, and Belief (Vishwas) is Lord Shankar. So, every day, chant Lord Shankar's Mahamrityunjaya Mantra 11 times: 'Om Tryambakam Yajamahe Sugandhim Pushtivardhanam Urvarukamiva Bandhanan Mrityor Mukshiya Maamritat'. By chanting this verse, faith and belief will come, and you will receive Lord Ram's grace. Jai.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: When will electronic items stop working?
Answer: When do you want it to happen? Soon? As long as electronic items work, we also work. First, become strong by doing Trikal Sandhya, then electronics will have no effect on you. But regarding electronics, look, this week there is a 'solar tsunami,' meaning a cyclone is happening on the sun. And in regions like America, in the northern polar area, people have seen lights in the sky because its rays are coming. Right now, these are small things. A time will come when all machines will fall and stop working. That time will surely come. It is coming. For the next three to four years, there won't be such a big problem. We have to move forward, may the Lord's grace be upon us, may humanity be well. But that time will surely come. So, correct your actions, do Trikal Sandhya, and become a divine being so that we can fight the coming problems.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pitaji, we do Trikal Sandhya, we do everything, we are spiritual too, but please shed some light on how we can become peaceful from within.
Answer: Very good. Look, to become peaceful from within, the name of Madhav should be repeatedly chanted in the heart. The friction of Madhav's name with the heart will make the heart soft and pure. And whenever you get time, without wasting it, close your eyes and chant the name of Madhav in your heart, not superficially. After doing this for two or three months, the mind will say, 'No, I don't want to be angry.' Then you will sit peacefully and work, or else you will leave that place. To reach that state, sages and saints performed penance for a long time to control their senses. But in this era, there is no penance; the penance is being a householder. Therefore, chant the name. Chant the name of Madhav. You will surely get its fruit, a very good fruit. Jai.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: If there is a pure devotee of God and they pray that this destruction doesn't happen, you mentioned the year 2032, can that be averted?
Answer: This is a very good and emotional question. Sometimes my heart also says that there should be no change in the world, but the thing is, Satya Yuga cannot come just because one person wants it. The cycle of eras ('yuga chakra') will definitely happen: Satya, Treta, Dwapar, and Kali. After Kali, the Ananta Yuga will come. This is the cycle of eras. Just as a human life has stages, the eras also have such changes. So this change of era will definitely happen because it is the 'yuga chakra'; it turns. It will surely come. We have to live with 'dharma' and fulfill the purpose for which we have received this human life. For that, there is no principle in the universe greater than Trikal Sandhya for the salvation of human life. Trikal Sandhya was for the gods, and today, by God's grace, we are distributing it for humans, so that they can become gods and move towards the ultimate truth.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pitaji, we wanted to ask if there will be a congregation in Haryana, around Rohtak, Delhi, or Sonipat, in the coming time?
Answer: Look, it will definitely happen in Kurukshetra. There will surely be a congregation in Kurukshetra; there is a plan for it. Apart from that, where else the discourse can happen is up to God's will, Ma. But the propagation of 'dharma' will definitely happen. The propagation of Sudharma Mahasabha will happen, and the propagation of Bhavishya Malika will definitely happen.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: When will you come to Nashik?
Answer: A congregation is going to happen in Nashik. We haven't given the date yet, but a congregation will definitely happen in Nashik, perhaps even this year. We will announce it online, and we will definitely inform you. Please watch the online satsangs and the YouTube channel; you will get the information there. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I have one more question. I was told that Lord Ram did not need any service, which is why he went to the forest. But devotees have a desire to serve him. How should we understand this desire for 'seva' (service)?
Answer: Look, Baba. 'Seva' (service) means offering one's mind. 'Seva' means to sacrifice. 'Seva' means to read spiritual principles to empower one's life, to get absorbed in them, to contemplate those principles again and again—this is service. Some serve through sacrifice, some through surrender to God, some by reading scriptures, and some through action. So, the feeling in your heart is correct. Everyone desires to serve God; I desire it too. If one gets the chance, no one lets it go. As your desire grows, so will your devotion. And a time will come when serving God will be natural. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L135: महा बीमारी से उद्धार का मार्ग - त्रिकाल संध्या | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pitashri Ji, I offer infinite prostrations at your feet, at the holy feet of Badi Ma, and at the holy feet of Madhav Mahaprabhu Ji. I needed your and Badi Ma's blessings.
Answer: I am fine. Very good. Thank you.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My question is, in the Tri Sandhya, the Gayatri Mantra comes at the beginning, then there are three verses in the Guru Stuti. The same thing is also said for offerings and incense during worship. So, should the Gayatri Mantra be chanted with Lord Madhav in mind or with the Sun God (Suryadev) in mind? And the Guru Stuti, should that also be recited with Lord Madhav in mind? How should it be?
Answer: In the Trikal Sandhya, I focus on four elements. The booklet contains many things, but they are not all necessary. Just do the Gayatri Mantra, the 16 names, the 10 avatars, the Durga Madhav Stuti, and chant the name of Madhav 108 times. That's enough. And at the end, praise Lord Mahavishnu. This is because people won't have much time. Those who have time can do more, but even doing this much will yield the full benefits. The Gayatri Mantra should be chanted with Lord Madhav in mind. Generally, people chant the Gayatri Mantra with the Sun God in mind. For this, make your request in the refuge of Lord Mahavishnu. He is the God of all gods, the creator of gods, and the lord of gods, the primordial Vishnu Sanatan. Go into the refuge of Madhav and offer everything to him. Jai.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I wanted to say that we have been performing Tri Sandhya for one and a half months. It's been a month and a half, and we haven't had a divine vision (darshan) yet.
Answer: You've been doing Trikal Sandhya for 1.5 months, are you having any experience? Do you feel good or bad? How does it feel? (Questioner: It feels very good, Father). Good. There is no negativity, the human mind remains cheerful, and all tasks feel joyful, right? Yes. Okay, if you haven't had a vision of the Lord and you want to have one, even in a dream, then before sleeping at night, chant the name of Madhav 108 times. Say, 'Madhav ji, please give me your darshan.' If you don't get it, then talk to me. Jai.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Yes, Father, I have one more question. One day, in the morning, I had a dream full of snakes.
Answer: At the time of the illumination of Naglok (the realm of serpents), the beings of Naglok are also coming to take refuge in the Lord's devotees, in Madhav. So, a vision of Naglok is good, don't worry. It is also called a Vaikuntha—Patal Vaikuntha or Naglok, where the Naga people reside. It's fine. But do as I have told you. Jai.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Greetings, Father. My question was about the Sudharma Mahasangh. What qualities should devotees have to gain membership in it, Father?
Answer: The Sudharma Maham Sangh is coming to Earth as the association of the gods or the eternal Mahavishnu. To become a member of the Sudharma Mahasangh, the most important requirement is Trikal Sandhya. Along with Trikal Sandhya, humans can gain entry into the upcoming programs of Satyug. And through this, people can join the Sudharma Mahasangh. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I had a question. The Lord somehow indicated to me that he wants to talk to me, and I tried to talk to him, but I am unable to.
Answer: Look, sages, saints, and great beings like Narad Mahamuni have visions of the Lord. Just by having a vision, and then by the grace of the Lord, they are born as great sages and become part of the Lord's incarnation. Therefore, having a vision (darshan) is the most important thing. If the Lord wants to talk to you, mother, then in due time, God fulfills that wish of the devotees as well. The most important thing is to wait for the right time and follow the path I have described.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, I shouldn't be asking this question, but I don't know why, I am eagerly waiting for this partial dissolution (Khand Pralay) that is coming. Please tell me about it. Is it right for me to say this or ask this question? Is this thinking of mine right or wrong? Please guide me.
Answer: Look, the devotees who are meant to work in the establishment of dharma for the Lord are the ones who get such feelings and premonitions. If you are also getting them, it is a good sign. Remain in the Lord's refuge and increase your devotion. Because a time will come when the power of devotion will be more influential on Earth than great mechanical powers. So, increase your devotion, remain in complete surrender at the Lord's feet. In the times to come, along with the salvation of devotees, the work of devotees will also progress. At that time, you all will also get good work to do. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Who will be the next Prime Minister?
Answer: Look, our current Prime Minister, I have said this before, he is and will remain the last Prime Minister. No one else can come after him because it is written in the Bhavishya Purana that a holy person who practices yoga sadhana will be in power in India at the end of Kali Yuga, at the time when the foundation stone of Satya Yuga will be laid. This is the proof. And developments like the establishment of Ram Rajya and the arrival of Lord Ram Lalla further strengthen this belief, in line with the principles of the Bhavishya Malika. So, the current Prime Minister, the honorable Modi ji, will remain, and no one else will come. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I want to share a dream with you. I don't remember it completely, but I remember this much: on Mount Kailash, Lord Shiva's half body was burnt. And his pain... many animals were being slaughtered, and it seemed like his body was half-cut, you know, like half-cut from the left or right side, and he was screaming a lot. I didn't see Lord Vishnu much, just saw him crying. And Lord Shiva was in great pain, screaming loudly, enduring the pain by shouting.
Answer: Look, mother, in the Mahakaleshwar temple, a fire broke out where 13 priests were. His wound has not healed. And according to the news we received, one person has probably passed away. So, you can consider this as Lord Shankar's pain. Devotees get visions of this. When something happens to the devotees, the Lord feels it. Okay? Jai.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I am asking, as I am on the path (dhara), but due to lack of time, I am unable to propagate the Malika. So, is it necessary to propagate it?
Answer: Look, whether it's necessary or not, I won't say. Humans have come to this Earth to get liberation from the cycle of life and death. And through our karma, we have to return to the Lord. Those who perform good deeds will get the ticket first. Therefore, to make human life successful, everyone should perform righteous duties and propagate them. If it is within your capacity and you have time, it would be good to do a little work for it as well. Jai Jai.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: In this partial dissolution (Khand Pralay), will our Shri Ram Lalla, where he is enshrined in our Shri Ayodhya Dham, be affected in any way?
Answer: Look, in my opinion, the consecration of Ram Lalla and the temple has happened at the end of Kali Yuga and the beginning of Satya Yuga. Perhaps this happened by the will of Ram Lalla. And if Ram Lalla wishes, he can save that area while causing the dissolution, from where he is spreading the influence of Satya Yuga across the world. Everything is his will. But since it happened at the beginning of Satya Yuga, it is probably a sign of Satya Yuga, and the Lord will protect it. Jai.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र

My son has not joined yet. However, he did come to the assembly in Kandivali, and he did everything we do on the path, like the Tri Sandhya, and he also participated in the procession. He did everything. But he is studying right now, so he hasn't joined the path yet. It is my wish that you give your blessings, and with the Lord's blessings, he too joins soon. It would be a great grace from you and the Lord. Could you please say his name, Krishna, once?
Answer: Your son will also join. Pray to Madhav, I will also pray. He will progress with time. Okay, Krishna will join in due time. It is our wish and Madhav's grace.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: When I perform the Lord's Tri Sandhya, sometimes my focus wanders. It feels like my mind is not concentrating on the Lord. What should I do then? I get very worried.
Answer: Look, when your focus wanders, don't be sad about it. Because at the end of Kali Yuga, every human is distracted. There is no harm to you because of this. But after performing Trikal Sandhya for a few days, you will gain firmness, faith, and your mind will not wander. This happens initially. Jai.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Jai Jagannath. If one wants to perform a ritual (anushthan), should it be of the Mahamantra or of the name Madhav? And can we do kirtan (congregational chanting) of the Mahamantra?
Answer: Look, kirtan of the Mahamantra can be done. It is called Naam Sankirtan, and this is also considered an anushthan. But you can also perform an anushthan of the name Madhav. One can do an eight-prahar or a 24-prahar sankirtan of the name Madhav. Whatever your heart desires. The Mahamantra is good, and the name Madhav is also good. To be liberated from Kali Yuga, the name Madhav is essential. And the Mahamantra was given by Chaitanya Mahaprabhu for the salvation of devotees; it is a mantra of love, by chanting which human life becomes successful. Jai Jai.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, my question was that my family members eat non-vegetarian food. And where I live, I am the only one connected to this path. My family members keep eating non-veg, and I feel a great aversion to it. I can't even bear to watch them eat it. But they do, and they cook it in the same kitchen, and I have to manage everything. I don't like it, but I still have to eat with them. I don't eat non-veg, but I have to sit with them and eat in the same kitchen. Is this wrong in any way?
Answer: It is not wrong at all, mother. This is a form of penance (tapasya) for you, and God will shower even more grace upon you for this. Don't fight with those who eat it, don't say anything. Let them follow their path. You follow your path. God's grace will surely be with you. There is no mistake in this. Okay?

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, as our honorable Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi ji is about to become the Prime Minister again, people say it is written in the Bhavishya Malika that after his term ends in May 2026, the next Prime Minister will be a yogi, unmarried, and a Hindu. Is it true, Prabhu ji, that Yogi ji can become the Prime Minister after 2026?
Answer: No, there is nothing like that. Modi ji himself will remain. Look, it is written in the scriptures, and the proof is also emerging that he will remain. And the amount of work he is doing for the upliftment of dharma is increasing his lifespan. And because his lifespan is increasing, the dangers against him are being averted. Those who perform righteous deeds, religious rituals, and build temples, their lifespan increases. His lifespan is also increasing. So, don't worry, he will remain. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I need your blessings to overcome the difficulties in my life. I also wanted to know, whenever I have knowingly or unknowingly told a lie or made an excuse, I am now realizing—ever since I started doing Tri Sandhya and reading the Bhagavat—that those things come true. For the last 25-30 years, I have experienced that my excuses and lies, whether said in jest or in anger, come true. The difficulties I am facing in this life are because of this. What should I do about this?
Answer: Look, mother, a person experiences the fruits of their past life's karma in this life as well. And devotees have to clear all their karmic accounts before they leave. The fruits of your past life's karma and the merits of your past life are also why you have attained God and this spiritual gathering (satsang). So, don't worry, mother. If you have sorrow in your family life or material life, then along with Trikal Sandhya, there is a verse of Chaitanya Mahaprabhu, 'Trinadapi sunichena...'. Chant that verse 108 times before sleeping and 11 times after waking up from bed. The Lord's grace will be upon you, and all your problems will be resolved. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Guruji, my question was, when will this dissolution (pralay) come? I mean, when will the devotees be assigned their tasks? When will their complete unification happen?
Answer: According to the Bhavishya Purana, the unification of devotees will continue until the very end. The establishment of dharma has already begun. It started in 2021 with the arrival of Corona. In 2025, with Saturn's transit into Pisces, it will progress further. So, it will happen gradually, not in a single day. The work of establishing dharma will continue gradually until 2032-2033. During this period, all devotees will be unified, and Satya Yuga will also arrive. The salvation of humanity and the destruction of sinners, the work of creating a new era on Earth, is being done by Lord Kalki and will continue to progress. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, I wanted to ask, I have been doing this for the last five months, and I chant the name of Madhav in the morning and evening while doing my work. I ask for it every day before sleeping, but I haven't received any experience so far.
Answer: Chant the name of Madhav during the day, and before sleeping at night, chant it 11 times and ask Madhav to give you a vision (darshan). You will get it. Jagannath.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
