Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Yes, Guruji. I was saying that since childhood, I used to have spiritual experiences and talk to Lord Krishna. He told me to accept him in the form of Madhav. I was unable to, but then I did. And now, it feels like he tells me every day to meet him. But there is no one in my house who is on this path, and I can't get help from anyone. I can't concentrate on any work at all. 24 hours a day, all I want is to meet him.
Answer: Look, it's true, I understand. Do one thing: read about Lord Krishna's Gopi Leela (divine plays with the cowherd girls). And tell Madhav to give you his darshan. The Lord tests his greatest devotees the most. So perhaps you are being tested. But read the Gopi Leela, and you will get his darshan. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, I wanted to say that I read the Bhagavad Gita, not the Bhagavata. So, is reading the Bhagavad Gita right or wrong? Because while reading the Gita, I felt as if I was going beyond this world, transcending it.
Answer: The Gita is knowledge. The knowledge in the Gita is necessary for all human beings. However, the Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana contains the story of Rama, it contains the Gita, it contains the Bhagavata, the Vishnu Purana, the Brahma Purana—it contains the essence of all the Puranas. And according to the Bhavishya Malika, the Srimad Bhagavata will create the humans of Satya Yuga. Therefore, if you read the Bhagavad Gita, continue to do so. But by reading the Bhagavata, one attains the proximity, grace, and divine nectar of the Lord's feet.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I have three questions. First: Will the Sudharma Maha Mahasangh be formed secretly? Will it be a secret society? And will it be formed at the end of all the stages of establishing dharma, around 2032? Second: I want my father and mother, who are senior citizens, to come to Satya Yuga. They read the Bhagavata and perform Tri Sandhya, so how can I take them to Satya Yuga? Third: I had heard that we should not kill cockroaches with chemicals, but they keep coming into my bathroom. I spray them while apologizing to Madhav, but I am very scared that I am failing a test or committing a sin. This is mentally disturbing me.
Answer: 1. First question, when will the Sudharma Mahasangh be formed? The Sudharma Mahasangh is Lord Kalki's association. Devotees will join it, and all devotees will be unified through it. Through that medium, all devotees will get the right to enter Satya Yuga. The Sudharma Mahasangh will rule the entire world and carry out the work of establishing dharma. This is from the Bhavishya Purana. 2. Second, if your father and mother perform Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavata, and do charity, and if they complete three years of Trikal Sandhya, they will be saved. 3. Third, regarding killing cockroaches, you can get salvation from that sin by feeding a cow. But take refuge in Madhav so that they don't come. Pray with devotion, 'Lord, please don't let them come to our house.' Therefore, chant the Lord's name, perform Trikal Sandhya, and do charity. Sins will be washed away, and righteousness will increase. We will all become worthy of entering Satya Yuga. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L136: सुधर्मा महा महा संघ सारे विश्व में धर्म संस्थापना का कार्य करेगा। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, my question is about my school friend. I told her about Tri Sandhya, and she is doing it. But no one else in her family is. So she keeps asking if her entire family can be saved in the coming age.
Answer: Look, the one who is performing Trikal Sandhya has become a deity. It is because of their past life's good deeds that they are performing Trikal Sandhya. If the family members want to come to the path, first tell them to read the Bhagavata. By reading the Bhagavata, knowledge and devotion will arise. With the rise of devotion, knowledge, and detachment, they will also come to Trikal Sandhya, they will be able to understand God, the signs of Satya Yuga's arrival, and they will get information about the advent of Lord Kalki. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Why does the Lord leave and go back? It would be better if he stayed with us. And a second question, Pandit ji: we sometimes get scared when we see the problems that arise in our lives. What should we do then?
Answer: Look, in every stream of life, even deities have problems, sages and saints have problems, and humans have problems. This is predetermined. So, problems come in every life, and they come in your lives too. But for those who are in the refuge of Madhav, why should we be afraid while living in His shelter? And in my estimation, my belief is that you all perform the Trikal Sandhya, so don't be afraid of problems. Face the problems, and along with them, perform your duties. Perform your actions with your mind invested in the Lord's refuge, and even major problems will be resolved. This is why you perform the Trikal Sandhya, and the essence of Trikal Sandhya will give you protection and strength. Therefore, do not be afraid. Don't fear any problem, just do your work, and God will carry it forward. There is no fear in performing Trikal Sandhya. Yes, if we do something wrong, get caught in a bad sin, then we will be punished for it. But if we perform Trikal Sandhya while living in righteousness and truth, no power on this earth can do anything to us. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I have two questions: Who are the Pancha Sakha, and second, what is the Sudharma Maha Mahasangh?
Answer: The eternal Pancha Sakha (Five Friends) are created from the Lord's body parts: from His heart, from His waist, from His mouth, from His arms, and from His feet. They are called the eternal Pancha Sakha, meaning the Pancha Sakha of Vaikuntha. In Satya Yuga, the Pancha Sakha were Narada, Markandeya, and Bhusunda, who were the eternal Pancha Sakha of Lord Vishnu. In Treta Yuga, Nala, Nila, Jambavan, Sushena, and Lord Hanuman, as manifestations of the Lord, worked with Him to establish dharma. In Dvapara Yuga, there were Dama, Sudama, Subala, Sridama, and Vasudama. And those same eternal Pancha Sakha took birth in Kali Yuga on the holy land of Odisha as Achyutananda, Ananta, Jasobanta, Jagannath Das, and Balaram Das. So, the Lord's eternal Pancha Sakha come from Vaikuntha. Before the establishment of dharma, they gather the devotees and liberate them. Just as Hanuman ji liberated all the devotees, and a devotee like Sudama came to the Lord's feet and the whole world was liberated by his devotion, similarly, the eternal Pancha Sakha come in every era. In Kali Yuga, they have come with the names I mentioned. And the Sudharma Mahasangh is the institution or organization that Lord Mahavishnu will create on Earth. Its name is Sudharma Maha Mahasangh. 'Sudharma' means to make humans like gods and take them to Satya Yuga. The Sudharma Mahasangh will rule and create the constitution for the entire world. The Lord will be the head of their rule, and devotees across the world will carry forward and manage the responsibilities of governance.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I had two dreams over two days. In one, the Lord's devotees had gathered and were searching for someone. In another dream, I saw the earth split open from below, and a lot of gold and grain came out. Please tell me what this means.
Answer: Look, all the devotees will be gathered together in the coming times; that is why you saw the dream of the devotees. And the precious elements that come from the earth splitting open are for the devotees. For the devotees who have become poor today, for whom it is necessary, the Lord has kept it for them. All the wealth—gold, diamonds, gems, and jewels—will be obtained by the devotees. The devotees will become great. This is the essence. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, my college exams are coming up. Please bless me so that I pass all my papers with good marks.
Answer: Alright, you have my blessings. You perform the Trikal Sandhya and also study. You will surely receive God's grace and good results.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Yesterday, while I was performing the morning Trikal Sandhya, something happened. My eyes were open and my mind was on something else, but when I suddenly closed my eyes, I saw a monkey. After seeing the monkey, a second later, I got goosebumps for two or three minutes, and I kept seeing that same monkey. I felt as if Hanuman ji had come for a minute or two. Can you please explain this?
Answer: Look, 'Chaar jug prataap tumhara, hai parsiddh jagat ujiyara' (Your glory is famed throughout the four ages, and your splendor illuminates the world). Those who perform the Trikal Sandhya, Hanuman ji bestows his complete grace upon them. And those who perform the Sandhya can also have a vision of Hanuman ji as they desire, through devotion. If those who perform Trikal Sandhya wish to see Hanuman ji, they should recite the Hanuman Chalisa after the Trikal Sandhya. This is Hanuman ji's grace.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: And Prabhu ji, today Hanuman ji also came in my dream. I was very happy with him; it felt like I was playing with him, he was giving me his darshan. I was very happy. And my third question is, just as we are distributing the Trikal Sandhya to people, what should we do for animals so that they can also go to Satya Yuga? We have a female dog at home, and looking at her, I feel like we should do something for her too so she can go to Satya Yuga. Please tell us what we can do for them.
Answer: This is a very good point. Animals and creatures, even without performing the Trikal Sandhya, can move forward with the change of the era. But the thing is, if you want to give liberation to any creature, to uplift any creature, then by making them listen to the Trikal Sandhya, they too will become righteous. A time will come when all animals and creatures will also speak. First, Mother Cow will speak, and after that, other creatures will also speak. They will also chant mantras. Not now. In the beginning, Mother Cow will definitely speak. In front of them, you can keep chanting 'Madhav, Madhav' so that some of it enters their ears, and they can also attain liberation through that.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I have been doing the Trikal Sandhya for a month. I needed your blessings.
Answer: Alright. Perform the Trikal Sandhya with joy and on time. Also, read the Bhagavat Ji. My blessings and God's grace are surely with you. I want you all to be uplifted. The upliftment of humanity is Madhav's work. Service to Madhav and service to humanity are one and the same. That is why we want all the followers of Sanatana Dharma, the holy and pure souls who have come to this earth in India and the world, to be shown the right path, through which they can attain God and move towards the ultimate truth. This is our goal. You continue doing it; God's grace is with you. Move forward and complete this path.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, may I ask a question? You had said that there will be 16 Mandals (regions) of the Sudharma Sabha in the entire world. After listening to the Trikal Sandhya, we listen to satsang for three months. Can we also join one of those 16 Mandals? For example, we are near Ayodhya, so after listening to the satsang, will the Ayodhya Mandal group be the one that goes to meet the Lord?
Answer: Yes, that is correct. The Ayodhya Mandal will become a large Mandal of devotees. This is written in the Bhavishya Purana about the Ayodhya Mandal. There are many devotees in the Ayodhya Mandal who perform the Trikal Sandhya. You should also do it and receive the Lord's grace. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, I had a question. In one of your videos, you said that those who oppose the Malika, their death is certain. You said their death is certain. But there are some good people who oppose the Malika, but they are good people. So what will happen to them?
Answer: Look, when an era changes, everyone has to accept the principles of that era's change. When destruction is coming, humans need the strength to face that destruction. And this Bhavishya Purana (Malika) was written by the Lord's eternal Pancha Sakha under His direction. The eternal Pancha Sakha are manifestations of the Lord Himself. And it is written in the Bhavishya Purana, one by one, about how the sinners will be destroyed. It is also written that those who do not believe in the Bhavishya Purana, do not respect the Bhavishya Malika, and criticize it, they will only see destruction. There is no changing this. Because this is the Lord's principle, not mine. I am just a Brahmin who is distributing it, I have no other role. And those who respect it, honor it, and follow it, they are the people of Satya Yuga. And those who don't believe, don't follow, criticize others, and talk here and there, their fate is written in the Bhavishya Purana: Mother Kalika will deal with them. And you know what Mother Kali's judgment is like, what can I say? And I say this with firmness: this scripture was created by the grace of God for the transformation of the earth and the welfare of humanity. If a person sinks their own boat, how is it God's fault? Those who sink their own boat will drown themselves.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I have been performing Trikal Sandhya for three months. Pandit ji, I have to travel for work and am unable to perform the Sandhya. Please advise on this.
Answer: Wherever we are, Sandhya is necessary. Time is very short. We can't say... 5129 years have passed, and humans have not improved. And now, within a maximum of 10-11 years, a great change will occur. The arrival of Satya Yuga has already happened, but its influence has not been able to spread due to the effect of Kali. At such a time, Trikal Sandhya is necessary for everyone. Trikal Sandhya is a pot of nectar. Those who drink from it will be saved; they will go to Satya Yuga. Today I am saying this, but a time will come when everyone in India will say, 'Yes, you too should do Trikal Sandhya.' But what will be the use then? Do it now, while there is time. It's very good that you are doing it. Wherever you go, continue it. Don't stop. Jai.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I had another question. Lately, when I see any spiritual master, any great guru, I get the feeling in my heart... just as Nishad Raj washed Lord Ram's feet and drank the charanamrit (holy water), I feel a desire to wash the feet of a guru and drink that charanamrit. Please tell me about this.
Answer: This is a good, saintly tendency. It is a sign of a pure heart. The divine (Brahman) is in everyone—be it a guru, a boy, or a girl, the divine is in all. We should have devotion and respect for everyone. This is a good sign; there is no sin in it. It is very blissful, and it will also increase your dharma. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: And the second thing is, Father, I want to take my parents, who are a bit old, with me to Satya Yuga. Is this possible? Please tell me something about this.
Answer: Look, first of all, I commend your actions. A devotee like you, through their devotion and the power of their merit, can uplift another fallen human being. You were able to do it, which is very good. Because if we have faith, God will surely come. You have done a very good deed, my son. And second, if you want to take your parents to Satya Yuga, then make your parents listen to the Trikal Sandhya, or tell them to perform the Trikal Sandhya on time. Also, read or recite one chapter of the Bhagavat Ji to them, whatever you can do. And go to Madhav and say, 'Madhav, I am nothing, I am in your refuge, please uplift me.' In my opinion, they will surely go to Satya Yuga. There will be no change in that; you will get a good result.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I want to tell you that Lord Shiva came in my dream and told me, 'You don't even know how to offer water on a Shivalinga. I will tell you how to offer water on a Shivalinga.' Then he left after saying only that much. But I never found out how to offer water on a Shivalinga. So please, can you tell me, Father?
Answer: Look, by establishing the Lord in your heart and chanting His name at His feet, you get the Lord's vision; the Lord manifests. When the great sage Narada first did penance, when he did penance through the Trikal Sandhya, the Lord gave him a subtle vision, not a gross, physical one. So, establish the Lord in your heart, chant the Lord's name in your mind, and you will get the vision. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I have a question. I have a son who is two years and seven months old. I perform Trikal Sandhya and read the Bhagavat Ji. But sometimes when I sit for puja, he disturbs me a lot, and then I get very angry at him. So, if I get angry at him while I am praying, will the Lord also be angry with me for getting angry at my child?
Answer: Look, children love food. Give the child food, a toy, or whatever he needs, and then do your work. What will you gain by getting angry? They have come from your own being, from your own blood; we are meant to uplift them. What will anger achieve? Manage him according to his needs, and then continue. Even if you have to stop in the middle, it's okay. Start again. Look after him and also do your Sandhya. There is no need to get angry. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, as you mentioned in a previous video, even Lord Brahma and Lord Shankar will not know the Lord's leela (divine play). But it is said that Hari and Har are one, Lord Shiva is called the greatest Vaishnava, and Lord Vishnu is called the greatest Shaiva. So how can Lord Shankar not know the Lord's leela?
Answer: No, what you said is correct. Lord Shankar is a part of Lord Vishnu, and Lord Brahma is also a part of Lord Vishnu; there is no difference. One who worships Lord Vishnu attains Lord Shankar, and one who worships Lord Shankar attains Lord Vishnu. Regarding the leela between the devotee and the Lord, Achyutananda has written with emotion: 'Brahma agochara na jananti Indra Chandra' (Even Brahma, Indra, and Chandra do not know the secret). He wrote that the leela that will happen between the devotees and the Lord, even Lord Shankar and Brahma will not be able to understand what is happening. It is written that they won't know what kind of leela, what kind of work the Lord is doing; they won't be able to figure it out. But the essence is one; they are all one, there is no difference. And all are God—Brahma, Vishnu, Maheshwara, all three are God. All are worthy of our worship. But the point is about the leela between the devotee and God, which even some deities, Brahma, and Lord Shankar will not be able to comprehend. This is what is written, written with this emotion. It is not necessary to go into the specifics of it. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I needed your blessings.
Answer: Alright, mother. Practice dharma, do good deeds, perform the Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavat Ji. God's grace and my blessings will surely be with you. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Sir, please give me your blessings too.
Answer: Alright, mother, you have my blessings. But remain in the Lord's refuge, perform the Trikal Sandhya, and God's grace and my blessings are surely with you. Jai Jagannath. God's grace is always there for those who take His refuge. You are in God's refuge; you will receive all His grace and my joy. Jai.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I want to know why things that don't happen in our life appear in our dreams? Why do such events, which are not part of our regular life, occur in dreams?
Answer: Look, mother, there are spiritual dreams and there are material dreams. One who has material curiosity and material desires gets dreams related to material things. One who is absorbed in spiritual elements, the soul, and spiritual devotion gets divine visions and spiritual dreams. Both types of dreams are true. The dreams we see based on material elements also come true, and spiritual dreams also come true. So, in the stream of human life, there are many types of dreams, but not every dream is true, and not every dream leads to human liberation. But if you get a good dream that is connected to the stream of your life, contemplate on it, and that dream will surely prove true with time. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I had gone to Badrinath, and there was a circular, rainbow-like halo around the sun. I took a photo and posted it. What should I understand from this?
Answer: Look, when a solar halo appears, wherever it is seen, destruction comes. A calamity comes. A halo appears around the sun, a halo appears around the moon. The place where this is seen, it is a sign that a calamity is about to come to that place or a place near it. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, please give your blessings. Me and my family need your blessings, just your blessings.
Answer: I give you my blessings. May righteousness (dharma) increase in your family, and may you progress through righteous deeds. May your family also grow, and may God's grace be upon you. May dharma continue to increase along with peace and happiness. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My son got 65% marks, Father. Now I have to look into his admission, but due to my job situation, things have become difficult. Right now, I don't see any way forward, how his admission will happen, how the money will come. Nothing is working out.
Answer: Look, chant the name of Madhav. Perform the Trikal Sandhya. Everything will be arranged. There will be no problem. Just try it and see, everything will be fine. But go into His refuge, and everything will be alright. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I need your blessings, Father.
Answer: You have my blessings. Do your prayers, do the Sandhya, the blessings will be there. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L137: धरती पर आगे भूकंप का प्रभाव आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I perform the Trikal Sandhya three times, but for the first one in the morning, I have trouble waking up. I can't get up early. What can I do for this?
Answer: Pray to Lord Madhav. Say, 'Lord, please wake me up on time so I can perform the morning prayer at the right time.' You will surely receive His grace. A time will come when you won't be able to sleep; your sleep will break on its own during the Brahma Muhurta (pre-dawn hours). Keep doing it, it will happen. Okay. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Jai Shri Madhav, Prabhu Ji. When we perform Sandhya (prayers), we also commit many sins, knowingly or unknowingly. The punishment the Lord will give for that is fine, but what about the children? What will happen to them, as they are not at fault?
Answer: In this world, there is no child and no senior. The soul within our body is countless eons old. The beings who come in the form of children and then grow up on this earth are also born according to their karma and will experience the fruits of their actions. So, there is no distinction between a child, a senior, or an old person in this regard. However, for those who perform Trikal Sandhya (prayers three times a day), take refuge in Madhav, and read the Bhagavat Ji, their sins will gradually diminish, and they will be able to become humans of the Satya Yuga (Age of Truth). This is written in the scriptures. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Gurudev, I am currently following the path, and I suddenly felt inspired. Since my summer vacation is ongoing, I want to go for a darshan (sighting) of Lord Jagannath in Puri and Goddess Biraja. My family members also want to go. So, I was seeking your permission. It came to my mind that I want to go only when the Lord calls me.
Answer: How many months has it been since you joined this path? (Questioner: Two, two and a quarter months.) Wait. You will come after further consideration. It has only been two months. Let at least six months pass, and then we will consider it. Look, major diseases, illnesses, and calamities are about to come upon the earth. In 2025, a significant astrological event is happening. It is necessary for everyone to perform Trikal Sandhya. The welfare of humanity lies in this, and the greatest fulfillment of human life will be found in it. Serving Him brings great joy. Do it. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I wanted to ask, if God has already arrived, why is he taking so long? Sin is increasing on Earth, and God must see everything. Even now, good people are suffering and facing hardships. So why doesn't he act quickly? Why don't good things happen to good people and bad things to bad people? Good people are harassed by everyone, including the police and the courts. Meanwhile, wrongdoers show off their power and control everyone. Isn't God seeing this? My simple question is: how long will God watch the suffering of good people? I may be bad, it's okay if bad things happen to me, but why are even good people suffering? What is God waiting for?
Answer: Look, this is a good question. Everyone has this question. Good people are suffering, the influence of demons is increasing, and sinners continue to display their power and wealth. The thing is, every being has come according to their karma. We don't know what deeds we performed in our past lives. The good deeds from the past lives of those who are sinning now have not yet ended, which is why they are influential. A devotee is a devotee in every age; if some karma was left from a past life, they are paying for it now. Yes, one thing is certain: sinners will fight against devotees and good people. In my opinion, those who remain in the refuge of Madhav and perform Trikal Sandhya will surely be victorious. It will take time, but victory is certain. We have come to pay for our past karma. That is why even devotees face sorrow, just as gods are sometimes born on earth due to curses and suffer. Sorrow and happiness in human life are due to 'prarabdha' (destiny based on past karma). The demons are powerful because of the Kali Yuga, but the time for their destruction is coming. Those who take true refuge in the Lord will surely be victorious in the end.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Prabhu ji, I have a question. I have a very strong desire to visit Lord Jagannath's holy land and have a darshan of the people of the Sudharma Mahasangh. Please tell me a way to do this.
Answer: Do you perform Trikal Sandhya? (Questioner: Yes, Prabhu ji, I do.) Do you read the Bhagavat Ji? (Questioner: Pandit ji, I made a small mistake. I didn't understand and brought the Gita instead. I will order the Bhagavat Mahapuran tomorrow.) Read the Bhagavat Ji. You will get a direct experience of God. By reading the Bhagavat Ji along with Sandhya, devotees can feel the Lord's presence. Do that, and in the future, we will act according to the Lord's instructions. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, I had a question. I have heard that the Meen-Shani yog (Pisces-Saturn conjunction), which you say will occur in March 2025, will secretly occur on November 2, 2024. Is this correct?
Answer: You have heard incorrectly. It will happen on March 29, 2025, at 5:30 PM. In some specific places, there might be a difference of one, two, or even five hours, but it will happen on that day. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I had a dream where I saw a huge wave come from the sea. I and another Pandit ji were sitting on a bed. He was scared, but I told him not to be, that Lord Madhav would protect us. I also saw many crows flying in the sky. What does this mean?
Answer: Crows are called messengers of Kaal (time/death). The sea water signifies that the time for a great flood (Jal Pralay) is approaching. God is showing you the destruction that will be caused by this flood. Those who are chanting the name of Madhav will be protected from the coming calamity and will be saved for the Satya Yuga. This is written in the scriptures, and it is very good that you saw it in your dream. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Prabhu ji, I want to know, what is the controversy between you and Acharya Salil?
Answer: Look, in the world, controversies happen over land, property, or mutual negativity. I have nothing of that sort; there is no controversy. But if someone doesn't like what I say, they have the right to speak up. Our country is free. Not everyone will agree with me. It is my duty, written in my karma, to propagate the Bhavishya Malika, so I do that. My Gurudev blessed me to do this. Some people like this work, some dislike it. But I have respect for everyone. It doesn't concern me. God has come, and He is judging my actions. If I am doing the right thing for the welfare of the world, I believe God will bless me further to propagate Dharma. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, my question is, whenever I talk about Bhavishya Malika in my home, my family members are never satisfied. I try to explain it to them, but they are unable to understand. I told them that the age of Kali Yuga is only 5000 years, but they say it is 432,000 years and that what is written in the book is a lie.
Answer: When the Yamuna river floods in Mathura and Vrindavan, then everyone will come around. We are waiting for that time. A great flood and a major calamity are also coming.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, why is it that I can understand, but my family members cannot?
Answer: Look, those who are not destined to understand, will not. Someone has to understand first, someone later. There will be a number one devotee, and a number two devotee; things will work accordingly. But for all the devotees of Mathura and Vrindavan, when they witness the fierce form of the Yamuna river in the future, they will then say, 'Yes, destruction will happen.' We have already told you this. You are good, that's why you understood.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I understand, Pandit ji, but when I try to explain it to my friends who have bad conduct and use foul language, I try to make them understand to stop and chant the name of Radhe. What should I do?
Answer: Stay away from those who do not understand or believe in the Bhavishya Malika. Six or seven days ago, near the Jagannath temple, a great fire calamity occurred. The plaster of the boundary wall of Meghanad Pacheri and Gundicha Temple all fell off. People should understand why this destruction is happening in the Jagannath Kshetra. They will understand when water enters their own noses and ears. The time is coming.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, you give proof from the Bhagavat Ji that the Kali Yuga has ended. But it is also written in the Bhagavat Ji that one should not charge any fees for reciting it. Yet, many storytellers charge lakhs of rupees and still say that the Kali Yuga is in its childhood. Why are you able to see the proof while they are not?
Answer: Look, there is proof in the Bhagavata Mahatmya and in the twelfth canto of the Srimad Bhagavatam. Those who accept money for reciting the Bhagavatam are not following the rules. They are misusing the scriptures and will surely have to answer to the one who created them. The time will come when it will be proven to the whole world, and those very people will say with their own mouths, 'Yes, the Kali Yuga has ended, the phase of destruction is ongoing. Please give us refuge too, save us.'

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Jai Shri Madhav, Guru ji. My question is, by performing Tri Sandhya, will my family be protected, even if they are not able to do it themselves?
Answer: Look, the protection of your family rests with God. When a person performs Tri Sandhya, their ancestors receive the benefits, and the performer receives the direct fruit. The family also receives some positive effect. However, for full protection from the calamities of the Kali Yuga, it is necessary for every member to perform Tri Sandhya.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My question is, people say Lord Kalki will come to slay the Kali Purusha (the personification of the Kali demon). Is this true?
Answer: Yes, they say Lord Kalki will come to slay the Kali demon. Look, in the Kali Yuga, there are crores of Kali demons. To destroy all of them, Lord Kalki will establish Dharma, save the devotees, and destroy the sinners. It's not just one demon; there are crores of them whose destruction is necessary. As long as those demons are on Earth, the Satya Yuga cannot arrive. Therefore, their destruction is necessary because Dharma has shrunk and sin has increased. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: In the Jagannath culture, there is a story that when Lord Sri Krishna was shot by an arrow, his body was later cremated, and his heart remained unburnt. Is this story true, or did he go directly to his celestial abode in his physical form, as mentioned in the Bhagavatam?
Answer: Look, in the Jagannath culture, it is written that Krishna is Jagannath. Because Lord Krishna is Mahavishnu, and Jagannath is the same. A verse states that at one time you were present as Lord Krishna on the banks of the Yamuna with the Gopis, and now you reside in the Nilachal region. The one who is Krishna is Jagannath. The text 'Jagannath Sanskriti', which is part of the Skanda Purana, clearly states that Jagannath is the original, eternal Brahman. All the gods are created on earth from Jagannath's body and then merge back into it. That is the truth. Just as there is Goloka Vaikuntha, there is also a Vaikuntha on earth, which is the region of Jagannath. All incarnations are created from and merge into Lord Jagannath, and that is what happened. Jai.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: By worshipping a Kuldevata (family deity) or a Devi (goddess), will one attain the desired fruits?
Answer: By worshipping any god or goddess, human beings attain material happiness. And if we worship any deity, the fruit of that worship is granted by Lord Krishna, as stated in the Gita. So, why not come directly to the refuge of Lord Krishna? That way, along with the grace of the demigods, we also receive the grace of Mahavishnu, and our life becomes simpler and more joyful. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Prabhu, I wish to know, how can we tell if we are on the right path of devotion, if what we are doing is correct, or if the Lord's grace is upon us?
Answer: This is a very good question. Look, performing Trikal Sandhya, reading the Bhagavat Ji, and chanting the name of Madhav... any human who follows this path is not ordinary; consider them a rishi, muni, or deva. This is the first sign. Second, yawning or having tears in your eyes while performing Trikal Sandhya is the second sign that God is accepting your worship and you are connecting with the Supreme. Third, when God comes in your dreams and guides you, then you will know that He is your protector and is leading you on the right path. You will find these three elements in Trikal Sandhya. Do it and move forward. With time, everything will be proven. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: For those who perform Tri Sandhya and are on this path, if they pass away during the 'khanda pralay' (partial dissolution), what will happen to them? Will they be born in the Satya Yuga?
Answer: Look, the path of Trikal Sandhya is followed only by the devas, devotees, rishis, and saints who have taken birth on this earth. God has prepared this path for them to attain Him. Those who perform Trikal Sandhya are God's people. When the great destruction happens, in my opinion, they will not die. They will go to the Satya Yuga and be in direct contact with God. After the Satya Yuga, they will go to Vaikuntha. Only such souls perform Trikal Sandhya; others criticize or question it. The devotees who have come to earth as Brijwasis, Gopis, and Gopas perform Trikal Sandhya and chant the name of Madhav. Nothing will happen to them. They will move forward into the Lord's refuge and then to Vaikuntha. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: By when can your assembly (sabha) be held in Nepal?
Answer: There will definitely be an assembly in Nepal. The teachings of the Bhavishya Purana and the pastimes of Lord Kalki will be propagated there. Nepal is a divine land, the land of Lord Buddha. There are devotees there as well, and they need to be saved. For this reason, many assemblies will be held in Nepal to work for the salvation of the devotees. It is the will of Lord Jagannath. It will surely happen in due time. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L138: क्या कल्कि अवतार का जन्म हो गया है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pitaji, I am from Ludhiana. Here, most people follow Guru Nanak Dev Ji or pirs and fakirs. I find it very difficult to find other devotees, and I face a lot of trouble performing my Sandhya prayers. If someone finds out, they make fun of me. I am in a big problem. Please tell me how I can find devotees.
Answer: Daughter, don't tell anyone. There is no need. Those who are meant to come, will come. That is why we conduct these online meetings. When all of God's devotees are saved, my work will be complete. Secondly, the Sikh community and Guru Nanak Dev are venerable to us. Guru Nanak Dev himself visited Lord Jagannath and wrote about the Kalki avatar in his scriptures. He wrote that devotees from all religions and sects will gather. Those who are not devotees will not understand. Our task is to save the devotees. It is not necessary to explain to anyone. You just do what I have told you. Come to the refuge of Madhav. The time will come when everyone will seek salvation when diseases and calamities strike. At that time, you can say, 'Now there is no need.'

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Jai Shri Madhav, Father. I needed your blessings.
Answer: Okay, no problem. My blessings are always with you. Do as you have been told, and may you receive more of God's grace. Jai.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र

Answer: The divine play of the Lord is an experience meant only for the devotees; it is not an experience for everyone. However, you have seen changes across the world, like the transformation in a place like Ayodhya. This is an effect of the intense Kali Yuga and a sign of destruction. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: After performing the Tri-Sandhya, I feel sleepy and I'm yawning. What is happening, Father?
Answer: Look, when you perform Tri-Sandhya, you will yawn, feel sleepy, and tears will come to your eyes. All three things will be visible. The reason for yawning is that when our body connects with the spiritual element, it is a sign of spiritual energy entering our body. Second, tears from the eyes are due to its effect. Third, sometimes sleep also comes, as the goddess of sleep (Nidra Devi) creates obstacles. This is because Tri-Sandhya is a path of penance, and in Kali Yuga, performing penance is difficult. Therefore, through this simple stream, human beings will attain God. This phenomenon occurs.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I have had a dream twice. I know that Kali Yuga will end in the future. So, when I already know this, why do I keep seeing these dreams repeatedly? I saw the clouds in the sky breaking apart, and everyone was running here and there. It felt like someone was saying the world would end in an hour. In the dream, I started chanting "Jai Shri Madhav" loudly, and three or four other voices joined in. Since I already know this is going to happen, why am I seeing it?
Answer: Okay, mother. Perform the Tri-Sandhya at the correct times. And one more thing, the dream you are seeing is a sign for you to share this message with other devotees. Such a time is coming, and this is how devotees in the world will be saved. God repeatedly makes certain people, through whom some work is to be done, feel what is about to happen so that they can help save other devotees. Jai.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: We are not in India. Should we follow the local time for Tri-Sandhya or the Indian time?
Answer: For those living abroad, the time I mentioned is according to our country's standard time. For those living in other countries, abroad, they must follow the local time of that place—when the sun rises, when the sun sets, and when it is midday. We have to follow the time of the place where we live. According to the sun's movement, the position of the planets and constellations, and the local time, it is necessary to perform Tri-Sandhya. In India, do it at the time I mentioned. Those living abroad should follow their local times for Brahma Muhurta, midday, and evening (i.e., before sunset). These are the three times. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र

It was also written that there would be rule in Telangana, which has also happened. And what was written in the Malika about Mr. Naveen Patnaik's rule has also come to pass. Now, for the beginning of Satya Yuga and for the manifestation of Lord Kalki's divine play from Odisha, a change in the spiritual element is necessary. This is happening because it is God's will. Whatever happens next will be by God's will. Jai.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र

Answer: Look, mother, this is very good. At 3:45 AM, the movement of the deities begins, their influence starts, and they begin to worship the Lord. The fact that you wake up at that exact time means the deities are waking you up too, telling you to perform Tri-Sandhya with them at that time. Something good is about to happen. Perhaps it is God's will. If you wake up at that time, perform Tri-Sandhya then. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I am Mukta from Jaipur. I want to know, apart from the three times we do Tri-Sandhya, you have mentioned chanting the name 'Madhav'. So, besides chanting on a mala, can we mentally chant the name while doing other work? Can we do that, or is there any issue with it?
Answer: Look, during the time of Tri-Sandhya, chant the mantras I have told you. At other times, you can chant the name of Madhav, or Krishna, or Ram. This will be more blissful and will maintain purity for us. The second point is that one should chant the name 'Madhav' because in Kali Yuga, Lord Kalki's name is Madhav. The form and name in which the Lord has incarnated, is about to incarnate, or is written in the scriptures to incarnate, is this. Therefore, chant the name 'Madhav'. Chanting it internally is even better. Jai.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र

Answer: You want to serve the country. This is a very important and pure aspiration. It is very good, and for daughters to join the service of the nation is like the power of the new era. But one thing, mother, look: prepare for the NDA, perform Tri-Sandhya on time, and continuously chant the name of Madhav. You will definitely receive grace, and by obtaining God's grace, your wish will also be fulfilled.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I am from Himachal Pradesh. What has been written about Himachal Pradesh regarding the coming cataclysm (pralaya)?
Answer: Look, Himachal Pradesh is in the Garhwal region, and there will be a huge change in the Himalayan mountain range. I have said this before and I am saying it again. Large hills will turn into plains, and there will be major changes in the geographical situation. However, there will be no effect on the devotees. For the destruction of sinners and wrongdoers, it will create trouble. The scriptures state that a great dissolution of the five elements will occur in the Himalayan range. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I want to give some advice. The topic of the video was that Kalki's divine play has begun. They should ask questions about the topic at hand.
Answer: That is a very good point. Daughter, you have given good advice. It is necessary that questions should be on the subject I present. Look, my spiritual discourse (satsang) is for the welfare and salvation of humanity, the establishment of Satya Yuga, and showing people the right path. But people are still entangled in their material and family matters. It is a time of epoch change, a great calamity for human civilization. Few people think about what we should do. They think more about what will happen today or tomorrow. It's okay. In human life, people will think about their family and worldly matters, but they should also connect the spiritual element to it, because a time is coming when nothing will be greater than spiritual power, which will protect us and our civilization. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, it is now 2024. In this entire year, what events are going to happen? Could you please tell us everything in complete detail—what will happen, how it will happen, all the information?
Answer: Look, about 2024, it is written that major changes will come to humanity. Communal forces will strengthen their position. Anarchy will be reflected in governance across the world. A foundation for conflict will be created between countries. Inflation and famine will rise. People will face sudden death through accidents and also without reason, like heart attacks. Diseases like cancer will continue to spread. This is why I am telling you about Tri-Sandhya. 2024 will become the foundation for the festival of destruction. The work of destruction will begin in 2025. At such a time, there is nothing but taking refuge in God. Tri-Sandhya and reading the Bhagavat should be performed in every house so people can be protected. It will be a time of discord and betrayal. People, lost in illusion, will not be able to move towards the true essence of their lives. This time is the time of Lord Kalki's secret divine play to create the foundation for establishing dharma. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: When I perform Tri-Sandhya in the morning and afternoon, my mind and soul are not as happy as when I do it in the evening. Also, I have a flaw: I get angry very quickly. Please tell me a remedy for this. I get very angry over small things.
Answer: Look, this world is a material world. We are not here to stay, nor are we here to fight. This world is transient. We are meant to perform our duties (karma) and achieve salvation through them. Just think, "This world is not mine. God has sent me to do good deeds and then leave." When you think this way, the power of "I, me, you, yours" will diminish, and your focus will remain on God. If we are not going to be here, then why fight?

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: In the morning and afternoon, it feels like I cannot perform the sandhya with full concentration, but in the evening, it is fine. Please tell me the reason for this.
Answer: It's okay, Baba. This is due to illusion (maya) and the effect of Kali Yuga. Because of this, conflict arises in the mind. Don't worry about it. This opposition will keep coming, but we still have to do it.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: When should one perform Tri-Sandhya? Many people say it should not be done at certain times.
Answer: Look, the first sandhya is from Brahma Muhurta until half an hour after sunrise. Midday is from 11:30 AM to 12:30 PM. And the evening sandhya is from half an hour before sunset to half an hour after sunset. It should be done during these times. Jai Jagat.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: During the monthly cycle (menstruation), can we read the Bhagavat from a PDF?
Answer: No. At that time, you can chant the hymns of Tri-Sandhya, but not in the temple or the prayer room. Reading is not possible. However, at that time, you can sit in a separate place and mentally chant the mantras of Tri-Sandhya, like the thousand names of Lord Mahavishnu, the Dashavatara, and the Durga Madhav Stuti.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: How can one increase their feeling of devotion (bhakti bhav)?
Answer: Look, to increase the feeling of devotion, I always say that chanting the name of Madhav and reading the Gopi Leela will bring devotion. Read the Sundara Kanda of the Ramcharitmanas, read the Gopi Leela, and read the scriptures about the Lord's glorious divine plays and the connection between devotees and God. Reading these will bring a change because scriptures are the path to the knowledge of devotion. Therefore, whenever you get time, chant the Lord's name. Withdraw your mind from worldly things and invest it in spirituality; devotion will manifest. For example, think about a devotee like Prahlada—how much he suffered, but nothing happened to him because God was with him. In the same way, know that "My God is with me, all this is illusion." Therefore, invest your mind in God and repeatedly contemplate His glory and His divine plays.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: The morning time for Tri-Sandhya is from 4 to 6 AM, but I end up doing it around 7 or 8 AM. I sometimes forget the afternoon one or do it late. Also, when I do Tri-Sandhya, my three-year-old child disturbs me. What should I do?
Answer: Pray to God, "Lord, give me the strength to perform Tri-Sandhya on time." May the Lord bless you. It is no problem; we can perform Tri-Sandhya while holding the child. And if the children cause some trouble in between, you can pause, handle them, and then continue. There is no issue. It doesn't mean you should ignore your child's troubles. You can do it while holding them in your lap, sitting near them, or after resolving their issue. There is no problem with that. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: According to the Vayu Purana, the total age of the four yugas is 4,320,000 years, but the experienced age is only 12,000 divine years. Just as the age of Kali Yuga was reduced due to sin, did the same happen with Satya Yuga, Treta Yuga, and Dvapara Yuga? And if so, for what reason, since there wasn't as much sin in those yugas?
Answer: Jai Jagannath. A very good question. The experienced age of Satya Yuga was reduced because of the pride, ego, curses, and willfulness of the sages and ascetics. They would dry up oceans and burn humans with their words. Due to their pride, Satya Yuga was destroyed. In Treta Yuga, it was sensual desire, which increased greatly. In Dvapara Yuga, good conduct and purity of thought did not remain among people, which caused its end. And in Kali Yuga, the four pillars of dharma—truth, purity, compassion, and forgiveness—were lost. This is why Kali Yuga's age also diminished, and only 5,000 years remained. Jai.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Jai Shri Madhav, Father. I suffer from many physical illnesses. As one gets better, another one starts. I perform Tri-Sandhya, but my past karma (prarabdha) doesn't seem to be ending. Father, I need your blessings.
Answer: Look, by performing Tri-Sandhya, the sins and karma in your destiny will gradually be cut away. Do one thing: read the 'Narayan Kavach' from the Srimad Bhagavatam. It is a composition in the eleventh canto, reading which cuts a person's past karma and also cures diseases and illnesses. Read it at any time during the day. The Narayan Kavach in the Bhagavatam is very powerful. Jai Shri Madhav.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I am Durgesh from Ghaziabad. My husband passed away last July. Everyone says that this happened to me because of my bad karma. Is this true?
Answer: None of your karma is bad. This happened due to Mangal Dosh (a planetary affliction) in your husband's horoscope. It is not your fault at all. Everyone's birth and death are subject to their own karma. He came with his karma, his karma ended, and he passed away. There is no fault of yours in this, mother. It all happened because he had Mangal Dosh in his horoscope. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: If there was Mangal Dosh in his horoscope, how could we have known?
Answer: It would have been known by showing it to astrologers. The reason was the influence of Mercury and Mars—both Budh Dosh and Mangal Dosh. Because of these, the illness came, and it could not be treated at the right time, which led to his death.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I need your blessings today. It is my birthday, I need your blessings.
Answer: My blessings are with you. I bless you to progress towards Dharma (righteousness), Artha (wealth), Karma (action), and Moksha (liberation). May you bring happiness to your family and your world, and may devotion to God arise in your heart. My blessings. Jai.

Video Title: L139: क्या भगवान कल्कि की लीला शुरू हो चुकी है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: For many months, I have felt the desire to perform good deeds, like reading the Vedas or learning Sanskrit. What does this mean?
Answer: Jai Jagannath. The meaning is that through Tri-Sandhya, your mind has been purified. The essence of true action is being illuminated in your mind, and you are moving towards spirituality. Question: Pandit ji, please tell me the rules and procedure for wearing a Kanthi mala.
Answer: For wearing a Kanthi, the most important procedure is to first offer the Kanthi at the lotus feet of Lord Shri Krishna, Ram, or Jagannath. Keep it at Jagannath's feet for one day. How to do this? Prepare Panchamrit with ghee, banana, jaggery, curd, and milk. Mix the Kanthi in this liquid, then wash it and place it at the feet of Jagannath or Krishna for one day. After that, wear the Kanthi mala while reciting the Lord's 16 names ('Aushadhe Chintaye Vishnum'). Regarding its use, you should remove the Kanthi when going to the bathroom, during a woman's monthly period, when visiting a house where a death has occurred, or during the period of impurity after a child's birth in a home. Keep it separate during those times and use it at other times. If a married woman sleeps with her husband, she should remove it and keep it aside before sleeping. For those who sleep alone, there is no issue. Jai Jagannath!

And one more thing, it might be delayed, but a time will come in nature and the five elements where you will witness great events with your own eyes—things you have not seen, thought of, or heard of. You will see what is written in the scriptures. For this reason, the Bhavishya Malika was written for human civilization. This is why we are holding this satsang. Our purpose is not to make you our disciples or gurus or to have any transactions. Our purpose is the welfare and salvation of humanity and to distribute the secret knowledge to civilization. Therefore, a bad time is coming, not a good time. Anarchy will spread throughout the world. Such anarchy has never been seen before. Everything will be turned upside down. No one will listen to anyone. Humans will understand nothing but their own self-interest. And along with the elements of destruction, social and communal tensions will keep increasing. The time is coming. Jai Jagannath. Be careful, stay at the Lord's feet, and do your duty. If God exists, the devotee exists; if the devotee exists, God exists. Devotees will be gathered for the creation of Satya Yuga. That is the reason for this satsang. Lord Kalki is in Sambhal Nagar, and the Kalki Leela has begun.

Video Title: L144: विश्व में एटॉमिक वार का खतरा 600 साल पहले लिख दिया गया था। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Can the journey to Satya Yuga be completed just by chanting the name (Naam Jaap)?
Answer: Look, I want to tell you the essence of the Bhavishya Malika. The Bhavishya Malika Purana was originally in Odia; we have translated it into Hindi, English, and 17-18 other languages. In the Bhavishya Malika, it was written 600 years ago that there will be no humans who do not perform Sandhya. I respect everyone who chants the name, but the fact is that those who do not perform Trikal Sandhya, who do not take refuge in Madhav, who do not surrender to Lord Kalki, are perhaps not the fortunate ones. And due to their own actions, they will bring about their own destruction. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L144: विश्व में एटॉमिक वार का खतरा 600 साल पहले लिख दिया गया था। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Is Trikal Sandhya absolutely compulsory, or can it be done through Naam Jaap (chanting the name) as well?
Answer: Trikal Sandhya is compulsory. It is a boon given by Lord Kalki for the salvation of devotees. To protect them from the coming diseases, calamities, and adversities—64 types of major diseases are coming, great calamities are coming—to be protected from all of them, if they don't do Trikal Sandhya, they will not survive. A time will come when everyone will do it. I'm not just talking about India; the whole world will do it. They will have to do it. If they don't, they will choose their own path. Jai.

Video Title: L144: विश्व में एटॉमिक वार का खतरा 600 साल पहले लिख दिया गया था। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My mother is 60 years old and is very ill. She has diabetes and is also afflicted by external obstacles like ghosts and spirits. What can be done for her, Pandit ji?
Answer: An old spirit passes by your house every day. It goes further ahead. Is there a water body ahead? It comes up to that river every day. That's why its influence is felt. Look, do one thing. Perform Trikal Sandhya in the house. Tell your mother to do it. Along with Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavat. This is a disease for which no cure has been found in this Kali Yuga. I can assure you this much: anyone who performs Trikal Sandhya and reads the Bhagavat will not face calamity. Her health will definitely improve. There will be no negativity. And the ghost—this is not a ghost or spirit possession, it's a spirit that passes by between 2 and 3 AM. That's its route, from what I can tell. It passes on that path and its influence falls on your mother. It comes and goes daily. Once you start, it won't come either. Chant the name of Madhav and perform Trikal Sandhya. If it doesn't stop coming to the house, then I will tell you what to do next. Okay? Everything will be fine, don't worry. Do Trikal Sandhya, chant Madhav's name, and read the Bhagavat. Jai.

Video Title: L144: विश्व में एटॉमिक वार का खतरा 600 साल पहले लिख दिया गया था। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I am Durgesh from Ghaziabad. I bought a house in 2018. We moved in happily and even had a housewarming ceremony during Navratri. But ever since my husband came here, he fell ill with diabetes. He has now passed away. Everyone is saying that perhaps there is something wrong with the house. Is this true?
Answer: Look, if I tell you, you will be scared. So listen to one thing. Yes, there is a problem with the house. That's why the owner sold it. The fault is in the soil. Whether you build on it, buy it, or sell it, how will the fault in the soil go away? The soil of that house is not good. So, do one thing. Live in that house, read the Bhagavat daily. Chant the name of Madhav and perform Trikal Sandhya. Everything will be fine. Everyone will be fine. There is no problem in living there. Look, a person suffers according to their karma, but by doing good karma, that bad karma can also be nullified. Therefore, perform Trikal Sandhya in the house daily. Tell your children to do it too. The times ahead are not good. You do it first. Read the Bhagavat so the fault of the house is somewhat nullified and you can live in peace. Okay? Even a foot or two can make a difference in the soil. Do this, it will be good for you. Okay.

Video Title: L144: विश्व में एटॉमिक वार का खतरा 600 साल पहले लिख दिया गया था। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I have two questions. First, you mentioned that in the coming days, Russia will rule India. What will the situation be like? We are spreading the Malika's message in Russian groups, so could you provide some facts to share with them to strengthen their conviction? Second, when we chant the name of Madhav, should we do it mentally or with our tongue? Is there a difference, as some say mental chanting is superior?
Answer: Jai Jagannath, a very good question. Regarding chanting God's name, of the two methods—chanting with the tongue and chanting in the heart—the greatest is to chant in the heart. But it doesn't happen right away. First, after chanting with your mouth for some days, it automatically becomes a practice. After that, the chanting happens in the heart on its own, even while you are walking, driving, working, or eating. Chanting in the heart is very good, and by doing so, we can do it all day and all night. Even while sleeping, the chanting doesn't stop. However, the effect of the Trikal Sandhya mantra's pronunciation comes upon the body, so it is more beneficial for a person if it is pronounced aloud.  Second, Mahapurush Achyutananda has written that there will be war on all the major borders of the world. At that time, there will be major communal riots in India, and Russia will come and take charge. This will not be by force. At that time, China, Pakistan, many Muslim countries, and America will all be at war with India. India will invite Russia to come. So Russia will come and take charge of the administration, meaning military rule for the defense of the country. It is also written that a different lineage of people will be in power in India at that time. The transfer of Lord Jagannath Mahaprabhu will be done by the Russian government's king and queen along with these rulers. In this way, Russia will definitely come to help India. It will be a coalition government; they will help us and handle all the administration and the defense of our country. Jai.

Video Title: L144: विश्व में एटॉमिक वार का खतरा 600 साल पहले लिख दिया गया था। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, my engagement that I told you about, which happened three weeks ago, has broken off. I was getting worried and thinking about how to fix it. But please tell me, can this relationship be fixed or not? If not, I will move on.
Answer: Look, my child, in this world, God's will is always for our well-being. If a relationship breaks, think that a better one is coming. It could be even better. But we shouldn't insist, 'No, I want that same relationship.' Okay, that relationship can also work out if you engage in devotion to God. But instead of saying that, pray to God, 'Lord, please finalize the relationship that is best for me.' For this, read the Gopi Leela from the tenth canto of Lord Krishna's life. Chant the name of Madhav and perform Trikal Sandhya. A good proposal will come, and you will get married. Within a year from now, you will be married in a very good place. There will be no problem. Just wait for God's will. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L144: विश्व में एटॉमिक वार का खतरा 600 साल पहले लिख दिया गया था। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र

Video Title: L146: द्वापरयुग में भगवान श्रीकृष्ण अर्जुन को जगन्नाथ जी के रत्न भंडार के बारे में क्या बताए थें?

There, people will be troubled by elements like floods, fire, earthquakes, and communal issues. There will also be changes in the sea. This is all part of establishing dharma. Video Title: L146: द्वापरयुग में भगवान श्रीकृष्ण अर्जुन को जगन्नाथ जी के रत्न भंडार के बारे में क्या बताए थें?
Question: My question is, as we see in the news, things like bloodstains appearing on the canopy in the Jagannath temple and the fights among the priests—what is the reason for this?
Answer: Look, the Jagannath temple is the main center of faith for Sanatana Dharma in the entire world. Secondly, according to the scriptures, the Jagannath temple is one of the four Dhams. Third, according to the Skanda Purana, the Jagannath region is called a Vaikuntha, the original Vaikuntha or Martya Vaikuntha (Vaikuntha on Earth). Here, Lord Jagannath is worshipped as Mahavishnu. When Lord Jagannath takes the Kalki form, major signs will first appear from the Jagannath temple, such as the flag falling, stones falling, questions arising about the Ratna Bhandar (treasure vault), the Ratna Bhandar being tainted, the Mahaprasad repeatedly not being offered, and fights among the priests. All of these things—bloodstains on the Ratna Simhasana (bejeweled throne), crows perching on the temple, and inauspicious birds circling the temple—all these are signs of the end of Kali Yuga and the incarnation of God. All these signs have already appeared, and the change is coming.

Video Title: L146: द्वापरयुग में भगवान श्रीकृष्ण अर्जुन को जगन्नाथ जी के रत्न भंडार के बारे में क्या बताए थें?
Question: Jai Shri Madhav, Prabhu Ji. I was saying that in the upcoming world war, many people will be killed. Sometimes, thinking about it is so frightening. How will it happen? And the Muslims living in India will also commit many atrocities. Please tell us something about that. It's very distressing to think about.
Answer: Look, we did not create this earth. When there were millions and billions of people on earth, we didn't know when we came or when we will go. Therefore, this earth is under the control of the Lord who runs it. Who will stay and who will go is a matter of dharma and adharma. If we get caught up in these thoughts, we will not find peace. We have to change our own karma and make an effort to change the world. If we follow dharma, maintain purity, and perform good deeds, we will have no problems in the future. And there will be no problem for humanity either. It is necessary for humans to abandon the karma of Kali Yuga and adopt the karma of Satya Yuga. This includes performing Trikal Sandhya, giving up alcohol, meat, and intoxicants, and reading the Bhagavata. Satya Yuga is coming. Humans who transform themselves will also move forward into the new age, no matter the trouble.

Video Title: L146: द्वापरयुग में भगवान श्रीकृष्ण अर्जुन को जगन्नाथ जी के रत्न भंडार के बारे में क्या बताए थें?
Question: My name is Rahul, and I am speaking from Delhi. You had mentioned that a crisis would come to Delhi. So, Father, when is this crisis likely to occur?
Answer: Look, for human beings in this world, there is no crisis as such. It is the consequence of our own karma that we call a crisis. But see, whatever disaster or problem comes into the world, we must hold on to dharma. As for when it will come, I have said before that a situation of great change will arise during the 'Meena Sadi Chalana' period. And gradually, moving forward, Satya Yuga will arrive by 2032. Therefore, there is nothing to fear. The point is to perform Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavata, and chant the name of Madhav. By becoming a person of Satya Yuga and performing the karma of Satya Yuga, this human life will be saved. The coming disaster will come and go; it will intensify, a lot. But what should we do? We must correct our own karma. So, a disaster will certainly come to Delhi. I cannot give a tentative date because it is in God's hands. But the point is, the time is visible. See what is ahead and move towards dharma. You and your family will be protected.

Video Title: L146: द्वापरयुग में भगवान श्रीकृष्ण अर्जुन को जगन्नाथ जी के रत्न भंडार के बारे में क्या बताए थें?

Answer: When someone eats food, their own stomach gets full. Someone who just watches another person eat doesn't get their stomach filled. Yes, for people who are physically handicapped or those who have very little time and cannot dedicate it, listening to it occasionally will work. But reciting it yourself yields greater results. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L146: द्वापरयुग में भगवान श्रीकृष्ण अर्जुन को जगन्नाथ जी के रत्न भंडार के बारे में क्या बताए थें?
Question: Father, I have a lot of fights with my mother regarding my studies. What should I do about it? I do everything, but she doesn't agree, and we always end up fighting. They are about studies, and they get very heated.
Answer: Look, son, just as we eat food three or four times from morning to evening, studying is like food. Just as a ray of light cannot separate itself from the sun, for young children who are not yet employed, studying is essential for everyone. What changes will or will not come in the world is a different matter; you children should not think about that. Follow the path shown by God. God has shown this path to live in bliss. So, study and respect your parents. Greet your parents with 'pranam' every day. This is the tradition of our Sanatana Dharma. By doing this, your lifespan will increase, and your future will be happy. Jai. Anyone else?

Video Title: L146: द्वापरयुग में भगवान श्रीकृष्ण अर्जुन को जगन्नाथ जी के रत्न भंडार के बारे में क्या बताए थें?
Question: Father, I am Alka from Jaipur. You had said I would have an experience, and I want to tell you about it. The very night I returned, I had a dream of a beautiful castle-like place. A female monkey wearing jewelry came and chanted 'Madhav' with me. She asked me to tell her about Madhav's divine play. Then my pet dog also came and loudly said, 'Madhav, Madhav,' which shocked me and I woke up. I wanted to share this experience.
Answer: Look, in Satya Yuga, monkeys will speak first. This is written in the Bhavishya Malika. Monkeys and cows will talk. And you saw that scene—in a beautiful environment, animals, whether it's your pet dog or a monkey, were talking and saying 'Jai Shri Madhav.' Everyone will say 'Jai Shri Madhav' and everyone will talk. This is a sign of Satya Yuga, and it is a proof for you that it will surely come. It is written in the Malika that all living beings will talk, even trees and plants will talk. No one will harm anyone else. Peace will prevail everywhere. Human beings will live with great peace and happiness, ending the bad times and evil on earth to create a beautiful new world.

Video Title: L146: द्वापरयुग में भगवान श्रीकृष्ण अर्जुन को जगन्नाथ जी के रत्न भंडार के बारे में क्या बताए थें?
Question: My question is that the glory of the Jagannath Puri dham is described in the Puranas. Will that glory remain intact in the future as well?
Answer: In Kali Yuga, God is in the form of Daru Brahma (wood-form Absolute). In a different yuga, the Lord is worshipped in the Jagannath region in a manifest form. The glory of the Jagannath region will remain. For a short period, for six years, Lord Jagannath's Rath Yatra will stop; this is written in the Bhavishya Purana. And for some days, Lord Jagannath will stay outside the region. There will be calamities. After that, Lord Kalki will call Vibhishana and tell him to absorb the water of the sea near the Jagannath temple. He will also call Agastya Mahamuni, who will appear before the Lord, and he will be asked to free the Jagannath region from the water. Agastya Muni will do so. After that, the glory of Jagannath will be restored. This glory is for infinite time; it will remain for infinite yugas.

Video Title: L146: द्वापरयुग में भगवान श्रीकृष्ण अर्जुन को जगन्नाथ जी के रत्न भंडार के बारे में क्या बताए थें?
Question: Father, why do I feel faint while listening to the satsang?
Answer: Don't get so emotional. Listen with a little more patience. It's good to have devotional feelings, but don't get so emotional. Chant the name of Madhav, and it won't happen again.

Video Title: L146: द्वापरयुग में भगवान श्रीकृष्ण अर्जुन को जगन्नाथ जी के रत्न भंडार के बारे में क्या बताए थें?
Question: Father, how do we bring our family members into this stream (path)?
Answer: Look, no one is anyone's family, no one is anyone's friend, no one is anyone's relative. Everyone has come together due to the bonds of karma. They have become a family in this birth, but not everyone's karma is the same. So, those who are meant to come will come, and those who are not, will not. If you must, tell them once. Don't tell them too much, don't argue too much, and don't debate too much. Those who are devotees will come, and those who are not, will not. The family is the Madhav family. The Madhav family will unite across the entire world. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L146: द्वापरयुग में भगवान श्रीकृष्ण अर्जुन को जगन्नाथ जी के रत्न भंडार के बारे में क्या बताए थें?
Question: Maharaj, why do we have 'Pitra Dosh' (ancestral affliction) in our horoscopes, and what is its remedy for the future?
Answer: Pitra Dosh is not in the horoscope. Pitra Dosh occurs when ancestors pass away and their Shraddha ceremony or their 'Dasha' rituals are not performed properly. Secondly, when the 'asthi visarjan' (immersion of ashes) is not done with the correct rituals or by a proper Brahmin, Pitra Dosh affects every person's life. You have it in your life too. Therefore, to get relief from Pitra Dosh, perform Trikal Sandhya. Also, come once to the Nabhigaya Kshetra in Jajpur and perform 'Pind Daan' (ancestral offerings). All your ancestors will attain liberation. Liberation is also attained by performing Trikal Sandhya, but also perform Pind Daan once. The problem will be resolved; the affliction will not remain. The problem you have can be removed through this karma.

Video Title: L146: द्वापरयुग में भगवान श्रीकृष्ण अर्जुन को जगन्नाथ जी के रत्न भंडार के बारे में क्या बताए थें?
Question: A saint from Gujarat has written a book in which your name is mentioned, along with prophecies about Kashi Vishwanath, Delhi, China, and Ahmedabad. Can I tell you about it? Is this information correct?

It is written that one person, a Brahmin born in Jajpur, will do this. Other saints and sadhus have also written about this in their books, which is why we are doing this work. It is absolutely correct, very good. Look, Devayat Pandit had written that the first satsang of Satya Yuga in Kali Yuga would happen on the banks of the Sabarmati in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. And in 2022, we started the propagation of Bhavishya Malika with the first Satya Yuga satsang from Gujarat. Send the PDF of that book. We will read it and use whatever else is written in it for the welfare of the people.

Video Title: L146: द्वापरयुग में भगवान श्रीकृष्ण अर्जुन को जगन्नाथ जी के रत्न भंडार के बारे में क्या बताए थें?

Question: Pandit ji, is God 'sakar' (with form) or 'nirakar' (formless)?
Answer: Look, 'nirakar' and 'sakar' are both aspects of God. 'Nirakar' means God has no form. When the Lord takes a human body, He is 'sakar brahma' (God with form). When the Lord, in the form of Mahavishnu, resides in the entire universe, in every living being, in every animate and inanimate object, He is called 'nirakar'. He has no form. Wherever you look, the Lord is there. As it is said, 'The Lord is omnipresent and equal everywhere; I know He manifests through love.' This means Lord Shankar tells Mother Bhavani that the Lord is present everywhere, and He manifests wherever there is a devotee's devotion, love, and emotion. In this way, He is 'sakar'. So, 'nirakar' refers to the Lord's formless, unimaginable light or element, and 'sakar brahma' is when the Lord takes a human form on Earth.
