There is nothing greater than taking refuge in Him. Only Trikal Sandhya can protect you, and the Bhagavata can make humans divine.

Video Title: L153: भारत के पड़ोसी देशों के साथ आगे युद्ध की स्थिति बनेगी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, a month ago, I saw the sun in my dream at 10 o'clock at night. What does this mean, Guruji?
Answer: Look, son, I have said before that a time will come when three, even six suns will rise. But they are not the Sun God; they are different celestial bodies that will be close to the Earth. This will happen in the middle of the night. The time has not yet come, but it will. For devotees of God, the Lord shows them in advance that time is about to change. Following the Bhavishya Malika and taking refuge in the Lord is for your own good. Okay?

Video Title: L153: भारत के पड़ोसी देशों के साथ आगे युद्ध की स्थिति बनेगी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I was talking to a friend from ISKCON about Lord Kalki's incarnation, but he said that Kali Yuga has not even properly started yet. I argued with him using points from your teachings, like King Parikshit seeing Dharma's legs broken and Narada Muni calling the current era the 'terrible Kali Yuga'. He couldn't answer but stuck to his point. How should we deal with people who don't believe that Kali Yuga is ending, despite scriptural evidence?
Answer: Son, you did a very good thing. Look, those who lack knowledge of the scriptures or are stuck in a wrong tradition—meaning they haven't studied the scriptures correctly—cannot understand. God is found not on the path of knowledge, but on the path of faith. One has to believe in the Bhavishya Malika. Those who are true devotees of Lord Kalki, who have come from Goloka Vaikuntha, will surely believe. Those who don't, the Malika says they are not devotees. Kali Yuga has already ended. The signs are everywhere: flowers on neem trees, milk flowing from them, the flag disappearing from the Jagannath temple. These are proofs that no one can refute. What the Nitya Pancha Sakha (five companions of the Lord) have written cannot be denied. Those who don't believe now will see the destructive form of the Lord and then believe, but it will be too late. If they were true devotees of Krishna, they would worship the Bhavishya Malika, as it is the word of Krishna Himself. We are not here for those who won't believe; we are here to save the true devotees. The takers of this nectar have already been chosen by God.

Video Title: L153: भारत के पड़ोसी देशों के साथ आगे युद्ध की स्थिति बनेगी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, I am from Kolkata and have a great desire to attend your assembly there. However, due to some obstacles, it seems I won't be able to. Please bless me so that I can overcome all obstacles and attend.
Answer: Look, chant the name of Madhav and pray with devotion, 'Lord, please bring me to the discourse.' If you cannot come for many days, you can come for two or three. Chant the name of Madhav, and you will surely receive the Lord's grace.

Video Title: L153: भारत के पड़ोसी देशों के साथ आगे युद्ध की स्थिति बनेगी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I have two questions. First, I visited your ashram in Bhubaneswar and was given a glass of water that felt very different, not like normal water. What kind of water was it? Second, when I do my morning Trikal Sandhya, my mind rushes me to finish it quickly, to speed through the mantras. Why does this happen?
Answer: For your first question: The Vaikunthadham Ashram on Khandagiri is located at the confluence of the sacred Saraswati and Ganduki rivers. The water there is from this holy confluence, which is why it felt different to you. It is the most sacred water for the salvation of devotees. For your second question: The urge to do the Trikal Sandhya quickly is a slight effect of the Kali Yuga, an external influence that distracts the mind. But don't worry, this will not happen in the future; your mind will become steady. In fact, doing it quickly is a good sign. It means your mantra is becoming 'siddha' (perfected and powerful). It is due to the mantra's power that it happens quickly, so it is a very good thing. Continue doing it.

Video Title: L153: भारत के पड़ोसी देशों के साथ आगे युद्ध की स्थिति बनेगी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My question is about the current pathetic situation of Hindus in Bangladesh. An image is going viral of a temple being set on fire and idols of Lord Jagannath on the ground. How will the Hindus living there, or in other places facing such atrocities, be saved and protected? Many people, including our devotees in Bangladesh, are asking this.
Answer: Look, for the Hindus, or people of any religion, to be saved from the current problem, they should chant the name of Madhav, perform Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavata, and chant Madhav's name continuously. It is my firm belief that if they do this, they will have no problems. The crisis that has been created today will also end. God will take revenge in some way; He can do anything. The Lord Himself can manifest and protect them. They have no other substitute or source of help. Therefore, they must take refuge in God. God will save those who take refuge in Kalki Madhav. Those who follow this path will surely be saved. In my opinion, there will be no problem for them.

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I wish for everyone's welfare and want to preach about the Lord, telling everyone to abandon everything and focus on meditation and devotion. But I drive a vehicle for a living and find it difficult to do this, though I still try. What should I do?
Answer: Look, you have been blessed with a human life. How can we make this human life meaningful? Human beings were created from dharma. A soul that performs the best deeds gets a human birth. A human who performs the worst deeds suffers in hell. Those who commit lesser sins are born as animals and insects. So, we have received this human life through dharma. You should dedicate some time to preaching about dharma. If you serve humanity, God will also bless you. There isn't much time left for the world to change. The people of India also need to follow the traditions of Sanatana Dharma, the principles of the Vedas, and refrain from killing living beings. Because a great, destructive dance (tandav) will also occur in India if people do not stay away from killing animals. My words are a warning for the entire universe. My words are for the transformation of the entire universe because God created the universe from Sanatana, and it is destined to become Sanatana again. The protection of devotees worldwide is the biggest issue. God has incarnated in India, and He will surely protect India. But those who walk the path of adharma (unrighteousness) will not be protected. Therefore, preach about dharma whenever you get time. It will bring welfare to human civilization.

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: As we see what is happening in Bangladesh, will it also happen in India? For the protection of our country's mothers, sisters, temples, and gurus, is it righteous (dharma) or unrighteous (adharma) to take up arms? And my second question is, will we get to see the four-armed form (Chaturbhuj roop) of our beloved Madhav ji?
Answer: Regarding seeing the Lord's form, I have said before that this is a matter of devotion. For those who regularly attend the online satsang, we will contemplate this in their thoughts and minds. But the main point is that this is a time of salvation for everyone in India and the world. At this time, it is necessary for everyone to perform Trikal Sandhya. It is necessary for everyone to hold on to dharma. Only those who hold on to dharma will remain; for those who do not, a time of great peril is coming. The change we are seeing in Bangladesh, we also saw in Pakistan, and we saw that change in Afghanistan as well. This is a time of great transformation. The more the power of dharma increases, the more this will happen. And just as Pakistan is in a miserable state, Bangladesh will face an even greater misery.

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I am a student from West Bengal. I prepared for the NEET medical exam, but the question paper was leaked, and despite my hard work, I couldn't get a seat. Recently, a horrific incident happened where a female doctor on night duty in Kolkata was raped and murdered. Could you please guide me on why these rape cases happen repeatedly with women? Will God not deliver justice for this? Why does this happen? Is there no safety for us? What should we do? We feel scared. How can we build our careers?
Answer: You have raised a very good point. Look, in Kali Yuga, the number of demons (asuras) has increased. It is written in the Bhavishya Malika that by consuming meat and killing animals, humans will become like animals. By eating animal flesh, animalistic behavior will arise in humans. And those who are animals, not humans, are the ones who commit such heinous, sinful acts that are beyond condemnation. The government should bring amendments, and they have brought major ones, but it still happens because people have become demonic due to their food, lifestyle, the environment, and the influence of the demons of Kali Yuga. In these times, only dharma can protect you, my dear. If any woman performs Trikal Sandhya and chants the name of Madhav, she will not face such a fate. The Lord will protect her in some way. God will protect her because Trikal Sandhya is such a principle. A daughter from Mumbai spoke to me this morning; her husband was saved from a major accident. She said it felt like he got a new life. But not everyone performs Trikal Sandhya. See, both dharma (righteousness) and karma (action) are necessary. In this empire of the demons of Kali, only dharma can protect us. Secondly, the malpractice in the medical examination, the NEET question paper issue, is happening because of Kali Yuga. This will continue to increase. People will not know what is happening. Not everyone will get results according to their merit because Kali Yuga has taken hold and wants to exert its influence over all hard work. This is the nature of the times. Therefore, every mother and sister should chant the name of Madhav and perform Trikal Sandhya; they will surely receive God's protection. No one will be able to harm them. As far as I know, a daughter who is connected with us called me. She lives in Jammu, Kashmir. She said she had to go home at 11 PM. The auto-rickshaw she took had a young daughter of her own age in it. The driver called someone and said, 'I am on my way, you wait.' His attitude seemed different. Scared, she performed Trikal Sandhya and asked him to drop her off, but he didn't. Then, by praying to the Lord, he dropped her on the road where there was no one. Then another auto came on its own, picked her up, and took her to safety. Dharma brings salvation, and sin brings destruction. People need to become righteous and take refuge in Madhav. If women do not follow dharma, how much can they fight against the power of demons?

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: (This is a testimony) I am Ishan from Mathura Vrindavan. Yesterday, I was in a car going to a debate competition. The driver was speeding. My chanting of 'Madhav Madhav' stopped for some reason. Suddenly, a motorcycle swerved in front of us on the highway. Our driver swerved violently to avoid them. It was a very close call; if it were a few inches off, no one could have saved us. Everyone else was shaken, but I didn't even move from my seat. Then, the name 'Madhav Madhav' started coming from within me. I realized later that Lord Madhav saved me. Neither my family, my education, nor my future money could have saved me at that moment. I have been doing Trikal Sandhya for a long time by His grace, and He saved me. If Lord Madhav is listening, thank you.
Answer: Through Trikal Sandhya, a person will not suffer an untimely death or die from illness. They will be saved. No enemy, no matter how powerful in the universe, can harm them. Because this is a divine principle, a divine act, which I am distributing to human civilization by God's grace. There is no greater principle, tradition, or guru than this. A time will come when people will want to do Trikal Sandhya, but by then, the times will have worsened, and it will be of no use. Now is the time to adopt it so that your welfare may be secured.

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Due to the sins and great sins committed in my past life or even in this life, I feel a lot of regret. Sometimes, life doesn't feel meaningful. I feel I've made mistakes, and sometimes, I even have suicidal thoughts. Will God forgive my sins, or will I have to suffer for them?
Answer: You have God's grace, and God Himself wants to save you, which is why you are connected with us. Secondly, we have received a human birth, and in this human life, we still have time. In one year, one can attain Vaikuntha (heaven). The karma of many lifetimes can be cleansed in a single day of righteous living. See, the suicides that happen in society these days are due to the influence of Kali Yuga. Those who commit suicide never get a human birth again. The soul gains no benefit from it. Suicide is influenced by Kali, ghosts, and spirits, or it is done in a fit of anger. But any soul that commits suicide never gets a human birth again, and they get nothing but hell, where they keep drowning. So, remove this thought from your mind. Perform Trikal Sandhya, chant the name of Madhav. If you have problems with your job or anything else, think about how you can move forward. Committing suicide is the act of a coward, and it brings no benefit to the person, only sorrow. Even ghosts and spirits do not give them a place, saying, 'You came by suicide, go sit somewhere else, you can't sit with us.' There is nothing but the torture of hell. And suicide is such an act that one will not get a human birth for crores of years, even infinite years. Therefore, wise people never commit suicide.

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Will my sins be atoned for by chanting God's name?
Answer: Perform Trikal Sandhya. Perform Trikal Sandhya and chant the name of Madhav. Read the Bhagavat Gita.

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My grandmother passed away. She had Tulsi and Rudraksha beads around her neck. Will she get a place in Vaikuntha (heaven)?
Answer: No, she did not attain liberation. Perform her Shraddha (last rites) rituals properly. See, suicide happens in homes where there is an influence of ghosts and spirits, or where there is a 'Pitri Dosh' (ancestral affliction). So, perform her last rites properly. Just having a Tulsi mala around the neck does not guarantee liberation.

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I want to know about Lord Bholenath (Shiva). What is his role in the upcoming calamities? I keep seeing him repeatedly. I am a devotee of Madhav, but today a pandit asked me, 'Why did you stop worshiping Mahadev?' I have never really worshiped him. He said, 'If not in this life, then in a past one.' I see Lord Shiva standing with his trident, asking why I left his devotion. I have become a little disturbed. Please guide me.
Answer: Lord Shankar is an avatar of God, an 'ansha avatar' (partial incarnation). Both Brahma Dev and Shankar Bhagwan were created from a part of God. They are all one, not different. See, if your mind tells you to, then chant Lord Shankar's name as well, worship him too. But perform Trikal Sandhya to go to Satya Yuga. There is no problem with that.

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My mother was asking if, as a woman, she can perform 'jalabhishek' (ritual bathing) on the Narayan Shila (Shaligram) and touch it, or not?
Answer: Any woman can worship God with devotion and purity. Regarding the Narayan Shila, which is called Shaligram, I have seen in some places that women are forbidden from worshiping it; it's not the tradition in their homes. But my principle is this: when Narayan was born as Lord Krishna, all the Gopi mothers were worshiping him. They were even performing the divine Raas dance with him and worshiping him. Meera Bai worshiped Lord Krishna and attained him in her physical body. Therefore, every human, every woman, has the right to worship Lord Vishnu, Narayan. The Bhavishya Malika says that because Lord Vishnu was not worshiped, 17,000 years were cut from the age of Kali Yuga. Therefore, according to my principles and the principles of Bhavishya Malika, everyone has the right to worship Lord Vishnu. There is no problem with it. You can do it with joy. Stay in dharma, do righteous deeds, perform Trikal Sandhya. My blessings and the Lord's blessings are with you.

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: (This is a testimony) The day before yesterday, I went for the Govardhan parikrama (circumambulation). I was awake all night. In the morning, after doing Trikal Sandhya, I prayed to Madhav ji to get me home to Delhi safely. I was tired and fell asleep on my bike while riding. Around 7 AM, there was a large truck in front of me. I didn't realize when I fell asleep. A car horn from behind woke me up. I was just one foot away from the truck. Lord Madhav protected me so much. I immediately thanked him, saying, 'Lord, I asked you, and you saved my life through someone else.'
Answer: People who chant the name of Madhav and perform Trikal Sandhya will never have an untimely death. There is no question of untimely death because God walks with his devotees. The name of Madhav can save a person from the greatest calamities of the universe. So, chant the name of Madhav and be devoted. May the Lord's grace be upon you. In the future, if you feel sleepy or have any problem, please stop, my son. God saved you once. So, we should not do this again. We will remain in devotion to the Lord and not make mistakes that are difficult to correct. Yes, the Lord is there, we do Trikal Sandhya, we chant Madhav's name, and the Lord will surely protect us. But the Lord has given you a warning once, so don't do it again. Act with understanding.

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I saw a video on your channel which said that in the coming Satya Yuga, everyone will get a new 16-year-old body. Will all of this really happen? Is what is written in the scriptures false?
Answer: Whatever is written in the scriptures about God's incarnations has happened in every age. Whatever God has promised in the scriptures has been proven true in every era since the beginning. In the coming times, those who remain in the refuge of Madhav, perform Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavat Gita, become vegetarian, and become members of the Sudharma Mahasangha, only they will attain youthfulness. I have said this before, and I am saying it again. There will be no change in this. It will definitely happen, but one must be a devotee.

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: We are very worried. We have set up this pomegranate farm by taking loans. People are using drones to keep an eye on it to steal the produce. What is the solution for this? We are very tense.
Answer: Look, in the end of Kali Yuga—or rather, Kali has already gone—the number of thieves will increase greatly. This is written in the Bhavishya Malika. So, do one thing: chant the name of Madhav, perform Trikal Sandhya, and do it while sitting in your fields. You will receive God's protection. It can happen.

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: When will I experience God? I want to feel that He is with me. I listen to everyone's experiences, but I want my own.
Answer: All these principles—Trikal Sandhya, reading the Bhagavat Gita, and chanting the name of Madhav—are one divine principle. Fulfill all of them. You will receive God's complete grace, your life will be meaningful, and your human life will become divine. There is no other way besides Trikal Sandhya. You have to read the Bhagavat Gita; it must be read in every home. So, read the Bhagavat, perform Trikal Sandhya, and chant the name of Madhav. Daughter, you will receive God's full grace. Do it with devotion and stay away from bad people.

Video Title: L154: विश्व में राजनीतिक अस्थिरता बढ़ेगा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Could you tell us something about Khandwa district in Madhya Pradesh?
Answer: It is not written about specifically, but it is written about Madhya Pradesh. In every district of Madhya Pradesh, calamities, disasters, diseases, illnesses, earthquakes, floods, fires, and epidemics will increase. The protection for people is Trikal Sandhya. Only those who perform Trikal Sandhya will survive. In a village, only two, four, or five people will be saved; everyone else will go their own way according to their karma. A time of great change is coming. We are seeing tremors on the earth daily. This change will turn cyclonic and accelerate. Humanity must turn towards dharma. Trikal Sandhya and reading the Bhagavat Gita can protect humanity. A time of great calamity is looming over the entire world. At this time, there is no other way but dharma, no protection for humanity except taking refuge in Madhav.

Video Title: L155: माता और कन्याओं के ऊपर अत्याचार क्यों हो रहा है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I wanted to ask, for people who are religious but still disrespect women and do bad deeds, what fate will they attain? Because as you say, just taking the Lord's name once can wash away all sins. So, for such people who do wrong against women, how will the Lord deliver justice?
Answer: Look, the Bhavishya Malika has a composition about this. Those who commit lustful and sinful acts against mothers and daughters will face destruction through disease and epidemics by the Yogini Mata, and afterwards, they will attain a hellish state. You see, there is no forgiveness for this sin. It is the nature of sin that those who mistreat mothers and daughters will go to hell. It is written in the Yama Purana and the Garuda Purana that such people will have to suffer for their sins in hell for an entire kalpa (eon). And in Kaliyug, they will have an unnatural death. Therefore, by doing such acts, a person works towards their own death and invites their own destruction. Because if the body is gone, what else is there in the world? That's why those who commit such sins will not be forgiven. It is written in the Bhavishya Malika.

Video Title: L155: माता और कन्याओं के ऊपर अत्याचार क्यों हो रहा है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Jai Shri Madhav, Pandit Ji. In an interview on a news channel, you once said that you have met Lord Parshuram. We don't want to know the details, but our only question is, can you tell us what color clothes he wears? How does he look? Can you tell us that, Pandit Ji?
Answer: Look, Lord Parshuram wears saffron-colored clothes and has matted hair (jata). The humans of Kaliyug would not be able to handle his sight because he has a divine form. Lord Parshuram has been in penance through the Treta, Dvapara, and Kali yugas, and he has so much power and influence that it's difficult to face him. If someone comes before him due to their own power of penance, they will be burned to ashes. Only Lord Kalki can face him. A meeting has occurred between Lord Kalki and him, and the leela (divine play) of Kalki is currently underway.

Video Title: L155: माता और कन्याओं के ऊपर अत्याचार क्यों हो रहा है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit Ji, I wanted to ask, it has been seven years since my marriage and we have no children. I am currently on medication. Also, in our house in the village, my mother sees a black shadow and hears the sound of footsteps at night, and she is unable to sleep properly. What is this dilemma?
Answer: Look, you have a 'Pitru Dosh' (ancestral affliction) in your house, which is why the ancestors are also coming and going. Do one thing in the house: tell your mother to recite the Bhagavat Ji. After reciting the Bhagavat Ji, perform the Trikal Sandhya in the name of Lord Madhav every day. If you don't see any benefit from this, then let me know. You will surely benefit from this. Secondly, you don't have children. What is your age? ... Listen, do one thing. From tomorrow, start reading the 'Gopi Leela' from the Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana, both husband and wife, in the morning and before sleeping at night. And perform the Trikal Sandhya. Tell me what happens next. If you stay on this path, you will surely receive the Lord's grace. It will be alright.

Video Title: L155: माता और कन्याओं के ऊपर अत्याचार क्यों हो रहा है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit Ji, I wanted to ask, the ISKCON people are saying that there is still a lot of time left for Kaliyug to end.
Answer: Look, son, ISKCON is a very sacred element of the Lord Krishna tradition. They have propagated Krishna Dharma throughout the world. Prabhupada Ji did very good work, and I have no comment on that. But I want to tell you one thing: I am a Pandit, a Brahmin, and I have studied the scriptures. According to the scriptures, it was written that Kaliyug would end after 5000 years. It has now been 5130 years. I have read all the scriptures like Manusmriti, Garga Samhita, Surya Siddhanta, Nirnaya Sindhu, Bhavishya Malika of the eternal Panchasakha, and Garga Samhita. Along with the scriptures, we have the Bhavishya Purana, which is the Bhavishya Malika, which I have translated into Hindi and English from its original Odia language, understanding its meaning well. Most people in India are not aware of the time of the yuga change. But in truth, Kaliyug has already ended. Its proof is becoming evident and will continue to do so. For this, we have arranged a conference with all the sadhus and saints of India. There is a meeting with all the saints in Jagannath where this will be discussed. After the saints deliberate on it, they will give a sign and also present proof of the yuga change for the Hindus of India and for all of human civilization. Therefore, the yuga change has already happened. With 4400 years and a yuga sandhya of 400 years, Kaliyug will end and Satyug will arrive. This is written in the scriptures. So, Kaliyug has ended. At most, Kaliyug will last until 2032, and the arrival of Satyug is going to happen in 2032-33. Therefore, following what is written in the scriptures will be good for humanity.

Video Title: L155: माता और कन्याओं के ऊपर अत्याचार क्यों हो रहा है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit Ji, I want to ask, I have been searching for a good guru for a long time. Having studied the Mahabharata, I haven't found a better guru than Lord Parshuram. So I want to ask you, since Kaliyug has ended and we are in the period after the twilight phase (sandhyakal), how can we receive education from Lord Parshuram in this era? I also want to tell you that Lord Kalki, as Lord Vishnu, came in my dream and gave me a sign that I will fight on his side. Since that sign, my heart is filled with excitement. So I want to ask, how can I receive education from him, as you also know he is the greatest guru?
Answer: Look, Lord Parshuram came in the Treta and Dvapara yugas. In the Dvapara yuga, he gave education to Karna and many other disciples. But in Kaliyug, he will not teach anyone; he will only become the guru of Lord Kalki. This is written in the scriptures. Secondly, those who fought in the Mahabharata war, the Saptarathis, the Pandavas, the five young warriors, they will receive their skills from Lord Kalki. This is written in the Bhavishya Malika. That too will happen when the Sudharma Sabha convenes, not now. After receiving the skills from the Lord, their power will come. Therefore, if you want to make Parshuram Ji your guru, then from the Dashavatara shloka, chant the mantra 'kshatriya-rudhira-maye jagad-apagata-pāpam...' 11 times during each of the three sandhyas. And accept Lord Parshuram as your guru in your mind and proceed with your work. If your devotion is true, you will get his darshan (vision), and you can consider that he has accepted you. Okay.

Video Title: L155: माता और कन्याओं के ऊपर अत्याचार क्यों हो रहा है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I live alone, so what should I do? The time for the divine vision (darshan) has also arrived.
Answer: Look, mother, listen. Talk to Mohan about this. Talking to me won't be of any use because by talking to Mohan, something can be done about it. Yes, one thing is that the Lord's darshan is attained through devotion, through karma (actions), and through one's own firm faith. With such devotion, faith, and firmness, you might get the Lord's darshan someday. Okay.

Video Title: L155: माता और कन्याओं के ऊपर अत्याचार क्यों हो रहा है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, my question is on behalf of a friend. I have two questions for you. The first is that a lot of tantra-mantra (black magic) happens in her house, which her sister-in-law does, due to which her brother is completely under her control. So what should she do about that? And the second question is that she is forced to cook non-vegetarian food in her house. She performs Trikal Sandhya and everything else. So what should she do about this? Will she incur sin for this?
Answer: Look, mother, sin is sin. Following dharma is very difficult. Those who live in a joint family face a lot of trouble. Therefore, tell the person who is doing this to perform Trikal Sandhya and pray that God gives them good sense so they don't put pressure on her. Pray to God with devotion. If her devotion becomes strong, she will surely receive God's grace. And for 'pret dosh' (spirit affliction) and 'bhoot dosh' (ghost affliction), we cannot do anything until we become vegetarian. We can't do anything until then. Once one becomes vegetarian, then we can prescribe a solution, because our path is based on dharma. Its foundation is on dharma. For a person walking on the path of dharma, whatever we suggest and they do, they will surely get the result, because our sacred principles are based on that.

Video Title: L155: माता और कन्याओं के ऊपर अत्याचार क्यों हो रहा है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My question was that I previously had desires and lust in my mind, about which I had asked you once. You advised me to read and contemplate the leelas (divine plays) of Lord Radha Madhav. By God's grace, there has been some improvement. But sometimes, my mind becomes restless and troubled. What should I do for that?
Answer: Look, the mind is fickle, like a river. It flows, right? Just like a river is full of water, the mind is an element full of thoughts, and it wanders here and there. For those who have accepted God as their own and have completely surrendered to God, such effects do not occur. Therefore, continue your devotion for a few more days. Do as I told you, and more change will come.

Video Title: L155: माता और कन्याओं के ऊपर अत्याचार क्यों हो रहा है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: We want to do bhakti (devotion), Father, but we are not allowed to. Every other day, so many obstacles are created that we are pushed away from the Lord's devotion. Father, this is our prayer at your feet, that we may be blessed with the grace of the Lord's devotion. And Father, we also want to have your darshan, but we are not being allowed to leave the house.
Answer: Look, I'll tell you one thing. When the effect of tantra-mantra is present, you should intensify the mantra I told you and chant it even more. That's the first thing. Second, when we go to a Bhagavat Katha, the flower garland that is offered to the Lord there, keeping that garland in the house prevents obstacles from tantra-mantra. So what can I do? Look, mother, for this problem, we have devotion and faith in God. The more you do, the better. If you face problems, sit with the Bhagavat Ji and read it, and chant the name of Madhav. The practitioners of tantra use it 24 hours a day. They use mantras 24 hours a day. So, for a few days, there will be a 24-hour battle. After the fight, they will retreat. They won't retreat so quickly. And our dharma, the amount of dharma one has, it doesn't allow these things to enter the body. But due to the karma of a past life and this life, a person suffers. So, read the mantra I told you and chant the name of Madhav. And secondly, during the katha, the flower garland offered to the Lord, if that is kept in the house, no calamity will befall that house. Sometimes it gets desecrated, that's a different matter. So, mother, look, on one side, there is a fight between dharma and the asuras. The more our spiritual strength increases, the more they will be defeated in the fight. So it will take time, it won't happen so quickly. Continue your devotion.

Video Title: L155: माता और कन्याओं के ऊपर अत्याचार क्यों हो रहा है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I planted a Tulsi plant four times, and all four times it died. Some creature comes at night and eats it. Also, a rat roams in my house. Ever since I took initiation and entered this path, it bites my finger and even my thumb while I'm sleeping. It bleeds a lot. So what is the remedy for this? And I am getting sicker day by day, becoming weaker and my weight is decreasing. So what should I do?
Answer: Who bites the finger? The rat? If there are many rats, then call the rescue team, the government's animal helpline, and have them removed from the house. It happens because there are too many of them and they don't get food. The number of rats has increased a lot in the house. If it has increased, they should be taken and left somewhere outside. If there are too many, they will start affecting humans. Look, due to planetary afflictions (graha dosh) in your house, the rats have increased. The influence of Rahu and Ketu comes when the number of such wild creatures increases in the house. Therefore, recite the Bhagavat in your house, perform Trikal Sandhya, and as for these rats, call the helpline and have them removed. Or, take measures to make them leave the house without killing them. Then it will be alright.

Video Title: L155: माता और कन्याओं के ऊपर अत्याचार क्यों हो रहा है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My mind is not interested in anything else besides your sermons. Why is this happening?
Answer: It's alright, it is God's blessing that your mind and feelings are drawn to this. This is God's grace. Your past life's sanskars (impressions) are good. Continue doing this, but also do the necessary social duties. Very good.

Video Title: L155: माता और कन्याओं के ऊपर अत्याचार क्यों हो रहा है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I have a question. Some medicines are non-vegetarian, which we don't know about. I have heard that capsule medicines are non-vegetarian. I had a fever, so my mother gave it to me and I took it. I wanted to ask, is the Lord angry with me for this?
Answer: No, look, God does not get angry over medicine. Because this is Kaliyug, one has to take medicine. I have not forbidden anyone from taking medicine. So, there is no effect from God on you for this, no negative effect. Pray to God to keep your body healthy so that you don't have to take medicine.

Video Title: L155: माता और कन्याओं के ऊपर अत्याचार क्यों हो रहा है ? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Gurudev, I have a question. The Bhavishya Malika mentions every state of India, but what about some of the North-Eastern states? For example, I am from Tripura. Is anything written about Tripura? Because very few people know about Tripura. I am asking what will happen to the devotees there.
Answer: It is written about the northern region (Uttaranchal). Manipur, Nagaland, Tripura - all these states are in the northern region. It is written what will happen in the northern direction for all these states. Look, in the Bhavishya Malika, it is written about the whole world: the 'Pancha Pralaya' (five types of dissolution), floods, fire, epidemics, world war, a great war from China's side, a war from the north, from the Uttaranchal side - everything is written. The protection from this is Trikal Sandhya. The devotees who want to be saved should perform Trikal Sandhya, they should recite the Bhagavat Ji, and they should remain in the shelter of the Mother.

Video Title: L156: भगवान कल्कि करेंगे परमाणु से सुरक्षा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Hello ji, my question was regarding Lord Kalki and Lord Parashuram...
Answer: This is already a secret element written in the scriptures. Lord Kalki will make Lord Parashuram his guru. He will receive various divine weapons like the Agneyastra, Varunastra, Pashupatastra, and the Lakshmipati bow from him. However, this divine play (leela) will happen in secret, and no one will know about it. The scriptures say that Lord Kalki will receive knowledge and arts from Lord Parashuram in a subtle form that no one will see. This is a secret element, so it's not necessary to think too much about it. But believe that whether the secret meeting between Lord Parashuram and Kalki has happened or not, Kalki's divine play is ongoing. You can contemplate and think about what has happened and what is about to happen.

Video Title: L156: भगवान कल्कि करेंगे परमाणु से सुरक्षा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Hello ji, I wanted to ask, what changes happen in life from serving cows (Gau Seva)?
Answer: Look, cow service (Go Seva) is the greatest service for all humans. Since we cannot directly serve the gods and deities, in our ancient Sanatana Dharma tradition, Go Seva is recognized as the highest form of action. A person who serves Mother Cow selflessly, without any selfish motive, receives God's grace and attains Vaikuntha (the celestial abode). However, there is no rule to sell the milk given by Mother Cow. The great saint Achyutananda and the Panchasakha (five friends) have written about Mother Cow that those who build cowsheds and serve her may do so, but there is no provision to sell her milk for business. The calf should be allowed to drink its fill first. Whatever milk is left after the calf has drunk should be given to a deity or to the poor, sad, sick, or diseased without taking any money. That is where the dharma lies, and that is what is called true service to Mother Cow. There is no selfishness in it. Whoever serves Mother Cow will receive the grace of all 33 crore gods and goddesses, and that person will easily become a virtuous human and can attain Vaikuntha.

Video Title: L156: भगवान कल्कि करेंगे परमाणु से सुरक्षा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Ji, my question is, we want to have a darshan (sighting) of Lord Madhav. We request you, Prabhu ji...
Answer: Look, look, look. I have told you all before. Those of you who join the satsang (spiritual discourse), such discussions do not happen in an online meeting. Therefore, you should keep such thoughts for the in-person satsang. Those of you who live in the Braj Mandal, and as devotee groups (mandals) are formed, you should discuss it within those groups. I do not keep such discussions in the online satsang.

Video Title: L156: भगवान कल्कि करेंगे परमाणु से सुरक्षा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: In the house where we live, nothing good happens. Is there something evil in our house?
Answer: Look, it's not necessary to say. Do you read the Bhagavata Mahapurana in that house? When you read the Bhagavata Mahapurana, start reading it again. And do one more thing: all of you should perform the Trikal Sandhya (prayers at the three junctures of the day) together. No problem or fault will remain. If you do it with devotion, all your problems will be resolved. It has happened for many thousands and lakhs of people and has been very fruitful. It will be for you too.

Video Title: L156: भगवान कल्कि करेंगे परमाणु से सुरक्षा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I had lit a 'jyot' (divine flame/lamp), and one flame turned into two. What does this mean, Pandit ji?
Answer: Look, Maa, as is the devotion, so is the manifestation of God's light. A devotee has a vision of God through their feelings of devotion. It is your feeling (bhav) through which you saw this change. And this is good, because if a devotee doesn't get feelings and experiences along with their devotion, how will their faith become strong? So, this is a good experience. Just maintain your devotion, and you will also get direct experiences through your devotion in the future.

Video Title: L156: भगवान कल्कि करेंगे परमाणु से सुरक्षा | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My question was, when will all the devotees of the 16 mandals (groups) gather?
Answer: Look, the gathering of the devotees of the 16 mandals will happen only after the salvation of all the devotees within those mandals is complete. In each mandal, some have 10 lakh, some 12 lakh, some 5 lakh, some 6 lakh devotees, as written in the scriptures. When their numbers are complete, the gathering will happen after that. It will take time because, due to the influence of Kali Yuga, gathering the devotees is a big problem.

Video Title: L158: विश्व साधु संत महा महासभा - श्री जगन्नाथ पुरी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: When we read the Shrimad Bhagwat Mahapuran and finish it, can we read it again? And you said there will be a test by the Lord, what kind of test will it be? Please tell me, what will happen to those who cannot pass it?
Answer: Look, the concept of not being able to pass is not in Sanatana ideology. And God never establishes a religion in a way that troublemaking demons do. God first gives a warning and preaches Dharma. Now, on the 3rd of next month, the Vishwa Sanatan Dharma will hold a Bhagwat Katha and discuss the ideology of the Bhavishya Purana in Delhi. Along with many saints, the workers of Vishwa Sanatan Dharma will first go to every house in Delhi to promote the reading of the Bhagwat, protection of the Vedas, and the Trikal Sandhya. The time is coming when our workers and saints will visit every home in India to show people the way. We have about three to four years, and within that time, everyone will adopt these rules. And when the Divine Mother (Devi Mata) conducts the test, all the devotees who are truly Sanatani will be able to answer about the Bhagwat and Trikal Sandhya. The campaign for this has already started, and work will also begin in Delhi from the 2nd of next month. Groups of about 50 saints will go to every street and colony in Delhi to preach the Bhagwat because the time of epoch change and calamity is approaching. They will preach to read the Bhagwat, protect the Vedas, protect and serve Mother Cow (Gau Mata), respect Sanatani saints, and unite all sects. Through this preaching, devotees will be saved. When the test happens, the devotees will answer according to this stream of knowledge. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L158: विश्व साधु संत महा महासभा - श्री जगन्नाथ पुरी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, I wanted to ask, in my village, I keep telling the elders and some knowledgeable people, but they don't believe that the epoch is ending. They say Kali Yuga is for 432,000 years, so nothing like this is going to happen now; this is just how the world goes on. I tell them that this is the absolute truth, whether you believe it or not, but they don't accept it. What should I do?
Answer: Look, in the conference of saints that was held in Jagannath Dham, it was decided that the epoch has already ended. According to the ideology of Jagannath culture and the Bhavishya Malika, the saints have agreed upon this. If you want, show them the broadcast from the 15th, 16th, and 17th on the 'Kalki Avatar' channel about the conference held in Jagannath Dham for the renaissance of Vishwa Sanatan Dharma. Show them that the saints are accepting the Bhavishya Malika and the change of the epoch. Ordinary people don't believe it due to ignorance. The saints will go door-to-door and explain, and then they will believe. It's okay. If they don't believe today, they will believe tomorrow. Whoever is destined to believe, will. But the saints have already deliberated on this. That's why we held a conference with saints from all over the world in Jagannath Dham, where the unification of Sanatana Dharma and the future were discussed, and proof was found. Watch that video and show it to them. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L158: विश्व साधु संत महा महासभा - श्री जगन्नाथ पुरी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: In our village, there is a Peepal tree. Bats never used to sit on it before, but for the last five, six, or eight days, they have been coming and sitting there daily. What is the reason for this, father?
Answer: Look, daughter, the times are not good. This is proof of that, and calamity will come in the future. God is giving a sign. The devotees already know this, but for those who don't, it is a sign. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L158: विश्व साधु संत महा महासभा - श्री जगन्नाथ पुरी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I wanted to ask, how can one attain God-realization? What needs to be done to achieve it?
Answer: According to our tradition's rules for God-realization, a person must read the Bhagwat. One chapter of the Bhagwat must be read every day. One must observe the Trikal Sandhya (three daily prayers). The three Sandhyas are: Brahma Muhurta Sandhya from 3:45 AM to 6:30 AM, Madhyan Sandhya (midday prayer) from 11:30 AM to 12:30 PM, and Sayam Sandhya (evening prayer) from 6:30 PM to 7:30 PM. The Tri-Sandhya must be performed within these times. The mantras for Tri-Sandhya are specific; one should chant the mantras that are distributed. Through this, one attains God-realization. Also, chanting the name 'Madhav' 108 times. It is written in Jagannath's teachings that those who chant the name of Madhav will be liberated from the cycle of birth and death. Therefore, by doing this, one will attain God-realization and liberation (Nirvana). One will also be saved from the cycle of life. Now is the time of epoch change, and Lord Kalki's work of establishing Dharma is underway. The Lord has already incarnated on Earth. Therefore, for the salvation of humanity, Trikal Sandhya, reading the Bhagwat, and chanting the name of Madhav are essential. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L158: विश्व साधु संत महा महासभा - श्री जगन्नाथ पुरी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I had a request. There are many illnesses in my house. I am chanting the name of Madhav and doing everything, but I can't understand the reason. Can you suggest a remedy? My elderly mother fell, I am sick, my wife is sick, we are facing a lot of trouble.
Answer: Look, what is actually happening is that some tantra-mantra (black magic) has been sent to cause trouble, which is why this has occurred. Secondly, your ancestors are also not at peace. You must read one chapter of the Bhagwat for 10 minutes before sleeping at night. You have to do it. Chant the name of Madhav. If you still don't find peace, when the Katha (discourse) happens in Vadodara, I will give you flowers and Tulsi from the Vyasa peeth (speaker's seat). Take them and keep them in your house, and no tantra will work, and there will be no problem. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L158: विश्व साधु संत महा महासभा - श्री जगन्नाथ पुरी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: A few days ago, the Mother Goddess came in my dream and wanted to test me. She said, 'Recite the Trikal Sandhya.' As soon as I started with 'Om,' I woke up. Then I had another dream. What does all this mean? I am not able to understand.
Answer: Look, son, the Divine Mother asked you about the Trikal Sandhya, and you couldn't answer. The reason is that this Trikal Sandhya is what will protect humans from the coming calamities, the tradition of which we are preaching. Its proof is in the Rigveda. The Trikal Sandhya consists of the 16 names, the 10 avatars, Durga Madhav Stuti, chanting 'Madhav' 108 times, and reading one chapter of the Bhagwat. Those who do this will be saved. For those who don't, it will be very difficult to live on this Earth because the epoch is changing. Satya Yuga is coming. So, perform the Trikal Sandhya. The Divine Mother is testing you. In the future, your life could be lost to disease and illness. Because the Divine Mother asked, it means it's necessary for you to do it. She wants you to do it. It is the grace of the Divine Mother and Madhav. Perform the Trikal Sandhya. Contact the number given below and start the Trikal Sandhya. It will be for your own good. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L158: विश्व साधु संत महा महासभा - श्री जगन्नाथ पुरी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: One question, Pandit ji. In 2015, I was listening to a discourse by Muridhar Ji from Rajasthan. He had said that the Lord has already incarnated and that in 2026, PM Modi will step down from his post on his own. He said that by 2029, everything will be settled. So I want to ask, will Modi ji step down from his post in 2026? Is there anything like that?
Answer: Look, I'll tell you this. The current government is facing external threats. For at least the next 13 months to two years, this government will continue to face problems. What will be the outcome of these problems, only God knows. But we will not discuss his views because a good government is running the country, so it doesn't feel right for us to comment. We want the protection and safety of Sanatanis, so I will not discuss this. The second thing is, Lord Kalki has already incarnated, as I have said before, and the divine play (leela) of Kalki is now unfolding. Whomever Lord Kalki wants in power, is in power. Everything will happen according to His will. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L159:अब बचने का एक ही उपाय - हर घर भागवत, हर घर त्रिसंध्या पाठ | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, I am currently from the Ramananda Sampradaya. When I learned about the Bhavishya Malika, I started doing Trikal Sandhya and chanting the Madhav name five times (five malas). I also chant the name of Sita Ram, which I have been doing for a very long time, so I have great faith and love for it. Although God is one and both names belong to God, my love for the Sita Ram name is greater. However, during Trikal Sandhya, I do five malas of the Madhav name in the morning, afternoon, and evening. So, will God accept me or not?
Answer: Look, it's wonderful that you chant the name of Ram. By the grace of the name Ram, by the grace of Lord Shri Ram, you have received the Trikal Sandhya and the Bhagavata Mahapurana. Do that, and also continue chanting the name of Ram. During the time of Trikal Sandhya, chant the name of Madhav. You will surely attain God, your life's goal will definitely be fulfilled, and you will also become worthy of being a human of the Satya Yuga. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L159:अब बचने का एक ही उपाय - हर घर भागवत, हर घर त्रिसंध्या पाठ | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: A million salutations at your feet. I had a dream on your birthday, Pandit ji. I was sitting with you, and you were teaching me a way to sit and showing me something on the wall. I couldn't understand what it was. This dream came on your birthday.
Answer: Okay, look, whatever dream you have, it's a thread of connection. God wants this. In dreams, God shows me to many people because I do the work of propagating dharma. I propagate Trikal Sandhya and the Bhagavata Purana. For this reason, by God's grace, He sometimes sends me to the devotees. And the principles I share are God's principles, not mine. I am an ordinary human just like you. For the salvation of humanity, God has given me this responsibility. Perhaps without God's will, it's difficult to do satsang and good deeds. The work we are doing... you should do Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavata Purana, and chant the Madhav name daily, following a schedule and routine. It will be auspicious for you all. And those who do this will surely become humans of the Satya Yuga. This is not just a belief; it is a principle based on the scriptures. It is the absolute truth. Follow it. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L159:अब बचने का एक ही उपाय - हर घर भागवत, हर घर त्रिसंध्या पाठ | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, you had said that there will be a change in power and that the descendants of Trijata will be seated in power. But looking at the current political situation, it doesn't seem like a change in power will happen. How will this be possible?
Answer: When did I say there would be a change of power? Listen, I had said that after 13 months, due to the transit of Saturn in Pisces, there will be conflict between the government, administration, and public movements in India and the world. There will be a crisis for the government in India, in Odisha, and for all governments ruling across the world. I didn't say this would cause a change of power, but that there would be a crisis for the governments. Prices will rise, and such situations will occur. We say it will start from 2025 and the advent of Satya Yuga will be by 2032. Therefore, God will decide on this, and the predictions that humans make will not be correct. God will surely make changes here and there.

Video Title: L161 : मीन शनि योग - महापरिवर्तन का समय! | केवल 48 दिन | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र

Video Title: L161 : मीन शनि योग - महापरिवर्तन का समय! | केवल 48 दिन | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र

If even they get influenced, stray from the path of dharma, and become distracted, then the boat of dharma will face problems in reaching its destination. Therefore, since God has sent us, we will do our work. We have no argument with those who won't believe.

Video Title: L161 : मीन शनि योग - महापरिवर्तन का समय! | केवल 48 दिन | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र

But the divine problems, which arise from a lack of dharma, we do not have the power to stop. That is why it is necessary for us to read the Bhagavat. Start reading the Bhagavat in every home from now, because the times will not be good from the month of March. God has shown the path of salvation for humanity: Trikal Sandhya and the Bhagavat, which will bring the greatest welfare to human civilization. Therefore, even if there are problems at home, do not abandon the scriptures and do not abandon the path of the scriptures. Jai.

Video Title: L161 : मीन शनि योग - महापरिवर्तन का समय! | केवल 48 दिन | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I have been connected to your stream of thought for about a year. I have told my mother, father, uncle, and aunt about this many times, but they still don't listen to me. Answer: Look, you have done your part. Whether they believe it or not depends on their past lives. We have studied in all the scriptures that the devotees of God who attain Vaikuntha (God's abode) may have to take many millions of births. So, those who believe, believe; for those who don't, don't say anything. Our world is connected to God. Through social illusion (maya), God has given each of us a world for which we perform our duties (karma). Therefore, do not fall short in your duties towards your family, your father, and your mother, whether they believe you or not. If it is in their destiny from a past life, they will be able to read the Trikal Sandhya and Bhagavat. If they do not have the karma or destiny from a past life, then perhaps this sacred knowledge will not appeal to them. So, maintain peace in the family, don't force anyone. Perform your duties selflessly. Do your duty of respecting and serving your parents. Every soul is born for its own salvation. Not all souls attain Vaikuntha, not all go to hell, not all go to heaven, and not all are born into lower species. It all happens according to one's karma; everyone is bound by karma. Therefore, you continue to perform your duties. It was your wish or your duty to tell them, and you did. Whether they accept it or not is subject to their karma. Don't be sad or worry about it. Hold on to dharma, and you will be blessed. Jai.

Video Title: L161 : मीन शनि योग - महापरिवर्तन का समय! | केवल 48 दिन | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र

Video Title: L161 : मीन शनि योग - महापरिवर्तन का समय! | केवल 48 दिन | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Jai Shri Madhav, Pandit ji. I have two questions for you. I am 15 years old and in the 10th grade. On days when I have school, can I perform a shorter version of the second Trikal Sandhya, and can I do it mentally?
Answer: Absolutely, you can. You can do it mentally. You can do the Trikal Sandhya. There is no problem with that, meaning it's not wrong for you. You can do it. I would also say that whenever you get time, do the full Trikal Sandhya. If you get time other than the three designated times, you can do it then as well, because this is a very important element for us. Trikal Sandhya is such a practice through which people are protected from great calamities. Not only that, they achieve their own welfare and the welfare of their soul. In the second volume book I have written, I have highlighted the primary importance of Trikal Sandhya from various scriptures. You all should read it and show people what is written in the Bhagavat, Vayu Purana, Kurma Purana, Agni Purana, and Bhavishya Malika about Trikal Sandhya. Because for the welfare of humanity, there is no greater tradition than Trikal Sandhya. Attaining God, attaining Lord Vishnu while sitting at home—Trikal Sandhya is the highest tradition of Sanatana Dharma. This tradition was lost and is now being propagated again. Many devotees have joined who promote Trikal Sandhya. This is a great, virtuous act for human welfare. By doing it, you will achieve welfare, and so will others. Jai.

Video Title: L161 : मीन शनि योग - महापरिवर्तन का समय! | केवल 48 दिन | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, I have been associated with you for a very long time, since 2020. My name is Vikas Kumar from Delhi. Lately, we are hearing many strange things and news about you from Odisha. Many people are saying you have left Odisha, and there are various other accusations, including that you took money and left. We have watched you very closely and were with you when these events were unfolding. We even remember you refusing financial help when it was offered, saying everything would happen by God's will. We believe these accusations are baseless. We formed a committee to check with all the Hindi-speaking followers if anyone was ever asked for money in your name, and not a single person has come forward. This proves your character is as pure as water. We don't know why these rumors are spreading in Odisha or what their motive is. I am saying this in front of everyone so they know the truth and have no doubts about your integrity, which is as bright and pure as ever. What do you have to say about this?
Answer: I express my gratitude. It is written in the scriptures: 'Dharma has shrunk, austerity is absent, and truth has gone far away.' This is the battle of the final phase of Kali Yuga. At this time, not just me, but anyone in India who steps forward to propagate dharma will face many problems. But the fight for dharma is a fight, and it must be fought. If we abandon dharma, who will grant us salvation after our death? If we stop propagating dharma, how will this Bhavishya Malika be spread? If we hadn't translated the Bhavishya Malika from Odia and other languages into English, how would the transformation that is coming to the world through it happen? So, people will talk. They have been talking ever since I started propagating dharma. It's a habit. In every age, the opponents of dharma have not allowed it to advance. There was some struggle and hardship, but dharma's propagation grew and it was protected. This is the end of Kali Yuga, meaning Kali Yuga is leaving and Satya Yuga is arriving. Obstacles will come for those who do the work of dharma. But despite the obstacles, in my opinion, if we remain in dharma, in truth and justice, then God will save us from it and inspire us to continue our work, which we are doing today. We have no enemy, no friend, no critic, no admirer. Our one goal is the scriptures, purity, and dispelling human ignorance. It is the duty of Brahmins and Gurus to save humanity from ignorance and darkness. God sends different people at different times to do this work. We believe it is probably the Lord's wish that we do this work. Everyone in the world is our friend. We haven't created any guru-disciple lineage; we haven't made anyone a disciple. But everyone is our friend, and for the welfare of all, we propagate the scriptures. This work is for the welfare of humanity. Today in India, thousands and lakhs of people are reading the Bhagavat and performing Trikal Sandhya, even in foreign countries. A time will come when you will see people all over the world—1 million, 1.5 million, 5 million, 10 million people a day—asking, 'What is Trikal Sandhya? Give it to us. Where can we find the Bhagavat? We want to read it.' Until that time, this is our work. And in our own minds, we believe we are doing the right thing. The world did not spare Radha Rani, Lord Krishna, Sant Jnandev, Sant Tukaram, Tulsidas Maharaj, or Prabhupada. The world has never spared anyone from slander. So, we are also slandered, but virtuous people move forward, and dharma is also propagated. When I spoke about Meen Shani Chalan in 2018, no one knew about it. Today, it is widely discussed. People talk about it after reading the Bhavishya Malika. Despite this, the message spreads, people are turning towards dharma, they are abandoning adharma. They are realizing for themselves that this is not good because the times ahead will not be good. So, the more negativity there is, the more purity is revealed. How can light shine if there is no darkness? Therefore, it is God's will that for however much negativity comes, 100 times more positivity will come into the world. Our job is to propagate dharma. We do it in every state, not just Odisha. We spend 95% of our time in other states and countries. So, we don't care what anyone says. Dharma is always based on truth. It is because of the victory of dharma that I am here with you all again, propagating and connecting people to dharma. This is my good fortune, that I can contribute to the welfare of the world and humanity as God has ordained. The time is up for today, so we will conclude the satsang here. We will have another satsang next Thursday and discuss how, according to the Bhagavat scripture, the Kali Yuga has ended and what humans should follow based on that scripture. My goal is that a time will come when everyone in the world will perform Trikal Sandhya and the Bhagavat will be read in every home. And in my estimation, their number will be 640 million. Until that happens, we will continue this work. It is all God's will; nothing happens without His blessings. If we have His blessings, we will be able to do this work, and humanity will also be saved. Thank you, everyone. Jai Jagannath. Jai Radha Rani. Jai Shri Krishna.

Video Title: L163 : नीलचक्र से ध्वजा गिरना | आगामी विनाश का संकेत? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: We would like to ask you, how do you have so much power? There is no one else in the universe who can predict the exact date and time of events. How is this possible? Where does this power come from? Is it possible that the Lord tells you directly?

I am an ordinary human being, yearning for liberation on this earth by the grace of God, performing my duties daily, and propagating Dharma. Whatever God puts in my mind, whatever comes to my mind, I say it. Because in the Malika Shastra, at one place, Achyutananda ji wrote that no human being will be able to decipher the exact dates and times. People will say it will happen on this day or that day, but no human can predict it. Only when God bestows his grace will a person be able to say it. So, this happens by the grace of God; I have nothing to do with it. I just say what comes to my mind, and if it is the Lord's grace, it happens. This means I am an ordinary human; I have no special qualities, no power, nothing at all. However, I have firm faith in God, and that faith is what proves success and purity. If you also take refuge in God with such faith, truth will manifest in your words and in the words of all people. So, this is all a gift from God; it happens by His will. He makes someone a beggar, someone a king, someone knowledgeable, and someone ignorant. It is all the Lord's grace. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L163 : नीलचक्र से ध्वजा गिरना | आगामी विनाश का संकेत? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र

I don't need to follow the special diet people eat during a fever due to medication. This is because when a person has Trikal Sandhya, devotion, and God's grace, they are protected. Every body has all kinds of diseases, but an illness only strikes when our karma is wrong. Therefore, you should continue with the same Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavat, and you already chant the name of Madhav 108 times. If you still have this problem, whenever you get more time, chant the name of Madhav again. This will bring you well-being. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L163 : नीलचक्र से ध्वजा गिरना | आगामी विनाश का संकेत? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र

Video Title: L163 : नीलचक्र से ध्वजा गिरना | आगामी विनाश का संकेत? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, I have a spiritual question. You just mentioned that the soul never dies. When I read the Bhagavat, and sometimes the Ashtavakra Gita or Yoga Vasistha, they say everything is an illusion (Maya). My question is this: since we never die, our true 'I' element is immortal, if a person is performing Trikal Sandhya, reading the Bhagavat, and chanting the name of Madhav, but for some reason is unable to go to Satyayug because their memory is still of Kaliyug... and if they do go to Satyayug, their memory will also become like that of Satyayug. So, Pandit ji, what is the root of liberation (Moksha)? How can one attain Moksha if our 'I' element never dies? I just want to know this. I have veered a bit onto the path of knowledge, so could you please guide me?
Answer: Sarva-dharman parityajya mam ekam sharanam vraja, aham tvam sarva-papebhyo mokshayishyami ma shuchah. In the Gita, the Lord said one thing. Arjuna asked, 'Lord, how can one attain liberation (Moksha)?' The Lord replied, 'Sarva-dharman parityajya.' This does not mean to renounce action (karma). It means to forget all the conflicting thoughts, the dualities, and the questions in your mind, and come to my refuge like a fool, like an ignorant person, and I will grant you liberation. That is why it is very difficult for knowledgeable people (Gyanis) to attain liberation. And how does one become a 'fool' in this sense? When one has complete faith and complete devotion to God. Therefore, choose the path of devotion (Bhakti Marg). Perform all your worldly duties, but do not have attachment to anyone or anything. We all perform our duties for everyone, and you should too, but without attachment to what will or will not happen. Whether great sorrow or great happiness comes, do not become agitated. Just keep performing your actions with complete, single-minded devotion to God. A single-minded devotee means one path, one stream, one Lord—and that is our Krishna. Forget all worldly things and keep performing your duties; then you will attain liberation. The first steps to liberation are: first, devotion (Bhakti); second, knowledge (Gyan); third, detachment (Vairagya); and the fourth element is the Bhagavat Mahapuran. Those who follow the Bhagavat Mahapuran attain Vaikuntha. So, you are already doing it. Nothing more is needed. Just maintain your devotion to God and stay away from material things. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L163 : नीलचक्र से ध्वजा गिरना | आगामी विनाश का संकेत? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: What is Trikal Sandhya? I don't know. Could you please explain it a little?
Answer: Look, mother, Trikal Sandhya means praying at three junctures of the day. The first is the Brahma Muhurta Sandhya, which is from 3:45 AM until sunrise. The best time is when the stars are visible in the sky. The second is the Madhyan Sandhya (midday prayer), from 11:30 AM to 12:30 PM. The third is the Sayan Sandhya (evening prayer), which is done 5-10 minutes or up to half an hour before sunset. At these three times, one chants the 16 names of Lord Mahavishnu, a shloka for the ten avatars of Mahavishnu, a prayer to Mother Radha Rani, Lord Krishna, and Durga Madhav, and the name 'Madhav' 108 times. This takes about six to seven minutes. A person who does this at all three times gets liberated from the cycle of birth and death and attains Vaikuntha. They also get relief from all of life's problems. For this reason, you can contact our devotees in Delhi or contact any of the numbers below this YouTube video, and they will send you a PDF. Read it and also read one chapter of the Bhagavat. To go towards the truth and to protect oneself from the calamities coming upon the earth, Trikal Sandhya is the greatest armor. So, you should do it. It changes the course of one's life. In the Bhagavat, the Lord himself told Uddhava that those who do not perform Trikal Sandhya, their body, even while alive, is like a dead body. It is written in the scriptures that it is essential for humans. It is our protection; it is God's grace. So, daughter, get in touch with them, get the Trikal Sandhya material, and start doing it. You will definitely have experiences, perhaps a vision of the Lord, Radha Rani, Krishna, or Lord Shankar, whichever deity you worship. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L163 : नीलचक्र से ध्वजा गिरना | आगामी विनाश का संकेत? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, regarding our children who are studying or working out of the country, when should we tell them to come back?

When the time comes, I will let you know. For now, much depends on God's will. The future does not look good for human civilization, but until we see the divine play of God unfold, we are waiting. Now is not the time. Let them continue with their duties and their studies. Just have them perform Trikal Sandhya and read the Bhagavat. By doing that, they will receive God's grace. There will be no problem. Wherever they are, they will receive the Lord's grace. This is my belief. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L163 : नीलचक्र से ध्वजा गिरना | आगामी विनाश का संकेत? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I perform Trikal Sandhya, but my experience is that when I'm sleeping, it feels like someone is grabbing my throat from behind and pressing it. Another time, it felt like someone was sitting on my chest and pressing my throat. And at night, I keep hearing the sound of anklets (payal). What is happening?
Answer: Let me tell you one thing, son. Listen. Where are you? Nagpur, Maharashtra. Do you live in your own house? Okay, in your own house, has any woman in your family, relatives, or neighbors in your society died at a young age? No? Okay, you built a new house.
