Video Title: L163 : नीलचक्र से ध्वजा गिरना | आगामी विनाश का संकेत? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: And Pandit ji, only I can hear the sound of the anklets, no one else in the house. What does this indicate? Can you tell me properly? I mean, why is my throat being grabbed from behind?
Answer: The sound of anklets means a young female spirit is passing by and making that sound. It's not a sign of anything. When a righteous person performs a religious act, it's like when good food is cooked in our house, the aroma spreads outside. People outside smell it and say, 'Good food is being cooked.' Similarly, when you started the religious practice of Trikal Sandhya, that spirit is also drawn to listen to it, because they can also attain liberation through it. Yes, in Trikal Sandhya, ancestors get complete liberation, and any spirits who listen also get liberated. Don't worry. Perform Trikal Sandhya once before sleeping. Nothing will happen.

Video Title: L163 : नीलचक्र से ध्वजा गिरना | आगामी विनाश का संकेत? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I had one more question, Pandit ji. Who came first in this creation, Lord Sri Krishna or Lord Narayana? Because the ISKCON people say that everyone is a part of Sri Krishna.
Answer: Look, Lord Narayana is called the primordial God (Adidev), the original Vishnu. All the avatars of Lord Narayana have appeared on earth—there have been infinite avatars, among which the 10 main avatars for establishing Dharma are prominent: Matsya, Kurma, Varaha, Narasimha, Vamana, Parashurama, Rama, Krishna, Buddha, and Kalki. Therefore, it is written in one scripture, 'ete camsa-kalah pumsah, krsnas tu bhagavan svayam.' This means all these are parts or aspects of the Lord, but Krishna is the Supreme Lord Himself. Lord Krishna is Lord Vishnu. The one who is Lord Krishna is Narayana. The one who is Jagannath is Krishna. Therefore, there is no difference. The Lord has many avatars. Lord Krishna is Narayana, Lord Krishna is Jagannath, Lord Krishna is Rama. He is all the infinite avatars. We should not get into these distinctions. The ISKCON dharma is also Krishna dharma, meaning it is the Sanatana Dharma of Lord Narayana. And what we speak of is also Sanatana Dharma. So there is no difference in the Dharma; the differences in the mind are what lead people astray. But God is God. He has many names and many avatars. 'Hari is infinite, the stories of Hari are infinite.' Lord Krishna himself is Vishnu. Don't worry. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L164 : Earthquake | भूमि पर प्रलय | मानव समाज के लिए चेतावनी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: We perform Trikal Sandhya (prayers at three junctures of the day), but the biggest problem is the impurity of the mind. How can we remove the impurities of the mind? Please tell me. Lord Shri Krishna said in the Gita that the mind controls everything; it can grant liberation or lead to hell through sin. I also have an experience: when the online Sandhya happens in the evening and the mantra is chanted, I yawn and tears come from my eyes. But when I am in a satsang directly with you, nothing like that happens. Why is this? Please explain.
Answer: Look, first, I'll tell you about yawning. When divine energy enters the human body during Trikal Sandhya, that's when one yawns and tears come from the eyes. This only happens during Trikal Sandhya. That's the first thing. Second, to cleanse the impurities of the mind, the actions we perform and the conduct we maintain throughout the day can either purify or defile it. If we don't engage our actions, thoughts, and sight in anything bad throughout the day, then evil thoughts won't arise. This is influenced by material elements. To purify the mind, it is stated in the Srimad Bhagavatam and every scripture to take refuge in the Lord. Surrender yourself to God and continuously chant His name. Just as a cloth is needed to wipe the dust that settles on a mirror, similarly, by chanting the Lord's name, the impurities of the mind are washed away. Also, study the Lord's holy scriptures; the mind will remain pure. What people do is from morning to evening, they watch their mobile phones, interact with bad people, worry about their future, and sometimes see wrong things. A person is influenced by these things. Therefore, from morning to evening, try to see and follow whatever is pure. And read the Lord's books at least two or three times a day, in which the glory of His divine plays is described. The Bhagavatam also shows the path to gradual liberation, which we cannot achieve in a single day; it takes many days. Then the mind will become pure. And the biggest factor nowadays is the social situation, the mobile phone situation. Everyone watches their mobile phones, and the mind is affected by it. Therefore, by staying connected to spiritual elements, the mind will be purified. Surrender to God and chant His name. The mind will be purified through chanting His name. It will take time. It won't happen by performing Trikal Sandhya for just one day; it requires six to seven months. Along with that, after reading the Bhagavatam for six to seven months, the mind will become pure. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L164 : Earthquake | भूमि पर प्रलय | मानव समाज के लिए चेतावनी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, you had mentioned that when Lord Krishna was present in his divine play (leela), 1200 years of Kali Yuga had already passed. I just wanted to know, the 5000 years we talk about, does that include those 1200 years? And where can I find the reference for this?
Answer: Look, this is composed in the Srimad Bhagavat Mahapuran: 'Yadaa Devarshayah Saptah Maghaasu Vicharanti Hi, Tadaa Pravrittastu Kalirdwaadashaabdashataatmakah.' When Lord Shri Krishna went to his supreme abode, the Saptarishis (seven great sages) were traversing the Magha Nakshatra. At that time, 1200 years of Kali Yuga had already passed. However, the influence of Kali Yuga could not manifest because of Lord Krishna's presence on Earth. When Lord Krishna left the Earth, Kali Yuga had already aged, but its influence had not spread. According to this, 1200 years had passed at that time, and now 5000 years of Kali Yuga have been completed, as written in the Bhavishya Malika shastra, the Garga Samhita, the Vayu Purana, the Manusmriti—it is written in all scriptures. It has now ended. Today, even in Jagannath Kshetra Puri in Odisha... and yesterday, a drop of blood fell in the Jagannath temple. The day before yesterday, the flag of the Jagannath temple fell. Ponder this, the times will surely change. For the transformation and protection of humanity, we tell you the sacred principle of Trikal Sandhya. Because in India... who thinks about what? We don't care. But our ideology is that Trikal Sandhya is necessary for every human being. You should follow it; it will be beneficial for you. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L164 : Earthquake | भूमि पर प्रलय | मानव समाज के लिए चेतावनी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I have been a devotee of Lord Krishna since childhood. I always wanted to know who created this Earth, how, and why. I still haven't found the answer to where I was 27 years ago, before this life. And I also haven't found the answer to where I will go after I die. Anyway, my question is this: I know that no one on this Earth is immortal. I had a friend who took one lakh rupees through me from someone else, and I was his guarantor. He then disappeared. The lender said he only knew me and would take the money from me. I had to find my friend, bring him back, and I tied him up for three days. I provided him with food and water; I just wanted him to return the money. In this Sandhya, I know that everyone asks God to fulfill their own wishes, but here we say, 'May Your will be done, Lord.' I like this very much. So, when I treated my friend like that, will it be counted as a sin? What will happen? Please guide me.
Answer: Yes, son, that's a very good thought. See, it was written in the Bhavishya Malika that in today's world, people will take money from others and not return it. When this happens, know that the end of Kali Yuga is near. This has become a tradition and it's a sign of the end of Kali Yuga. The most important thing is that our human life is bound by 8.4 million births. We have taken birth before and have also performed actions. As Adi Guru Shankaracharya said: 'Punarapi Jananam Punarapi Maranam, Punarapi Janani Jathare Shayanam' (Again birth, again death, again sleep in the mother's womb). You are 25 now, but 26 years ago, you had a different life. After death, a person faces the consequences of their actions (karma), and after birth, a person experiences their destiny (prarabdha). In this human world, people experience the karma from their previous lives. That is why in this human life, we should perform actions that lead us to liberation. And Trikal Sandhya is one principle through which a person can attain nirvana and the supreme abode of Goloka Dham. This is written in all scriptures. Trikal Sandhya is the one element that will free a human from the bondage of the life-death cycle. There is nothing in the world that cannot be obtained through Trikal Sandhya. Secondly, we come to this world to perform our own karma, not for others. So our own actions should be right. I would say that nowadays if someone asks for credit, help them a little. If they ask for 10,000, tell them, 'Son, take 2,000 and don't worry about returning it,' because they won't be able to. The time of great change is here. No one will return anyone's money. The economic situation is becoming dire. So, the times are not good. Perform Trikal Sandhya. 'May Your will be done' means that God's will is auspicious for us, while our own will may not be. For example, a person starts a business with his own will, it fails, and he can't repay his loans. That's why a devotee prays, 'Lord, if Your will is done, it will be for my well-being.' So, leave it to God. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L164 : Earthquake | भूमि पर प्रलय | मानव समाज के लिए चेतावनी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I am speaking from Jalandhar. I had a dream last night that everything was chaotic and upside down. I saw the Mlecchas (impure foreigners/barbarians) in their attire, and everything was in disarray. I couldn't understand anything. My whole night passed in this confusion, and I kept feeling scared and trembling. Pandit ji, I don't understand what this dream signifies.
Answer: Its sign is that in the future, the Mlecchas will cause great trouble for humanity on Earth. The number of Mlecchas has increased, and the time for their destruction has also arrived. This is the sign.

Video Title: L164 : Earthquake | भूमि पर प्रलय | मानव समाज के लिए चेतावनी | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: If the end of Kali Yuga has already happened, then why are the symptoms of Kali Yuga still visible now?
Answer: Look, just as a person goes through childhood, adolescence, and youth, similarly, the end time of Kali Yuga... that conjunction happened in 1943, as mentioned in the Srimad Bhagavat Mahapuran, when the Sun, Moon, and Jupiter converged in the Pushya Nakshatra in the Cancer sign. The Satya Yuga (Age of Truth) began on that day. But that doesn't mean Satya Yuga appears in a single day. Look, it took 5000 years to build this Yuga. To dismantle it, it takes about 10% of that time. So, it started on that day, but it will also take time to dismantle, right? 10, 50, 100 years. So, there is very little time left now. The work has already begun. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L165 : Maha Kumbh | महाकुंभ - सत्ययुग आगमन का पहला चरण। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Hello, Shri Ma, pranam. My question is, during the upcoming destruction, many people will die. We also perform Trikal Sandhya, but if our karma is not good, whether we will be saved or not is a different matter, only the Lord knows. But for those who die, when Satyug (the Age of Truth) arrives, how will they be liberated? How will they attain salvation?
Answer: Look, those who die in the coming destruction will proceed according to their karma. As I have said before, after death, a person attains different realms like Bhoot Lok (ghost realm), Jaksh Lok, Gandharva Lok, Surya Lok (solar realm), Chandra Lok (lunar realm), Swarg Lok (heaven), Vaikunth (divine abode), or Patal Lok (netherworld) based on their deeds, whether virtuous or sinful. In this period, for those who die an untimely death, if their 'pind daan' (ancestral rites) is performed, they will receive the fruits according to their karma. But for those who die and their 'pind daan' or 'shraadh kriya' (last rites) are not performed, they will become restless souls. Then, after Satyug, after one 'kalpa' (aeon) when the 'Brahma Pralaya' (dissolution of the universe) occurs, the Lord grants liberation to everyone at once. After that, they are again assigned their places according to their karma. Therefore, if someone dies an untimely death and their last rites are not performed, they will remain as restless souls and will have to wait for the time when the Lord grants them forgiveness. This is because without the 'shraadh' ceremony, it becomes problematic for a soul to reach its designated place. For instance, if one is meant to go to Pitru Lok (ancestral realm), they cannot go due to the lack of rites. If someone is to attain liberation, that also becomes problematic without the 'shraadh kriya'. So, for those who die untimely deaths in the future, they will have to wait until the Brahma Pralaya for their liberation. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L165 : Maha Kumbh | महाकुंभ - सत्ययुग आगमन का पहला चरण। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Sir, I am speaking from Karnataka. I have received a dealership offer and I have to invest around 2 crores. Should I go for it or not, sir? It's a private tractor/vehicle dealership. What suggestion would you give me? Also, my son is doing his MBA in Pune.
Answer: Look, there are still about five to seven years for some changes to happen. So, if it's a good company with strong sales, then go for it, there's no problem. In the future, there will be nothing but agriculture. Everyone will take up farming, and agriculture will be the biggest challenge. People will engage in agricultural work using their own methods and hard work. So, this last generation and the one coming after will be dependent on agriculture. For agriculture, in my opinion, it's fine. So go ahead, there's no problem. It would be good if your son helps you in your business. There will be no private organizations left by 2030. Look, if your son helps you with your business, you can expand it further. He can get a job if he wants; he can even go abroad.

Video Title: L165 : Maha Kumbh | महाकुंभ - सत्ययुग आगमन का पहला चरण। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Jai Shri Madhav, Pitaji. An incident happened with me last night. I was with my Laddu Gopal, whom I have named Madhav. I was in my room, putting him to sleep, when I felt like someone held my hand, but no one was there. I felt someone grab my wrist. I screamed out of fear, 'Who is it?' but there was no one there. I was alone in the room with Madhav. When I asked my family, they said it might be a negative entity. I'm scared, was it really something negative?
Answer: This is not a negative thing. Just as you have devotion for Lord Krishna, Lord Krishna is giving you proof. Ma, this is your good fortune. Just keep maintaining such devotion. Okay? Jai Shri Madhav.

Video Title: L165 : Maha Kumbh | महाकुंभ - सत्ययुग आगमन का पहला चरण। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I wanted to ask, right now this Google Meet is happening, and satsang (spiritual gathering) also happens. So if I attend the Google Meet, I miss the satsang. Is that a problem?
Answer: Look, a satsang is wherever there is a discourse on knowledge. The online meeting happens six out of seven days a week. That is, devotees come online for two days out of seven, and we do it for five days. There is no problem with this. This is good; they are one and the same. There is no difference, no separate effect. They are the same. So this satsang and that satsang are the same. You are not at a loss. You get equal spiritual merit from this.

Video Title: L165 : Maha Kumbh | महाकुंभ - सत्ययुग आगमन का पहला चरण। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pitaji, ever since I started chanting the name, I have begun to see the image of Lord Madhav. However, the situation at home is not conducive. My family says that since I am a college student, I should look for a job. But we know what the future holds, Pitaji, that there won't be jobs...
Answer: Look, even now, I perform my karma. I still work hard; I earn a living too. I propagate dharma, but that doesn't mean I just sit and eat somewhere. I also work hard. And by work, I mean apart from this religious work, I do other work to support my family and myself. I have to earn a living. What will happen in the future with dharma is a different matter. You should also do your karma. Try to get a job; you will get one. Because just sitting and depending on someone is not the human dharma. I also work. You can talk to my followers about how hard I work. So, it's no problem. Earn a living and practice dharma; both tasks are necessary. Keep trying, and you will get a job.

Video Title: L165 : Maha Kumbh | महाकुंभ - सत्ययुग आगमन का पहला चरण। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pita Shri ji, I had to ask you a question. I had once asked you on Google Meet about our house, and you had advised us to leave it. But circumstances are such that despite wanting to, we are unable to leave. We are facing a lot of problems. My son's health also remains very poor. He had a slight problem in his eye since birth, but now, even after medication, the problem is increasing. The doctor has even suggested surgery but says that even with surgery, it might not be completely cured. I don't understand, Pita Shri ji, whether this is a disease or some kind of supernatural affliction.
Answer: Look, I had already told you to leave that house. But you are unable to leave. Do all the people who live in that house perform Trikal Sandhya and read the Bhagavat? (The questioner clarifies only she does). Look, you perform Trikal Sandhya alone, right? To remove the affliction from the house, for at least seven days, you and your husband should sit together and read the Bhagavat. Complete the entire Bhagavat. And every day, perform a 'havan' (fire ritual) with 108 offerings in the name of the Panchbhuta (five elements) and Madhav. For these seven days, complete the entire Bhagavat. And for the necessary actions to be taken for this, you should talk to me, and I will tell you. If you do this, the affliction in the house can be removed. Jai.

Video Title: L165 : Maha Kumbh | महाकुंभ - सत्ययुग आगमन का पहला चरण। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: As you say that Chaitanya Mahaprabhu is also an incarnation of Lord Mahavishnu, why is there no special mention of him anywhere? Even in the Dashavatara Stotra, after the Buddha avatar, it directly mentions the Kalki avatar. Why not Chaitanya Mahaprabhu?
Answer: Because Chaitanya Mahaprabhu is Krishna himself. Look, even Lord Krishna is not described in the Dashavatara (ten incarnations); Lord Balaram is described there. And Chaitanya Mahaprabhu is Krishna, and he who is Krishna is Mahavishnu. The avatars are created from him. You say there is no description of Chaitanya Mahaprabhu, that it's not written. Look, Chaitanya Mahaprabhu is present in the Jagannath temple near the main structure as a 'Daru Murti' (wooden idol). And there, Lord Chaitanya has eight arms. That is, the two arms from each of the four yugas—Satya, Treta, Dvapara, Kali—combine to make eight arms. And with these eight arms, holding the weapons of all four yugas, Lord Chaitanya stands and is worshipped there. And this eight-armed form of Chaitanya Mahaprabhu is the form of Lord Kalki, about whom Mahapurush Balaram Das wrote, 'Ashta bahu ashta kali sese, janma heve Madhav' (With eight arms at the end of Kali Yuga, Madhav will be born), and 'Madhav naam ko je japai, janma maran taara nahin' (He who chants the name of Madhav is free from birth and death). This means that Chaitanya Mahaprabhu, who is present in the Jagannath temple as an eight-armed wooden idol, is Madhav. And that same Madhav will come in the form of Kalki in the Kali Yuga. It is written; it's not that it isn't.

Video Title: L165 : Maha Kumbh | महाकुंभ - सत्ययुग आगमन का पहला चरण। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pitaji, I had a question. My family members do not believe in this path. Even when I tell them, they don't believe me. I am the only one connected to this path. I am also not allowed to go anywhere, so I cannot attend any external gatherings or assemblies. So, if I can never attend any assembly, will I still be able to progress on this path? I do Sandhya, read Bhagavat Purana, and chant the name from morning to evening.
Answer: Absolutely. Ma, if you cannot go to the assembly or attend the Bhagavat Katha, it's alright. If your devotion to Madhav is complete and your faith is unwavering, you will receive the same fruit. Look, it is written in the Srimad Bhagavatam that when Lord Krishna sent the cowherd boys to the wives of the Brahmins for food, they were hungry. The Brahmins, busy with their rituals, ignored them. After that, the cowherd boys went to the wives of the Brahmins. The Brahmin wives immediately took food for Lord Krishna and started towards Braj to feed him. The Brahmins tried to stop them, but they did not listen. However, there was one small, frail mother whose husband tied her tightly to a pillar in the house and did not let her go. All the other Brahmin mothers went and had the darshan (divine sight) of Lord Krishna. On the other hand, that mother who was tied up surrendered to Lord Krishna right there and directly attained Vaikuntha (the supreme abode). So, it's nothing like that. Dharma is dharma. Yes, those in whose destiny it is written to perform karma in the establishment of dharma, they do it. In your destiny, it is written to worship the Lord right there, so do that. You will still receive the Lord's grace. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L165 : Maha Kumbh | महाकुंभ - सत्ययुग आगमन का पहला चरण। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I won't be able to come to the Baroda assembly. I want to know, will you conduct more assemblies after that? Will there be other assemblies of ours?
Answer: Look, as the destruction on Earth increases, everyone else's discourses will stop, everyone's assemblies will stop. But ours will not stop. The assemblies will continue. Whenever you get time, you can come. No problem.

Video Title: L165 : Maha Kumbh | महाकुंभ - सत्ययुग आगमन का पहला चरण। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pitaji, I wanted to ask, if someone reads the Bhagavat Mahapurana, performs Trikal Sandhya, and also chants the name of Madhav, but along with that, also engages in addiction, meaning consumes intoxicants, will they get the fruit of their practices?
Answer: Look, it is written in the scriptures that the places where Kali (the demon of the current age) resides are intoxication, gambling, killing living beings, gold (attachment to wealth), and falsehood. If someone does not get intoxicated, they will not be able to lie. If someone does not get intoxicated, they will not become demonic. Therefore, those who consume intoxicants should give them up. Yes, if they have been doing it for a long time and are now performing Trikal Sandhya, they should quit. Those who do not quit will have to face the torment of Yama (the god of death) and will receive punishment in Yama's realm for an infinite amount of time. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L165 : Maha Kumbh | महाकुंभ - सत्ययुग आगमन का पहला चरण। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Other sadhus and saints narrate the Bhagavat, but no one tells us to read the Bhagavat ourselves. You always emphasize that we should read the Bhagavat ourselves. Is there a difference between listening to it and reading it ourselves? And secondly, regarding this Trikal Sandhya, through which we get very close to the Lord and have many divine experiences, was it written anywhere in the scriptures that someone would come in Kali Yuga and distribute or propagate Trikal Sandhya? Pandit ji, we would like some guidance from you on this.
Answer: Look, it is written in the Bhavishya Malika scripture that the devotees of the Lord will perform Trikal Sandhya. And about its distribution, it is also written in the Vedas that when a 'Purna Sant' (a perfect saint) comes, he distributes Trikal Sandhya. A perfect saint comes at the end of every yuga to distribute Trikal Sandhya, and it will be propagated. It is also proven in the scriptures that the devotees of Lord Kalki will chant the Dashavatara, Durga Madhav Stuti, and the 'So'ham' name. I have seen this in the Vishnu Purana, Brahma Purana, Brahmavaivarta Purana, Kurma Purana, Linga Purana, Narada Purana, Srimad Mahabharata, Srimad Mahapurana, and the Bhavishya Shastra of the Panchasakha. The composition of Trikal Sandhya for humanity is nectar. It is written that those who do not perform Trikal Sandhya do not have the right to eat. But nowadays in Kali Yuga, everyone eats without performing Trikal Sandhya. The scripture says that there are three times for Trikal Sandhya, and if you miss even one Sandhya, you are not supposed to eat after that time. So, those who do not do it are a big problem. They are living humans, but it is as if they are dead or have already gone to Yamapuri (the realm of Yama). It is also written that there is no other way for humanity besides Trikal Sandhya; it must be done. Those who perform Trikal Sandhya will be protected wherever the cataclysm occurs—be it in water, air, fire, sky, or space. For the protection of their family, if all family members also perform Trikal Sandhya, they too will be protected. Because there is no greater principle than Trikal Sandhya. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L165 : Maha Kumbh | महाकुंभ - सत्ययुग आगमन का पहला चरण। | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: If I have your permission, can I share a small experience here?
Answer: Okay, tell it in two minutes because time is up.

Video Title: L166 : कलियुग से सत्ययुग कैसे आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, this is a problem for us and for all devotees, please provide a solution. For example, my son's name is Madhav. He is older, but there are many young children, some 3, 5, or 10 years old, who sometimes need to be scolded. When we scold them, if their name is Madhav, it feels like we are scolding the Lord himself. How should we explain things to the children? A little scolding is sometimes necessary, right? Please advise on this.
Answer: Look, mother, to guide children onto the right path, have them listen to the Bhagavat, and make them chant the name of Madhav. For instance, sit with them and tell them to chant Madhav's name 100 times. Make them do it while sitting with them. Scolding doesn't bring about change. If we need to loosen a nut and bolt, we apply oil to it, and then it opens. If you try to force it open without oil, it will break. Similarly, hitting or scolding small children will not change them. The path to their transformation is through dharma (righteousness). Make them chant the name of Madhav, tell them stories of Lord Krishna's divine plays with the Gopis (Gop Lila), and teach them about Trikal Sandhya. This will bring about a change. If you scold them, they might obey now, but when they grow up, they will start scolding you. Jai Shri Madhav.

Video Title: L166 : कलियुग से सत्ययुग कैसे आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: The Dhumketu avatar, who will slay Koka and Vikoka... what does the Bhavishya Malika say about this? I wanted to know about the Dhumketu avatar of Lord Ganesha, who will come and slay Koka and Vikoka, the chief ministers of Kali. I saw something about this on the internet, so I wanted to know what is described about this in the Bhavishya Malika.
Answer: Look, Ganapati Maharaj, even Lord Jagannath takes the form of Ganapati. And among the gods, one avatar is Ganapati. At this time, Lord Kalki himself is coming in the form of Kalki, and 33 crore gods and goddesses will come in human bodies to participate in the divine play with the Lord. A Ram Rajya (kingdom of Rama) will be established. This is written in the Bhavishya Malika. And Ganapati himself is Kalki; they are not different. Because in the Gita, it is said, 'Among the gods, I am Ganapati.' And Ganapati is also God. So, that same God is coming in the form of Kalki. At this time, what is written in the Malika Shastra is that Brahma, Lord Shankar, the great sage Narada, and all the gods will be present in their manifest forms. Other gods will come in human bodies and will perform divine plays with the Lord. Because Satya Yuga is the era of all gods, sages, and saints. This is what is written. Jai Shri Madhav.

Video Title: L166 : कलियुग से सत्ययुग कैसे आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Can't we stand up for the 'Jaighosh' (victory chant)? If we are in the office, we cannot stand up to do it.
Answer: No, no, it's not necessary. Look, do it in your mind. Even folding your hands is not necessary.

Video Title: L166 : कलियुग से सत्ययुग कैसे आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: And what should be said before Trikal Sandhya? I mean, when we seek permission from God, how should we say it?
Answer: Before Trikal Sandhya, you should chant 'Om' three times. The word 'Om' is the 'Pranava' syllable, which is considered the formless aspect of Lord Mahavishnu. Chant that name, that mantra. Say 'Om' three times, say it in your mind, you don't need to make others hear it.

Video Title: L166 : कलियुग से सत्ययुग कैसे आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: We have heard about the name 'Madhav' being spoken by Radha ji in the Mahabharata. Where can we find the reference for this?
Answer: No, not in the Mahabharata, it is written in the Gita Govinda. When Radha Rani married Lord Krishna, she did not initially call him by the name Krishna; she called him Madhav. 'Maach Brahma Swarupa Jambu Prakriti Swari Narayani Iti Vikhyata Vishnu Maya Sanatani. Jog Mahalakshmi Swarupa Cha Mahalakshmi Swarupa Jog Maya Gayatri Radhas Taa Sa Swami Cha Madhava.' The meaning of this shloka is that Radha Rani first addressed Lord Krishna by the name Madhav. When she married Lord Krishna—Radha Rani's marriage happened first—this is composed in the Gita Govinda. And the marriage of Radha Rani was performed by Lord Brahma himself in Braj, on the banks of the Yamuna, in the presence of Nand Baba's garden. At that time, Radha Rani called Lord Krishna by the name Madhav. Jai Shri Madhav.

Video Title: L166 : कलियुग से सत्ययुग कैसे आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: The shloka you mentioned, is it only in the Gita Govinda or is it somewhere else as well?
Answer: It is composed in the Gita Govinda. It is a composition within our Jagannath culture. Look, it is also composed in the Brahma Purana and another, the Vayu Purana. In the Brahma Purana, it is written that when Lord Kalki came in the Kali Yuga before this one, his name was Pramit Chandra, and he came as an incarnation of Madhav. This time, Kalki himself has come as Madhav. Madhav means Mahavishnu. 'Madhav Madhav Vishnu Madhav Madhav Hari Smara, Sadhava Nityam Sakal Karyeshu.' This means that gods, yakshas, gandharvas, sages, and saints all chant the name of Madhav. It is the most benevolent name in the world. Jai Shri Mata.

Video Title: L166 : कलियुग से सत्ययुग कैसे आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: A solar storm will come and the entire internet or our satellite system will collapse. The predictions last year were that it would be at its maximum around July and would destroy our entire communication system. So, Pandit ji, will this happen this year or not? Because I live far from home, I want to spend some time at home with my parents.
Answer: Look, that time has not come yet. That time is under God's control. Regarding those who make predictions, watch my videos from 2018. I had said before, 'Lekha jantra maan ula padibo, tithi baar narate dasa saara ko nischaya udaya.' 'Lekha jantra' means the computer will not work. Achyutananda ji wrote this long ago. But this is under the control of Lord Kalki. Today, many people have started making predictions. It will certainly happen, but in my opinion, it won't be around July. The time will come later. If I were to specify the time, it would be wrong of me because this is God's work. We are preachers of dharma, we are wanderers. Our job is to spread dharma, to bring people to the right path, to spread righteousness, and to propagate the principles of Satya Yuga for which we have received God's grace. Yes, we know the approximate time, but it is not by July. Nothing like that will happen by July. The predictions many people are making will not come true. Jai Jagannath. The internet might fail for short periods, but a complete internet failure will not happen yet. Jai Jagannath. For now, everyone should work, earn a living, do your business, hold on to dharma, and move forward. We have about 10 years in our hands. If the Lord wishes, he can shift it by two or three years here and there. So what is there to fear for a decade? Yes, during this period, there will be gradual changes. You will get a feeling that things are about to happen. God will not do it all in one day. But before doing it, he will show it little by little, gradually, and after that, he will stop it completely. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L166 : कलियुग से सत्ययुग कैसे आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: My daughter's health is very bad, and my mother's health is also very bad. I am performing Trikal Sandhya, waking up at Brahma Muhurta, reading the Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana, and also chanting the name of Madhav. So, could you please suggest something for my daughter?
Answer: Look, the idol of the Mother Goddess that was consecrated was probably not done with the correct rituals. If it had been, why would the village be suffering misfortune? Therefore, I advise you to organize a 'Madhav Naam Sankirtan' (congregational chanting of Madhav's name) in the village for its well-being. Chant only the name of Madhav, an 'Ashta Prahar Kirtan' (24-hour chanting). That might have an effect. Secondly, for your little daughter, record the Trikal Sandhya and play it for her and your mother to listen to. This might bring some good results. Because the practice of Trikal Sandhya bears fruit after at least three years of sadhana (spiritual practice), but still, try and surrender to Madhav. Jai Shri Madhav.

Video Title: L166 : कलियुग से सत्ययुग कैसे आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, I want to know what 2025 and 2026 will be like for Nepal.
Answer: Look, 2025-26 indicates earthquakes for Nepal. Furthermore, there will be heavy rainfall, and some areas will also experience drought. There will be a shortage of food grains. And I want to tell you that in Nepal, there can be disarray in the government. Along with this, inflation will rise significantly, and the fury of the five elements will also have to be witnessed. This is what is foreseen for Nepal in 25-26. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L166 : कलियुग से सत्ययुग कैसे आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Regarding the upcoming Shivaratri, do you have any message or anything specific to do? We already do Bhagavata Mahapurana, Trikal Sandhya, and chant the name of Madhav. I wanted to ask if there is anything else to be done on the day of Shivaratri. Jai Shri Madhav.
Answer: Look, on the day of Shivaratri, recite the Sundara Kanda from the Ramayana, the chapter in which Lord Rama rescued Mother Janaki (Sita). It is called Sundara Kanda. Recite the Sundara Kanda to Lord Shankar; he will be very pleased. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L166 : कलियुग से सत्ययुग कैसे आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, please forgive me. We work all day, doing household chores, outside work, jobs, etc. It is very important to perform our duties (karma). But sometimes it happens that we fall behind in our religious duties; sometimes we miss reading the Bhagavata. We feel that this is a great sin. And sometimes, we end up doing things that we shouldn't, things that are wrong. We know they are wrong, but they still happen because of our work. Is this right for us? Please guide us on the path.
Answer: Try to do the Trikal Sandhya at the correct time. Trikal Sandhya can also be done while walking around; it can be done while working. The chanting should be done in the mind, in the heart; you don't need to make others hear it. Therefore, wherever you are working, anywhere, chant in your mind. Your mouth isn't always eating, so your mouth is free, right? So, chant with your mouth, in your heart, wherever you are. I sometimes do it in the car, sometimes while walking around. Because there are no strict rules for chanting God's name. Wherever you chant, you will receive the fruit of it. Just don't do it at the wrong time. Doing it on time is good. You don't need to take out special time to sit down for it; you can do it while doing your household chores and work.

Video Title: L166 : कलियुग से सत्ययुग कैसे आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Okay, Pandit ji. In places where it is cold, can we do it in the morning while lying down, especially when it's very cold?
Answer: Look, Brahma Muhurta is at 3:45 AM, starting from 3:30. When the stars are visible in the sky, performing Trikal Sandhya at that time yields the best results.

Video Title: L166 : कलियुग से सत्ययुग कैसे आएगा? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: No, I mean, by chance, if it's not possible otherwise, can it be done while lying down? That's what I wanted to ask.
Answer: Lying down, the elderly and sick people can do it.

Video Title: L167: MAHASHIVRATRI | महाशिवरात्री लिंगराज तथा जगन्नाथ क्षेत्र से अशुभ संकेत ! | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I want to talk about the Mahamantra. I used to chant the Hare Krishna mantra and felt like I should add Lord Kalki to it, so I would chant 'Hare Krishna... Hare Rama... Kalki Hare Kalki Kalki Kalki'. But it didn't feel right, so I stopped. Since joining your stream in 2023, I've been chanting. The Hare Krishna mantra is preceded by 'Shri Krishna Chaitanya Prabhu Nityananda...'. I thought of creating something similar for the mantra we chant. I came up with three versions and would like your opinion. The first is 'Jai Shri Jagannath, Jaswant Prabhu, Achyutananda, Shri Advaita Gadadhara, Shri Anant Das, Balaram Bhakta'. The second is 'Jai Shri Achyutananda Prabhu, Balaram, Jaswant, Jagannath Prabhu ke charano mein dhyave Anant'. The third is 'Shri Krishna Madhav Prabhu Achyutananda, Shri Jagannath Jaswant Prabhu ke charano mein dhyave Jaswant aur Anant'. Is this okay?
Answer: Okay, very good, Baba. This name is very pure; it contains the Lord's name. However, I have told you what is written in the Malika Shastra. Regarding the 'Hare Rama Hare Rama Rama Rama Hare Hare' mantra given by Lord Chaitanya Mahaprabhu, it is written in one place in the Malika Shastra that the Mahamantra will be chanted in reverse. That is, 'Ram Hare Krishna Hare, Ram Hare Krishna Hare, Ram Hare Krishna Hare, Anant Madhav Hare Hare.' It will be chanted like this. Therefore, the mantra you have composed is very good and pure. You can chant it. But during Trikal Sandhya, chant the name of Madhav. Perform Trikal Sandhya, and also chant the reverse version of the Mahamantra as written in the scriptures: 'Ram Hare Krishna Hare'. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L167: MAHASHIVRATRI | महाशिवरात्री लिंगराज तथा जगन्नाथ क्षेत्र से अशुभ संकेत ! | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Guruji, what is the Brahma Ekakshar mantra (the single-syllable mantra of Brahman)?
Answer: Look, only a Brahma Muni (a sage who has realized Brahman) knows the Brahma Ekakshar. The Brahma Ekakshar mantra is not public. Only a Brahma Muni who can impart the knowledge of Brahman can tell about it. However, I will tell you a little about the Ekakshar. The Ekakshar mantra means 'Ekam Brahma, dvitiya naste' (There is one Brahman, not a second). Chanting the name of Lord Mahavishnu is called Ekakshar bhajan (single-syllable worship). And in this Kali Yuga, the Ekakshar mantra is the name 'Madhav'. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L167: MAHASHIVRATRI | महाशिवरात्री लिंगराज तथा जगन्नाथ क्षेत्र से अशुभ संकेत ! | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I went for a Rudrabhishek yesterday. Usually, I chant 'Om Namah Shivaya', but since joining this stream, no other name but the Lord's (Madhav's) comes to my lips. Instead of 'Har Har Mahadev', I found myself saying 'Jai Shri Mahadev'. And while performing the Rudrabhishek, instead of 'Om Namah Shivaya', I was chanting 'Jai Shri Madhav' the whole time. Did I do anything wrong by performing the Rudrabhishek while chanting the Lord's (Madhav's) name?
Answer: If you chant the name of Madhav during the worship of Lord Shankar, Lord Shankar becomes most pleased. This is because Lord Shankar constantly chants the name of Ram in his heart. There is no difference between the Lord (Vishnu/Madhav) and Shankar; they are all one, only the names are different. For the attainment of God, Lord Shankar also blesses the chanting of Madhav's name. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L167: MAHASHIVRATRI | महाशिवरात्री लिंगराज तथा जगन्नाथ क्षेत्र से अशुभ संकेत ! | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: And one more question: if a lustful thought accidentally arises in the mind, is it a sin? My mind has been a bit disturbed since this morning. For the past year and a half, I have kept myself under control, but sometimes the mind gets a little distracted. I seek forgiveness and guidance on this.
Answer: Look, the human body is composed of the five elements (Panchabhuta). And in this body of five elements, there is water, air, fire, earth, and ether. Just as changes sometimes occur in the five elements, the human mind also experiences turmoil. Because of this, the awakening of desire and lust happens in everyone; it even happens to sages and saints. So, for that, there is no sin. But if someone acts upon that desire or embraces it, that is a sin. When such feelings arise, it is necessary to chant God's name, follow a daily spiritual routine, and take refuge in God to stop them. Therefore, this feeling comes to all humans, deities, sages, and saints, so it is not a sin. But to act on it is a sin.

Video Title: L167: MAHASHIVRATRI | महाशिवरात्री लिंगराज तथा जगन्नाथ क्षेत्र से अशुभ संकेत ! | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I want to share a personal experience and ask a question. (Shares a long story about doing Trikal Sandhya at a Shiva temple). My question is for our Madhav Mahaprabhu. Does He still perform the same 'leelas' (divine plays) as Krishna did, like stealing butter and breaking curd pots?
Answer: Listen, listen. No one has recognized God; no one knows God. It is not necessary to even think about this. The thought should be that we have to perform good deeds. And by performing good deeds, if it is in our destiny, we will go to Satya Yuga. This campaign of ours is for chanting the name of Madhav. I say, where Madhav is, who He is, is not our concern. But it is written in the Malika Shastra that those who chant the name of Madhav will go to Satya Yuga. They will be protected from the coming calamities. That is why we promote it. The essence of Trikal Sandhya is Brahma Karma (divine action). The person who imbibes this essence of Trikal Sandhya will become a human of Satya Yuga, because in Satya Yuga, all humans will have to perform Brahma Karma. So we should remain in this line of thought. With time, in the end, when Satya Yuga is established, then we will think about what leela is or isn't, and what will happen next. For now, do what I am telling you. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L167: MAHASHIVRATRI | महाशिवरात्री लिंगराज तथा जगन्नाथ क्षेत्र से अशुभ संकेत ! | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, when something related to our past comes before us now—be it a person, an event, something related to family, or ourselves—at that moment, we are unable to act with patience, nor are we able to adhere to the truth. What should we do?
Answer: Look, constantly chant the name of Madhav. Whenever you have time, read the Bhagavat twice a day. The problems that are arising in these times will go away. Because no one becomes a saint in a day, no one becomes a sage in a day, and no one attains spiritual powers in a day. It requires time. Do as I have told you, and with time, everything will be alright. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L167: MAHASHIVRATRI | महाशिवरात्री लिंगराज तथा जगन्नाथ क्षेत्र से अशुभ संकेत ! | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Father, I want to know, you had mentioned that some devotees will be saved in India and some devotees will also be saved in foreign countries. So, for the devotees living abroad, if they chant Madhav's name and perform Trikal Sandhya right where they are, will they be safe there, or will they have to come to India? I am asking because both my children are abroad.
Answer: Firstly, it is written in the Malika Shastra that people who are abroad will return to their own country. Secondly, it is also written that the devotees of God who remain in foreign countries—it is written about the entire universe—God Kalki will go to them in the final moments and make them kings. So, the essence of this thought is that for those who perform Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavat, and chant the name of Madhav, wherever they may be, they will remain safe.

Video Title: L167: MAHASHIVRATRI | महाशिवरात्री लिंगराज तथा जगन्नाथ क्षेत्र से अशुभ संकेत ! | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: On the night of Shivaratri, I had a dream. I saw a statue of Lord Mahavishnu lying down with a boy sitting next to it. I told the boy to wake the Lord up. The boy called out, 'Vishnu ji, please wake up.' From the statue, a figure holding a trident and wearing prayer beads arose and sat in front of the boy. The boy then pointed at me and told the trident-bearer, 'Look, that person is watching you.' As soon as the trident-bearer saw me, he tried to throw the trident at me. At that moment, I started shouting, 'Madhav, Madhav, save me, Madhav, protect me!' Then I saw you (the speaker) appear near me, talking on the phone. I could only see your back. I also saw myself lying down, and drops of water were sprinkled on my body. I felt that now that you had arrived, I was safe. I heard your voice on the phone, and I woke up, repeatedly saying, 'Protect me, protect me.' What does this mean?
Answer: The meaning of this is that Lord Shankar is the Rudra form of the Lord, that is, of Lord Kalki. It is the form of destruction. Because Lord Vishnu, as per Brahma's design, creates the universe; in the form of Narayan, He sustains it; and in the form of Shiva, He destroys it. So, this is proof that for the purpose of destruction, the Lord Himself has taken the form of Shiva. And what happened yesterday in the Lingaraj temple is Lord Shankar proving, 'I will do it now, your intervention is not needed.' This is the proof we are getting. And it is also proof that at the time of Lord Shankar's destruction, the name of Madhav will protect. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L167: MAHASHIVRATRI | महाशिवरात्री लिंगराज तथा जगन्नाथ क्षेत्र से अशुभ संकेत ! | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: As we hear that the gods are leaving their abodes, has Baba Vishwanath (Lord Shiva in Kashi) also left his place?
Answer: All the deities have left their places, throughout India and the world. That is why the act of destruction is happening. That is why inauspicious events are occurring. That is why the five elements are causing devastation. That is why diseases are spreading. That is why wars are happening. As long as they were being worshipped, there was no sin or sorrow on earth. Human civilization is terrified; no one is at peace. And I had said one thing, look, I said this in 2018-19, that there will be so much breaking news that no media channel will know what to report because there will be millions of breaking news items. If Lord Shankar hadn't left, why would this breaking news be happening? It will continue to increase. For destruction, Lord Shankar has already departed. And the one who is Lord Shankar is also the form of Kalki. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L167: MAHASHIVRATRI | महाशिवरात्री लिंगराज तथा जगन्नाथ क्षेत्र से अशुभ संकेत ! | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I had a dream. I was going for propagation with the Malika and some pamphlets. It was 6 AM. We asked someone for a lift. In the blink of an eye, I saw Nepal. First, the path was scorching hot with dry trees. A little further, it was raining so lightly you could count the drops, and everything was lush green. Then we fell into mud but managed to save the Bhavishya Malika and other materials. We were dropped off in a place like Nepal. Suddenly, an old woman appeared. She was very old, her skin was sagging, but her face was incredibly radiant. I was speechless. Behind her was a young boy, about 8-10 years old, wearing light brown robes like a Buddhist monk. He kept looking at me with a slight smile. The old woman asked, 'What have you come here for?' When I showed her the materials, she said, 'Oh, you've come for propagation. We know. And the boy behind you who is looking at you, he also knows a lot about this.' I looked back at him, and he was staring at me, but I couldn't say anything. Then, something big and dark overwhelmed me, and my dream broke. Can you please tell me something about this and provide some guidance?
Answer: Look, guidance is not necessary. Those who chant the name of Madhav and perform Trikal Sandhya naturally have such dreams. This was a vision of the power of Yogamaya. And you are receiving some information about the Lord's program. It indicates that religious propagation and work for the coming Satya Yuga will also happen in Nepal; that is why Nepal was shown. So, you have had a vision of the power of Mother Yogamaya, which is a thing of great joy.

Video Title: L168: EARTHQUAKE | नेपाल-बिहार में भूकंप का असली कारण? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Why are there frequent earthquakes in Nepal and Bihar?
Answer: The speaker explains that these frequent earthquakes are a warning from God to humanity. He had previously predicted them based on scriptures like the Malika Shastra, which foretells destruction in the Himalayan region, including Nepal. These smaller tremors are precursors to a much larger, devastating earthquake in the future. He states that these events are signs for people to understand that a great calamity is approaching and that they must turn towards a path of righteousness (dharma). The frequency and intensity of these disasters, including earthquakes and floods, are predicted to increase significantly after March 2025. The ultimate way to find protection from this impending destruction is to change one's lifestyle: abandon non-vegetarian food and alcohol, and sincerely practice virtues like truth, peace, and compassion. He strongly advises everyone to perform the Trikal Sandhya ritual, read the Srimad Bhagavat, and constantly chant the name of Lord Madhav for their and their family's safety.

Video Title: L168: EARTHQUAKE | नेपाल-बिहार में भूकंप का असली कारण? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I've grown tired of telling my family to join me in my spiritual practices like Trikal Sandhya and chanting. They show no interest and say they worship God in their minds and whatever is to happen, will happen. What should I do?
Answer: It's okay, leave them be. See, not everyone is a devotee, and not everyone is destined to walk the path of truth. Only those with the right karma from past lives will be drawn to it. The Malika Shastra also says that only those who were devotees in the previous four yugas and were with the Lord will enter the new age of truth (Satyayug). How can those who haven't done this go? So, leave them. Don't say anything to anyone. If they are meant to join, they will in the future. What is your family? The whole family is God.

Video Title: L168: EARTHQUAKE | नेपाल-बिहार में भूकंप का असली कारण? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: I have a question regarding all students. Nowadays, it's common for them to be in immoral relationships, like having a girlfriend or boyfriend. What does the future hold for them?
Answer: Look, we are not commenting on married people. However, for those who are in immoral contact and commit sinful, unauthorized acts before marriage, their path is not good from a religious (dharmic) perspective. They should mend their ways while there is still time.

Video Title: L168: EARTHQUAKE | नेपाल-बिहार में भूकंप का असली कारण? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Guruji, a colleague at my office constantly picks fights with me. It's happened many times, and she doesn't listen to reason. We recently had a very bad fight where she was extremely rude. Since then, I've been unable to focus on anything, including my spiritual practices like Trikal Sandhya or reading the Bhagavat. How should I deal with people like this? I lose control of my mind.
Answer: Look, this doesn't just happen in your office; it happens in every corporate office. Do one thing: maintain distance from them. Pray to Lord Madhav, 'Lord, protect me from them.' Don't talk to them, don't meet them. If she sits somewhere, you stay away from her. This will be for your own good. The fight that is happening now between the divine and demonic forces, this is also a kind of fight. Therefore, neither speaking nor doing anything will help. We have to live in society and also do our job. So, maintain distance from them and every day, pray to Madhav to protect you. In my opinion, the Lord will show his grace.

Video Title: L168: EARTHQUAKE | नेपाल-बिहार में भूकंप का असली कारण? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, my parents fight almost daily. When I try to intervene, I sometimes get angry and say things I shouldn't. I feel this is a mistake and I'm scared that because of this anger, I might fail the spiritual test of Yogini Mata and won't be able to enter the new age of truth (Satyayug). What should I do about this recurring situation and my anger?
Answer: You must renounce that anger. Getting angry at someone, cursing someone, or abusing someone—this is not the rule for virtuous people. We should change people through our language and conduct. It is not our right to be angry at anyone, especially for devotees who perform Trikal Sandhya. For them, anger is like a poison because it will destroy our dharma. So, leave this habit. If someone does wrong, explain it to them. Therefore, renounce anger, and with pure and refined language, explain the situation to those who are doing wrong, whether in your family or outside. If they don't understand or argue, then don't talk to them at all. Maintain distance.

Video Title: L168: EARTHQUAKE | नेपाल-बिहार में भूकंप का असली कारण? | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Pandit ji, sometimes my body temperature rises while I'm performing the Sandhya ritual. Is this okay?
Answer: If it increases, that is a good thing. There is no problem. Continue with your practice, and you will feel peace afterward.

Video Title: L169: ASTEROID IMPACT | क्या पृथ्वी पर ऐस्टरॉइड गिरने वाला है?  | पंडित काशीनाथ मिश्र
Question: Mukesh Kumar from Patna, Bihar, is asking: Will the democratic system (republic) remain until 2029, or will it end?
Answer: Look, it is written in the scriptures that Satya Yuga (the Age of Truth) will begin in 2032. I have also written in the Hindi version of the Bhavishya Malika scripture that Satya Yuga will start from 2032. This is the scriptural rule. It could be 2034 instead of 2032, or it could even be 2030. Because when dharma is established, there can be a difference of a year or two. But the question is, will there truly be a monarchy instead of a republic after 2032? Yes, your question is correct. Because Achyutananda ji has written about this, stating that thirteen celibates will rule India in the form of a monarchy, and a Brahmin will rule on the throne of Delhi. And not just in India, but throughout the world, by God's will, devotees will become kings. It's not a dictatorial rule; the great devotees of God, by the grace of the Lord, will be made kings. Question: What is the definition of Moksha (liberation)? Does the existence of the one who attains Moksha come to an end?
Answer: This is a very good question. Moksha also means Nirvana or attaining the supreme state (Param Gati). When any being is born on earth, from the very day its seed is created, its one goal is to attain Moksha, whether it's a plant, an animal, or a human. However, plants and animals have to reach the human birth to attain it, which is why there is a provision for 8.4 million births. The most important among these is the human life. Human life is the life right before becoming a deity. Just as Dhruva, Prahlada, and the Pandavas all became deities from being human. Attaining Moksha is even greater than becoming a deity, as deities reside in heaven, while those who attain Moksha reside in Vaikuntha, where there are no enemies, only friends. It is a place where there is no sun or moon, yet it is always illuminated by the divine power of Dharma and the Lord. There is no darkness. Once Moksha is attained, a person gets a new life in which they receive a body with four arms, like the form of Lord Vishnu. They do not merge into God's body but receive an independent, divine body with which they reside in Vaikuntha in bliss for infinite time. They do not die, even during the great cosmic dissolution (Brahma Pralaya). They have neither death nor birth and experience supreme bliss in Vaikuntha.
