Answer: Absolutely, they will be. Physical or emotional... emotion comes later; first comes the physical act. After performing devotion and worship in the physical realm for some days, even out of fear, emotion arises. From emotion comes devotion. From devotion comes surrender. And from surrender comes liberation. Therefore, those who follow Trikal Sandhya with time, even just with a sense of duty, will surely receive a shield of protection. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L185: विश्व युद्ध एवं पंचभूत प्रलय में रक्षा पाने के उपाय? | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Can we attain God forever by dedicating all our karmas to the Lord and becoming free from the sinful karmas of past lives, committed knowingly or unknowingly? If yes, then how should we spend the rest of our lives so that we can receive the grace of the Supreme Lord? Please guide us.
Answer: Look, it is not possible for us to surrender the karmas of this life and the prarabdha (accumulated karma from past lives) to God. There is only one way. If we perform Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavata, and chant the name of Madhav, then our prarabdha from past lives and the bad karmas of this life will be cut away. That is, they will be wiped clean, and then we can become virtuous souls and move towards the ultimate purpose of life. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L185: विश्व युद्ध एवं पंचभूत प्रलय में रक्षा पाने के उपाय? | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Respectful salutations, Pandit ji. Now that the war has started, can we perform any special prayers or remedies for our soldiers and frontline workers so that they remain safe and can successfully perform their righteous duties? Please guide everyone.
Answer: My message to all the devotees with me is to pray to Madhav and, during Trikal Sandhya, ask for India's honor and protection, that our army receives the Lord's grace and strength. May our army fight well and enhance the nation's honor. And this collective prayer to God—that is, when everyone does it—its results will certainly reach our soldiers. This is my view. Jai.

Video Title: L185: विश्व युद्ध एवं पंचभूत प्रलय में रक्षा पाने के उपाय? | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Prabhu, I am pursuing higher education in America. Everything you are saying is true. Should I return to India now?
Answer: In my view... another gentleman from the US had asked me for my opinion on whether they should leave America, the US, now. Not yet, wait for two or three months. I told him this in the last satsang. I am telling you the same thing. Wait for two or three months. We will study the situation, and when I say so, it will be good for you to come back. For now, wait for two or three months. Jai.

Video Title: L185: विश्व युद्ध एवं पंचभूत प्रलय में रक्षा पाने के उपाय? | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pitaji, I have a small question. If we tell someone, whether we know them or not, to chant Madhav's name or to perform Trikal Sandhya to join this spiritual path, how should we approach them so that they listen to us with some patience and believe that something true is happening, that this will come true, and that the Lord is arriving?
Answer: Look, in my view, it is not necessary for you to tell anyone about Madhav's name. Someone who is physically or mentally distressed, who is suffering, who needs God's grace—if they ask for it, then tell them about Madhav's name. Without being asked, without them showing any interest, you should not approach them about this. Because that is not our ideology. Our ideology is that if someone is suffering, you should also provide the remedy. Jai.

Video Title: L185: विश्व युद्ध एवं पंचभूत प्रलय में रक्षा पाने के उपाय? | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Jai Shri Pita Shri, can we chant the Hare Krishna Mahamantra instead?
Answer: Always chant the Hare Krishna Mahamantra. Chant the root mantra of our Sanatana Dharma. Also, chant the mantra that has been prescribed for Trikal Sandhya. Jai Jai Ma.

Video Title: L185: विश्व युद्ध एवं पंचभूत प्रलय में रक्षा पाने के उपाय? | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I need this Bhagavat Path in Punjabi. My mother and I had ordered it, but we are unsure if we will get it. Can we get it in Punjabi, or will we have to take it in Hindi, Guruji?
Answer: It will be available in Punjabi in 15 days. Work is underway for it. In a maximum of 15 to 20 days, we will make its translation available in the Punjabi language. The English version will also be ready in 15 days.

Video Title: L185: विश्व युद्ध एवं पंचभूत प्रलय में रक्षा पाने के उपाय? | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pita Shri, my question is, how do we bring people towards dharma? When I tell them, they laugh. They say the Kali Yuga hasn't ended yet and ask whose influence I've fallen under. I send them videos to watch, but they don't even look; they just ignore them. So, Pita Shri, please guide me.
Answer: One who is not destined will say the Kali Yuga has not ended. And one who is destined to enter the Satya Yuga already knows that the age is changing. So, the fortunate ones will receive it. Those who have performed virtuous deeds in their past lives will say, 'Yes, the age has ended.' Those who are not destined will say, 'No, the age has not ended.' They will just wait for their time and walk their own path. What do we have to do with it? No one should be forced, no proselytizing. We want the light of dharma to spread, for Sanatana to be protected, and those who are already on God's list for the Satya Yuga will surely believe.

Video Title: L185: विश्व युद्ध एवं पंचभूत प्रलय में रक्षा पाने के उपाय? | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I had a realization about the word 'sindoor' from the operation. If you break it down into 'sin' and 'door', 'sin' means transgression (paap) and 'door' means to keep away or remove. So, 'sindoor' means to remove sin from the house. Is this understanding correct?
Answer: This is absolutely true. This is a major step by the government to remove sin, and it also aligns with spiritual ideology. There is the sindoor of the Mother Goddess, and the sindoor of our mothers who get married, the sindoor of the goddesses of our country. It is all one. That sindoor protects dharma and also destroys sin. Jai.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Darshana Sharma from Barnala, Punjab, is asking: Between the Trikal Sandhya mentioned in your book and the one that is already prevalent, which one should we follow?
Answer: Jai Shri Mata. You should follow the method of Trikal Sandhya that is given in the second book.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: The second question is from Priyanka from Nagpur, Maharashtra. She asks what the Bhavishya Malika Purana says about the white Tulsi (Shwet Tulsi)?
Answer: Look, in the Bhavishya Malika, in the Jai Phul Malika, it is written... 'Garusi bil ji Brahma rasi'. The Tulsi, in my view, the Tulsi Mata, one is the Samet Tulsi, which we call Radha Tulsi in the name of Radha Rani. There is a black-colored Krishna Tulsi. And this one is of a fair complexion, meaning a completely white-colored Tulsi. Perhaps it was in Shri Vrindavan, and during the British rule, they took it from our country. The Lord will return that plant to India, and in Satyayuga, it will become the Tulsi. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Mukund Agrawal from Kanpur asks: In the upcoming establishment of Dharma, what will be the fate of animals and birds? How can we, for these creatures who are an integral part of society, contribute during the establishment of Dharma?
Answer: All the 56 crore living beings will remain. The era will change, and the animals will also talk. They will have their own ideologies and will become very knowledgeable. These creatures will not remain as they are in Kaliyuga; they will also converse with humans and in human language. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Mohit Pant from Haldwani, Uttarakhand, asks: What is the correct time for the evening Trikal Sandhya that is suitable for the entire year? Should the time be adjusted according to summer and winter?
Answer: Look, Trikal Sandhya depends entirely on the rising and setting of the Sun God. The time of sunrise and sunset is different in every state. So, if you perform Trikal Sandhya in Himachal, the evening comes later there. You should see when the Sun God sets, and performing Trikal Sandhya 15 minutes before and 15 minutes after sunset will give you the complete benefits. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pawan Solanki from Maharashtra asks: Jai Shri Madhav, Pandit Ji. My question is, if someone calls out to you or for some reason the Trikal Sandhya is left incomplete, will it be considered a sin? Will an incomplete Trikal Sandhya be considered invalid?
Answer: Look, if there is an extreme emergency, then you can talk, but not before. If someone calls on the phone, don't pick it up at that time. At least switch off your phone. It only takes five to six minutes, and for those five to six minutes, we should remain in complete devotion. Secondly, if someone calls you at that time, tell them you are performing Trikal Sandhya. Then, continue chanting your mantra from the Trikal Sandhya. Nothing is incomplete in this. You can even talk to them for a moment, say for a minute or 50 seconds, 'Look, I am busy right now and will talk later,' and then continue your Trikal Sandhya. Jai Jai.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Sangeeta Kaushik from Kurukshetra, Haryana, asks: Respectful greetings, Pandit Ji. I want to know, just as the Lord performed his divine play (leela) in Kurukshetra during the Dvapara Yuga, will Madhav perform any leela in Kurukshetra this time as well? Is anything written about this in the Bhavishya Malika? Please do tell.
Answer: It is definitely written. In the Dvapara Yuga, Lord Shri Krishna's great leela took place in the holy land of Kurukshetra, where Dharma was re-established. It was an era-changing event, and the Lord undertook a great program to protect Dharma. But in Kaliyuga, Odisha will become Kurukshetra. It is written in the Bhavishya Malika... 'Ek jug Mahabharat Odisha bhu praman, sab utpatti hui thik thike Ram sun.' This means that on the holy land of Odisha, this Mahabharata will happen in Odisha, and everything will originate from Odisha. Therefore, Lord Kalki will go to Kurukshetra and meet the devotees. But the war of Dharma (Dharma Yuddha) will begin in Odisha, and that war, the remaining part of the Mahabharata, will take place in Odisha itself. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Omkar Patil from Jalna, Maharashtra, asks: Namaste, Pandit Ji. I am a UPSC aspirant and want to serve the forests by joining the IFS. I perform Trikal Sandhya daily and have started on the path of devotion. According to the Malika, if everything is going to be destroyed, will students who are thinking of achieving success in their fields today be able to succeed? Should we still continue preparing for exams like UPSC if these institutions won't exist in the future? Will people like me, who have a desire to serve and are connected to nature, get this opportunity? Please guide me.
Answer: Look, the Lord has said in the Gita, 'Perform your duty (karma).' My first advice is to prepare even better for the UPSC. And since you perform Trikal Sandhya, you will also achieve success in it. Because children who are in education and are unsuccessful, by following the path of Trikal Sandhya, their morale, memory power, and the Lord's grace all increase, and they become successful. Those who perform Trikal Sandhya are never unsuccessful. In my view, if you perform Trikal Sandhya, apply for the UPSC; you will definitely succeed. At the same time, continue performing Trikal Sandhya to protect Dharma. Everyone must perform their karma. Whatever the time brings, we must accept. Just as we are getting food today, if we get something better in 50 years, we will eat that. Do what is available at the given time. But time doesn't stop, and karma doesn't stop. It is necessary for everyone to perform their karma. I also do my karma as a Brahmin. So my advice to you is to also do your karma. If you want to serve the country, then serve the country. Protecting the nation is our greatest Dharma. Therefore, strengthen your studies, perform Trikal Sandhya, and the Lord's grace will be with you. This is necessary for the honor of your family and parents. No one's education or karma should stop; the Lord has said this, and we say the same. What is written in the Malika scripture is for the salvation of humanity and for the change of time. Humans will still exist in this world. Everything will continue as it is, but sin will not remain. So, study, give interviews, respect your parents, and also perform your religious duties like Trikal Sandhya. You will be blissful. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Gopi Shetty from Mumbai asks: Revered Pandit Ji, my respectful salutations at your feet. I regularly perform Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavata, and chant the name of Madhav. I also make an offering to Agni Dev (the fire god) before starting to cook in the morning. Please tell me what other precautions I should take to protect myself from the upcoming diseases.
Answer: To protect yourself from upcoming diseases, first, your actions (karma) should include truth, right thinking, compassion, and charity. You should cook food only after making an offering to Agni Dev. Trikal Sandhya should be done on time. The Bhagavata should be read. In my view, whenever you get time during the day or night, do not stop chanting the name of Madhav, so that the coming calamities do not affect us. Utilize your time wisely. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Ankit Tiwari from Ballia asks: Honorable Pandit Ji, can the appointed time for the establishment of Dharma, 2032, be extended further? Please guide us.
Answer: Look, in my view, I have written 2032, but by the Lord's will, it can be shifted by two or three years. It can be extended or even shortened. It is His will. But from 2032, in my opinion, there will definitely be a radical change in human civilization. People will become truthful. People will turn towards Dharma. People will become vegetarian. The purity of brotherhood and the concept of 'Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam' (the world is one family) will manifest. Sanatana Dharma will rule the world, and people all over the world will return to Sanatana Dharma. Also, everyone will perform Trikal Sandhya and read the Bhagavata. This will certainly bring about an independent change. The Lord may take some time to establish Satyayuga, but from 2032, there will be a great impact of Dharma and truth on this world. Jai.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Nitin Kumar Modi from Angul, Odisha, asks: I am from Odisha, and there is a prophecy of a great war here. Should we leave Odisha and move to another state?
Answer: Look, the propaganda about the war in Odisha in the Malika is not that significant. The war will happen where it is destined to happen. Human civilization will continue on its path. There is no problem in Odisha. Live blissfully, do your work, and follow Dharma. Also, perform Trikal Sandhya. There is no problem. In my opinion, I will only say this much: the war in Odisha will happen where it is supposed to. For that, Odisha is a land of gods, and the establishment of Dharma will also happen in Odisha through the Lord. It is a holy land. There is nothing to worry about. Look, wherever we are, we are safe if our karma is right. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I have two questions for you. Can I ask them one by one? ... Father, my question is that a few days ago I was watching one of your podcasts. There you mentioned that those who have achieved self-realization can have a vision of the Lord. Those who have attained self-realization get to see Him. So I want to ask you, what is self-realization and how can we achieve it?
Answer: Self-realization means realizing the Lord's presence everywhere in the millions of universes. It is when a person rises above the distinctions of poor, helpless, sad, sinner, virtuous, ignorant, and caste. Thinking of all castes and religions as one, when a person considers their own heart and the hearts of others as one, sees the world within their own body, and sees themselves in the world. This is self-realization. Such a person recognizes all souls, considers everyone as one, and gives everyone equal status. The Lord blesses them. This is called self-realization, and through it, a human attains liberation. Jai Jai.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Yes, Father, first of all, my countless salutations to you. Father, first I need your blessings. And Father, my only prayer is that whenever the Lord is near us, may we please have his vision. May he not test us, because we are not capable of taking a test...
Answer: I want everyone to have the vision of Lord Kalki and benefit from His presence. But a person will receive fruits according to their karma. And I say this much: those who perform Trikal Sandhya and read the Bhagavata can have the Lord's vision even while sitting at home, perhaps in a dream. Because the Lord gave his vision to Brahma Dev in a dream when Lord Krishna incarnated in the Dvapara Yuga. This also happened during the Rama avatar. So, devotees will surely get this vision through the medium of Trikal Sandhya. Do it and have complete faith in the Lord. He will surely bless you. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit Ji, we used to hear that in other yugas (eras), people's height was much greater. For example, in Dvapara Yuga, the height was more, in Treta Yuga, it was even more, and in Satya Yuga, even more than that. So, was the size of animals and birds also similarly larger?
Answer: Absolutely. They were also bigger, the fruits and roots were bigger, and the grains were bigger. At that time, people's eyesight was also much more powerful and expansive. Their strength was also as great, and so was their mind. Everything was good. Due to Kaliyuga, everything has become smaller. Even the fruits and roots have become smaller. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I was asking you, in Haridwar, you gave me a Bhagavata as prasad. I received the 'Sudha Sagar' Bhagavata. You speak of reading the Bhagavata; what is the difference? As you say one should read the Bhagavata, you gave me 'Sudha Sagar' as prasad in Haridwar. What is the difference between that and the Bhagavata reading you recommend? (Clarified by host: The book she received is 'Sudha Sagar,' which also contains the Bhagavata Mahapurana. She is asking what the difference is between the Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana and 'Sudha Sagar.')
Answer: 'Sudha Sagar' must be 'Sukh Sagar.' Yes, 'Sukh Sagar.' It is the same thing, one and the same. Read it. Do it. In life, this is the greatest influence; it is the greatest asset of human life. What you have received is the greatest asset. The person who has not received the Bhagavata is unfortunate.

Video Title: L186: 64 प्रकार की महामारी | त्रिकाल संध्या निदान | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Father, you gave me a flower for my husband. It withered on the way within a day. We have dried it and kept it. Can I keep it in any small box?
Answer: Yes, keep it. Pray to Madhav that he also follows your path and performs Trikal Sandhya so that his life may also be filled with peace and happiness.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: The first question is, how can we calm the restlessness of the mind while performing Trikal Sandhya and reading the Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana?
Answer: Look, when people first start doing Trikal Sandhya, for a few days the mind remains distracted, it wanders here and there. But after practicing it for several days, the mind becomes stable. At that time, one only gets a vision of God, feels God's presence, and experiences a sense of purity. Therefore, for those who are new to this, the mind will be a little distracted. After doing Trikal Sandhya for a few days, in my opinion, the mind does not get distracted. So, practice it for some time, for a few days. After that, it will be fine. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: The next question is, can we buy property and build a house? And can we make some new investments for our children?
Answer: Look, investing for children is necessary. You can plan for their future. It is necessary for their education. That should be done. But when it comes to property, the property market will go down in the future. It will go down a lot. You will see for yourselves. Therefore, by investing money in property, apartments, or buildings, your 100% investment could even come down to 50%. Now is not the time to do it. Wait for two or three years. Do that.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: The third question is, it is said in the Bhavishya Malika that compassion, forgiveness, peace, and love are all necessary. But what about someone who has done great wrong to us, whom we cannot forget, and feel hatred from within when we see them? How can we forgive them?
Answer: Look, we are neither the ones to forgive nor the ones to punish anyone. In the Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana, in the twelfth canto, the Lord Himself has said that those who see a Chandal (outcast), a sinner, a sadhu (saint), a sant (holy person), and a human being with the same sentiment, they attain Me and they attain Vaikuntha (the celestial abode). If you want to attain Vaikuntha, then stay away from such feelings. If you want to be bound by the cycle of life and death, to be born again and again, and to face death and rebirth repeatedly, then you can consider your enemy an enemy or a friend. This is your own ideology. But I would say that human life is obtained with great difficulty, and to make this human life meaningful, in my view, you should forget enmity and friendship. Just perform your karma. And as for the enemy who has done wrong, God will deal with them. This is not under our control. Therefore, leave it to God. Do not harbor feelings of enmity or friendship. Because by harboring feelings of enmity and friendship, we will not be able to achieve anything. We will get nothing but sorrow and mental anguish. Jai.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: According to the Malika, very few people with pure and truthful nature will enter the Satya Yuga, and most will be destroyed. My question is, what will happen to those souls? Will they get a chance to be reborn in the Satya Yuga as humans or in some other form?
Answer: Look, those who go towards unrighteousness, they never will. Yes, those who pass away after performing good deeds, some of them will surely return. And those who have an 'apamrityu' (untimely death), those who will have an untimely death in the coming destruction... 'Apamrityu' means accidental death, dying before one's time is up, at a young age, due to some illness or accident. For such people, attaining liberation is not possible so quickly. The fruits of their karma are also considered according to the scriptures.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: We have received information about the changes that are coming to the Earthly realm (Prithvi Lok). But what changes will occur in all the other realms? What will happen to the souls residing in the heavenly realm (Swarga Lok) or the netherworld (Patal Lok)? What will be the fate of all the human souls of the present time who will not be worthy of going to the realm of truth (Satya Lok)? Will they get a rebirth?
Answer: Look, this is under God's control. But the thing is, those who live in the netherworld (Patal Lok), the netherworld will become like heaven, and the people of the netherworld will live there as if in heaven. The mortal realm (Mrityu Lok) will go to the netherworld, and heaven will be created on the mortal realm. The people who survive on Earth will get heaven-like happiness and peace. And in my opinion, this is under God's control. It is not under our control. But God will decide about heaven and the netherworld. On Earth, a being receives the fruits of their karma according to their actions. They get a life according to that.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Due to my job, I often have to travel back and forth between India and Dubai. Is it safe to travel after this month? Should I avoid it, or can I continue traveling in the name of Madhav?
Answer: In my opinion, first, do good deeds. Perform Trikal Sandhya. Along with that, chant the name of Madhav and then travel. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: When will government jobs and positions be eliminated? Will all jobs end as soon as the Pisces-Saturn conjunction is over?
Answer: No, nothing is going to happen so soon. There is still time for that. You will have to wait until 2032, and with time, you will also get a sense of what the future results will be. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: When will the third part of the Bhavishya Malika book be released?
Answer: Look, the third part of the Bhavishya Malika will definitely be released. And before that, a book about Sanatana Dharma, based on the elements of Jagannath culture, will be published. After that, the final book, the third stream or the third part, will also be unveiled and published. It will take time; we are working on it.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Will 2027-28 be a suitable time to get children married? For the children who are of age, will it be appropriate to get them married in 2027-28?
Answer: Look, '27, '28, '29, '30, '31, '32, '33, '34, '35... now, weddings, marriages, food, and diet—these things will never stop. They will continue. Therefore, it's not like that; with time, whenever someone's marriage is destined to happen, it will surely happen. It will not stop because marriage is a traditional system, a rule that has been going on in the world for centuries. Even if there is a great destruction, marriages will still take place. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What does 'Gandharva Vivah' (a form of marriage by mutual consent) mean? Will the system of marriage change in the future?
Answer: Look, in our Sanatana Dharma, marriage is performed with Agni (the fire god) as a witness, or with the Mother Goddess as a witness, or with the deities as witnesses. The marriage that happens with fire as a witness, through a yajna (fire ritual), is our social rule and is based on the rules of the Vedas. And in the Puranic era, Gandharva Vivah was prevalent. At that time, a husband and wife, or anyone who wanted to marry someone, would do so by keeping the gods and goddesses as witnesses and exchanging flower garlands. This was called Gandharva Vivah, and that is also good. And the marriages that take place today are also good. Gandharva Vivah is a sacred marriage. Perhaps with the change of the era, it may become prevalent again in the future.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Will only those devotees who have been with the Lord for all four yugas (eras) have memories of their past lives?
Answer: Absolutely, the gathering of devotees from all four yugas, the gathering of deities, the gathering of siddhas (perfected beings)—all of this is going to happen at this time. Therefore, the Lord does not come without devotees, and without devotees, the Lord's divine play (leela) does not happen. So, understand this as a union of devotees, and the devotees of all four yugas will unite at this time. Jai Jagannath. With the change of the era, those who go to the Satya Yuga will remember a lot about their past lives, and they will also have realizations.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Jai Shri Madhav, Pandit Ji. I am Abhishek speaking from Bareilly. First, I wanted to say that I need your blessings. I got married a few days ago, as I had told you. My wife started performing Trikal Sandhya three months ago, and a few days ago she became pregnant. She told me that the Lord gave her a vision in the form of Laddu Gopal (child Krishna) at her parents' home in the village. And then a few days later, she had a vision of Kalki, dressed in white clothes, in the clouds, smiling at her. So, Pandit Ji, I want to know what this means, and I seek your blessings for our family and my unborn child. I just need your blessings. Jai Shri Madhav.
Answer: Look, have your wife listen to the Bhagavata, and have her listen to the Trikal Sandhya. A good son will be born. Jai.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: You said that 33 crore (330 million) gods and goddesses have now taken birth, right? So, will only devotees go to Satya Yuga, or will gods and goddesses go too? Because you mentioned that a total of 33 crore from the population of India and a total of 64 crore from the entire globe will go to Satya Yuga. So, you said that a total of 33 crore gods and goddesses have taken birth in this world, so will only human beings go to Satya Yuga?
Answer: Gods and goddesses also go to Satya Yuga. Look, when Lord Krishna was born, when Lord Rama was born, even at that time, gods took birth on Earth. They were also born in human bodies. No one knew which deity they were. So, this is the time for the union of devotees and gods from all four yugas. That is why all the gods have descended to Earth, and all have been born in human bodies. Perfected sages (siddha rishis) have also been born. Not all gods come, because the Earth also needs to be managed and run. Therefore, whichever gods were to come, have come. The perfected sages have also come, and devotees from the Gandharvas have also come. And the Lord's closest devotees from all four yugas have also come. All together, 33 crore devotees will build the Satya Yuga with the Lord. And this is my ideology: India is the land of gods, and 33 crore gods will reside here.

Video Title: L187: IRAN and AMERICA | ईरान अमेरिका का सम्बन्ध कैसा रहेगा आगे जाके ?| Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Lord, I have one more question. I perform Trikal Sandhya, I read the Bhagavata, I chant the Hare Krishna Mahamantra, and I chant the name of Madhav. But in this path, other people have dreams, right? Dreams of Lord Kalki and other dreams. Is it difficult? If everyone performs Sandhya, will everyone have dreams?
Answer: Look, He will not come in everyone's dreams. People will get visions according to their level of devotion. It is good for those who get them, and those who do not should also follow Trikal Sandhya, and with time, they will also get a vision.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: We have changed a lot since connecting with the Lord. Before, we used to commit many sins like adultery, but now we live a disciplined life. Why does it feel like we were fine the way we were before, and now we have changed? Why does it feel this way?
Answer: Look, when the influence of dharma (righteousness) falls upon humans, a transformation occurs. And for those who understand dharma, everything changes. There is no such thing as good or bad. Every human has good qualities as well as bad ones. Transformation comes to humans through their environment and spiritual gatherings (satsang). And for those who practice human dharma, perform Trikal Sandhya, and read the Bhagavat, a time of great change is coming. With time, devotees are experiencing this, and soon the whole world will experience it. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: In our spiritual stream, there are many brothers who perform Sandhya diligently and follow the Lord's path well. In the future, when the country needs them, they will serve as soldiers and lead on behalf of India in this world war. So, will they die or be martyred? Will they attain moksha (liberation)?
Answer: Look, those people who follow Trikal Sandhya according to the prescribed times—the morning, noon, and evening Sandhyas—who follow all three according to the time and with devotion, and who practice truth, peace, compassion, and forgiveness, and exhibit the signs of supreme devotion, they will go to the Satya Yuga (the age of truth). They will not die. This is an independent element of scriptural and spiritual ideology. Jai Shri.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: We live in a rented room. In our home, my mother and I work to pay the rent. My father does nothing; instead, he creates conflict daily and tries to beat my mother. I am a 20-year-old youth and cannot tolerate this. I leave everything to the Lord. The neighbors are also troubled by the conflict. Everyone understands but says nothing, which pains me a lot. I don't want anyone to suffer because of us. Therefore, I have considered taking a loan to build a separate house where the neighbors are far away. Sometimes I think of going out to find a job, but I can't because of my responsibility towards my mother. Please provide guidance.
Answer: If you want to take a loan to build a house, you can, no problem. And look, our karma is tied to good and bad. Therefore, a father is a father. Pray to the Lord for him to change. And if you want to take a loan to build a house, you can do that too. During Trikal Sandhya, tell God about the problems in your home. In my opinion, you will find some direction. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What will be the contribution of devotees in the war? Will it be direct or indirect?
Answer: As long as our soldiers are fighting and there is a war between the armies of different countries in the world, it is very important for devotees to only sing praises of God. When the spiritual war happens with God's power, at that time, God might engage some devotees in that righteous work. It is good to wait for the time to come. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: When will the Siyalda Mahayagya (great fire sacrifice) take place?
Answer: In the middle phase of the Third World War, a yagya ritual will be held in Siyalda. It is a very important yagya in which devotees from 16 mandals (regions) of the world will participate. It will be held by the Sudharma Sabha during the middle phase of the world war. If the world war lasts for, say, seven years, then perhaps after three years, the yagya ritual will be held in Siyalda.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Will the Sudarshan Chakra destroy 1.4 million soldiers? Will the heretics then attain Vaikuntha (the celestial abode of Vishnu)? Please guide us on this.
Answer: Look, the Lord's annihilation of sinners is part of a cycle. There is one 'Kaal Chakra' (cycle of time/death) and another 'Uddhar Chakra' (cycle of liberation). In the Uddhar Chakra, the Lord liberates devotees who are born on Earth due to a curse. When dharma is established, they die due to the effect of the Kaal Chakra. Those who die due to the effect of the Kaal Chakra do not attain Vaikuntha. They do not get liberation. They are born again. For example, all the soldiers from the Kaurava and Pandava armies who died in the Mahabharata war have already been reborn. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: It is written in the scriptures that one should never slander others. But what should we do when someone comes and slanders others in front of us, especially if that person is a family member slandering us or the family? Please guide us.
Answer: Look, for us, it is best to maintain distance from people of wicked nature, from wrongdoers. This is not a good time. In the future, there will be such conflicts and quarrels in every house, and in some places, someone might even kill another. Such situations will arise. There will be quarrels in every house and conflicts in every village. Therefore, my request to the devotees is to maintain distance from mischievous and wrong people. Keep only as much contact with them as is necessary. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: In today's time, what is the most important thing for all of us to know and to do?
Answer: In today's time, the greatest danger looms over human civilization. There is no greater power or greater action than performing Trikal Sandhya, reading the Bhagavat, and chanting the name of Madhav. All humans should follow this so that human civilization can be saved. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: We are told that we should be the humblest and see the Lord in everyone. But how do we stop our hidden pride from repeatedly making us feel incapable?
Answer: Look, I didn't say this. This is the dharma of a human, the dharma of a devotee. In this world, one must abandon the pride and ego of 'I' and 'mine', consider oneself an ordinary human being, and take refuge in the most beloved Lord. Therefore, it is necessary for all humans to follow this. Those who do not follow it have demonic qualities. But devotees should not have this quality. Leave behind 'I', 'mine', 'you', 'yours', and just surrender and live with devotion. A new era will be built. The Satya Yuga will be built. So, prepare yourself for it. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: It is written that in the Satya Yuga, it was appropriate to wear deer skin. But why is it inappropriate to wear leather today?
Answer: The practice of wearing deer skin in the Satya Yuga is not clearly written about in the scriptures. Therefore, we do not see solid proof of this concept in our human civilization. Because in the Dvapara Yuga, the Pandavas were wearing good clothes. They were wearing high-quality and advanced attire. In the Treta Yuga, even Ramchandra wore the clothes of a forest dweller. I don't find any proof of this anywhere. That's why I will not discuss it. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Many things are said about the Bhavishya Malika. It is said about many events that they are written in the Bhavishya Malika. Is it necessary for us to know all of it? Is there an essence to it that we should all know, and knowing which would be sufficient for all of us?
Answer: Look, the Bhavishya Malika scripture is one of our Puranas. It contains writings about all the elements of Kali Yuga and the salvation from destruction, for the purpose of transforming the Earth from Kali Yuga to Satya Yuga. Therefore, what is written in the Bhavishya scripture is happening in human civilization and will continue to happen. Everyone should just follow it with utmost purity. Its core element is the four pillars of dharma: truth, purity, compassion, and charity, which all humans must follow. The purpose of writing this scripture was to make humans aware of the problems to come, to bring people towards dharma, and to reform a corrupted society, that is, to make it better. Following it is good for all humans.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: It is often seen that fear is spread in the name of Bhavishya Malika, and Lord Kalki is also portrayed as the destroyer of all and shown as very terrifying. What is the truth? Is the Bhavishya Malika an object of fear, and should we also be afraid of Lord Kalki? Or is there a different element of devotion that not everyone understands? If yes, what is it?
Answer: At the time before Lord Krishna was born, all the demons were trembling with fear. Even Kansa could not sleep at home out of fear. Therefore, those who perform demonic deeds, who commit sins, they are afraid of the propagation of Bhavishya Malika. The devotees, however, become joyful and, by studying it, change their actions. This has happened in every age, and it is happening in this age as well. Jai.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: For someone who is not a devotee, can they also attain devotion by performing Trikal Sandhya?
Answer: Anyone, be they a demon, an outcast, or a great sinner, no matter how great a sinner they are, if they follow Trikal Sandhya, then their mind, body, inner self, and soul will be purified. They too can become a pure, holy devotee and attain Vaikuntha. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Trisandhya is the essence of Brahman. By performing the Trisandhya mentioned in the Bhavishya Malika, can one be saved from repeatedly coming into this cycle of the world?
Answer: In this world, if a person wants to attain Vaikuntha, the greatest core mantra and main action is Trikal Sandhya. And those who perform Trikal Sandhya will attain the abode of Lord Vishnu. There is no doubt about it.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I have a question related to Trikal Sandhya. There are people who eat meat and fish and want to quit. When I preach about Bhavishya Malika to some of my old friends who eat meat, fish, and drink heavily, they understand what I say, but they say, 'We have also read in the Bhavishya Malika that if we perform Trikal Sandhya while drinking alcohol, the Yogini Mata will consume us.' Out of this fear, they don't even want to start. So, Pandit ji, what can be done about this? Please guide me.
Answer: I am very happy with your preaching and I commend you. The thing is, suppose someone has eaten non-vegetarian food and consumed alcohol their whole life, committed immoral acts, and now wants to change. Now listen to what is written in this scripture. It is clearly written that this scripture was created for the transformation of people on the wrong path and to save humans by making them pure and holy. Therefore, if they abandon the sins and deeds they have committed and perform Trikal Sandhya and read the Bhagavat Mahapuran, then they too can go to the Satya Yuga and save their lives. There is no problem. Jai.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: It has been said that banks will fail, the stock market will go down, and property values will fall. So what should we do? We can't even keep cash at home. What should we do?
Answer: For now, you should wait a little. When the world war begins, a decision should be made at that time. But I will say this: do not invest money in real estate or the stock market at this time because this is not a good time for us. The Brahmastra has already been released. We don't know when and where it will fall. So, wait for some time, and I will definitely tell you when the time is right.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am scared about what to do because in the future, technology is going to end, and my work is in that field. So I'm scared whether I should complete my studies in it or not. I feel like studying, but I'm afraid that when everything ends, what will we do? What we have studied won't be of any use then.
Answer: Look, my child, even now I am studying. I read the scriptures every day. I keep studying because one's work cannot be stopped. If the flow of water stops, how will people get water? If the flow of air stops, how will humans get air? Similarly, a human's work, like a student's duty to study and get an education, and for those who work, to do their job, should continue. This is the rule of the world. So, do your work. When it happens, it will be seen. Why fear? Perform Sandhya, read the Bhagavat, and study. Listen, when a person performs some action in life, God gives them something in return. Those who have studied hard will also go to Satya Yuga and will receive fruits according to their efforts.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: You have said that in the end, there will be seven days and nights of darkness. You also said that Yogini Mata will test us in three stages. What will happen in that? I don't know any scriptures; I started performing Sandhya three times a day after listening to you. But I have also heard from others that there will be tests in three stages, and Mata will ask about things like the Durga Stuti. If we are not able to pass, will we not be allowed to go forward?
Answer: Absolutely, for those who perform Trikal Sandhya, if the Divine Mother asks a question, whether in a dream or in person—and this is for the final time, for which there is still a lot of time left—at that time, she will ask about Trikal Sandhya. If you perform Trikal Sandhya, you will say, 'We perform Trikal Sandhya and chant the name of Madhav, given to us by Pandit Kashinath Mishra.' That's it, she will let you go and won't ask anything else. She won't ask anything, she will just give her blessings and leave, and say nothing more.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: As you mentioned that the internet will shut down in the future, what will people do after it shuts down? The whole world depends on the internet, especially for jobs. For example, I am currently doing digital marketing, so when all that ends, what should one do?
Answer: This situation will continue until 2030. When it shuts down, we will see, but it will definitely shut down. Why worry about it? Listen, one must continue to work. We still have two, three, four, five years in our hands. So keep doing it. The internet won't go away in a single day. It will be affected little by little, gradually. First, the internet will fail in sinful countries, and India will be last. Wait for the time.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Knowing what will happen in the future, should we make plans for the future or not?
Answer: There is no need for future plans. Practice dharma, do good deeds, perform Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavat—that is the great plan. Focus on your work, your education, your field of action.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I continuously perform Trikal Sandhya, chant the name of Madhav, and also read the Bhagavat, but I am not able to develop the right feeling (bhav) for the Lord. My mind gets distracted while performing Trikal Sandhya.
Answer: Look, when you don't feel the devotion, just close your eyes during Trikal Sandhya and look at the Lord. Just keep looking. After doing this for a few days, He will appear in your mind and heart. By doing this, the mind will not get distracted. Close your eyes and try to see Lord Krishna; you will see Him, and your mind will not wander anywhere. Try it once and see.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is the mantra written in the Malika? It is written that whoever chants the Brahma mantra will go to Satya Yuga. Is that the name 'Madhav'? Can we go by chanting the name 'Madhav'?
Answer: It is written that those who chant the one-syllable Brahma mantra will go to the Satya Yuga and will be saved from the wrath of the Divine Mother. The name 'Madhav' is Brahma. Those who chant it along with performing Trikal Sandhya and reading the Bhagavat will go.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: You have told us that the value of gold will become zero. Since gold is so expensive, should we buy it or not? How should we invest?
Answer: In my opinion, after three years, the price of gold will be less than half. So, think about what to do based on that.

Video Title: L188: वर्ल्ड वार की स्थिति क्या होगी? | 13 इस्लामिक देशों की गुप्त बातचीत | Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: If someone has a skin disease, and they are regularly performing Trikal Sandhya and reading the Bhagavat, are there any chances of it being cured?
Answer: Look, a girl two or three years ago—you can see my old video—she had a skin disease for about 10 years and was taking medicine. She took her medicine after chanting the 16 names during Trikal Sandhya. She said that from the day she started doing this, the disease is gone. So, look, medicine is a system of the Kali Yuga; one should take it. But those who chant the 16 names with devotion, thinking of Vishnu as the medicine, and also take their medicine, that medicine will work well and they will be free from the disease.

Video Title: L189: जगन्नाथ पुरी में सबसे बड़ा विनाश का संकेत। Rath Yatra Massacre | Dr Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: A devotee is on the spiritual path, but their family eats non-vegetarian food. They are wondering if, through the influence of their devotion, their family members will also gradually come to the path of devotion and be saved? Is it possible that the good deeds we do will also benefit our family members and lead to their salvation?
Answer: This is a very good question. Many devotees face such problems in their families. This question comes to me repeatedly. But the thing is, 'Without holy company, wisdom does not arise.' If any virtuous, pure person lives in a family, that family also transforms due to the influence of their purity. It's like lighting a bright lamp in a dark room; because of it, the darkness dissipates. Similarly, if a saint or a devotee in a family follows the path of dharma, under their influence, with time, some changes will surely occur. For this, making small efforts is also necessary. And by contemplating the sacred words of dharma over time, purity and transformation will also come to the home. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L189: जगन्नाथ पुरी में सबसे बड़ा विनाश का संकेत। Rath Yatra Massacre | Dr Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: A very famous storyteller in India, who narrates the stories of Lord Shiva, says that there is no liberation even in Vaikuntha. He claims that we stay in Vaikuntha only as long as we have good karma (punya), and after it's exhausted, we are reborn. Please provide guidance on this.
Answer: Look, I'll say one thing. In the Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana, the Lord Himself told Uddhava, and many great sages like Narada have also contemplated this. Those people who go to Vaikuntha do not die even during the Brahma Pralaya (the dissolution of the universe). It is called the immortal realm (Amar Lok), where there is no death. Where there is no death, where does such an ideology come from? During the Brahma Pralaya, all realms are submerged in water, but even at that time, Vaikuntha is not flooded. That is why the Lord Himself said, 'Neither the sun, nor the moon, nor fire illuminates that place. Having gone there, they do not return. That is My supreme abode.' In my realm, there is no sun, yet it is illuminated by light. In my realm, no one dies, and everyone attains the immortal realm. So, where does death come into the immortal realm? Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L189: जगन्नाथ पुरी में सबसे बड़ा विनाश का संकेत। Rath Yatra Massacre | Dr Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is the difference between believing in dharma and practicing dharma?
Answer: Those who merely believe in dharma—there's a saying and a doing. The one who just says it discusses it with others, but in truth, only those are wise and successful who practice dharma in their actions. Those who practice it get the fruit. By merely believing, one gets a little bit of merit (punya), but not the fruit. There is a big difference between getting merit and getting the fruit. It's like having a plant. What is the benefit of just having leaves? A tree having leaves but no fruit is equivalent to just believing. And if a tree has fruit along with its leaves, that is like practicing it; such is the fruit. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L189: जगन्नाथ पुरी में सबसे बड़ा विनाश का संकेत। Rath Yatra Massacre | Dr Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: We have very tall buildings here, so the Sun God and his rays are not visible. We offer arghya (water offering) to the Sun God by facing east. Is this correct?
Answer: It is absolutely correct. Whether the Sun God is visible or not... for instance, if the sky is covered with clouds, the Sun God is not visible then either, right? The Sun God bestows his grace during morning and evening. He rises in the east and sets in the west. Whether you can see the Sun God or not, at the time of sunrise and sunset, if you offer arghya to the Sun God according to the rules, you will receive the same meritorious fruit as those who do it while seeing the sun. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L189: जगन्नाथ पुरी में सबसे बड़ा विनाश का संकेत। Rath Yatra Massacre | Dr Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: We only bathe during Brahma Muhurta (pre-dawn hours) and midday. So, in the evening, can we offer arghya to the Sun God without bathing?
Answer: You can offer arghya to the Sun God at midday and in the morning. In the evening, if you have difficulty or a physical problem that prevents you from bathing, you can wash your feet, then perform a mental bath in the Ganga, sprinkle water on yourself, chant the name of Mother Ganga three times, and then, wearing clean clothes, you can offer arghya to the Sun God. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L189: जगन्नाथ पुरी में सबसे बड़ा विनाश का संकेत। Rath Yatra Massacre | Dr Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: I cannot go to the rooftop to offer arghya. So, I meditate on the Sun God and offer it while standing at the threshold of my house. However, the Sun God is not visible from there, and the water falls on the wall of my house. Is it right to do this?
Answer: Look, for people living in apartments in city areas, it's not possible to offer water to the Sun God outside. Therefore, you can offer water to the Sun God even inside the house, whether it falls on the wall or anywhere else. The water offering is not consumed by the Sun God. It is meant to counter the asuras (demons) who try to devour the sun during the morning and evening prayers. The water offered by devotees acts like fire on the faces of these asuras, burning them and stopping the trouble they cause the Sun God. Therefore, you can offer it anywhere, and you will receive the fruit for this as well. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L189: जगन्नाथ पुरी में सबसे बड़ा विनाश का संकेत। Rath Yatra Massacre | Dr Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: During the time of Trisandhya (three daily prayers), if I am somewhere else where I cannot perform it properly, what should I do? Is it necessary to bathe before performing Sandhya?
Answer: Look, Satya Yuga will not be established in a single day. I cannot make everyone virtuous in one day. That's why I am telling you step-by-step. For now, the rule for Trikal Sandhya is this: you can perform a mental bath in the Ganga and do your prayers anywhere—while traveling, working, or driving. However, with time, when Satya Yuga arrives, one will have to bathe before all three daily prayers and also perform yajnas. But for now, in whatever situation you are, perform a mental bath and recite the Durga Madhav Stuti, the 16 names of Lord Vishnu, the shlokas of his ten avatars, and chant 'Madhav' 108 times. Also, read one chapter of the Bhagavata anytime between Brahma Muhurta and 12 AM. By doing this, you will receive the meritorious fruit of Trikal Sandhya. We will follow this rule for now, and I will change it with time. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L189: जगन्नाथ पुरी में सबसे बड़ा विनाश का संकेत। Rath Yatra Massacre | Dr Pandit Kashinath Mishra

But they say, 'No, none of this will happen.' So, how should I make them understand? Also, I don't know if I will go to Satyayug (the Golden Age) or not, because I get angry over small things, although I try not to. So please tell me, how should I explain to those people? Answer: Look, what is written in the scriptures is not the whimsical word of any human. The scriptures are always the absolute truth. Those who are destined to move forward will appreciate it. Those who, despite trying to save themselves, are headed for destruction and trouble, they will not understand. Therefore, don't try to convince anyone. Those who are hungry for it, who have truly done good, virtuous, and pure deeds in their past lives, those who have the capability to become humans of the Satyayug, they will like it. Those who are fortunate will accept it. Those who are unfortunate will not accept it. We have nothing to do with that. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L190: अमेरिका में भूकंप और अमेरिका का भविष्य। Future of US | Dr Pandit Kashinath Mishra
Question: Father, as you say, the age of Kaliyug is decreasing due to sin. But a person doesn't sin of their own free will, do they? I have joined your satsang, I read the Bhagavata Purana, I perform Trikal Sandhya, and I chant God's name. I am following everything. I just wanted to ask, you say the age of Kaliyug has been reduced because of sin. But Kaliyug brought the sin, right? A person is not doing it of their own free will. The Supreme Father had already written that in Kaliyug, people would act this way. This is what I wanted to ask.
Answer: Look, sin also happened in Satyayug, Tretayug, and Dwaparyug. But in Satyayug, 99-100% of people were not sinning. Yes, every leaf moves by His will, but when a creature is killed, it first cries and screams, and then the human forcibly kills it. Does this happen by God's will? No. Man is bound by the thread of his own karma. God created the world with goodness, passion, and ignorance, and gave humans knowledge, intelligence, and 'vivek' (conscience). Those who awaken their 'vivek' do not commit sins. Humans who are under the influence of their senses commit sins. And God has said that man commits sin through his own actions and earns merit through his own actions. The fruit of sin is sin, and the fruit of merit is merit. Therefore, God has nothing to do with this. The creation runs by God's will—we get food, the sun and moon appear, the wind blows—all this is by God's will. But actions, man does by his own will. Those who follow the scriptures receive God's grace and perform good deeds. Those who are ignorant and controlled by their senses, they sin by their own will. Therefore, God has nothing to do with it. God says that a person will receive fruits according to their actions. That is why the scriptures were created. Those who study and follow them will never sin. And those who sin say, 'It happens by God's will.' No, it is those whose sensual power is awakened who commit sins. Those who attain pure (sattvic) power perform virtuous deeds.

This is why one yawns and a few tears come from the eyes. It means your Trikal Sandhya is successful. Jai Jaikar.

It is written in the scriptures that the life of those who do not perform Trikal Sandhya (prayers at three junctures of the day) is like that of an outcast. Their life has no value. There is no purpose to their birth on this earth. And those who do not perform Trikal Sandhya do not have the right to eat. One might say, 'I am earning, so I will eat.' Question: What is going to happen and what is not, only the Lord knows. But you are telling us what we should or should not do. For example, today you mentioned we should remain silent (maun). Similarly, what other things can we do to make our tasks and life easier?
Answer: Look, God does everything. There is no path without God. But the more silent we remain, the more our knowledge, the power of our eyes, and the power of our body will increase, and we will also receive God's grace. A characteristic of a devotee is to be silent, not to speak much, to speak less. Second, eat before sunset. Third, perform Trikal Sandhya. Fourth, read the Bhagavat. Fifth, continuously chant the name of Madhav. And consider all humans in the world as your own, and leave aside any religion or creed, because Dharma belongs to God, and God created Dharma. Humans need to change their actions (karma). It is written in the Bhagavat that every human is a child of God, and humans should perform their duties towards all trees, all of nature, and all living beings. In this, you can give a small fruit or root to a cow every day, you can donate something to small creatures like ants. This will increase your merit and lifespan. Also, start performing the Agnihotra Yagya. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L193: 2026 में वैश्विक संकट और प्राकृतिक आपदाएँ | India Pakistan War | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am an IT engineer and I am always under stress in my private job. If there is any way to get rid of this stress, please tell me.
Answer: For this, you should perform Trikal Sandhya and read the Dashavatara Stotra before sleeping. Your stress will go away. And think about one more thing: when you surrender to God, what worries do you have? Surrender everything to the one who sent you. 'Lord, you are everything, I should not take any worry.' Just keep performing your duties without expecting results. Those who expect results get worry and tension. Perform your duties without attachment to the fruits, read the Dashavatara Stotra before sleeping, and perform Trikal Sandhya on time. With time, you will say that the world is an illusion, one just has to perform their duties and remain in the refuge of God. This is the truth, and all your worries will vanish from your mind.

Video Title: L193: 2026 में वैश्विक संकट और प्राकृतिक आपदाएँ | India Pakistan War | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: You repeatedly say that Tri-Sandhya should be performed according to the rules. So, how do we perform Tri-Sandhya according to the rules?
Answer: The rule means that before sunrise, during the time from Brahma Muhurta to sunrise, you should perform a mental bath in the Ganges or take a physical, purifying bath, and then clearly recite all the mantras of the Trikal Sandhya. Second, for the midday Sandhya, you should perform a mental bath in the Ganges; a physical bath is not necessary at that time. Wherever you are—at your job, in the office, in your business, on the road, driving a car—you should recite it mentally. The midday Sandhya should be done according to the time, between 11 AM and 12:30 or 1 PM. And the third Sandhya, which is before sunset, wherever you are, perform a mental bath in the Ganges and do the Sandhya on time. If possible, keep a small bowl, get some water, and offer it to the Sun God and your ancestors. You will feel great joy. Follow it according to these rules.

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: How will human civilization be saved in today's world? And what should humans do at this time?
Answer: We are currently in a time of epochal change, a sign that is being felt by everyone from scientists to spiritualists worldwide. The establishment of dharma (righteousness) doesn't happen in a day; it's a gradual process that starts small and transforms the entire environment. In today's world, people lack knowledge of dharma and scriptures. This period is marked by small signs of the coming change, like shifts in nature's five elements and the geopolitical situations leading to war. Humanity itself is responsible for this state. We have polluted the elements of water, earth, air, space, and fire, angering their presiding deities. We have disrespected Mother Earth with geographical changes and explosions. We have not followed the sacred laws of the Vedas, which are the very basis of creation. All of this has led to a grave situation where the world is heading towards a great catastrophe, and the protection of human civilization is necessary.

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: So, what should we do at this time?
Answer: The small problems we are seeing now will escalate into major issues in the future. We cannot stop or change this course because it is the consequence of humanity's long-accumulated sins. The modern civilization that man built with science is now being destroyed by man himself. We have polluted the five elements: the water element, angering the water gods; the earth element, by digging it up, changing its geography, and conducting explosions; the air element; and even the space element with our negative thoughts. Humanity has misused its dominion over God's natural creation.

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: If there is an atomic war, who will protect the Earth?
Answer: When Ashwatthama used the Brahmastra, a weapon like a nuclear bomb, Lord Vedavyasa saved the Earth. But in this age, science has no way to protect us from an atomic war. Everyone possesses this power and will use it, but we have no means of escape from its consequences. Therefore, our only protector is the primal Lord Vishnu, our supreme father, the creator of the universe, the gods, and all of us.

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Lord Thakur ji is thinking, how can human civilization be saved? How will it happen?
Answer: Because of this concern, Lord Vedavyasa, knowing that human civilization would need to be saved at the end of Kali Yuga, composed the Bhavishya Shastra (scriptures of the future) and the Kalki Purana. To elaborate and simplify these teachings for humanity, under the direction of Lord Jagannath and Lord Chaitanya, the scripture known as Bhavishya Malika Purana was composed in Odisha by the five divine friends (Panchasakha). It is a compilation of countless texts, translated into all world languages so that all of humanity can understand the times and find the path to salvation. This scripture is like a life-saving nectar for civilization.

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Some people with wavering minds think, 'Why isn't the great change happening? These are just small issues. When will it happen? We don't know.'
Answer: The establishment of dharma is a gradual process, like the lighting and extinguishing of a lamp. God gives repeated signs over a period of time. This is a very precious time for salvation. The path to salvation is written, what is going to happen is written, and how a peaceful civilization will be built is also written. It will be a world where humans love each other, where everyone sees the one in all and all in one, and there is no discrimination based on religion.

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is the meaning of 'Kalki Swarup Durtan Marg Sthapati Hari'?
Answer: It means that just as Vedavyasa came in the Dvapara Yuga, Maha Vishnu will come as Kalki at the end of the Kali Yuga. He will transform many great demons, sinners, and evil-doers through his pure dharma. This is clear proof that even great sinners who have done wrong deeds will be seen transforming through Lord Kalki's teachings and will become worthy of entering the Satya Yuga (the Age of Truth).

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: But for those who will agree to follow the path, what is it that they must agree to?
Answer: They must understand the Lord's divine state and accept His supreme power in their hearts with complete surrender and humility. Pride, arrogance, and deceit will not work. Harming other living beings, or destroying any part of creation, whether animate or inanimate, will not be accepted by the Lord.

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Why is this principle called 'Brahma Tattva' (The Absolute Principle)?
Answer: It is called Brahma Tattva because the Trikal Sandhya (three-times-a-day prayer) involves the worship of Lord Vishnu. It also includes verses for Prakriti Swarupini Yogamaya Radha Rani, the primordial mother. This Brahma Tattva is exclusively about worshipping, singing praises (bhajan), and chanting the name (japa) of Lord Vishnu. It includes the ten main avatars of Maha Vishnu, his 16 names, and his original name, Madhava, which is the secret tradition of Lord Jagannath.

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: But some people will say, 'I can't do it on time,' or 'I can't read the Bhagavat,' or 'I did it once today but might not do it twice tomorrow.' What about them?
Answer: For this very reason, we have not imposed strict rules of purity or conduct. You can chant the mantra while walking, driving, sitting in the office, or wherever you are. You can do it while working. I have removed all the rules for this reason, so that humans can first just chant the name and let the mantra become perfected (siddha). Only then will they become righteous, follow the Vedas, and become worthy of entering the Satya Yuga of Lord Vishnu.

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: So, what should you all do at this time?
Answer: My advice is to practice Trikal Sandhya. There are three specific times: Brahma Muhurta (early morning), midday (11:30 AM to 12:30 PM), and the period around sunset (half an hour before and after). If you do this at these three times, you will receive the grace of Lord Vishnu. When you have Lord Vishnu's grace, all other deities, the nine planets, and even destructive forces will see you as a devotee of Vishnu and spare you, just as junior officers respect someone favored by a high-ranking official.

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Leaving family and employment, where will people find the time to perform penance (tapasya)?
Answer: There is no time for traditional penance, as everyone is a householder with worldly duties. That is why I have converted the pillar of 'Tapa' (penance) into 'Satya, Shaucha, Daya, Daan' (Truth, Purity, Compassion, Charity). 'Shaucha' means purity of mind, free from lust and desire. 'Daya' means compassion for all living beings and all of creation. 'Kshama' (forgiveness) is also important; we should forgive those who make mistakes instead of holding onto anger, which is a sign of arrogance. And 'Daan' (charity) can be anything, big or small, according to one's capacity, even offering a little grass to a cow.

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: If we don't get the three years to practice, how will the mantra be perfected (mantra siddhi)? And if it is not perfected, how will our life and family be successful?
Answer: This is precisely why I am appealing to those who seek salvation and want to take this life into the Satya Yuga. It is my request that you perform the Trikal Sandhya at the correct times with complete and clear mantra recitation. Even if you are in a hurry, the pronunciation of the mantra must be clear and complete. You can read it from a paper or listen to a recording if you are illiterate. Also, practice the four pillars of dharma: Satya (truth), Shaucha (purity), Daya (compassion), and Daan (charity). By doing this, you will become worthy of the Satya Yuga and will be protected from the great destruction to come.

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra

Video Title: L194: आज के समय में मनुष्य को क्या करना चाहिए ? | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Father, please tell us how to increase our 'dharma bal' (strength of righteousness).
Answer: To increase dharma in Kali Yuga, charity (daan) is the foundation. Charity can be small or large. As I said, even bringing some grass from a field and giving it to a cow is charity. Giving small amounts of food, or even 10-50 rupees, is charity. Dharma increases by helping others. Who are others? All living beings. If we give jaggery to ants, our dharma will increase. A small piece of jaggery or sugar costs very little but increases merit. Dharma increases when we help others. Chanting God's name and performing Trikal Sandhya purifies the body and mind, allowing God to reside in our heart and bless us. So both are necessary: bhajan, kirtan, Trikal Sandhya, and small acts of charity. Speak the truth, bow to your parents, serve the cow, help others, and do small charities. This will increase your dharma.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What proof is there?

We have seen a kite bird sitting on the Neel Chakra (Blue Wheel) at Madhya Vaikuntha. Lord Adi Vishnu Sanatana Mahaprabhu, who is the universe, who resides in the Nilachal region in the form of Maha Vishnu with the Chaturdha Vigraha (four-fold divine form), in that region, a kite bird sitting on the Neel Chakra of the Lord's main temple is a big sign.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
