Answer: The meaning of this sign is an inauspicious bird going and sitting on Vaikuntha. The Lord's wheel of time (Kalachakra) and the wheel of salvation (Uddharkari Chakra) are both fierce and gentle. The Neel Chakra is fierce as well as gentle; it is gentle for the devotees and a destructive wheel of time for sinners. So, this kite bird brings a big sign not just for India or Odisha, but for the entire universe. It is proof of a unique time.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is that unique time?
Answer: That unique time is related to the current world situation. In human civilization, devotees are in deep thought. There are many devotees of God in India and across the world. But the devotees are thinking, 'Something is truly about to happen.' Yes.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is that uniqueness?
Answer: That uniqueness is one thing: it is a sign of a change of time in the entire world. This involves two types of time. One is the salvation of all the devotees in the world. The sitting of the kite bird is an auspicious message, and the second is a message of change. The first message is the unification of all devotees worldwide. The time is coming for the flag of Sanatana Dharma to be unfurled across the world. Devotees from all four yugas (ages) will unite. Those people, those humans, regardless of their religion or creed, who practice truth, peace, compassion, forgiveness, and friendship; who are compassionate towards living beings and perform truthful deeds, based on sattvic (pure) qualities, those humans will be protected.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is the second sign?
Answer: The second sign is for those who have not given up sin and continue to commit sins. The first sin is when a person has no compassion for living beings. Those who kill and consume mother cow and other living beings, for them the element of sin comes. People who do wrong against others—be it in the world of nature, spirits, humans, or animals—those who are engrossed in such acts, are being given a sign from one side to change. On the other hand, for those humans who work against others and commit sins, who think ill of others—be it living beings, humans, any country, or any community—for them, a destructive time is coming.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is sin?
Answer: The first sin is when a person has no compassion for living beings. Those who kill and consume mother cow and other living beings, for them the element of sin comes. Also, people who do wrong against others—be it in the world of nature, spirits, humans, or animals—those who are engrossed in such acts.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: So, what will he (Lord Kalki) do?
Answer: In this shloka, it is written based on the same principle as the kite bird sitting. The idea is, as I mentioned, two types of change: one is a spiritual change, and the second is a change for people engrossed in sin. For those engrossed in sin, a time of great consequence is coming. Here, truth will not be with anyone because all the power of Kali Yuga is now in the hands of Lord Kalki. No matter how much any country or any person thinks, 'I have money, property, I have power. I can do anything,' they should forget this. From 2026, you should abandon this mindset because all ideologies have gone into the hands of God. Those humans who misuse this will also be destroyed.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is written?
Answer: It is written, 'Kalki Swaroopa Durat Marga Sthapayate Hari.' Lord Kalki will certainly grant salvation to the sattvic (pure) people; there is no doubt about it. But even those who do mlechha (impure) deeds, who commit sins, who misuse their ego, grandeur, and power—they too will be guided. The one stream of guidance is the Bhavishya Malika Purana, and in it is the complete divine element, which we call Trikal (the three times).

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is Dharma (righteous duty)?
Answer: Small donations, service to mother cow, observing Trikal Sandhya (prayers at three junctures of the day), sattvic (pure) food, sattvic conduct, and adopting a sattvic mindset.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: It has been 10 months since I started this Sandhya practice and joined this family. Please guide me. My respectful salutations to you.
Answer: Look, a person should do their own karma (actions). We do our karma. If our actions have purity and a message of social welfare, we should not discriminate whether someone accepts it or not. But the fact is, the time will come when people will adopt it. They will have no other way. That is why in the month of Vaishakh, we are organizing a workshop in Delhi to teach Agnihotra Yagya to 3000 people, with a collective Havan program. Not everyone will agree, and not everyone will understand. When the sun shines, its light falls on everyone, but not everyone offers Arghya (libation) to the sun god. But some pure souls do, and because of them, the sun's grace descends upon the earth. Therefore, remain steady like a tree and perform your duties like a Karma Yogi; that is our most important task. A tree doesn't say anything to anyone, but by remaining still, it gives the most. A Karma Yogi attains the ultimate goal. Both are acceptable to us. Whether someone accepts it, criticizes it, says good or bad, it doesn't affect them. And God collects every particle, every inch of our karma and puts it in our lap. Jai.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I perform Trisandhya. Does this protect my family, or do I earn merit (punya)?
Answer: Look, the person who performs Trikal Sandhya receives the direct fruits of it. And in the house where Trikal Sandhya is performed, the path to liberation for the ancestors is opened by its grace. And if we perform Trikal Sandhya and someone else hears it, over time they will also receive some of its benefits. Therefore, those who perform Trikal Sandhya will receive the full benefits. Those who listen or come in contact with it will get some benefits, but they will not attain the full merit. To go to Satya Yuga (the Age of Truth), everyone must perform Trikal Sandhya. The one who does it will go.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: If I perform Trisandhya twice instead of three times, will that be acceptable?
Answer: The idea is, 'I do it two times.' If we eat two meals and skip one, it doesn't work. Similarly, Trikal is an immortal element. By chanting it repeatedly, our heart's knot is purified and we receive divine grace. This grace is fully obtained by doing it three times. Doing it twice will give some benefit, but it is most important to observe Trikal Sandhya three times. The times I have given are Brahma Muhurta, midday at 12, and evening Sandhya half an hour before and after sunset. At these times, the deities perform Trikal Sandhya. You should also perform it at that time. You will become immortal like the gods. You will become worthy of receiving meritorious fruits like the gods.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: In chanting names, which name is better? Madhav Madhav, Radhe Radhe, or Hare Krishna Hare Rama?
Answer: Therefore, the greatest and most sacred name is the name 'Madhav'. 'Ma' is the form of Brahma, the primordial nature, famous as Narayani, the eternal illusion of Vishnu, the form of Mahalakshmi, the mother of Vedas Gayatri, Radha, and Vasundhara. Her husband is Madhav. Madhav is the husband of Radha Rani and is Lord Satchidananda, Maha Vishnu himself. Therefore, by chanting the name Madhav, Radha Rani's name is also chanted, and Lord Krishna Maha Vishnu's name is also included. The name Madhav brings welfare and salvation to the world, and any human who chants the name Madhav will go to Satya Yuga. This is written categorically. It is essential to follow this.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: My question is, I have been associated for the last three years, but I haven't been able to perform Trikal Sandhya yet due to some reason. Until when will it be considered appropriate to start Trikal Sandhya? If I start it now, will it be okay?
Answer: If you haven't been able to do it, start now. Start from today. If you don't perform Trikal Sandhya, you will not go to Satya Yuga. I say this clearly because this is neither my religion nor my ideology. It is the divine element (Brahma Tattva). It is the meritorious essence of all eighteen Puranas. It is difficult for those who do not perform Trikal Sandhya to go to the Age of Truth. So, start Trikal Sandhya from today, from Brahma Muhurta. Perform it on time. Control your mind and senses, and rein in the wrong thoughts that arise in your mind. By controlling your mind, increase your devotion to God. There is no greater meditation, penance, worship, or remedy in the world than Trikal Sandhya. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Baba, I was cured of a major illness, paralysis, through Trisandhya. For this, my salutations to you and many thanks for this stream. I had taken a vow that after getting well, I would offer Arghya to the sun and eat according to the rules. I did this for some time, but now I am unable to do it regularly. What should I do? Even after trying, I can't do it properly.
Answer: Look, it's okay. The lack of control over the mind and senses repeatedly becomes an obstacle for a person in performing righteous duties. But don't worry. Do one thing: before sleeping, chant the name 'Madhav' 108 times and say, 'Madhav, please bless me so I can perform the Vedic, spiritual, and divine duties that I was doing.' Then, slowly, it will get better. Chant the name Madhav 108 times every day before sleeping. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L195: JAGANNATH मंदिर से मिला और एक नया संकेत! | Bhavishya Malika | Pandit Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: My wife's family has influenced her and separated her from me. Her family has demonic tendencies and are non-vegetarians. Please guide me. How will my family be fixed, or how can I walk on the right path?
Answer: Jai Jagannath. First, I'll tell you, if you want to fix your family, you must first perform Trikal Sandhya. Second, every day before sleeping, chant the name 'Madhav' 108 times. Say, 'Lord, please return my family to me.' No one is a demon, and no one is a saint. Karma and time make a person what they are. Even if someone is a meat-eater, we can condemn their actions, but we should not condemn them. The scriptures say not to condemn any person. We can condemn the wrong actions done by a person, but not the person themselves. Every human is a child of God. Therefore, your in-laws are also good. The point is, if you want to get your family back, chant the name Madhav 108 times for six months. Do it at night before sleeping. Perform Trikal Sandhya at the proper times. After that, see what results you get, and then contact me or contact this number. Okay?

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is this current time bringing for human society?
Answer: This should be the biggest consideration. When the entire world is facing such huge problems and such major wars, human civilization must reflect on this. It doesn't matter what religion, creed, or tradition one follows, but no one is thinking about it. Everyone thinks it has nothing to do with them. But the fact is, once a war starts, it doesn't stop. And a blazing fire, like a destructive inferno, burns down large forests and vast areas. This war is an element just like that.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What will be the reaction and future of the war happening in the Middle East?
Answer: We need to think about this. The biggest issue is the protection of human civilization; that is the greatest question. If human civilization is not protected, if humans are not protected in this world, then how will the Earth be protected? Therefore, this time is very valuable.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: If humans are not protected, how will the Earth be protected?
Answer: This is why this time is so precious. Everyone is at home, eating, drinking, and sleeping in comfort. But in the aggression and war that is happening, so many people are dying. So many innocent lives are lost, regardless of their religion or creed. It doesn't matter. But human civilization suffers immense loss.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What fault did the little children commit?
Answer: Yet, even after seeing this, our mindset doesn't change at all. We just sit idly. This is why the scripture of Bhavishya Malika was written. It is clearly written in it that when a great war happens in the Middle East, at Mecca and Medina, then the sea will submerge the region of Jagannath.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is this sign, written in advance, of a war in one religious land and a deluge in another?
Answer: We are moving towards that time. Therefore, as the Earth moves towards this Third World War, the entire world will suffer losses. Whether it's the most powerful country or the smallest country, everyone will suffer in this. It's not that a powerful country will be saved while others will not.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: How can human civilization be protected? How will it survive?
Answer: The most important thing is to contemplate this. 600 years ago, across the four yugas, a scripture was composed in the Jagannath region, which is called the Bhavishya Malika. For about 40 years now, it has been propagated in the Hindi language and also in foreign countries. This is because it is a time of change and a time of grave danger for human civilization.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: When human civilization is at the peak of progress and development, why is there destruction?
Answer: Because, while we have achieved everything, who will bear the consequences of the unrighteous acts (adharma) we have committed? Lord Vishnu is not worshipped. Lord Vishnu is not revered. It is written in the Mahabharata that when the age (yuga) ends, Lord Vishnu will not be worshipped. Other gods and goddesses will be worshipped, but due to the lack of worship of the primordial, eternal Lord Vishnu, humans will go astray and their actions will become corrupt. The fruit of the actions we have committed is now coming towards us.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What does dharma (righteousness) say?
Answer: First, become a vegetarian yourself. Do not kill living beings. If you kill any living being, you have to suffer the curse that comes from it. It is written in the scriptures that due to cow slaughter, the age of Kali Yuga was reduced by 100,000 years.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Who will suffer for the sin of mistreating cows?
Answer: Who is suffering? Don't ever think that a war is happening in the Middle East and it has nothing to do with us. The sorrow that people experience there is the same sorrow that is going to come to our country as well. We will find protection from it through dharma, and nothing else.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Is it not a sin to leave the parents who gave us birth in old-age homes?
Answer: Yes, although not everyone has done it. You who are listening may not have done it, but such sins happen in society, don't they? The consequences of this sin will have to be faced. Therefore, we must learn the biggest lesson. What is happening abroad today, people are wandering hungry and thirsty not for a day, but for 15-15 days. They don't have water to drink.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What lesson should we learn from the suffering of people in war-torn areas?
Answer: From this, we should learn the biggest lesson. We must change our actions (karma). If we don't change our actions, our situation will also become the same in the future. Because this is a time of change for the whole world, not just for the Middle East, not for Europe, not for the Asian continent. It is a time of epochal change for the entire world.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What will be gained from fighting amongst ourselves?
Answer: It will be difficult for human civilization to survive. At this time, instead of going here and there, we must protect dharma and pray for the welfare of all. And the war that is going on in the Middle East may continue for more than a month. But there will be some solution in which the war will also stop, and after that, the time will come for this war to happen between Pakistan, India, and China.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is this great grace of God you speak of?
Answer: The war that was supposed to happen between India and Pakistan, for which many countries were going to use their power against India—those countries are now destroying their own power for their own protection. By God's grace, their power is diminishing. They will not be able to fight against India with their full strength. God is continuously reducing their power.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: But what will be the result of the Third World War?
Answer: This is also written in the scriptures. The result of the Third World War will be the establishment of Sanatana Dharma throughout the world. No country will remain a superpower. This will be its outcome. The countries that think they can conquer the world with their power and destroy India's economy, fight with India, and achieve victory over India... look, in all four yugas, no one has been able to conquer India. India has always been an unconquerable territory. So, the result of the Third World War will be that Sanatana Dharma will be established all over the world. Small states will be formed all over the world, and India will be the main country. After the Third World War, India will become Akhand Bharat (undivided India), in which all regions of the Asian continent will become part of India.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What will be gained by getting trapped in 'I' and 'mine'?
Answer: Therefore, everyone should worship Lord Vishnu. Follow the Trikal Sandhya. Chant the name of Madhav and read the Bhagavata so that you can protect your own life and your family. Because the path to protection is also written, and the timeline is also written.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Are we not getting a sign from the drop of blood in the Jagannath temple?
Answer: Yes, we are. Be less happy, joke less. Don't laugh too much. The time of doom (Kaal) is coming. What is the need to laugh? I go on the road, in a car, and people laugh so much while talking. Nowadays, children and even senior people do. What is the need for this laughter when the Earth is heading towards destruction?

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is the need for this laughter?
Answer: When the Earth is heading towards destruction, the greatest tradition is to speak as little as possible and stay in the refuge of God as much as possible. At this time, do not laugh and joke. Do not kill living beings. Do not consume alcohol and meat. Do not eat eggs. Do not covet what belongs to others. Do not lie. If you have the ability, help others.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: If you don't follow the scriptural rules, how will you find welfare?
Answer: Therefore, you should perform Trikal Sandhya, chant the name of Madhav, read the Bhagavata, donate the Bhagavata, serve mother cow, worship Tulsi Devi, and follow the fundamental traditions of Sanatana Dharma for the welfare of human civilization. In this, we will find our protection. And in 2034, Satyayuga will arrive; this will not change either. In the meantime, human civilization will face 64 types of diseases, and the great Third World War will begin, leading to a major transformation of human civilization. Time is not in our hands. At this time, hold on to dharma and do good deeds.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Jai Jagannath, Pandit ji. In your first Bhavishya Malika, you were the first person to write that whenever a mishap occurs in the Jagannath temple, the same will be reflected throughout the world. We saw signs before Corona, and then Corona came. Similarly, on the 8th, bloodstains were seen; on the 7th, an inauspicious bird; on March 5th, a vulture; on March 4th, a fight among priests. So many incidents have occurred in just one month. Someone has asked, does this mean a very big sign is appearing from this year itself?
Answer: Absolutely, from this very year. Look, the Earth is moving towards a world war, and a large number of human lives will be lost, and wealth and life will be destroyed. This is a sign from the Jagannath temple for the entire world. So, the sign that is being received from the Jagannath temple indicates that the Earth will definitely move towards a Third World War, and there will be a very terrible situation. And in the future, more signs will also be received from the Jagannath temple. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: A mother has asked, 'Jai Shri Madhav. A person who cries has not transcended Maya (illusion). Does this mean that crying for the Lord also falls under Maya? It happens with us. When we cry, we can't stop crying while taking the Lord's name. We only stop crying when we remember Maya.'
Answer: Look, one who cries in devotion to God is the most blessed, and those are called tears of joy (anand ashru). The person who sheds such tears also receives God's grace. Because one doesn't cry for God; one laughs. That crying is called bliss. But those who cry because of Maya—for their property, their family, their ego, their anger, when they don't get recognition—they cry, sit, and get angry. Such people attain hell. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Jai Jagannath. Avadhesh Thakur ji has asked, 'Jai Shri Madhav, Pandit ji. How and when will people of other religions follow the Trikal Sandhya of our Sanatana Dharma and be able to take refuge in God?'
Answer: Look, before 2032, after 2028, there will be a major, radical change in the world. People from many world religious traditions will adopt the Trikal Sandhya of Sanatana Dharma. They will read the Bhagavata. They will adopt the Sanatana tradition. Because at that time, when diseases come, there will be no cure or protection. Great calamities will come, and there will be no remedy or protection from them. Then, out of fear or for protection, people will adopt the traditions of Sanatana Dharma. By 2034, the whole world will be on the path to becoming Sanatana. This is our thought. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Jai Jagannath, Pandit ji. Jyoti Kushwaha asks, 'Jai Shri Madhav, Father. My question is that my spiritual emotion fluctuates a lot on the path of devotion. I believe the Malika to be true and have surrendered myself to the Lord. However, sometimes I feel a lot of emotion and become very restless for the Lord, but at other times, I feel numb.'
Answer: Look, when someone first drives a car, the car swerves here and there. Similarly, until a person's inner self is completely pure, the mind wanders. Sometimes devotion comes, and at other times, worldly and social elements come, and one forgets God. By reading the Bhagavata with full devotion and proper rituals for a long time, this fluctuation in the mind—sometimes feeling devotional, sometimes not—will be resolved. By reading the Bhagavata scripture and performing Trikal Sandhya at the right time, a person can become a single-minded devotee and will be able to remain in God's refuge with complete devotion. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Jai Jagannath, Pandit ji. Someone who was supposed to go to Saudi Arabia today called. He was asking if this is the right time to go to Saudi Arabia for a year, if possible. His financial condition is a bit poor, so he is thinking, 'Can we go there for a year?'
Answer: Look, one has to work, but at this very time when a war is going on, and that war will continue for another month to 45 days, going at this time is problematic. God can provide employment anywhere. So it's better to wait. Right now, there are no arrangements for flights. So it is better to postpone this for now. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Jai Jagannath. Pandit ji, a mother has a question: What about the small children whose family members are not on this spiritual path? They are small children, and no one is telling them about Trikal Sandhya. So how will they be saved/liberated?
Answer: Look, all beings have come according to their own karma. It is the responsibility of the parents to teach and recite the Trikal Sandhya to their children. If the parents do not take care of their children, they are small, what can they do? Therefore, for the children who cannot read, the very young children, my request to the parents is that they should follow the Trikal Sandhya and also make their children listen to it. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L196: वर्तमान युद्ध से मानवता को क्या सीखना चाहिए? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Jai Shri Madhav, Pandit ji. Please give me your blessings. I have an exam tomorrow.
Answer: Okay. Chant the name of Madhav. The exam will go well. Jai Jagannath. The exam will go well. Go after chanting the name of Madhav, it will be fine. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: How can human civilization be protected?
Answer: This is the biggest question today. The speaker explains that the world is in turmoil, nature's course has changed, there is conflict everywhere, and planetary movements are causing instability. No human is safe. For the welfare of all humanity, he advises everyone to follow the Trikal Sandhya (prayers at the three junctures of the day), read one chapter of the Bhagavat daily, and feed the first roti (flatbread) of the house to a mother cow. He emphasizes that austerity, compassion, and charity are the greatest purities and are of utmost importance.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: And when diseases come, how will we be protected?
Answer: This is the reason we propagate the scriptures. A time will come when medicine will fail and will not work. The only way to be protected is through the tradition of performing Sandhya three times a day. It is written in the scriptures that those who perform Trikal Sandhya have the sins of their countless births burned away, they become free from all sins, their lifespan increases, and illnesses are removed by God's grace.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: So, what is the path to humanity's protection?
Answer: The one and only tradition is performing Sandhya at three times. During times of great calamities like floods, fires, earthquakes, celestial disasters, pandemics, and major world wars, Trikal Sandhya will protect you. That is why everyone is requested to follow Trikal Sandhya every day.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: How will people pass on to the Satya Yuga (Age of Truth)?
Answer: Its one and only tradition is performing Sandhya at three times. We have dedicated that book for the welfare of humanity. It is written in the scriptures that those who perform Trikal Sandhya have the sins of their countless births burned away, and they become free from all sins.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is Dharma (righteousness)?
Answer: Dharma is truth, purity, compassion, and charity. Those who serve living beings, mother cows, and the poor and distressed, that is Dharma.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: If someone in the house or family passes away, can we perform Trikal Sandhya at that time? And during that period, is it necessary to give up garlic and onion?
Answer: Absolutely. When a family member dies, or someone in your bloodline passes away, we should stay away from onion and garlic. During that time, oil is also not consumed, so that has to be followed. You can eat food cooked in ghee. Secondly, if someone has died in the house, Trikal Sandhya is a path of devotion and chanting. You cannot go to the temple, but you can sit somewhere and mentally chant the mantra. This is because for 10 days, the soul of the deceased wanders around your house, and the essence of Trikal Sandhya helps the ancestors attain liberation. Therefore, you cannot perform Trikal Sandhya ritually in a temple, but you can sit somewhere and sing it, chant it, or recite it. When someone dies in the house, worship is not performed in the temple, we cannot go to the home's prayer room or read the Bhagavat, but we can chant mantras and names elsewhere. This gives salvation to the departed soul, and they also receive blessings. So, this should be done.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: The situation here in Qatar is a bit bad right now. So, what should we do at such a time? And I have one more question: should one observe the Ekadashi fast during Adhimas or Malmas (intercalary month)?
Answer: Look, whether it's Malmas or any other month, Ekadashi is never stopped. Those who are physically healthy and fit should observe the Ekadashi fast. That's the first thing. Secondly, the situation in Qatar or the Middle East countries will continue for a few more days and then it will stop. Therefore, at this time, you should perform Trikal Sandhya and chant the name of Madhav. Surrender yourself to Madhav, to Kalki, so that Lord Kalki can protect you. The name Madhav can protect you. Trikal Sandhya can become a protective shield for you against major disasters. Just do this and eat vegetarian food. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, when there is no food, how will we stay alive?
Answer: Look, such a time has not come yet. That time is far away. We have read in the scriptures, and even now in the Himalayas, there are saints who have not eaten for 10,000 or 15,000 years. They have survived by chanting mantras, which prevents their bodies from feeling hunger. So, when there is no food, people will be able to survive for a year or two by chanting the name of Lord Madhav and performing Trikal Sandhya. Dharma will save you, the mantra will save you, Madhav will save you. So, that time is not now. Don't worry about it. But from now on, follow the Trikal Sandhya. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I have just started Tri-sandhya, but your guidance says that the Lord will protect those who have been doing it for more than three years. So, will I be protected or not?
Answer: Absolutely. I want everyone to have God's grace and blessings. But perform Trikal Sandhya at the right time. Along with Trikal Sandhya, you must read one chapter of the Bhagavat anytime between 3:45 AM and 12:00 AM the next night. And follow all the rules of Trikal Sandhya. I am not talking about bathing. Wherever you are—at work, traveling, anywhere—just chant the mantra with devotion. You will be protected by it. Even if it hasn't been three years, if you do it at the right time, God will be gracious. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am 15 years old. Everyone in my family is non-vegetarian, but I am a vegetarian. I secretly perform Tri-sandhya and have been doing it for a month. I have also memorized it. But my family doesn't support me. Will Madhav protect me?
Answer: Absolutely. Bow to your father and mother and be devoted to them. Perform Trikal Sandhya according to the time. Focus on your studies and do not slack in them. Madhav's grace will definitely be with you, and Madhav will also deliver you. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: For the coming time of cataclysm, should we start eating less food from now on, or should we continue to eat normally as we do?
Answer: No, no. I say, at this time, eat as much good food as you want. In the future, after three or four years, the situation will change drastically. So, for now, eat whatever good food you feel like. This doesn't mean eat well every day; it should also be digestible. So eat good food now, as you won't get it later. There is no problem. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: When there is darkness for seven days and seven nights, will God take the devotees to a secret place to save their lives, or can people save their lives by staying at home?
Answer: Look, for this, according to our Bhavishya Malika, 16 Mandals (zones/groups) have been formed. For the devotees of these 16 Mandals to live, they will come together to form groups or organizations and live together. My view is that you should stay in contact with the Mandal of the region or state you are in. So that when such a disaster comes, some arrangements will definitely be made by the Lord beforehand, and the devotees will also make arrangements to live together. Jai.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: The people in my house have been doing Tri-sandhya for a year, but they are not feeling any devotion for the Lord in their hearts. Why is this happening? Please explain.
Answer: Look, a temple is not built in a day. A structure cannot be made to stand in a day. The path of Dharma is also very difficult. They have performed Trikal Sandhya for one year. The karma from their past lives is being cut away, and when it is completely gone, then feelings, devotion, and surrender will all come. The most important thing is that they are performing Trikal Sandhya. They will definitely receive God's grace. But do it at the right time. Even if there is no feeling or devotion, chant the mantra on time. You will receive God's blessings through that mantra chanting itself. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am a student. I don't get much time, so I do Tri-sandhya every day. I listen to the audio of the Bhagavat Mahapuran three times. Is this correct?
Answer: Yes, it's absolutely correct. But listening to the audio of the Bhagavat Mahapuran systematically from the first canto to the twelfth canto will suffice. And do the Sandhya as well; it only takes five to seven minutes. Pay full attention to your studies. Bow to your father and mother every day. This is my instruction for you. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I have migraines, and due to the migraine, whenever I observe any fast, the pain increases a lot. So, can I observe the Ekadashi fast?
Answer: Look, those who have any physical ailment, pain, or minor diseases, it is better for them not to observe the Ekadashi fast. You can definitely attain God and take your life towards the ultimate goal by performing Trikal Sandhya, even without observing Ekadashi. There is no doubt. If your body suffers from such pain, then you should not do it at that time, meaning it would be better not to observe the Ekadashi fast. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Can we perform the morning Trikal Sandhya without bathing?
Answer: Absolutely. I have made this Trikal Sandhya very simple for all people. After leaving your bed, you can mentally bathe in the Ganga by chanting the name of Mother Shri Ganga three times and touching your head and ears. You can sit and chant the mantra without bathing and you will get the full benefit. Even while traveling or at school or college, you can take a five or six-minute break and do it. You will get the full benefit from that as well. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: We want to ask you that sometimes we miss our morning Tri-sandhya. We don't do it intentionally, it just happens sometimes. You had said that one attains siddhi (spiritual accomplishment) by performing Tri-sandhya for three years.
Answer: Absolutely, that is correct. Try to do it at the right time. If not, pray to Lord Madhav, 'O Lord, give me the strength to perform Trikal Sandhya at the right time.'

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I had heard about Tri-sandhya three or four years ago but started in 2026. While doing it, in 2025 I had to go to Gurgaon for a job. Then at the end of November 2025, my practice stopped because of a heavy workload at the office. Now, I suddenly feel like starting it again. So, if I start it again now, can I do so?
Answer: You can absolutely do it. Look, just as a person eats food and works a job for their life and family, Trikal Sandhya is a priceless element for our body. Through Trikal Sandhya, all of a person's impurities are removed. In the coming times, Trikal Sandhya will become humanity's greatest, priceless asset. Therefore, it is necessary for everyone. If we don't do Trikal Sandhya, how will we reach Satya Yuga? If we don't follow the principles of Satya Yuga from now, the age will change, but if we don't change, we won't be able to go. Therefore, do Trikal Sandhya for your life's protection and also do your job. It only takes 15 minutes in total, five minutes each time. Do it. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Should we give up milk? Because in Kali Yuga, cows are given injections and are pained to extract more milk from them.
Answer: Look, our scriptures do not say to give up milk. In our Sanatana tradition, the mother cow is considered a mother. Yes, nowadays such manipulation happens, which should not. But what can be done? If vegetarians don't drink milk, it will be difficult to survive. Some people's bodies are weak, and it is necessary for them. So, in my opinion, we cannot stop drinking it. But pray to God that this doesn't happen; a big change will come in the future. The mother cow is our mother. Drinking milk is not a bad thing; it's a good thing. You can drink milk. Those who do these things to cows, God will definitely punish them according to their karma. This is the time of Jagannath. In the future, mother cows will be greatly protected. Today, humans are killing cows and other animals, and they will suffer the consequences. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I wake up at 5:00 AM and offer water to the Sun God. But at that time, the moon is visible instead of the Sun God. So, what should I do?
Answer: Look, you should offer Arghya (water offering) to the Sun God half an hour before sunrise. Even if the Sun God is not visible, a red color will appear in the sky. Therefore, you should offer Arghya at that time. Offer it half an hour before sunrise and half an hour after sunset. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L197: भविष्य मालिका से नया संकेत? | Bhavishya Malika Puran | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am the only one in my house who believes in God and performs Tri-sandhya. I want my five-year-old son to also walk this path and do Tri-sandhya. What should I do for that?
Answer: Absolutely, I also pray to God that your son adopts Trikal Sandhya. He is a small child, so if he cannot do it, then read it out to him. As a mother, it is your responsibility to have him sit nearby during the Trikal Sandhya time and tell him, 'Son, listen to this.' He will get the benefit from that as well. By listening, he will also start speaking it. Many very young children, two or three years old, also perform Trikal Sandhya. There is a girl in Maharashtra who recited the six-page Narayan Kavach in Sanskrit in front of me. So, show him that example. I will share her video. Show the example of how small children do it. Those children have become divine. And tomorrow, whatever happens, even destruction, God will protect them because they recite the Narayan Kavach. So, make your son listen and show him examples of how other small children perform Trikal Sandhya. Tell him, 'We will not die from this, our studies will improve, we will get the blessings of all our planets, we will become successful human beings, and in the next life too, we can attain God.' Thank you to all. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L198: 30 मार्च 2026 - जगन्नाथ मंदिर ध्वज पर फिर चील का बैठना - अशुभ संकेत? | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: A question from Preet from Nawada, Punjab. She says her daughter, who is less than two and a half years old, has memorized the Trisandhya in a few days. She wants to make her daughter perform it on time and sometimes scolds her for it. Is it a sin or a mistake to scold her? Should she not be scolded? Secondly, you talk about Agnihotra. How should this yajna (fire ritual) be performed?
Answer: Jai Jagannath. I bless your daughter. It is difficult for people to memorize the Trikal Sandhya even after years, whereas that holy daughter has managed to do it in a short time. This is because powerful souls are now being born on Earth who will work for the establishment and protection of dharma. If your daughter performs Trikal Sandhya, she will have the grace of Lord Vishnu. She should not be scolded for it. However, I advise that she should also do her own work, eat her food, study, perform her duties (karma), and do the Trikal Sandhya on time. In the future, it will be very difficult for human civilization to survive without the Trikal Sandhya. When diseases spread, people will sit and perform Trikal Sandhya 24 hours a day, day and night, because during times of illness, the Trikal Sandhya is the only means of protection from the Divine Mother. So, if she does it, I commend her. As for the Agnihotri yajna you wish for, we have a PDF for it, and we also conduct workshops to teach it to devotees. When our session is organized, you will be informed, and you can come and learn. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L198: 30 मार्च 2026 - जगन्नाथ मंदिर ध्वज पर फिर चील का बैठना - अशुभ संकेत? | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Priyanka Singh from Haryana asks: 'Revered Pandit ji, my family wants me to study for an LLB and wants to send me to a hostel. I don't want to go because I'm afraid that living in a hostel might cause me to miss my Trikal Sandhya, reading the Bhagavat Mahapuran, and chanting God's name. What would be the right thing to do? Please guide me.'
Answer: Look, we can perform Trikal Sandhya anywhere, be it school, college, or a hostel. And by staying in a hostel, you can also change and uplift ten other people. We should obey what our parents want. Mother is Parvati Devi, and Father is Dev Maheshwar. Our parents are worthy of worship. It is good for us to obey their words. I cannot comment further on this, so obey your parents' wishes. And there, you should also inspire your friends and classmates to follow this sacred path. We have not come for ourselves alone; we have come to uplift the world. May Lord Madhav bless you. Stay happy. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L198: 30 मार्च 2026 - जगन्नाथ मंदिर ध्वज पर फिर चील का बैठना - अशुभ संकेत? | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Rama Revri from Gujarat asks two questions. First, with which mantra should one offer water to ancestors (Pitu Jal Arpan)? Second, in March, more than 10 signs have been received from the Jagannath Dham in Puri. Is something big about to happen?
Answer: First, I will speak about Pitru Tarpan (ancestor offerings). In the morning and evening, with a pure mind, if you have time, do it after bathing. If you don't have time, then mentally chant the name of Mother Ganga three times, touch your head and ears, and keep a small vessel with you. Fill it with any water. At sunrise and sunset, face the sun towards the south. Take water in your hands and let it flow out from the side of your thumb. Offer this water three times for your ancestors and three times in the names of your family elders. This is called Pitru Tarpan, and it should be done twice a day. Regarding your second question, look, it won't happen in a single day, but big events are already happening in the countries where they are destined to occur. Disease is spreading in America. A sign at the Jagannath temple doesn't mean disaster will strike only India; it will affect the entire world. And I state this categorically: the countries with more sin, arrogance, and pride will have their pride shattered by God. Lord Kalki, Lord Jagannath, will bring ruin to those who harm others. So, big things will certainly happen in the world, but for India, it is a time of relief. People should turn to Trikal Sandhya and devotion to God. Gradually, the time will come for India as well, but other countries will face many disasters. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L198: 30 मार्च 2026 - जगन्नाथ मंदिर ध्वज पर फिर चील का बैठना - अशुभ संकेत? | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Gulshan Singh from Nepal asks: What does the future hold for Nepal? Will the youth leadership be able to lead the country in the right direction? Balendra Shah ji has become the youngest Prime Minister of Nepal at just 35. What will Nepal's future relationship with India and China be like?
Answer: Look, Nepal is a land of dharma, located in the Himalayan region, and it has always been so. There is a strong connection between Nepal and the Jagannath temple. Our tradition in Odisha, the Jagannath tradition, is also connected with Nepal. The current youth leadership will certainly try to preserve the purity and integrity of an undivided Nepal. However, I will not reveal everything, but I will say this: a time will come when the relationship between India and Nepal will change. The bond will grow stronger, similar to the marriage between Mother Janak Nandini and Lord Ram. Currently, there is chaos throughout the world due to the alignment of planets and stars. This situation is not unique to Nepal; it exists in many countries and will happen in others too. Therefore, do not focus on these things. Perform Trikal Sandhya, read the Bhagavat, and chant the name of Madhav. The entire world will change, not just Nepal. The devotees will be saved. Satyug (the Age of Truth) will arrive in 2032. So, there is little time. I do not know who will rule and who will not, but Satyug will definitely arrive. This is my belief. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L198: 30 मार्च 2026 - जगन्नाथ मंदिर ध्वज पर फिर चील का बैठना - अशुभ संकेत? | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: A mother asks: 'Jai Shri Madhav. Revered father, my salutations. I have been connected with this spiritual path for five years, but I am unable to find a good job. I face rejection wherever I apply. I am very distressed. Please guide me.'
Answer: Okay, mother. For one month, every day before you sleep, chant the name of Madhav 108 times. And pray to Lord Vishnu and Mahalakshmi for a job. Keep doing this for three months, and I believe you will get a job within that time. But you must also keep trying and making an effort. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L198: 30 मार्च 2026 - जगन्नाथ मंदिर ध्वज पर फिर चील का बैठना - अशुभ संकेत? | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Gaurav Prajapati from Madhya Pradesh asks: 'I have heard that Maya (illusion) cannot affect those who take refuge in God. Then how did Jaya and Vijaya, deluded by Maya, disrespect the Sanaka sages? Why did they fall from Vaikuntha?'
Answer: Look, no one can explain the divine play of God. If Jaya and Vijaya had not been cursed, how would the demon empire have been destroyed? They were born into a demon clan, and after their birth, they brought all the demons together, leading to their collective death and the destruction of the demon civilization. If they had not united all the demons, establishing dharma would not have been so easy for God. Divine illusion (Brahma Maya) and material illusion (Bhautik Maya)—nothing happens without God's will. The action of Jaya and Vijaya was merely to stop the sages, but the curse the sages gave was under God's control. One does not receive such a severe curse just for stopping someone. But if they did not descend to the mortal world, how would the demons be destroyed? So, to destroy all the demons, God sent his own people as demons. This establishment of dharma happens in every age. It is God's will. For those who are surrendered to God, sometimes even nectar can taste bitter. Even those who live close to God can develop arrogance and pride, thinking, 'We are with God.' A person reaps their own karma. God's law is not obstructed by this. If we are sitting with God, we must give the respect that is due to others. Humility is essential; arrogance should not be there. So, this was the karma of living beings, the karma of Jaya and Vijaya. What does God have to do with it? Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L198: 30 मार्च 2026 - जगन्नाथ मंदिर ध्वज पर फिर चील का बैठना - अशुभ संकेत? | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Supratim Goswami from Assam asks: 'Gurudev, will the state of Assam be included in the 16 Mandals (regions) or not?'
Answer: Yes, among the 16 Mandals, the Kamakhya Devi Mandal of Assam is one of them. It is included. That Mandal is currently active within the 16 Mandals and will continue to work in the future. According to the scriptures, the Assam Maa Kamakhya Devi Mandal will work towards the establishment of dharma. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L198: 30 मार्च 2026 - जगन्नाथ मंदिर ध्वज पर फिर चील का बैठना - अशुभ संकेत? | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Karishma Sharma from Jaipur asks: 'When we do Trisandhya and chant God's name, my body starts to move. I feel a pulling sensation on my third eye, my legs and waist go numb, and I can't open my eyes. What should I do?'
Answer: This is a very good sign indeed. A divine influence is present. Pray to Madhav, saying, 'Lord, please let me perform the Trikal Sandhya. If the influence becomes too strong, how will I manage?' This happens due to the influence of deities, which causes vibrations in the body. Tears flowing from the eyes, frequent yawning, and a strong sensation in some part of the body are common during Trikal Sandhya due to this divine influence. So, don't worry. Continue doing it; it is a state of bliss. If it doesn't happen, tell Madhav it's alright. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L198: 30 मार्च 2026 - जगन्नाथ मंदिर ध्वज पर फिर चील का बैठना - अशुभ संकेत? | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: This question from Virat is a common one for many people who work or study. He is a college student who can perform the Trisandhya in the early morning and evening, but misses the afternoon one because he is at school. Secondly, he cannot perform Havan (fire ritual) without his parents' permission. How can he perform both of these practices correctly?
Answer: My son, you are performing Trikal Sandhya, and for that, may God bless you. I will say this: there is no need to perform Havan right now. For those who cannot perform the midday Sandhya, I will give you a shloka. Record this shloka. If performing the full Trikal Sandhya is not possible, chant the name 'Durga Madhav' 10 times. Then chant the name 'Madhav' 108 times, which will take about a minute. And I will recite a shloka. Reciting this shloka will be equivalent to the shloka of the 10 avatars. [He recites the shloka: 'Veda dharate, jagannivate, bhugol mudbhibhrate, daityam darayate, balim chalayate, kshatrakshayam kurvate, Paulastyam jayate, halam kalayate, karunyamatanvate, mlechchhan murchhayate, dashakrutikrite Krishnaya tubhyam namah... Shri Radhika Vallabhaya namah... Shri Kalki Devaya namah.'] Just chanting this mantra, which I sang slowly, will take only one or two minutes to complete. Jai Jagannath to all.

Video Title: L198: 30 मार्च 2026 - जगन्नाथ मंदिर ध्वज पर फिर चील का बैठना - अशुभ संकेत? | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: In the books published by Gita Press, Lord Krishna, an avatar of Lord Vishnu, is described as the eighth avatar. However, many consider Lord Krishna to be Lord Vishnu Himself. Which is correct? Please guide us in detail, revered father.
Answer: Lord Krishna is Lord Vishnu. He is not the eighth avatar; He is the source of all avatars. The creation of every avatar originates from Lord Krishna. Lord Krishna is Mahavishnu. On the material plane, or according to our era (yuga), if it is written somewhere in the scriptures that He is the eighth avatar—though I have not come across such a view—that may also be true. But Lord Krishna is the original source of all avatars. He is Mahavishnu, and all avatars are created from Him and merge back into Him. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L198: 30 मार्च 2026 - जगन्नाथ मंदिर ध्वज पर फिर चील का बैठना - अशुभ संकेत? | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Rishikesh ji from Maharashtra asks: 'Revered father, how can one chant God's name continuously? After a while, my mind wanders, and I am unable to maintain continuous chanting. I get lost in my own thoughts.'
Answer: Every night before you sleep, chant the name of Madhav 108 times and say to the Lord, 'Lord, please make my mind steady. I take refuge in you.' And you will see, it will certainly happen. Jai Jagannath.

Video Title: L198: 30 मार्च 2026 - जगन्नाथ मंदिर ध्वज पर फिर चील का बैठना - अशुभ संकेत? | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: This person has not given their name. They ask: 'Revered father, I am unable to quit certain wrongdoings. I repeatedly make the same mistakes, even though I am following the spiritual path. Please guide me.'
Answer: Look, the guidance is this: at this time, everyone should perform Trikal Sandhya on time. I have been preaching for 40 years, and so far, there has been very little change. People should stop acting on their own whims now. They should perform Trikal Sandhya and read the Bhagavat. The times ahead will be a challenge for us; a time of testing will come. Before that test, prepare yourself, work for your own salvation and for the salvation of the world. Thank you, everyone. We will end today's discussion here.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: What is the path to protect humanity from nuclear destruction?
Answer: I have read all the future scriptures and the eighteen Puranas, and in them, I have seen one truth: for humanity, Trikal Sandhya (the three-times-a-day prayer/meditation) is the most significant tradition. If a third world war happens, it will not be like the previous wars. In the third world war, nuclear weapons will be used because that is what remains. To protect humanity from nuclear weapons, Trikal Sandhya is the most important element. This is because we are in the age of machines (Jantra Yug), and the effect of machines is manifested through nuclear power. However, the power of mantras (Mantra Shakti) can save human civilization from the calamity of machine power. Therefore, I repeatedly say that if this human civilization can take refuge in Lord Maha Vishnu and follow the principle of Trikal Sandhya for salvation, then no matter how great the disaster, how big the problem, or even how severe the nuclear attack, humanity can be saved through Trikal Sandhya. It is written in the scriptures that when devotees chant the Lord's name, no bullet or missile can harm them. Trikal Sandhya is that 'name' (practice).

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: You might ask, if there is a nuclear attack, can Trikal Sandhya really protect us?
Answer: In my opinion, to this day, no element has been invented for protection against nuclear weapons. Man created the atom bomb but could not create a protective formula against it. That is why the scriptures say that those who adopt this supreme and most sacred path of Lord Vishnu will be saved even from great destructions like a nuclear holocaust. Trikal Sandhya is the one supreme element that has the capability to protect humanity, and there is no mantra greater than it. We are moving towards an age of mantras (Mantra Yug), and Trikal Sandhya is the supreme mantra of that age. Therefore, I want to tell all of human civilization and all devotees to practice Trikal Sandhya every day.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: In the prophecies written in the Bhavishya Malika, what is mentioned about the modern era's fuel, petrol, and gas? Is an era of shortages or very high prices coming? And what will be its effect on the common people?
Answer: See, the most important thing is that this era of Kali Yuga is called the Jantra Yug, the age of machinery. All machines run on electricity, diesel, petrol, and other fuels. However, in the coming Mantra Yug (age of mantras), these will not be necessary. In Satya, Treta, and Dvapara yugas, there was no petrol or diesel. In the future, things like petrol, diesel, and kerosene will probably not be needed, and their availability will be minimal. The government will keep them in reserve for their own use, for war, and for emergencies. I have read in the scriptures that a time will come when large vehicles, cars, trucks, and buses will all be left standing on the roads. Fuel will not be available. We don't need to panic about this now; it will happen in due course. When God destroys one element, He creates another. So, this is not for us to worry about; it is God's plan. If the power from petrol and diesel goes away, another power will emerge that will be easy, beautiful, and a better method for humanity's use.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, is it necessary to bathe twice before offering Arghya (water offering) to the Sun? And what are the rules for offering Arghya? Please explain.
Answer: Look, for those who perform Surya Tarpan (offering to the Sun) or Arghya to ancestors, bathing is necessary. If you are unable to bathe at that time but have bathed in the morning, you can keep a small bottle of Ganga jal (Ganges water) with you. You can sprinkle the Ganga jal on yourself and then offer water to the Sun God from a small vessel. You can also offer it to the ancestors. The water offered to the Sun God has two shlokas (verses). The morning shloka is: 'Ehi Surya Sahasramsho Tejorashe Jagatpate, Anukampaya Mam Bhaktya Grihanarghyam Divakaram.' Offering Arghya to the Sun God increases a person's lifespan, bestows the grace and blessings of the nine planets, destroys planetary afflictions, and makes a person knowledgeable, powerful, and free from diseases. For the ancestors, the Arghya should be offered facing the south. You should take water in your cupped hands (Anjali) and release it towards the south, letting the water flow over the side of your thumb. This should be done three times for the ancestors. For the Sun God, it should be done seven times. The shloka for offering Arghya to the Sun God in the evening, at sunset, is: 'Sandhyam Kashyapamatmajam Sarva Papa Pranasanam, Grihanarghyam Maya Dattam Divakaram.' With this mantra, offer water to the Sun God seven times from your palms in the evening. For the ancestors, offer it facing south. When offering water to the ancestors, you should chant 'Om Shri Pitra Devaya Namah' three times. If you want to offer it to your father, mother, or other relatives, you should say their names and offer it three times for each.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am practicing Trisandhya and reading the Bhagavata, yet I feel that my faith in Lord Vishnu is weak. I want this faith to increase. What more can I do to receive His grace and also increase my faith?
Answer: My thought is, if you feel your devotion to God is lacking, it's very good that you are doing Trikal Sandhya. Every day before you sleep, repeatedly read the Gopa Leela from the 10th Canto (Dasham Skandha) of the Srimad Bhagavatam in its entirety. Through this, you will gain devotion towards Lord Vishnu and Krishna.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I perform Sandhya all three times and make all the offerings. I have lost my job. I don't understand what to do. Please guide me.
Answer: Look, the reason for losing your job could be a Mangal dosha (an astrological affliction related to Mars). For this, you should do one thing. During the three Sandhya times, chant the name of 'Madhav' from 108 to 216 times. At night, before sleeping, read the 12th chapter of the 11th Canto (Ekadash Skandha) every day for at least three months. This will bring you auspiciousness, and you will find an opportunity for a job.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I have a small, naive question. Is there a possibility of board exams happening in February 2027?
Answer: Board examinations will continue until 2032-34, and they may not stop even after that. Education will never stop. War is a different matter, but education will never cease. So, the exams will happen in 2027; that's not new. They will happen in '27, '26, '28, '29, '30, '31, '32, '33, '34, and possibly beyond. We should not worry about this. They will absolutely happen because the education system will continue until this civilization ends. So, don't think about it.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Should one eat garlic and onion or not while performing Trikal Sandhya, or should one give them up?
Answer: Look, garlic and onion are rajasic foods. This food makes a person agitated, meaning it creates heat in the body. If you can give it up, that is good. But after 2032, in my opinion, people will give it up completely anyway.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: How can I control my anger? How can I make myself calm? And I am unable to chant the name of Madhav continuously. How can I chant continuously? Please guide me.
Answer: Look, anger is the biggest sin. When anger remains in your body for 24 minutes, it converts into sin. Therefore, the scriptures say that if you get angry, you should end the anger within two to three minutes. If anger stays in your body, it not only destroys your body's organs but also converts into sin. In Yamapuri (the realm of the god of death), there is a description of 22 hells, and there is a hell for those who get angry. So, never be angry. Anger leads a person to hell. Therefore, do not do it. Chant the name of Madhav. Before sleeping at night, chant the name Madhav 280 times. This will bring a change. Perform Trikal Sandhya on time. Read the Bhagavata. With time, the anger will also disappear, your senses will be subdued, and by subduing your senses, you can progress towards spirituality.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Pandit ji, I am very sick. Even medicine is not helping. I also perform Sandhya. I am a college student. My studies have been ruined, and I am unable to go to college. Please guide me.
Answer: I would say this: due to your illness, if you are unable to study, you should perform Trikal Sandhya on time. Also, every day before sleeping, you should read all the shlokas (verses) of the Dashavatara (Ten Incarnations) once. After waking up in the morning, apart from Trikal Sandhya, read them one more time. And in the afternoon, chant the name 'Madhav' an additional 108 times (on top of the 108 times in Trikal Sandhya). Do this for three months and pray directly to Lord Vishnu, to Madhav, 'O Lord, protect me from this illness, which is due to my past life's karma.' Do this for three months.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: Which Mandals (regions/zones) are there in South India? I know of one, the Rameshwar Mandal. Are there any other Mandals in South India besides this?
Answer: See, according to our Bhavishya Malika scripture, 16 Mandals will become the blessed regions of Lord Kalki Mahaprabhu. In the southern direction, there is one Mandal called the Rameshwar Mandal. The Rameshwar Mandal includes Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, and Kerala. However, in the future, a Padmanabha Mandal and a Venkatesh Mandal will also be formed. These will be smaller Mandals that will work under the Rameshwaram Mandal. Yes, even now, devotees in all states are performing Trikal Sandhya. If needed, you can get their contact numbers from the number in the description below.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: It has been a year since I started doing Trisandhya, but whenever I watch one of your new videos, I get very scared and can't sleep. So my question is, why isn't the fear going away despite doing Trisandhya, chanting the name, and reading the Bhagavata Mahapurana?
Answer: Look, fear is a mental disorder that arises from attachment to the senses and material things. Those who are fond of material things feel fear. If we fulfill our desires for material things like food or work, we might not feel fear, but the attachment to the material world is the cause of fear. Due to attraction towards the material world, a person feels fear for the protection of their life, family, home, and body. The material world is an element we should not worry about. The God who gave us birth thinks about it. So, if you feel fear, I suggest you chant the shloka of the Narasimha avatar from the Dashavatara: 'Tava kara kamala vare nakham adbhuta shrngam, dalita hiranyakashipu tanu bhrngam, keshava dhrta narahari rupa jaya jagadisha hare.' Recite this verse ten times each during the morning and evening Trisandhya. In my view, all fear will disappear. Look, I propagate this, and I sleep, eat, and drink in bliss because I have no material thoughts. Whatever happens to the world, to all my property, my house, I have no concern. This is because I have no attraction to the material world. The mind is attached to material things: family, relatives, property, education. Don't think about the future. Just perform your karma (actions), and God gives the results. The results come on their own. Those who are engrossed in the material world feel fear. Those who are above the material, who live in the divine element, have no fear. You are doing Trikal Sandhya. In Trikal Sandhya, the senses are subdued. In Trikal Sandhya, all fears are broken. All worldly bonds are cut. So why the fear? Do it on time and recite the hymn to Lord Narasimha as I mentioned.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I am a 16-year-old student. I am a vegetarian, have been offering Arghya to the Sun since childhood, and I also feed roti to mother cow. You had said that Trikal Sandhya is perfected (siddha) in three years. By that calculation, mine will be perfected in 2029. Please tell me a way to perfect it sooner.
Answer: I thank you and also give you some advice. Bow down to your parents every morning and evening. Your Trikal Sandhya will be perfected. Bow to your parents and also perform Trikal Sandhya on time. Do not lie. Study according to your schedule. With the blessings of your parents, your Trikal Sandhya can be perfected.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I have been wearing a Tulsi mala for six months. At home, I prepare prasad with onion and garlic. Will I incur any sin from this? And when can I give it up completely?
Answer: That is perfectly fine. Perform Trikal Sandhya. There is no restriction on eating onion and garlic right now. When the Satya Yuga arrives, everyone will give them up anyway. For now, there is no need to stop. If your entire family eats it, you can also eat it with them and prepare it. There is no sin in that.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: I have been doing Trikal Sandhya since June 2025. You say that not a single person will be saved who doesn't do Trikal Sandhya. I do it, but when I do, while meditating on the Lord, thoughts of household chores and other things come to my mind, which breaks my concentration. I try to focus again, but will the mantra still work if I perform Trikal Sandhya this way?
Answer: It will absolutely work. The chanting of mantras purifies the glands of the human body. Continue doing Trikal Sandhya. Distractions and thoughts about social, current, family, and worldly matters come to mind due to Maya and the senses. But with time, after practicing Trikal Sandhya for some days, all this will gradually end. Then you will attain devotion to God. If you want to attain more devotion, read the 10th Canto of the Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana for five minutes before sleeping.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: How should one meditate on the Bhagavata Mahapurana? What is the method? Actually, how should one read it?
Answer: The method for the Bhagavata Mahapurana is this: you can read it anytime from 3:45 AM to 12:00 AM. You should bathe, or mentally perform a Ganga bath, and wear clean clothes to read the Srimad Bhagavata Mahapurana. If you are reading from a phone, laptop, or tablet, you can read it after mentally performing a Ganga bath. If you are reading from a physical book, you should wash your hands and feet and sprinkle Ganga jal or mentally perform a Ganga bath. The procedure is, if you are reading at home or in a temple, light an incense stick, offer a flower in Lord Vishnu's name, and after meditating on Him by chanting the mantra 'Shuklam Baradharam Vishnum Shashi Varnam Chaturbhujam...', you can read the Bhagavata. If you are not at home, but outside for some work and reading on a device like a phone, you can read it after mentally performing a Ganga bath.

Video Title: L199: परमाणु महाविनाश से मानव का रक्षा सूत्र क्या है? | Bhavishya Malika | Pt Dr Kashinath Mishra
Question: The question is from the army. If someone from the army attains martyrdom (Veer Gati) while fighting in a war, and they were practicing meditation on the Lord and Trisandhya, what will be their fate? Will they remain in the shelter of the Lord? And will everyone, even those who have become Vaishnavas, have to fight?
Answer: Look, according to the times, everyone may have to fight. The scriptures say that those who attain martyrdom in battle are reborn again after receiving the fruits of their karma. According to their karma, those who attain martyrdom for their country or their king... I cannot speak about this in detail. I will share my personal views, because this is a public question, and fighting happens in every country, on the borders. Our brave soldiers fight. I cannot discuss this question in such detail here. However, I will say this much: those who make a sacrifice for their country have God's grace and blessings. If they also perform Trikal Sandhya, they too can progress towards salvation. Thank you all.
